Name: Blue Lives Matter
Description:
Law Enforcement Today recently acquired Blue Lives Matter and we are now the largest police news outlet in the world, and one of the largest in the 2A and conservative space.

WHAT DOES THIS MEAN FOR LAW AND ORDER?
It’s simple.  We are combining all of these audiences to bring law enforcement across America the show of support that they desperately need – and deserve.
We’ve got HUGE plans for resurrecting law and order in America...

“Blessed are the peacekeepers, for they shall be called the children of God.” 

You’re obviously familiar with the term “the thin blue line”. 

In case you aren’t, it’s a term that typically refers to the idea of the police as the line which keeps society from descending into violent chaos.

The "blue" in "thin blue line" refers to the color of the uniforms of many police departments.

For years, we’ve watched that “thin blue line” seem to get thinner and thinner.

The war on cops.  The riots.  The defunding of police.

Politicians weaponizing law enforcement.  Officers being forced to choose between the Constitution and the enforcement of unconstitutional mandates.

Today, as the owner of the largest police news outlet in America, I’m going to make a pretty bold statement.

As of this morning, the thin blue line is gone.

Now before you stop reading – let me explain to you WHY it’s gone.

It’s not because of virtue signaling cries of discrimination or any other BS.

It’s because it’s been replaced… by the BIG BLUE LINE.

LOptimisme.pro a pour vocation de mettre en avant les initiatives en faveur de la Qualité de vie au travail. 

Chaque jour nous publions des articles, des infographies, des interviews de ceux qui créent l'entreprise de demain. 

Notre site s'adresse aux RH, aux responsables QVT, aux managers mais aussi à tous les collaborateurs qui souhaient connaître les bonnes pratiques en matière de bien-être en entreprise et de QVT. 

Notre volonté est de mêler les regards : des psychologues aux RH, des collaborateurs aux sociologues, nous abordons la qualité de vie au travail de 1000 façons différentes. 

Le site lOptimisme.pro a également pour mission d'être un acteur de valorisation et de partager au plus grand nombre les initiatives positives mises en place dans les entreprises. Qu'il s'agisse d'actions en faveur de la diversité, de la RSE, de la gestion des émotions, de la santé mentale... nous partageons le fruit de nos échanges avec ceux qui s'engagent en interne. 

Notre ambition reste la même depuis le démarrage du projet : amplifier le beau, mettre en valeur des personnalités inspirantes et engagées, donner des idées en matière de QVT, RSE et santé mentale : nos trois sujets de 2022. 

En parallèle, nous avons créé en 2018 un organisme de formation (qualiopi) et réalisons de nombreuses formations et sensibilisations :
- Premiers Secours en Santé mentale
- Bien-être en entreprise

Vous souhaitez travailler avec nous ? Etre partenaires d'un sujet sur le site web ou former vos équipes ? Un mail : anne.leblanc@loptimisme.com

>> Visie
Waarheidsvinding en duiding zijn essentieel voor een gezonde democratie. Onafhankelijke, diepgravende journalistiek kan niet alleen onthullen, maar ook verandering op gang brengen, en het verschil maken.

We streven naar rechtvaardigheid en transparantie in een wereld waar geld overheerst en ongelijkheid groeit. Name: History News Network
Description:
Our mission is to help put current events into historical perspective. Given how public opinion is shaped today, whipsawed emotionally on talk shows this way and that in response to the egos of the guests, the desire for ratings by the hosts and the search for profits by media companies and sponsors, historians are especially needed now. They can help remind us of the superficiality of what-happens-today-is-all-that-counts journalism.

Each week HNN features up to a dozen fresh op eds by prominent historians. Our archives, extending over the past decade, include thousands of well-researched pieces.

Even those who profess utter indifference to history are beholden to it. History is inescapable. Who we are and how we react to events depends, to a great extent, on our past. As Eugene O'Neill has a character in Long Day's Journey into Night exclaim, at a critical juncture, "The past is the present, isn't it? It's the future, too. We all try to lie out of that but life won't let us." Our motto at HNN reflects O'Neill's insight: "History News Network ... Because the past is the present, and the future, too."

Among the many duties we assume are these: To expose politicians who misrepresent history. To point out bogus analogies. To deflate beguiling myths. To remind Americans of the irony of history. To put events in context. To remind us all of the complexity of history.

Per mettere in valore il talento italiano abbiamo deciso di intervistare imprenditori italiani in vari campi: dalla moda al giornalismo, dal tech alla finanza per parlare con loro del loro percorso, delle aziende che hanno creato, e per parlare un pò d’Italia.

Ambos são especializados na área e com vasto conhecimento prático, já tendo participado de várias operações com as Forças Armadas brasileiras e estrangeiras, embarcando em navios e aeronaves dos mais variados tipos.

Neste espaço, pretendemos difundir e discutir o tema DEFESA à todos que estiverem interessados, bastando para isso, acompanharem o nosso website, que é atualizado diariamente com notícias, artigos e vídeos, trazendo o assunto de forma clara e objetiva, mas com o nosso diferencial, de realizar matérias de campo e passando as nossas experiências vivenciadas de forma independente, focando sempre nos assuntos militares com a credibilidade conquistada com trabalho sério, imparcial e responsável, visando sempre elevar as nossas instituições militares.

This clear focus not only helps us design our content, but also becomes our north star while choosing stories and covering news events. 

There is value in helping people understand the world around them a little bit better. And we believe a truly world class, wildly popular media company can be built around it.

Name: Workific
Description:
Imagine replacing workplace dread with the opposite… having a spring in your step, looking forward to seeing your colleagues and getting stuck into the day ahead! Our mission is to make this a reality for everyone.

Workific is an on-tap, global community of changemakers, here to help you build happier teams and create the right spaces and resources for all employees to thrive at work. 

We founded Workific as Diversity Network back in 2020, to champion DEI at work. This has since grown into a global community of over 20,000 senior professionals worldwide.

Workific’s articles, resources, and online events throughout the year are designed to unite company executives, team leaders and changemakers from around the world to shape the future of work and advance progress. 

Partnering with a wide array of respected leaders from top global brands, we deliver meticulously curated insights that cover every facet of inclusive culture – and help leaders to create a better experience for all employees everywhere. 

Our team spans the globe, and our community includes individuals from over 90 countries worldwide. You can rely on Workific for expert on-tap advice and support all year round, wherever you may be. We also offer inclusive work culture consultancy and training.

As an independent organization, Workific is dedicated to fostering strategic discussions  within workplace and business contexts. Our mission is to inform, educate, challenge, and inspire through content designed to transform work culture for the better. 

We illuminate groundbreaking developments in business through a dynamic blend of case studies, virtual events, panel discussions, interviews, and insights from industry leaders on the frontlines of transformation, while our regular online meetups provide an opportunity for you to connect and network with like-minded professionals.

We invite you to join us on this journey as we continue to support and champion a more inclusive work future for all.

Description:
Lähtijät on vaikuttajamedia ja Suomen kuunnelluin työelämäpodcast. 

Tuomme rohkeasti julkiseen keskusteluun työelämän vaiettuja teemoja, joihin lukeutuvat työpaikoilta lähtemisen syyt sekä johtajuuteen ja yhdenvertaisuuteen liittyvät haasteet. Tuotamme myös aiheeseen liittyvää tutkimusta ja osallistumme aktiivisesti keskusteluun monipuolisesti julkisuudessa, eri kanavissa ja medioissa.

Rakentavan ja empaattisen keskustelun myötä haluamme paitsi kohdistaa valokeilan työelämän kipukohtiin, myös tarjota työkaluja niiden korjaamiseksi. 

Lähtijät ei näin ollen pelkästään puhu hyvästä työelämästä, vaan tekee sen eteen konkreettisesti työtä joka päivä. Tavoitteena onkin rakentaa Suomeen inhimillistä, tulevaisuuskestävää ja tuottavaa työelämää Lähtijät yrityksiin kuuluvien Hear Hear Median ja Ultima Lead by Lähtijät kautta.  

Hear Hear Media tarjoaa yrityksille vaikuttavan äänen mahdollistaen näkyvyttä ja uniikin mielikuvan markkinassa. www.hearhearmedia.fi

Ultima Lead by Lähtijät puolestaan kouluttaa Suomen ainoana yrityksenä organisaatioviisaita asiantuntijoita. Tämä tiimiläistaitoihin pohjautuva valmennus tarjoaa ihmisille 360-johtajuuden välineet, joilla vastuunotto vahvistuu, yhteistyö sujuvoituu ja ajankäyttö tehostuu. www.ultimalead.fi

Name: All3DP
Description:
All3DP is the world's largest international online media platform on 3D printing and its applications for professionals and consumers. 

We are the most-read 3D printing magazine in the world, with nearly 1 million unique monthly readers. Our coverage is available in English, French, German, Spanish, and Portuguese. 

All3DP delivers unbiased guidance, trusted hands-on 3D printer reviews, and practical information on all aspects of 3D printing, including materials, software, printers, and the wide range of possibilities and applications. 

All3DP Pro is the magazine's dedicated section on additive manufacturing covering the latest engineering-grade materials, professional printers, software, 3D scanners, and how savvy companies are putting it to use every day. It is where decision-makers turn to understand and profit from the business applications of 3D printing. All3DP Pro offers a unique focus on innovation, influencers, and both established and emerging technologies.

All3DP runs Craftcloud, the leading 3D printing marketplace offering instant access to professional 3D printing services. Craftcloud connects customers with 3D printing service providers worldwide. Its industrial-grade 3D printing price comparison service, helps businesses and consumers around the world find the right prices, materials, and 3D printing services for their projects — 40% of users come from North America, 35% from Europe, 19% from Asia and other countries, and 4% from Oceania.

All3DP was founded in 2014 in Munich, Germany, and is well-financed by leading German investors HighTech-Gründerfonds, Bayern Kapital, Deutsche Balaton AG, and private business angels.

Name: Tweakers
Description:
Technologie brengt ons voortdurend mooie, maar ook ingewikkelde producten: simpel van buiten, complex van binnen. De stroom innovaties maakt het moeilijk om het overzicht te bewaren. Welk apparaat voorziet in jouw behoefte? Zijn die recensies echt? Kloppen de specificaties? Kortom: hoe maak je de juiste keuze?

Een onafhankelijke expert biedt uitkomst. Daarom is Tweakers er. Inmiddels bestaat onze community uit meer dan een half miljoen leden met één grote passie: technologie. Samen met die community is de redactie in staat om technologie kritisch te bekijken. We testen zelf onder andere laptops, smartphones, tablets, games en tv’s. We zijn nieuwsgierig naar elk detail, zodat we producten goed kunnen vergelijken en onze kennis kunnen delen, vrij toegankelijk en overal beschikbaar. Zo helpen we je om te kiezen en het maximale uit je aankoop te halen.

Tweakers is met meer dan 4 miljoen unieke bezoekers en 100 miljoen pageviews per maand de grootste elektronica- en technologiewebsite van Nederland en België. De site behoort tot de top-20 van drukst bezochte websites van het Nederlandstalige internet en is in 2009, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015 én 2016 door het Nederlandse publiek verkozen tot Beste Nieuwssite en Beste (en populairste) Vergelijkingssite. 

Wij zijn Tweakers. Wij stellen technologie op de proef.

It is primarily intended for manufacturers, Responsible Persons, formulators, prescribers, consulting firms... and more broadly for all market players in the cosmetics industry. Its readers are generally regulatory managers, quality managers, heads of companies of all sizes, control authorities, consultants, academics...

In addition to its website and daily newsletters, CosmeticOBS publishes books in e-book format on sensitive topics for the industry (nanomaterials, endocrine disruptors, allergens, eco-responsibility...).

The ebooks and the different subscription formulas are available on its website www.cosmeticobs.com.

CosmeticOBS was founded in 2008 and is edited by Laurence Wittner.

Name: newonce
Description:
Jesteśmy platformą mediową, która powstała z organicznej pasji do kultury miejskiej. Dokumentujemy i komentujemy otaczającą rzeczywistość oraz społeczną dynamikę przez pryzmat popkultury czy lifestyle'u. Wywodzimy się z renomowanych redakcji, wytwórni, festiwal, agencji kreatywnych i międzynarodowych firm. Połączyliśmy siły, żeby stworzyć w przestrzeni publicznej ośrodek nowej generacji, który ma znaczenie. 

Wierzymy, że w czasach informacyjnej hiperewolucji nadal możliwe jest łączenie przekazu merytorycznego i rozrywkowego w takim stylu, który będzie nie tylko “nośny”, ale również ważny dla odbiorców. Wyrośliśmy z oddolnych inicjatyw, dlatego jesteśmy wiarygodni i stawiamy na bezpośredni przekaz. Choć nie znamy odpowiedzi na klasyczne pytanie “jak żyć?”, dzielimy się tym, czym żyjemy na co dzień; rzucając światło na zjawiska, które nas intrygują i triggerują. Szukamy “the next big things” i podważamy zastany porządek, znajdując szerokie grono pasjonatów, którzy wchodzą z nami w dialog.

Nie zamykamy się w żadnych ramach czy definicjach. Stawianie granic pomiędzy “portalem”, treściami audio i video, prasą czy moderowaniem społeczności pachnie początkiem lat dwutysięcznych, a my chcemy być dwa kroki do przodu i decydować o sobie w “czasie rzeczywistym”. 

We don't follow the rules, we create newonce 

Pobierz aplikacje newonce (Android/iOS) i bądź z nami na bieżąco.

Name: Relocating to Italy
Description:
Relocating to Italy is a UK-based consultancy dedicated to helping individuals and families achieve their dream of living in Italy. Whether you’re seeking a lifestyle change, planning retirement in the sun, or exploring opportunities for remote work in a beautiful Mediterranean setting, we’re here to make your move smooth, stress-free, and successful.

Our team of experienced advisors offers a personalised, friendly service tailored to each client’s unique situation. We specialise in three core areas: language support, immigration guidance, and property search assistance.

Relocating to a new country involves more than just packing boxes — it’s about understanding a new culture, navigating foreign bureaucracy, and finding the right home to begin your new life. That’s where we come in.

Language Help – From conversational Italian to document translation, we provide expert support to help you communicate confidently. Whether you’re booking appointments, speaking with estate agents, or integrating into the local community, we’ll help you bridge the language gap.

Immigration Advice – We guide you through the visa process step by step, whether you're applying for a work visa, elective residency, or other permits. We work with trusted legal professionals in both the UK and Italy to ensure you stay compliant and informed at every stage.

Property Search – Finding a home in Italy can be daunting, especially from abroad. We help you identify the best regions for your needs and budget, liaise with estate agents, attend viewings, and review contracts. Whether it’s a countryside villa, a seaside apartment, or a city bolthole, we help you find the perfect place to call home.

As a UK-based company, we understand the unique challenges faced by British citizens moving to Europe post-Brexit. Our services are designed with this in mind — with clear communication, cultural insight, and a practical, supportive approach.

Let us help you turn your dream of Italian living into reality.

Name: Diario Judicial
Description:
Comenzó a gestarse en septiembre de 1999 cuando, con la idea de emitir por internet un diario especializado en temas jurídicos, se consiguió el apoyo económico necesario SLI (Sociedad Latinoamericana de Inversiones - Grupo Liberman) para transformar la iniciativa en una realidad. El 1 de noviembre de 1999 nacía Diario Judicial.
El sitio enseguida encantó a los abogados y gente interesada en el quehacer jurídico.  La mezcla entre el rigor académico en lo jurídico y la frescura y rapidez informativa, unidos a títulos creativos y novedosos nos convirtieron en un medio único. En junio del año 2000 se creó formalmente la sociedad.
Durante la crisis del 2001, aumentamos geométricamente el número de lectores, ávidos por conseguir noticias y fallos sobre los amparos y el corralito financiero.
En el año 2003 ganamos el premio Mate.ar de plata en el rubro “Medios de comunicación (pymes)” compartiendo el primer lugar con La Nación que ganó el mismo premio en el área grandes empresas.
En el año 2004 surgió la idea de especializarnos en brindar capacitación profesional a distancia para abogados y contadores. 
En estos años hemos crecido en calidad y cantidad de cursos y en número de profesores y alumnos. La actividad académica se transformó en el pilar económico de Diario Judicial.
Las actividades que se realizan en Diario Judicial.com SA se desarrollan en dos sedes. El equipo periodístico trabaja desde la sala de periodistas ubicada en el Palacio de Justicia. El resto de las actividades (sectores administrativo, académico, comercial, dirección y coordinación periodística; y la totalidad de los procesos relacionados con la capacitación a distancia) se llevan a cabo en las instalaciones que la organización posee en el barrio de Colegiales de la Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires. El sector de educación a distancia está certificado en sistema de gestión de calidad ISO 9001:2000 desde el año 2007, Certificado Nº 5309-2007-AQ-ARG-OAA
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Capital Federal

Name: CIBERSEGURIDAD LATAM
Description:
En CiberSeguridad Latam entendemos que es imprescindible tomar conciencia sobre uno de los principales temas de la agenda internacional de hoy y de la próxima década: la seguridad informática. Ciberataques, ciberterrorismo, ciberguerra son términos que se escuchan y leen cada vez con mayor frecuencia y todos, dirigentes y la sociedad en general, debemos incorporarlos para tomar las mejores decisiones en nuestras respectivas actividades. Gobiernos, organismos nacionales e internacionales, ONGs y corporaciones de todos los ámbitos progresivamente van sofisticando sus estrategias para hacer frente a un enemigo invisible pero implacable, que está en constante mutación: los ciberdelincuentes.

En un mundo crecientemente informatizado, las amenazas que plantea el ciberdelito son permanentes y nos acosan de manera incesante. En cualquier ámbito, ya sea político, social o económico, la magnitud de las consecuencias que el ciberdelito puede generar supera lo que podemos imaginarnos.

En muchos medios encontramos referencias a la temática, pero generalmente en lenguaje demasiado técnico, orientado a un público específico y dominador de la terminología. Por eso CiberSeguridad Latam es un espacio para analizar, informar, debatir y encontrar respuestas sobre un tema que ya acapara la atención del mundo entero, pero en un lenguaje sencillo y accesible, orientado al público en general que poco a poco va tomando conciencia sobre los peligros que el ciberdelito plantea para su vida diaria. También, es un punto de encuentro entre los actores de nuestra sociedad: dirigentes políticos, empresarios, medios de comunicación y público en general, entre otros, encontrarán en este espacio información relevante para nutrirse y contribuir, desde sus respectivos ámbitos, a la lucha contra la ciberdelincuencia en todas sus expresiones.
Location: San Nicolás, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Description:
Review of Optometric Business is an online publication designed to provide the optometrist with a tool set to manage and grow the practice as a business.

Just as the profession of optometry is changing, so is the field of journalism. No longer are magazines agents of top-down information. They are a forum for exchanging knowledge, an ongoing conversation between writers, editors and readers. Today, everyone is a content provider.

For this very reason, we are building Review of Optometric Business as an interactive journal. With each article, we ask for your feedback. We welcome your ideas, in written form, in photographs, in videos and in still-emerging technology formats. As you share your insights and strategies with other readers, our collective knowledge base grows.

Your optometric business can — and should — be planned, grown and managed according to sound and proven business principles. Review of Optometric Business in your resource to help you to make growth happen.

Arena Digitale è concepita per essere un incubatore di idee e proposte che favoriscono la crescita di una nuova cultura civica basata sulla trasformazione digitale. Autorevoli accademici, esperti, esponenti del mondo dell'impresa, delle Istituzioni e delle associazioni contribuiranno a rendere Arena Digitale una preziosa bussola che aiuterà i cittadini a capire e a orientarsi nel mondo che ci circonda. 

Il nuovo portale ha spunti e idee e saprà fornire una visione prospettica degli attuali fenomeni complessi nel quale il cittadino è coinvolto, contribuendo anche alla formazione di un’opinione critica per quanto riguarda i principali eventi nazionali ed internazionali.

Il portale si collocherà al centro della trasformazione digitale proponendo contenuti che spaziano dalla blockchain ai pagamenti digitali, dalle cripto valute all’intelligenza artificiale, dalla cyber security all’innovazione tecnologica, dalle fintech agli over the top, dalle tecnologie abilitanti agli aspetti normativi e regolamentari assicurando una visione critica d’insieme dei fenomeni attuali.

Arena Digitale è un portale ricco di informazioni, notizie ed iniziative che guidano il cittadino attraverso la trasformazione digitale e che lo aiutano a viverla come un'opportunità.

Name: DonanımHaber
Description:
Türkiye’nin en eski teknoloji şirketlerinden biri olan DonanımHaber 1999 yılından bu yana teknoloji yayıncılığı, 2001 yılından bu yana da sosyal ağ alanlarında Türkiye’nin yol gösterici girişimlerinden olmuş, geçmişten gelen tecrübeyi bugün modern teknolojileri ile harmanlayarak dünya standartlarında ARGE çalışmaları ve teknoloji projeleri yürütmektedir.



Neler Yapıyoruz?

➤ DonanımHaber Türkiye’nin en çok ziyaret edilen sosyal ağlarından biri ve her geçen gün büyümeye devam ediyoruz.

➤ Resmi ARGE Merkezi statüsünde ve Türkiye’nin ARGE yatırımına yapay zeka, makine öğrenmesi, derin öğrenme gibi teknolojileri kendi imkanları ile geliştirerek katkı sağlıyoruz.

➤ Türkiye’nin enformatik öncelikli olarak seçilmiş projelerini hayata geçirdik ve yeni projeleri geliştirip kullanıma sunuyoruz.

➤ Türkiye’de ilk sayılabilecek projelerden olan, forumdaki moderasyon işlemini makine öğrenimi ve yapay zeka algoritmalarına bırakacak, insan kararlarından daha tutarlı robotlar geliştiriyoruz.

➤ En yeni yazılım teknolojilerini ve trendlerini yakından takip edip, kullanıyoruz.

➤ Yetişmiş insan kaynağını önemsiyoruz ve çalışanlarımıza yeni teknolojileri kullanmak için gerekli fırsatları yaratmaya özen gösteriyoruz.



Hangi teknolojilere hakimiz? Neler kullanıyoruz?

.NET Core FW altında hamurunu kodladığımız yeni projelerimizi, Docker ile fırına verdikten sonra container'lara yükleyip Türkiye’de barındırılan sanallaştırılmış yapıdaki kendi sunucularımızda koşturuyoruz.

Objelerimizi cachelemek istediğimizde ise Redis ile aşk yaşıyoruz.

RDBMS tarafında hâlâ Microsoft MSSQL dipte uyurken, üstünü Mongodb, Cassandra ve Redis ile örtüyoruz.

Kuyruklamasöz konusu olduğunda ise "seni seçtim RabbitMQ!", yetmediği yerde süperman Redis'i de çağırırız.

Websocket gerektiğinde Nodejs'i bu pakete dahil ediyoruz.

Aramalarda ise hem SQL Fulltext hem de Elastic Search'un bize bahşettiği nimetlerden faydalanıyoruz.

Yüksek hacimli trafiği döndürmek ve static cacheleme söz konusu olduğuda nginx'i masaya vuruyoruz/yatırıyoruz/çıkarıyoruz.

Makine öğrenmesi dendiğinde Python'a yuvasından çıkması için flüt üflüyoruz, yapay sinir ağlarında ise Tensorflow diyoruz. Hem CPU yoksa GPU yesinler diyebiliyor bize Tensorcuğumuz.

Mobil uygulama projelerimizde Native bir kodlama (Java, Objective-C, Swift) tercih ediyor, bazı özel projeler için hibrit framework’ler üzerinde çalışmalar yürütüyoruz.

Single Appilication Pages içinse Angular kullanıyoruz.

Name: Motivation.se
Description:
Verkligheten för ledare idag är mer komplex och föränderlig än någonsin tidigare. Vi lever i en global värld med en snabb teknisk utveckling och en ökad konkurrens. Det blir allt viktigare att ha ett varumärke som attraherar kunder, samarbetspartners såväl som duktiga medarbetare. Den nya generationen medarbetare har andra värderingar och de efterfrågar sin tids ledarskap. Det finns en medvetenhet hos företag och organisationer om ett ökat samhällsansvar. Det förväntas mer av och ställs större krav på oss som ledare. Vi behöver hela tiden hämta ny kunskap och hålla oss uppdaterade om utvecklingen. Och det är där Motivation.se kommer in.

Vi är en källa till kunskap för dig som har ambition och driv. Du vill, precis som vi på Motivation.se, vara med och göra skillnad. Vi samlar kunskap, forskning och strömningar inom ledarskap, motivation och goda prestationer på en lättillgänglig plats. Allt för att du ska kunna fortsätta utvecklas, hålla dig uppdaterad och samtidigt hinna med din dagliga verksamhet. Kunskap, inspiration och värde för andra är nyckelord för oss.

Genom att bli medlem kan du skräddarsy Motivation.se efter dina intresseområden. När du loggar in får du tillgång till just det du vill läsa om och ta del av. Du får även ett nyhetsbrev där du, utifrån din valda profil, effektivt erhåller relevant kunskap i koncentrerad och konkret form en gång i veckan. Vi har även ett betalmedlemskap som vi kallar Guldmedlemskap för att ge ännu större värde till dig som läsare.

Name: The News Movement
Description:
Our purpose is to provide Gen Z and beyond with information they trust - on the platforms where they live their lives. We are pioneering a new system of content creation and storytelling for the good of journalism, media partners, brands and the next generation of citizens and consumers. We believe in the power of storytelling to inspire and engage audiences, and in turn drive change and progress.

United in the shared approach to fight misinformation and reimagine the way news and information through engaging storytelling techniques, we’ve built an approach that serves audiences high-impact material in unique ways. Our network of brands include:

The News Movement: Our Gen Z focused news brand that combines journalistic rigor with engaging storytelling techniques, covering a range of topics that matter to our audiences. We provide them with approachable journalism to help them understand and navigate the world around them. 

The Recount: Delivering informed short-form video journalism at the intersection of power, change and post-linear distribution. The Recount aims to cut through the noise with a fresh approach to news that explains what is happening and holds those in power to account.

Capsule: A lifestyle brand documenting fashion, trends, and pop culture. Via the newsletter and Instagram page, we share recommendations of things to read, watch, and listen to, and have fun hearing our culture oracles make predictions about future trends. 

The Collective: Our in-house content studio and creative agency. Moving at the speed of news, we apply journalistic research techniques and our deep understanding of the biggest issues facing the world today to best-in-class creative thinking to help brands win online and in the real world.

Want to tap into Gen Z? We partner with brands and agencies who share our mission: to inform and empower young people. Get in touch to learn how we can work together, from sponsored and branded content to strategy and planning to events.

Our morning update features an edit of the day's key issues - a quick conversational scan to help you prepare for any elevator ride - as well as our latest views on making careers, work and business better for women. 

We're an independent publication first launched by Private Media in 2012 and acquired by its founding editor Angela Priestley in 2016. Our business survives off advertising, sponsors, and by helping organisations with content strategy and marketing, especially those looking to engage women.

After publishing more than 1000 newsletters, 7000 stories and managing dozens of events, we intimately understand the needs and desires of career-minded, time-poor women.

Indeed, we are such women ourselves! 

We're busy and sleep deprived but seriously passionate about what we do. We also all work flexibly, managing priorities ranging from kids, to travel, to writing books and building businesses.

Description:
VISION:

The Vision of the Ghanaian American Journal is simply to tell a culturally and socially captivating story as it pertains to the African or Ghanaian experience in America. 

MISSION:
GAJ would provide platforms for cutting-edge discussions with key stakeholders on contemporary topics of interest to our audience. 

Fred Kojo Kyeremeh, Founder/Editor
Is the founder and editor of the Ghanaian American Journal. He is an HR practitioner, Entrepreneur, and a 20-year veteran of the Army National Guard who served two tours of duty in Iraq and Kuwait. He was born and raised in Ghana and is a proud Alumni of Opoku Ware School, in Kumasi and Central Connecticut State University where he caught the bug for literature and current affairs. 

Fred founded GAJ to give Ghanaians and Africans in general, a platform to document and share their experiences, achievements, and vicissitudes of life in America. 

Fred is a former member of the University of Connecticut Veterans Advisory Board and serves on the Board of the Manchester Land Trust.

Fred has received many awards including the National Defense Service Medal, Iraq Campaign Medal, Army Commendation Medal, Connecticut Wartime Veterans Service Medal, CIRC Immigrant Award, and Citation from the Connecticut General Assembly.

Fred lives in Avon, Connecticut with his wife and three children. He enjoys reading, writing, cycling, running, and travelling.

Name: The New Humanitarian
Description:
The New Humanitarian was founded by the United Nations in 1995, in the wake of the Rwandan genocide, out of the conviction that objective on-the-ground reporting of humanitarian crises could help mitigate or even prevent future disasters of that magnitude.

Almost twenty years later, we became an independent non-profit news organisation, allowing us to cast a more critical eye over the multi-billion-dollar emergency aid industry and draw attention to its failures at a time of unprecedented humanitarian need. As digital disinformation went global, and mainstream media retreated from many international crisis zones, our field-based, high-quality journalism filled even more of a gap. Today, we are one of only a handful of newsrooms world-wide specialized in covering crises and disasters – and in holding the aid industry accountable.  

In 2019, we changed our name to The New Humanitarian to signal our move from UN project to independent newsroom and our role chronicling the changing nature of – and response to – humanitarian crises.

Throughout our journey, we have remained true to our mission to inform crisis prevention and response by amplifying the voices of those most affected; shining a light on forgotten crises; and resisting superficial, sensational narratives about the crises of our time.

Many personalities support Futura: Axel Kahn, Claudie Haignere, Yann Arthus-Bertrand, Isabelle Autissier, Etienne Klein, Jean-Pierre Luminet, Joel De Rosnay, Jean-Louis Etienne, Yves Coppens ... We are proud that they are always by our side, 17 years later. But, well beyond these prestigious supports, we are happy to be read by more and more professionals and enlightened amateurs. You too, with Futura, explore the world.

Name: Ars Technica
Description:
Ars Technica was founded in 1998 when Founder & Editor-in-Chief Ken Fisher announced his plans for starting a publication devoted to technology that would cater to what he called "alpha geeks": technologists and IT professionals. Ken's vision was to build a publication with a simple editorial mission: be "technically savvy, up-to-date, and more fun" than what was currently popular in the space. In the ensuing years, with formidable contributions by a unique editorial staff, Ars Technica became a trusted source for technology news, tech policy analysis, breakdowns of the latest scientific advancements, gadget reviews, software, hardware, and nearly everything else found in between layers of silicon.

Ars Technica was founded in Cambridge, Massachusetts. Amongst those joining Ars Technica in its infancy was Jon Stokes, co-founder and renowned CPU Editor for Ars Technica's first 12 years (Jon served also as Deputy Editor from 2008-2011). Eric Bangeman, co-founder and Managing Editor, joined the site during its earliest years and remains in the thick of the Ars Technica newsroom.

Acquired in 2008 by Advance, the parent company of Conde Nast, Ars Technica has offices in Boston, New York, Chicago, and San Francisco. Today, Ars Technica operates as Conde Nast's only 100% digitally native editorial publication.

Con la llegada de la pandemia se aceleraron los planes de regionalización abriendo oficinas en 2020 en Perú, 2021 Estados Unidos y 2022 Irlanda.

Name: Startupeable
Description:
The intersection of entrepreneurship and technology is a historical opportunity to solve Latin America's most pressing problems like healthcare and education, but to solve them we need a more diverse base of founders.

Unfortunately, Latinos' lack of "pedigree" (e.g. MBA, Big Four, finance, etc.) considerably reduces their access to knowledge, advisors, and investors. Yes, playbooks for building startups already exist in English, but language and context remain barriers for them.

To eliminate those barriers, we launched Startupeable, a website in Spanish with educational resources to start, scale, and raise Venture Capital for Startups in Latin America.

Our mission is to democratize access to knowledge, region-specific advice, and capital for Latin American entrepreneurs.

How? In 4 steps:
1. *Glossary*: Learn the startup ecosystem vocabulary and slang.
2. *Blog:* In collaboration with entrepreneurs and startup executives, we create guides, tools, and stories.
3. *Podcast:* Discover how the best startups in LatAm were built – directly from its founders and investors.
4. *Directory:* Seeks +200 active startup investors in Latin America.

Name: ITWeb
Description:
ITWeb is South Africa’s leading technology-focused publisher, with media products and services that span online, print and events.

ITWeb Online is a vital resource for South African ICT decision-makers, ITWeb delivers news, views and information through diverse content platforms, including online, e-newsletters, social media and events. It is a trusted voice in South African business IT sector and the first port of call for an audience that ranges from entry-level tech professionals to CIOs and CEOs.

ITWeb's Brainstorm magazine is South Africa's most influential business IT monthly, reaching 12 000 executives and decision-makers with its in-depth, issue-driven, "big-picture" stories in business technology.

The ITWeb Events division delivers conferences such as BI Summit and IT Security Summit that have become definitive annual think tanks for industry experts and practitioners.

Description:

Name: Le Monde Informatique
Description: Elu “Meilleur site professionnel” par le Palmarès de la Presse Professionnelle en 2011, en 2013, Le Monde Informatique reçoit en mars 2012, l’Etoile de l’OJD pour la plus forte progression d’audience durant quatre années d’affilée. Name: Gulf Business
Description:
Gulf Business is the preferred choice for decision makers, business leaders, innovators and high-ranking officials in the GCC region and globally. As the region's first and leading business magazine, Gulf Business offers incisive reports, landmark interviews and in-depth analysis. 

The brand also has a strong digital presence. Gulf Business' website is updated with all the latest news and views from the GCC covering a wide spectrum of sectors, from energy to real estate and banking to technology.

Name: The Organized Crime and Corruption Reporting Project
Description:
The Organized Crime and Corruption Reporting Project (OCCRP) is a nonprofit investigative news reporting platform for independent media outlets around the world, publishing more than 100 investigations a year. By developing and equipping a global network of investigative journalists and publishing their stories, OCCRP exposes crime and corruption so the public can hold power to account.

OCCRP was founded in 2006 by veteran investigative journalists Paul Radu and Drew Sullivan after they partnered with a number of media outlets in several countries to pursue an investigation. 

Our follow-the-money journalism is cross-border, collaborative, and networked. In the face of rising costs and growing threats to independent media, OCCRP’s model includes providing a global network of member centers — mostly nonprofit, independent media outlets — with a range of critical resources and tools and allows those covering sensitive topics to work in teams with trusted editors. We also work with more than 40 local, national, and international publishing partners a year reaching millions of readers.

We built OCCRP Aleph, an investigative data platform that gives journalists the ability to search and cross-reference more than a billion records to trace criminal connections and patterns and efficiently collaborate across borders. 

By arming citizens and civil society with information to meaningfully press for justice and change, we envision a world where democracy is strengthened as a result of a more informed citizenry, increased accountability, and sharply higher costs for criminal activity. 

Sign up for our newsletter to keep up with the latest in global crime and corruption. 
Subscribe here: bit.ly/2Zd0SI1


To join the fight, become an OCCRP Accomplice and support our work. Donate here: bit.ly/32ERLRD

Name: Nurse24.it
Description:
Libertà d'informazione infermieristica. Educare e informare i cittadini e i professionisti della sanità. Consigli, notizie, storie, tecnologie, lavoro e studenti.

Il Nursereporter è l'infermiere che attraverso la comunicazione e l'informazione vuole diventare il tramite tra il mondo scientifico e il paziente-utente finale. Spesso il divario di conoscenze e il tecnicismo nel discernere creano una barriera tra chi deve assistere e chi è assistito.

L'Infermiere di nuova generazione, a nostro avviso, oltre a quanto stabilito dal profilo professionale e dal codice deontologico, deve essere attento a quello che è il mondo dei media e dei social-network di oggi: l'avvento del Web 2.0 e presto del Web 3.0 ha cambiato la società moderna, che è sempre più esigente e preparata.

Il paziente-utente, il familiare e il care-giver sono ancor più esigenti di un tempo e pretendono educazione, formazione e informazione.

La mission di Nurse24.it è proprio questa, ovvero quella di offrire là dove possibile un supporto in più alla conoscenza.

Il Nursereporter deve essere colui che è vicino all'utente finale e ai colleghi delle professioni sanitarie, nel tentativo di abbattere i muri dell'handicap comunicativo attraverso un feed-back continuo.

Name: A Sustainable World
Description:
A Sustainable World is an online media company dedicated to building a sustainable future. We strive to be a positive catalyst for sustainable societal change. We promote sustainability through education and partnerships programs.

What do we mean by a Sustainable World? 
Sustainability requires humans to learn to live within our means. Major factors, such as biosphere robustness, resource stock, food supply, and environmental quality must remain in balance, on a global scale.

Sustainability is the ability to exist and develop without depleting natural resources for the future.  A development that meets the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs.

Specialities
Sustainability, GreenBusiness, EcoFriendly, EnvironmentalImpact, ClimateChange, GreenEnergy, RenewableEnergy, NetZero, ZeroWaste, CorporateSustainability, SustainableDevelopment, ReCycling, UpCycling, Biodiversity, Marketing, Strategy, BusinessStrategy, AI

Name: AllThingsD / D: All Things Digital
Description:
AllThingsD.com is a Web site devoted to news, analysis and opinion on technology, the Internet and media. But it is different from other sites in this space. It is a fusion of different media styles, different topics, different formats and different sources.

Because the site is wholly owned by Dow Jones, publisher of The Wall Street Journal, we aim to adhere to the journalistic standards of the best of the mainstream media. But, because it is run autonomously as a small online startup, we aim to exhibit the fresh thinking and nimbleness of the best of the new media. We want to be first, and sassy, but also well sourced and accurate. We will offer lots of opinion and analysis, but plenty of fact as well.

Our flagship conference (and the source of our name) is D: All Things Digital, held every year in late May/early June. 2013 will mark the 11th annual D conference, which you can read about here: http://allthingsd.com/conferences/d/d11/about/

In addition, we host separate conferences that focus more narrowly on a specific type of the technology, the most recent of which were D: Dive Into Media, hosted in February 2013, and D: Dive Into Mobile, hosted in April 2013. 

You can read about all of our events, and see stories and video about conferences past, at http://allthingsd.com/category/conferences/

Name: CNC Media
Description:
CNC Media è una community giornalistica italiana con 2 milioni di lettori, dedicata a sensibilizzare e informare le nuove generazioni su tematiche di formazione, sostenibilità e di innovazione. La sua icona distintiva è una papera gialla, ispirata alle installazioni artistiche di Florentijn Hofman, simbolo di inclusione nel dibattito pubblico.

La missione di CNC Media è creare un dialogo tra le nuove generazioni e le aziende, attraverso la produzione e diffusione di contenuti multimediali e social, come video, caroselli e podcast. Le attività di CNC includono anche eventi come il "Tour della sostenibilità", che racconta l'Agenda ONU 2030 attraverso un viaggio in varie città italiane, coinvolgendo migliaia di partecipanti e ottenendo milioni di impression.

CNC Media è stata riconosciuta da Forbes Italia nella categoria Media per il suo impatto e la sua capacità di connettere i giovani con importanti tematiche globali, rendendola una delle più grandi community virtuali d’informazione giovanile in Italia.

Name: ReadWrite
Description:
The IoT revolution has captured the hearts and imaginations of millions of people from across the globe. Our goal  is to bring you the latest news, analysis, and conversation on IoT and the Connected World. Stay on top of it! Visit our website to read our most recent article. 
  
ReadWrite is a place where builders, creators, developers, and dreamers can explore and stay in the know about all things IoT. Every day there are stories of amazing technologies being created and advancements in connectivity as our world transitions towards a better and brighter future.

If you're ready to take a dive into the great depths of technology in today's world, read our most recent article by visiting our website: https://readwrite.com/.

Or, if you want to connect with other IoT experts and enthusiasts, join the ReadWrite LinkedIn Group and get the conversation started!

ReadWrite was founded on April 20, 2003 by Richard MacManus as ReadWriteWeb. Now known as ReadWrite, it engages an audience of builders, creators, developers, and dreamers who are joining its mission to map the programmable world.

Name: The Hill
Description:
The Hill is the premier source for policy and political coverage, reporting on every aspect of the business of Washington and the campaign trail.

The Hill is known among those who influence policy as a "must read" in print and online.  It signals the important issues of the moment.  In an environment filled with political agendas, The Hill stands alone in delivering solid, non-partisan and objective reporting on the business of Washington, covering the inner-workings of Congress, as well as the nexus between politics and business.  

The Hill serves to connect the players, define the issues and influence the way Washington's decision makers view the debate.

Name: ThinkGeoEnergy

ThinkGeoEnergy is the leading news & research platform for the global geothermal energy sector.

We provide unrivalled daily news updates from across the globe, helping to facilitate the invaluable progression of the geothermal energy sector. With a plethora of market and company insight, thought-provoking interviews, and in-depth and up to date industry research and data, we connect the dots of our sector.

Name: My Little Paris
Description:

My Little Paris is now present in 13 countries at the international (Europe and Japon), with offices in Paris, Berlin and Tokyo.

A Parisian newsletter at first, created in 2008, My Little Paris has grown thanks to word of mouth, and evolved into thematic media (My Little Kids, My Little Travel, Mina, Greenletter, Tapage, Merci Alfred, etc.).

Name: Esports Insider
Description:
Based in London and founded in the summer of 2016, Esports Insider is a business to business events and media company. ESI's core service offering is as follows: 

– EsportsInsider.com – The leading esports industry publication worldwide. We feature the latest news stories alongside opinion pieces, and interviews with those making waves in esports business.

– ESI Events – We are world leaders in esports business events, having run them since 2017 them in London, NYC, Los Angeles, Singapore and elsewhere.

– ESI Media – We can assist with a comprehensive, multimedia push with a view to enhancing awareness of your brand, product, event and/or service offering to the broader industry across ESI channels via editorial, podcast, video, newsletter, print and directory.

– ESI Connect – Our agency arm. This service is split across Brokerage, Consultancy, & Campaign Activation. In short, we bring together esports rights holders and suppliers, brands, and investors, on a global scale.

Drop us a line at info@esportsinsider.com

Name: Informazione Fiscale
Description:
Informazione Fiscale è una società di formazione, editoriale locale e multimediale, editrice della testata giornalistica omonima, iscritta presso il registro della carta stampata tenuto dal Tribunale di Velletri al numero 14/2018. La società è iscritta al Registro degli Operatori della Comunicazione (ROC) tenuto presso il Ministero dello Sviluppo Economico (MISE) al numero 31534/2018.

Dal punto di vista editoriale ci poniamo un obiettivo ambizioso ed impegnativo: fornire quotidianamente ai nostri lettori un’informazione di qualità, puntuale e completa, su tutto ciò che riguarda il mondo del Fisco, delle imposte e delle tasse, degli adempimenti fiscali, del lavoro e dell'impresa.

Vogliamo fornire un’informazione semplice ed accessibile a tutti, che consenta di comprendere senza particolari patemi la cervellotica normativa italiana sul mondo del fisco e del lavoro. Per farlo abbiamo creato un gruppo di professionisti del settore: commercialisti, consulenti del lavoro, tributaristi, revisori, avvocati, giornalisti e studiosi del diritto tributario in genere che quotidianamente forniscono il proprio contributo.

Non è facile fare informazione fiscale in Italia; non è facile perché la normativa di riferimento si caratterizza per essere ampia e con un’evoluzione schizofrenica. Tuttavia noi ci proveremo: informazione fiscale aperta al contributo di tutti i lettori che vorranno partecipare attivamente con proposte, discussioni e critiche.

Dal 2017 svolgiamo attività di formazione attraverso la collaborazione con importanti realtà italiane già affermate nel settore.

Name: Les Pros de la Petite Enfance
Description:
« Les pros de la Petite Enfance » a été créé par Catherine Lelièvre (Catherine Lelièvre Conseil) qui fut pendant près de 20 ans directrice de la rédaction de Parents, off et online, mais aussi d’Infobébés, Infocrèche, Infocrèche pro et Leslie Sawicka, fondatrice et présidente de Mayane Groupe (Parole de Mamans, Parole de sages-femmes, Parole de pédiatres).

L’idée : s’adresser à l’ensemble des professionnels de la petite enfance, quels qu’ils soient, assistantes maternelles, pros exerçant en crèche, ou auxiliaires parentales gardant des enfants au domicile de leurs parents. Un media en ligne rien que pour eux ? Il n’existait pas, il fallait l’inventer pour :

• Répondre à leurs besoins d’information fiable, précise, experte. Ce site s’appuie sur les compétences de journalistes spécialisés
• Favoriser les contacts entre pros pour rompre leur isolement
• Participer à cet effort de décloisonnement des métiers de la petite enfance, engagé depuis  quelques années
• Valoriser les professionnels de la petite enfance en faisant connaître tout ce qui se fait de formidable…  mais méconnu !
• Apporter des regards multiples sur la petite enfance et les pratiques éducatives, en dehors de toute chapelle, dans un esprit d’ouverture. C’est l’objet de nos dossiers qui abordent toutes les questions sans tabous, ni a priori. C’est aussi l’esprit de nos chroniques où chaque auteur a eu carte blanche.

Le Desk est un site d'information et d’enquête pure player, indépendant et interactif. Nous défendons un journalisme curieux, tenace et surtout libre des lobbys politiques et économiques. Emmené par des journalistes soucieux de l’éthique de leur métier et réputés pour leur solide indépendance, le site offre une nouvelle expérience journalistique, couplée d’une grande exigence graphique.

Nous souhaitons proposer l'actualité sous une forme inédite, conviviale, intelligente et interactive. Celle-ci est trop souvent privée de fond et de mémoire, soumise à une course effrénée au clic elle-même dictée par un modèle économique fondé seulement sur la publicité. Il n’y a jamais eu autant d’informations disponibles, mais nous avons toujours autant de mal à être bien informés.

C’est pourquoi nous avons fait le choix d’exister pour et par nos lecteurs.

Name: What's up Doc
Description:
What's up Doc est le 1er magazine des médecins & professionnels de santé dédié à l'installation, l'exercice médical et la e-santé !

Publié depuis 2011 par une équipe de médecins et créatifs autour de Dr Matthieu Durand, What's up Doc est un périodique papier tiré à 18 000 ex/num, sur abonnement en ligne, et édité quotidiennement en ligne sur http://www.whatsupdoc-lemag.fr/.

What's up Doc est une bombe d'énergie, en rupture totale avec la presse médicale conventionnelle. Sa ligne éditoriale concerne tous les sujets d'intérêt des jeunes médecins. Il est lu majoritairement par les 28-45 ans qui se questionnent sur leur métiers, la façon de l'exercer, leur secteur d'exercice, leur installation, leur e-reputation, leur développement professionnel, leurs moyens pour évoluer, se diversifier, digitaliser leur pratique... Bref, tous les sujets des médecins de notre époque pour leur exercice ! 

Parce que nos générations actuelles vivent une révolution de l'exercice médical, What's up Doc s'est spécialisé sur toutes les nouvelles tendances métiers de la vie professionnelle et personnelle des médecins d'aujourd'hui.

100 % pratique, 100 % d'époque, What's up Doc s'exprime sans taboo avec une liberté de ton et d'expression qui fait toute sa différence et sa reconnaissance !

Abonnez-vous et lisez le média en ligne sur http://www.whatsupdoc-lemag.fr/

Name: Usbek & Rica
Description:
Usbek & Rica est le magazine qui explore le futur. C'est un trimestriel, vendu en kiosques et librairies, qui veut comprendre le monde qui vient. 

Nous vivons à l'ère des bouleversements les plus rapides de l'histoire humaine, et nous refusons de les subir. L’interrogation qui guide nos choix de sujets et la façon de les traiter est simple : les progrès technologiques en cours sont-ils synonymes de progrès humains ? Pour nous aider à y répondre, nous faisons appel aux savants les plus libres et aux journalistes les plus curieux.

En nous appuyant sur les personnages d’Usbek et Rica (présents dans les Lettres persanes de Montesquieu, et revisités dans nos pages), nous nous efforçons, comme eux, de voir le monde d’un œil neuf. Fausse naïveté, mais vrai engagement : la seule valeur qui ne varie pas, c’est notre humanisme. Et cette volonté de proposer des idées neuves, de nous acharner à construire le monde de demain.

Name: GeekWire
Description:
GeekWire is a fast-growing, national technology news site with strong roots in the Seattle region and a large audience of loyal, tech-savvy readers around the globe, who follow the site for breaking news, expert analysis and unique insights into the technology industry.

Founded in 2011, GeekWire is uniquely positioned to cover some of the most widely followed and innovative tech companies in the world, and one of the most vibrant startup markets in the country.

Our signature events bring out thousands of people to connect, learn, recruit, do business and have fun with a broad cross-section of the tech community. Our membership program includes some of the most respected figures in the technology community: top entrepreneurs, computer scientists and business leaders.

In addition to news coverage, GeekWire provides widely-used resources for the Pacific Northwest technology community, including the GeekWork job board, GeekWire 200 startup ranking, GeekWire Seattle engineering outpost list, the Startup List database, Service Provider Directory and GeekWire Calendar. GeekWire also produces popular audio podcasts and video shows.

Name: CLIQ Digital
Description:
The CLIQ Group is a data-driven online performance marketing company that sells bundled subscription-based digital products to consumers worldwide. The Group licenses content from partners, bundles it to digital products, and sells them via performance marketing. CLIQ is expert in turning consumer interest into sales by monetising online traffic using an omnichannel approach.

The company is headquartered in Düsseldorf and has offices in Amsterdam and Paris. CLIQ Digital is listed in the Scale segment of the Frankfurt Stock Exchange (ISIN: DE000A35JS40, GSIN/WKN: A35JS4) and is a constituent of the MSCI World Micro Cap Index.

Name: RETHINK Retail
Description:
RETHINK Retail is your go-to destination for executive-led insights into the trends and innovations that are transforming the global retail landscape.

We are a global media leader in retail insights and coverage. Through our award-winning podcasts, fresh, original and thought-provoking content series, and partnerships with the world's leading retail events, we reach a growing audience of the top retail decision-makers and industry thought leaders.

Name: UrbanToronto.ca
Description: UrbanToronto is the Great Toronto-Hamilton Area's premier source for news and information on development, planning, real estate, construction and architecture. It has the largest and most active community of its kind, populated by industry members and urban aficionados, buyers, developers, suppliers and realtors. Well-known and respected, the site has garnered a reputation for solid reporting, breaking stories and early news on projects before they are widely reported. The company's data service, UrbanToronto Pro (UTPRo) tracks planning applications, construction and development in the area. UTPro currently contains data on 5,000+ projects and 8,000+ companies and growing.

Name: Electronics For You
Description: Electronics India, is an initiative by Electronics For You magazine, to accelerate growth of the Electronics System Design & Manufacturing industry by connecting different stakeholders.

Name: Dealflower
Description: Dealflower è una testata economico-finanziaria digitale e Web Tv, lanciata nel 2021, da un gruppo di giornalisti con consolidata esperienza. L'obiettivo è raccontare il mondo del business in maniera innovativa, attraverso news e interviste, eventi, contenuti social e strumenti di data journalism.

Name: Brasil Paralelo
Description:
A Brasil Paralelo é uma empresa brasileira fundada em 2016 por jovens em Porto Alegre. A nossa missão é resgatar os bons valores, ideias e sentimentos no coração de todos os brasileiros. 

Produzimos documentários, filmes, séries, trilogias, cursos e podcasts. O foco do conteúdo é informativo e relacionado ao contexto social, político e econômico brasileiro. 

Toda a produção é feita de forma independente, apartidária e isenta, cujo objetivo principal é oferecer ao público um conteúdo baseado em um grande acervo informativo analisado por dezenas de especialistas.

As produções cinematográficas tratam de política, história, filosofia, economia, educação, arte e atualidades. Trata-se de uma empresa de comunicação cujos materiais são de caráter documental e historiográfico.

Começamos em uma sala improvisada, e com apenas 5 pessoas entregamos nosso primeiro lançamento. Hoje, atingimos um novo patamar. São mais de 240 pessoas trabalhando dia e noite para entregar em tempo recorde todo o conteúdo que oferecemos. 

Desde então, conseguimos entregar mais de uma centena de filmes e programas originais, todos de graça, alcançando milhões de pessoas.

Todo o faturamento da Brasil Paralelo provém da venda de cursos e conteúdos exclusivos para assinantes. A monetização de vídeos no YouTube nunca foi uma fonte de recursos e não há qualquer financiamento de órgãos públicos ou subsídios fiscais. 

Reinvestimos o valor da assinatura dos nossos Membros em equipamentos de ponta, estúdio e equipe, aprimorando cada vez a capacidade de entrega da Brasil Paralelo.

Name: Entreprendre au Sénégal
Description:
Le Sénégal regorge d'entrepreneurs et d'innovations qui participent à l'évolution du pays. Notre mission, c'est de les mettre en lumière, de les faire connaître, d'échanger avec vous sur ceux qui œuvrent à construire le Sénégal de demain.

Si vous souhaitez apparaître sur notre média, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour nous faire part de votre projet.

Name: Torcha
Description:
Torcha è un progetto editoriale di informazione sui social media. Il nostro obiettivo è informare i giovani sull’attualità, la politica e l’economia, con contenuti pensati e creati per essere consumati dove passano il loro tempo. 
Se sei un brand, scrivici a partners@torcha.it

Name: Military Times
Description:
The trusted, independent source for news and information for the Military Times community.

Service Members and their families rely on the print edition of Military Times and MilitaryTimes.com as trusted, independent sources for news and information on the most important issues affecting their careers and personal lives.

Military Times is published by Sightline Media Group. Sightline is the latest of three company names, starting with Army Times Publishing Co. in 1940. Throughout its history, the company has a strong heritage and tradition of meeting the highest standards of independent journalism and has expanded with publications serving all branches of the U.S. military, the global defense community, the U.S. federal government, and several special interest, defense-oriented industry sectors.

Name: Scottish Construction Now

Description: Get Hired is part of LinkedIn News, which works to build the voice of the global workforce through news, ideas and community.

Name: Stuff
Description:
Stuff is the leading media organisation in New Zealand, connecting with almost 80% of Kiwis aged 15+ every month through our newspapers, magazines and websites, as well as social network Neighbourly. We offer quality news, content and experiences that help make New Zealand a better place.

Stuff also runs some of NZ’s largest and most iconic events, including Round the Bays, Central Districts Field Days and NZ House & Garden Tours.

We also offer a great workplace for our employees - from diverse and inclusive people programmes, activity-based and flexible working to international scholarship and mentoring programmes. 

For job opportunities visit our careers site: careers.stuff.co.nz.

Learn more at about.stuff.co.nz.

Name: Augustus Media
Description:
Augustus Media is an award winning Middle Eastern digital media company based in Dubai and Riyadh and has been designed to adapt and evolve to this perpetually changing media environment. 

Lovin' is a local news and entertainment channel. Lovin shares the best of its city, informing using bitesize news, viral content, and community stories. Lovin’s mantra is simple: Lovin’ Life. 

Smashi is a regional content platform, telling inspiring stories for the driven, the dreamers and the doers. 13 channels including Business, Gaming, Sports and Entertainment. Live stream full length UAE League matches for Basketball, Futsal, Handball, Volleyball.

ODEUM is the content production powerhouse of Augustus Media, specializing in high-quality video production, branded content, animation, audio production, and studio services.

Our vision is to establish and maintain a ‘New Order’ of media advertising with data and content at the heart of everything we do.  

Our mission is to be the ‘New Media’ company of choice in the Middle East by generating profitable growth through innovation and breaking the mould in marketing communications.

We have offices in Riyadh, KSA; Dubai & Abu Dhabi in the UAE, Cairo in Egypt and Doha in Qatar.

Name: 3Dnatives

Name: Acast
Description:
Acast is the global podcast platform connecting thousands of advertisers with engaged audiences across our 140,000+ podcast network.

Since 2014, we’ve built the world’s most valuable podcast marketplace, spanning more than 140,000 shows and one billion quarterly listens — monetized wherever those listens happen.

With advanced targeting, brand safety controls, and creative solutions that drive results, Acast empowers advertisers to reach listeners who trust and act on what they hear. Our marketplace brings scale, impact, and measurable ROI to podcast advertising, across any app or platform.

The company operates worldwide and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden. Acast is listed on the Nasdaq Stockholm (ACAST).

Name: MERCADO&CONSUMO
Description:
A MERCADO&CONSUMO é uma plataforma de conteúdo que traz, diariamente, as notícias mais impactantes sobre varejo, consumo, franquias, shopping center e foodservice, entre outros temas, no Brasil e no mundo. Conta, ainda, com análises aprofundadas dos maiores especialistas do setor, tendências e insights das lojas mais inovadoras e entrevistas exclusivas com grandes empresários brasileiros. Name: WAYA

Name: Latino Leaders Magazine
Description:
Latino Leaders Magazine is a dynamic publication that aims to connect leaders, inspire the future, and highlight the significant contributions of Latinos in the United States. Our mission is to promote and publish stories of Latino success, offering an alternative narrative to the mainstream media while showcasing the enduring influence and achievements of the Latino community.

For over a decade, Latino Leaders Magazine has been at the forefront of showcasing the top Latinos in various fields, including politics, sports, business, and other areas where they have made a substantial impact. Our magazine serves as a platform to amplify the voices and achievements of these individuals, providing a source of inspiration and empowerment to our readers.

At Latino Leaders Magazine, we understand the importance of representation and strive to fill the gaps in media coverage by sharing stories that often go untold. By doing so, we aim to challenge stereotypes and foster a more inclusive society where Latino excellence is acknowledged and celebrated.

Our publication reaches a diverse audience that includes individuals from all walks of life, ranging from aspiring young professionals to seasoned leaders in their respective fields. We believe in the power of storytelling to inspire and motivate individuals, and our content reflects this belief. Through in-depth interviews, profiles, and features, we provide valuable insights into the experiences, challenges, and triumphs of Latino leaders, offering guidance and mentorship to those who aspire to follow in their footsteps.

Latino Leaders Magazine publishes several main editions throughout the year, each focusing on a specific theme or sector. These editions cover a wide range of topics, including politics, entrepreneurship, education, arts and culture, and more. By exploring these diverse areas, we aim to showcase the breadth and depth of Latino talent and expertise.

Name: Portail de l'Intelligence Économique
Description:
Le Portail de l’IE est le reflet de la dynamique du secteur de l’IE en France. 
A l’interface des mondes de l’intelligence économique, de l’entreprise et de la recherche, le Portail constitue le centre français d’information sur l’intelligence économique et stratégique.

Son but : informer sur le développement de cette discipline, favoriser les échanges entre ces trois milieux, et permettre le référencement des cabinets d’IE français.

Fédérer la communauté de l’IE en permettant à chacun de s’exprimer, de s’interroger, de commenter, voilà un projet ambitieux.

L’IE devient indispensable dans un nombre croissant de secteurs, d’où la nécessité de faciliter la compréhension de nouveaux entrants dans cette discipline, de toucher un public élargi auquel il sera proposé une analyse nouvelle des thématiques qui le concernent.

Le Portail s’adresse tant au grand public souhaitant se documenter sur l’intelligence économique, qu’aux professionnels souhaitant rester connectés avec l’information de leur communauté ou du monde de l’IE.

Name: IoT - Internet of Things
Description:
The Prism Group welcomes you to our IoT.do portal: collaborate, connect, socialize, innovate. We are the largest Internet of Things focused online portal. We cover anything and everything related to the Internet of Things.

- IoT Crowdfunding: raise finance for your Internet of Things project by asking a large number of people each for a small amount of money
- Devices: a comprehensive list of Internet of Things devices, wearables, gateways that can easily be purchased online
- Discussion Forums: ask and get answers, as long as it is IoT related
- IoT Events: Conferences, Webinars, Workshops, we work hard to offer our IoT community discounts
- Jobs: Employment Opportunities for those looking to hire and staff their teams with IoT expertise
- News: Announcements and Press Releases from all those involved in the Internet of Things

IoT.do invites global technology and startup professionals to share their opinions and expertise with our community. Take part in the IoT revolution! If you would like to share your point of view, please register or contact us at info@iot.do.

Name: Cadremploi
Description:
DEVENEZ LE CADRE QUE VOUS VOULEZ ETRE 

Aujourd’hui, la majorité des cadres pensent qu’ils seraient heureux s’ils changeaient de travail, mais peu d’entre eux en changeront cette année. 
Pourtant, le marché de l’emploi des cadres ne s’est jamais aussi bien porté ! Qu’attendez-vous pour être heureux ?

Cadremploi est LE site de recrutement dédié aux cadres. Rendre visible des offres d'emploi est notre cœur de métier depuis près de 30 ans. Expert en gestion de carrière, nous avons à cœur de vous donner toutes les clés de la réussite.

Le bonheur existe, il passe par Cadremploi :
•	Postulez en un clic et retrouvez votre CV depuis votre ordinateur ou votre mobile
•	Soyez le premier à recevoir chaque jour les nouvelles offres d’emploi qui VOUS correspondent
•	Faites-vous remarquer : nombre de recruteurs privilégient l’approche directe. Déposer son CV sur Cadremploi, c’est déjà saisir une opportunité avant même la parution d’une annonce. 

On ne sait pas ce qu’il vous faut de plus… N’attendez-plus : votre carrière a besoin de vous !


 Retrouvez nous sur nos réseaux sociaux : @cadremploi 
Facebook - X - Instagram - Youtube

Cadremploi est une marque du groupe FIGARO CLASSIFIEDS.

Name: Business Magazine Albania
Description:
Business Magazine Albania (www.BusinessMag.al) constitutes an online platform which includes a periodical publication of business related articles and a website.

It started as a personal initiative in January 2015 and now it is a trusted source of specialized content in different fields of business, like Entrepreneurship, Startups, Leadership, Marketing, Strategy, Travel, Media & Pr, Innovation & Tech etc.

Business Mag Albania is an important and active actor in the Albanian Entrepreneurship Ecosystem, by giving support to Startup Initiatives in the Region while being a solid partner to many events, conferences, summits, and educative sessions taking place in Albania.

It is the first of its kind in Albania and is targeting Albanian Professionals and inspiring youngsters looking to become future entrepreneurs.

Business Magazine Albania Website operates as an online Business & Technology news outlet and generates this kind of content providing lots of inspiring success stories, expert interviews, opinions from managers, business owners, potential investors, how-to business guides, video etc.

We have been supporting Events like: Startup Weekend Tirana, Startup Grind Tirana, Design Overview in Tirana, ISN Trainings, Yunus Social Business Accelerator Program, Allweb.mk and SVOD – Sillicon Valley Open Doors, etc.

Business Magazine Albania is a project initiated from Infoalbania.al founders and its main goal is to create an online community of business professionals.

Business Magazine Albania - Sharing Knowledge and Experiences of People Inside Business.

Name: Customer Experience Magazine (CXM)
Description:

With a fast growing readership and 45,000 subscribers, CXM is also the ﬁrst stop for entrants, judges, and winners of the UK Awards International events.
 
In 2018, Lucep named CXM as one of its top 50 most inﬂuential Customer Experience websites. 

CXM also organises Customer Experience and Employee Experience Masterclass training sessions in collaboration with two of the world's foremost experts in their fields.

Make sure you don’t miss out the latest business stories and subscribe for our newsletter today!

Name: Made in Limburg
Description:

Want wij zorgen er immers voor dat nieuwsbehoeften ingevuld en nieuwsgierigheden gestild worden. Via een online medium naar keuze: e-nieuwsbrief, website of sociale media. Kortom, dankzij Made in Limburg blijven ondernemers steeds up-to-date van het regionale KMO-landschap.

www.madeinlimburg.be
www.made-in.be

Name: IBT Media
Description:
Under the umbrella of IBT Media, IBTimes launched in 2005 to connect the dots around the world to fuel your passion for news and ability to make informed decisions. IBTimes has a vision to document the unfolding story of the global economy in ways radically different from other publishers at the time. 

While there were some publishers that covered business in various geographies, it was often done through the perspective of their home countries, missing nuance and important detail to make the coverage locally relevant. With constant innovation, we are ensuring that whether by website, app, newsletter or feed, you have access to global information that moves your world.

Recognizing the incomplete narrative, IBT quickly launched foreign editions, not only to report news back to New York, but to become an indispensable tool to serve local economies and businesses as well. 

Now, under new management, IBT Media is upholding that philosophy and focused on engaging a new generation of readers with content that speaks to their interests, analysis that serve their businesses, and insight to make sense of a globally connected world.

Description:

Name: The Conversation France
Description:
The Conversation est un média en ligne d'information et d'analyse de l'actualité indépendant, qui publie des articles grand public écrits par les chercheurs et les universitaires.

Notre équipe de journalistes expérimentés travaille en collaboration avec les universités et les instituts de recherche afin de diffuser leur savoir vers le plus grand nombre.

L'accès à un journalisme d'expertise authentique et de qualité est un des piliers de la démocratie. Notre objectif est de permettre une meilleure compréhension de l'actualité et des sujets les plus complexes, dans l'espoir d'alimenter un débat public de meilleure tenue.

Nous sommes un réseau global de diffusion du savoir, avec 90 journalistes basés en Australie, en Grande Bretagne, aux États-Unis, en Afrique et en France, qui travaillent en collaboration avec plus de 33 000 experts, académiques et chercheurs. Notre ambition est de compter des journalistes sur l'ensemble de la planète.

Enfin, tous nos articles sont gratuits et peuvent être republiés gratuitement sous licence Creative Commons alors que les autres médias font payer les republications.

Name: Voov Media
Description:
Voov Media isn't just another media company. We're a results-oriented team dedicated to empowering content creators navigating the ever-evolving digital landscape. Our mission is to provide video creators with the tools, resources, and expertise they need to thrive, including maximizing revenue.

We strongly believe in the power of collaboration and fostering a connected ecosystem. Our goal is to streamline the path to content monetization and exposure, enabling creators to concentrate on their passion while we amplify their reach and revenue.

What sets Voov Media apart is our unwavering commitment to our clients' success. We leverage data and insights to design effective strategies that align with video creators’ unique needs. At Voov, we stay ahead of the curve by exploring new trends and technologies within the video creator landscape.

Description:

Ses contributeurs dans les 54 Etats africains fournissent tous les jours un aperçu sur les startups locales, l’innovation et les technologies qui émergent sur le continent.

Afrique Jeune Entrepreneur souhaite ainsi contribuer à façonner l’Afrique de demain en mettant en avant la capacité des jeunes à entreprendre et à innover.

Name: Xerfi Canal
Description:
Xerfi Canal est la revue audiovisuelle en ligne sur l’économie, la stratégie et le management des entreprises

Jour après jour, en toute indépendance, Xerfi Canal décrypte les politiques économiques dans leur contexte français et international, l’impact des technologies et des innovations sur les systèmes de production, le management et les relations de travail, leurs conséquences sur les stratégies nationales et celle des entreprises.

Un think tank virtuel, générateur d’idées

Dans un monde en plein bouleversement géopolitique, technologique, sociétal et entrepreneurial, l’ambition de Xerfi Canal est de concilier exigence intellectuelle et circulation des connaissances. De rapprocher les disciplines de l’économie, du management et des sciences humaines qui influent sur l’entreprise. Xerfi Canal aborde les thèmes structurants de l’actualité, mais avec le recul, la rigueur et la hauteur de vue indispensables à la réflexion de fond.
Xerfi Canal donne la parole non seulement aux experts de Xerfi, mais aussi à des économistes, géo-politologues, chercheurs en techniques de management et sciences humaines, et leaders d’opinion.

Lancée en 2009 au sein de Xerfi, le leader français des études sectorielles, Xerfi Canal est diffusée chaque jour via une newsletter gratuite. Vous pouvez également retrouver une bibliothèque de plusieurs milliers d’émissions, disponibles gratuitement, sur XerfiCanal.com. Plusieurs dizaines de milliers de décideurs et d’experts, du privé comme du secteur public, reçoivent chaque jour la newsletter Xerfi Canal.

Name: Il Caffè Geopolitico
Description:
Il Caffè Geopolitico is an Italian no-profit body, founded in 2009. We are editors of a magazine, entirely produced online, thanks to the contribution of young professionals, experts and enthusiasts of geopolitics and international relations.
Spreading and promoting a "culture of foreign affairs" is the core of our mission; our aim is to tell and explain what happens in the world, with a style accessible and understandable to the general public.

Our mission
We know that global trends impact societies and industries, and that economic and political concerns often overcame any other issue, regardless of their long term robust implications: taking to a diverse array of relevant playmakers will help our readers understanding why and how.
Our analysis tackles the main issues of today's geopolitics through an analytic approach: here information and analysis merge and provide the readers and the experts with a broader view.
Given this premise, the main goal of our project is to address how to deal with such concerns at several levels: how citizens can be active players of international dynamic? How decision makers can cope with today issues to guarantee coherent decisions? How can businesses deal with their marketplaces abroad?

Our people
Most of our members are young people, voluntarily contributing to the mission: they are our "Under 35 Team".
For them, Il Caffè Geopolitico wants to become a landmark in the important transition between study and business world, and towards specialization.
