Name: WhoWhatWhy
Description:
What we do
WhoWhatWhy embodies a form of investigative reporting that is rigorous, relentless and scientific — we call it forensic journalism.

Forensic journalism requires skepticism towards power and credentialed expertise; a determination to unearth the facts interested parties want to keep hidden; and an unflinching commitment to follow the trail wherever it leads. We are truth seeking-not quote seeking.

We take on controversial topics others will not touch and dig deep to uncover and name the institutions and persons shaping our world. Our organization is neither partisan nor ideological and only provides accounts based on extensive research and thorough sourcing.

In addition to producing rigorous investigative reporting, we seek to further the long-term survival and betterment of the news industry as a whole.

We pair senior reporters who have decades of experience with dedicated young journalists new to the field. We facilitate the transfer of values, methods and culture as our talented and varied investigators shape an improved and adaptive form of journalism to fit our times.

Provide us your ideas
We strongly encourage our readers to join us in our mission. If you know of a news, academic or literary source that relates to one of our stories, tell us about it. If there is a story of interest that hasn’t received coverage or documented facts we are missing, let us know! Consider yourself the media watchdog for the media watchdog.

Donate to Us
We are a non-profit organization. We need readers, supporters and citizens passionate about and committed to strong investigative journalism. Please consider a donation to help us produce the next story.

S’adressant à une communauté de plus de 5 millions de personnes réparties sur trois océans et sur l'Hexagone, Outremers360 valorise un monde extrêmement complexe. Bien plus qu’un site d’information, Outremers360 est un media de décryptage de ces territoires avec son réseau de journalistes et de médias partenaires donnant la voix et la parole  un certain nombre d'expertises.

Outremers360 : Au-delà du traitement de l’actualité chaude (breaking news), se décline des sujets de fond, des grands angles et le regard averti d’experts sur tous les faits marquants de l’actualité (politique, économique, sociale, sportive, culturelle, scientifique etc.). Outremers360° favorise une analyse de tous les sujets (actualité nationale, régionale/territoriale, européenne) affectant les ultramarins dans les différents territoires des outre-mer ou dans l’Hexagone, ainsi qu’à la diaspora répartie sur l’ensemble des continents.   

Outremers360 : c'est la valorisation des histoires et cultures des territoires et a à cœur de proposer des séquences dédiées (via des documentaires, des sites web dédiés, des programmes, podcasts, radio, etc.). L'ADN de 360 est tournée vers les économies des outre-mer, les innovations et toutes les initiatives positives portées par les territoires. 


Outremers360 est un groupe média et dispose d'une expertise dans l'organisation et le suivi événementiel.


Retrouvez-nous sur notre site, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn.

Our team of experienced journalists file daily news reports from the EU capital and do in-depth investigations on topics of special interest. If you want EUobserver to look into a specific issue, please contact our editors. We protect our sources.

Name: Edições Globo Condé Nast
Description:
A Edições Globo Condé Nast S/A foi criada em 2010 a partir de uma joint-venture entre a Editora Globo e a Condé Nast Publications. As editoras formaram a parceria para publicação dos títulos internacionais da Condé Nast no Brasil, cujo capital está distribuído entre a Editora Globo (70%) e a Condé Nast (30%).

A partir da joint-venture a Edições Globo Condé Nast S/A se tornou responsável por gerir os títulos Casa Vogue e Vogue no país – que incluem, além da Vogue, os suplementos especiais Vogue Noivas, Vogue Passarelas, entre outros. 

Com a parceira outros diversos títulos do portfólio da editora ganharam versões nacionais como a revista GQ, voltada para o público masculino, lançada em abril de 2011, e Glamour lançada em abril de 2012.

Economy.bg publishes original editorial content – video interviews, features, analyses, statistical and research materials created in collaboration with managers of Bulgarian and international companies, economic analysts and experts from various business fields.

We are the biggest platform for professional football executives, coaches and practitioners in the UK and our subscribers/ followers include elite-level Chief Executives, Sporting Directors, managers, Heads of Performance, Heads of Data, Academy Managers and more.

Our website is respected within the industry has more than 150,000 unique monthly visitors; our social media channels have more than 120,000 followers and millions of impressions per month. We are a platform that is truly tapped into what goes on behind the scenes in pro football and our articles are regularly picked up by mainstream media. We have also been shortlisted for website of the year at the prestigious Sport Journalism Awards.

Guests on our monthly podcast, which has been running for four years, have included Eddie Jones, Sean Dyche, Emma Hayes, Dan Ashworth and Jamie Carragher.

Our live and virtual events attract high-calibre speakers and delegates and truly set the agenda within the industry. In 2023 we are holding our biggest event ever: a two-day conference celebrating the best of the backroom at the iconic Beetham Tower in Manchester.

TGG has a quality and highly-engaged audience of football decision-makers. In short, we get to the people that other platforms cannot reach.

Wyborcza.pl jest liderem procesu transformacji cyfrowej prasy w Polsce. Jako pierwsza wprowadziła system limitowanego dostępu do swoich treści (paywall) i ofertę prenumeraty cyfrowej. W maju 2022 roku społeczność Prenumeratorek i Prenumeratorów cyfrowego wydania „Gazety Wyborczej” liczyła 290 tys., najwięcej w Polsce.

Name: Filodiritto
Description:
Qualche anno fa scrivemmo che Filodiritto – rispetto alle case editrici giuridiche-corazzate – poteva essere equiparata ad una minuscola ma dinamica fregata in perenne ricerca di nuovi spazi da esplorare.

Confessiamo che il paragone ci piace (un atto di superbia?), ancor più oggi che abbiamo scelto di non dedicarci solo all’esplorazione del mondo del diritto, ma di aprire il campo di azione anche ad altri orizzonti, senza porci limiti, come spiega il Direttore nel primo editoriale.

La fregata in questo oceano smisurato appare insignificante ma, forse per questo, sarà ancor più spregiudicata e controcorrente, incurante di giudizi, previsioni e preconcetti di cui abbiamo fatto ampia scorta in questi anni.

Dicevamo in passato che il blasone sarebbe arrivato – sempre con riferimento ai ben noti brand che popolano il web e le librerie.

La novità è che oggi francamente non ce ne frega nulla, andiamo avanti per la nostra … in fondo la nostra missione è proprio quella di esplorare nuove forme di informazione.

Nec spe nec metu

Description:
Bienvenue sur 21st Time, votre source d'information pour tout ce qui est moderne, innovant et avant-gardiste. Nous sommes heureux de vous présenter une publication numérique qui couvre des sujets allant de la Politique, Sport, Diplomatie, Technologie, les arts, le divertissement jusqu'au style de vie, la santé et le voyage. Si vous souhaitez rester informé et à jour sur les dernières tendances, idées et perspectives, alors 21st Time est le magazine parfait pour vous.

Chez 21st Time, nous avons une équipe dédiée d'écrivains et d'éditeurs qui s'efforcent de créer le meilleur contenu possible. Notre équipe est composée de professionnels expérimentés qui ont une passion pour explorer les sujets les plus intrigants et stimulants de notre temps. Nous croyons que chaque histoire a une voix et une perspective uniques, et nous cherchons à les mettre en évidence dans chaque pièce que nous publions.

Que vous soyez intéressé par les derniers gadgets, les tendances les plus chaudes de la mode ou les destinations de voyage les plus tentantes, 21st Time a quelque chose pour tout le monde. Nous nous efforçons de fournir à nos lecteurs un contenu captivant, informatif et divertissant qui les incitera à revenir régulièrement.

Alors, si vous êtes prêt à embrasser le rythme du monde moderne et le voir d'une perspective unique, assurez-vous de consulter 21st Time. Nous vous garantissons que vous ne serez pas déçu.

Name: Contxto
Description:
Contxto.com is an engaging, authoritative digital platform focusing on the dynamic landscape of Latin American startup ecosystems. This platform gives readers access to the pulse of technological advancement, entrepreneurship, and innovation that spans from Mexico to Argentina, presenting a blend of content that both informs and invigorates.

Founded by an expert team of analysts, journalists, and tech enthusiasts, Contxto offers comprehensive and timely coverage of the most compelling events in the region. Whether it's documenting the ascendance of a burgeoning fintech in São Paulo, analyzing the impact of a new investment in a Chilean health-tech startup, or profiling an up-and-coming entrepreneur, Contxto's coverage is astute and contextual.

The aesthetic of Contxto is sleek and minimalist, reflecting the precision and pace of the tech industry. But beneath this modern facade, the platform carries a vibrant Latin American spirit that resonates with its audience and enriches its content.

Contxto's detailed databases, covering startups, accelerators, and investment funds across the region, have become a treasure trove of information for investors, entrepreneurs, and industry observers. The Contxto Live podcast extends the brand's reach, providing audiences with engaging discussions and invaluable insights into the region's tech industry.

More than a news outlet, Contxto serves as a digital hub for the future-focused community, nurturing a network of innovators, investors, and enthusiasts who are driving and responding to the rapid changes in Latin American entrepreneurship. It's a portal to a world where business, technology, and culture intersect in new and thrilling ways.

Name: youmatter.world
Description:
Créé en 2009 par Pierre-Yves Sanchis, Youmatter est un média gratuit et un organisme de formation leader en France auprès des citoyen·ne·s et collaborateur·rice·s sur les sujets de transition écologique et sociale.

 Notre objectif ? VOUS donner les clés, à vous citoyen·ne.s et collaborateur·rice·s pour agir et transformer la société ! 
Nous vous accompagnons grâce à : 
- de l’information, à la fois via notre média mais aussi en accompagnant les structures à communiquer en interne et à l’externe sur les enjeux RSE (création de contenus : vidéos, podcasts, rédaction d’articles, newsletter et veille), 
- de la formation pour accompagner les citoyen.ne.s et les collaborateur·rice·s dans leur montée en compétences,
du coaching et de l’accompagnement au changement pour activer la transformation au sein des organisations !

 Pourquoi ? Car le réchauffement climatique est bel et bien là et qu’il est urgent d’agir. Nous sommes certain·e·s d’une chose, votre compréhension des enjeux a le pouvoir de contribuer à changer la société : VOUS comptez ! #becauseYOUmatter. 

 Comment vous accompagner ? Notre équipe de plus de 10 personnes passionné·es travaille d’arrache pied, jour après jour pour vous proposer l’information et les formations qui vous rassemblent. Car c’est aussi ça Youmatter : une communauté engagée qui s’informe et se forme, voire se transforme pour avancer ensemble vers le monde durable de demain ! 

 Notre média gratuit & nos supers articles : https://www.youmatter.world 
 Inscrivez vous à la newsletter Youmatter, notre newsletter pour recevoir tous les mardis dans votre boîte mail l’essentiel pour comprendre & agir pour un monde plus durable : https://youmatter.world/fr/abonnement-newsletter/
Découvrez nos offres de formations par ici : https://youmatter.world/for-organizations/fr/formation-sensibilisation-developpement-durable-rse

Vous avez un besoin de formations ou envie de rejoindre notre équipe, écrivez nous  hello@youmatter.world !

Name: The Conversation U.S.
Description:
We publish trustworthy and informative articles written by academic experts for the general public and edited by our team of journalists.

On our website (and through distribution of our articles to thousands of news outlets worldwide), you’ll find explanatory journalism on the events, discoveries and issues that matter today. Our articles share researchers’ expertise in policy, science, health, economics, education, history, ethics and most every subject studied in colleges and universities. Some articles offer practical advice grounded in research, while others simply provide authoritative answers to questions that sparked our curiosity.

The Conversation began in Melbourne, Australia, in March 2011, created and founded by Andrew Jaspan with the support of business strategist Jack Rejtman and the University of Melbourne Vice-Chancellor Glyn Davis. Global expansion brought it to the U.S. in 2014.

The Conversation arose out of deep-seated concerns for the fading quality of our public discourse and recognition of the vital role that academic experts could play in the public arena.

Information has always been essential to democracy. It’s a societal good, like clean water. But many now find it difficult to put their trust in the media and experts who have spent years researching a topic. Instead, they listen to those who have the loudest voices. Those uninformed views are amplified by social media networks that reward those who spark outrage instead of insight or thoughtful discussion.

The Conversation U.S. seeks to be part of the solution to this problem, to raise up the voices of true experts and to make their knowledge available to everyone.

Description: Somos un medio de comunicación especializado en el sector agropecuario peruano. Difundimos noticias, reportajes, entrevistas y avances tecnológicos que visibilizan el trabajo del campo. Como revista digital, promovemos la agricultura sostenible, el desarrollo rural y la innovación en el agro. Nuestra audiencia incluye productores, profesionales, instituciones, empresas y todos los interesados en el crecimiento del sector agrario.

Name: الطاقة
Description: منصة عربية إلكترونية تهتم بشؤون الطاقة وقطاعاتها المختلفة محليًا وإقليميًا ودوليًا

Name: Thotis
Description:
Thotis, le média pour trouver sa voie. #Orientation #Actualité #VieÉtudiante

Notre objectif : aider les lycéens dans leur orientation à l'aide de témoignages et accompagner les étudiants dans leur insertion professionnelle avec des conseils de professionnels.

Notre site : https://thotismedia.com

Name: Business Insider Nederland
Description: Business Insider Nederland is based in Amsterdam.

Name: ETHospitalityWorld
Description: ETHospitalityworld.com will be the premier source of information for the hospitality industry as a whole. While we will be the ultimate source of what is happening in the industry, our strength lies in looking beyond the headlines.

Name: Cultureveille.fr
Description: Cultureveille.fr est une revue de presse sur les pratiques professionnelles et les politiques du monde de la Culture d’aujourd’hui. Le site relaye quotidiennement des articles publiés sur d’autres médias et crée également des contenus originaux.

Name: Food Innovation
Description:
O portal Food Innovation adere ao propósito do setor de alimentos e bebidas de avançar cada dia mais na descoberta e disseminação do conhecimento.
Através de seu conteúdo técnico e científico, sendo um valioso recurso para os químicos, cientistas e gestores, fornecendo informações especializadas sobre novas tecnologias, ingredientes, insumos, assuntos regulatórios, novidades da indústria e análise mercadológica do setor. Nosso principal objetivo é incentivar o desenvolvimento do setor através da promoção do conhecimento técnico e científico, em parceria com as indústrias, entidades de classe, institutos de pesquisa e centros acadêmicos, colaborando com o potencial criativo dos profissionais.

Name: Psychedelic Spotlight
Description:
The leading voice for news on the psychedelics industry covering breakthrough discoveries, policy & pop culture.

Our mission is to cover the latest stories in the emerging psychedelics industry including breakthrough discoveries, investor news and cultural reform, to develop a powerful and intuitive network for collaboration with industry leaders, researchers and investors who are transcending the way the world regards what is possible in mental health, the mind and human consciousness.

Name: The Publicist East Africa
Description:
We are a communications trade magazine dedicated to celebrating creative excellence in the Public Relations and communication industry whilst observing the highest industry standards. 

The magazine spans news, sector analysis, features, advertising media, direct digital PR and marketing communications. We pride ourselves on industry-defining insight with a strong editorial voice, backed up by reviews from industry leaders.

Name: Seekho
Description:
Seekho is built on one simple belief: Make learning fun and easy for everyone.

We’re India’s #1 app-based video edutainment platform, helping people learn real-world skills through short, expert-led videos across digital services, business, spoken english, and much more.

Founded in 2020 by IIT Kanpur alumni Rohit Choudhary, Keertay Agarwal, and Yash Banwani, we are trusted by 4M+ paid subscribers and have been Ranked No. 2 in Google Play's Top Trending App 2025 list.

We are backed by Bessemer Venture Capital, Elevation Capital, Lightspeed India, and Goodwater, and powered by a growing community that believes learning should be practical, accessible, and fun.

Name: Mundo Agro Editora
Description:
A Mundo Agro Editora oferece soluções estratégicas e comerciais, com mais de 20 anos de experiência no mercado da proteína animal.
Referência para todos os segmentos da indústria, produtores e empresas fornecedoras de maquinários, insumos e serviços.

Somos especializados em: Articular, disseminar, assessorar, posicionar, comercializar, otimizar e executar estratégias digitais, contando também com as principais entidades públicas e privadas que reúnem os diferentes players do mercado. Utilizamos diferentes ferramentas de marketing e branding voltadas para toda a indústria de processamento de alimentos, apoiando do campo ao futuro do agronegócio.

Produzindo conteúdo com credibilidade e qualidade, sendo referencia em análises de mercado e estatísticas, com foco na produção animal.
 
Acesse aqui > https://link.mundoagro.com.br/link-da-bio

Name: Tops México Los Mejores Abogados
Description: Nuestra Edición periodística reúne a la élite del gremio legal mexicano actual, sin dejar a un lado la constancia y trayectoria de las firmas que se han consolidado como las de mayor autoridad y prestigio a nivel nacional.

Name: Ancient Origins
Description:
At Ancient Origins we believe that one of the most important fields of knowledge we can pursue as human beings is our beginnings. And while some people may seem content with the story as it stands, our view is that there exists countless mysteries, scientific anomalies and surprising artifacts that have yet to be discovered and explained .

Our goal is to highlight the very latest archaeological findings, peer-reviewed academic research and evidence, as well as offering alternative viewpoints and explanations of science, archaeology, mythology, religion and history around the globe.

We’re the only Pop Archaeology site combining scientific research with out-of-the-box perspectives.

By bringing together top experts and authors, we explore lost civilizations, examine sacred writings, tour ancient places, and question mysterious happenings. Our open community is dedicated to digging into the origins of our species on planet earth, and question wherever the discoveries might take us. We seek to retell the story of our beginnings.

Name: Videndum Media Solutions
Description: Videndum Media Solutions is a Division of Videndum plc, an international group of companies serving customers in the growing content creation market. Videndum Media Solutions designs, manufactures and distributes premium branded photographic, audio and video equipment such as tripods; bags; filters; backgrounds; motion control; lights and microphones for professional and hobbyist photographers and video-makers; and content creators. Positioning Videndum Media Solutions as the leading global provider of accessories within the fast-growing digital multi-media content market, the portfolio includes the following premium brands: Audix; Avenger; Colorama; Gitzo; JOBY; Lowepro; Manfrotto; Rycote; Savage and Syrp Lab. All products are distributed in 11 markets across the world through Videndum Media Distribution, as well as many other markets through a network of qualified retail partners.

Name: Fem
Description:
Fem è una media company digitale e dal 2021 fa parte del gruppo editoriale GEDI, dove lavora in sinergia con le altre realtà della prima media company italiana per contenuti, audience, tecnologia e credibilità.  

Fem è anche un editore nato da una community. La nostra community è sempre stata e rimarrà sempre al centro: accanto a contenuti proposti dalla redazione, uno spazio speciale è riservato a spunti, osservazioni, vissuti ed esperienze condivisi dalle persone che ci seguono ogni giorno 

Raccontiamo tanti punti di vista diversi con l'obiettivo di ritrovare la gioia di cambiare idea e scoprire qualcosa di nuovo senza sentirsi giudicati. Vogliamo prenderci la responsabilità di contribuire positivamente ad aumentare la libertà di scelta delle persone per aiutarle a prendere tutte le decisioni della vita che definiscono chi siamo, attraverso risposte concrete e strumenti specifici che aumentino la consapevolezza del proprio valore e la qualità dell’informazione sul mondo che ci circonda.

Name: AGUASRESIDUALES.INFO S.L
Description: Portal web informativo  para profesionales del sector del tratamiento de agua en el que podrá obtener información de manera gratuita de todas las noticias, ofertas de trabajo, artículos, reportajes, casos de éxito, tesis, videos, etc que se generen en este sector.

Name: Gear Patrol
Description:
Founded in 2007, Gear Patrol is an award-winning print and digital publication, store and content studio based in New York City. We believe that the things we create and own, as well as the habits that surround them, play a crucial role in our global culture. Products, in short, are culture. From the Model T to the iPhone, and anything before or since, products hold the power to revolutionize the way we work, relax, communicate, travel, look, learn and more.

That’s why we’re focused on something we call Product Journalism a.k.a. #ProJo. Our mission is simple. We are a team of creators, users, and enthusiasts, hell-bent on building the definitive resource for discovering products and exploring the stories that surround them. Our goals are not limited to specific platforms or mediums. We know that making essential experiences for product lovers requires leveraging the best that digital, print and social platforms all have to offer.

Gear Patrol's Accolades Include:

Folio Awards
Best New Magazine Design of 2016 
Best Magazine Design (under 250k) of 2016

Communication Arts
Best Editorial Design 2016 Winner

Editorial Excellence 2016 Winner

Editorial & Design 2014 Finalist

OMMA Awards

Name: Erem News
Description:
Our teams of editors, reporters and contributors work on providing comprehensive coverage, for all political & economic events, sports and cultural spin in the Arab region, focusing on the Gulf region, which has become the focus of the vitality of the events of political, economic and financial center and home to many international companies and expats communities.
The site was launched in August 2013.

Name: ID l’Info Durable
Description:
Depuis 2017, ID est le média incontournable pour décrypter le durable d’aujourd’hui et de demain. Avec une offre éditoriale exigeante résolument tournée vers les solutions concrètes, nous permettons à nos lecteurs de comprendre les enjeux en matière de durabilité.

La naissance d’ID, c'est avant tout un projet qui part d'un constat : notre société attend des solutions concrètes à portée de tous, les initiatives sont nombreuses et les acteurs économiques ont saisi ces enjeux. C'est à partir de là que Valère Corréard, journaliste et entrepreneur, a réuni une équipe de journalistes et de professionnels des médias pour lancer une offre inédite en France.

Newsletters, magazines, articles, vidéos, podcasts, notre rédaction produit en continu du contenu pour comprendre et pour décrypter cet univers du durable en France et ailleurs dans le monde.

Name: Actualités Economiques - Madagascar
Description: Economic information about Madagascar and the world in its most important aspects, insights on innovations and the economy of tomorrow, and the geopolitical implications within an interdependent and systemically competitive global economy.

Name: Design Burger
Description: A platform for shared ideas, community growth and world class industrial design.

Name: Business Insider South Africa
Description: Fast, fair, fearless and fun South African business news. A 24.com publication.

Name: The Washington Times
Description: Since 1982, The Washington Times has furthered its founder's vision to provide a trusted counterweight to the media often identified as "mainstream." While presidents, prime ministers and other power brokers worldwide rely on our coverage, The Times primary audience consists of readers outside the halls of power. The Times delivers that audience facts and commentary to inform and to celebrate the American values of freedom, faith and family.

Name: YEN.com.gh
Description: YEN.com.gh is a Ghanaian online news publication. We cover local and international news, politics, business, entertainment, technology, sports news and users’ generated news content.

Name: NucNet | Independent Nuclear News
Description:
NucNet is a Brussels-based independent news agency and information network for the global nuclear industry. It is registered in Belgium as a non-governmental non-profit association (association sans but lucratif or a.s.b.l.).

NucNet operates a 24/7 service reporting nuclear-related news about the operation and construction of nuclear power stations, policies affecting the nuclear industry, nuclear safety and security, emerging nuclear technologies and the safe use of ionising radiation.

NucNet was created in 1990 with the support of the European Nuclear Society as a response to the growing need for accurate information about nuclear energy and ionising radiation. The aim was the same then as it is today: to focus on the facts behind the stories and to only publish information that has been verified by our editorial team.

Our Editorial
NucNet publishes daily, weekly and monthly newsletters.

NucNet Nuclear News Daily
Published five days a week (Mon-Fri) with daily news from the global nuclear industry.

NucNet Weekly News Review and Uranium Market Weekly
Published every Friday morning, Brussels time. It includes a brief roundup of the week’s main stories and a weekly roundup of developments in the uranium market.

Analysis, Features and Infographics
Exclusive editorial content examining the most topical issues facing the nuclear industry.

NucNet Nuclear Politics
A monthly roundup of policy stories affecting the nuclear industry.

NucNet New Build Monthly
A monthly roundup of global new-build news.

NucNet +
NucNet offers free online news, but members of NucNet + are entitled to additional services. These include daily, weekly and monthly newsletters, exclusive news and feature stories and the use of NucNet editorial for your own corporate material including websites and printed publications.

NucNet + members get free access to the NucNet editorial database, which contains more than 18,000 news articles and features from January 1991.

Name: Made in Kempen
Description:
De eerste afspraak die ondernemers, CEO’s en kaderleden iedere ochtend hebben om te kunnen meepraten over het meest recente, economisch nieuws uit de Kempen? Dat is met ‘Made in Kempen’. 

Want wij zorgen er immers voor dat nieuwsbehoeften ingevuld en nieuwsgierigheden gestild worden. Via een online medium naar keuze: e-nieuwsbrief, website of sociale media. Telkens met enkele essentiële agendapunten in het achterhoofd: optimistisch ondernemerschap, regionale relevantie en krachtige, onafhankelijke journalistiek.

Kortom, dankzij Made in Kempen blijven ondernemers steeds up-to-date van het regionale KMO-landschap.

www.madeinkempen.be
www.made-in.be

Name: DF SUD
Description: Medio de comunicación especialista en negocios.

Name: Happinez
Description:
Get to know the first glossy magazine for contemporary women who are interested in self-development and emotional learning.  With both feet on the ground, Happinez shows ways to a more meaningful, more spiritual and especially happier life. Starting with Happinez Magazine in the Netherlands in 2003, and with licenses in Germany and France, now more than a million readers have found the spirit of Happinez.

With an English issue and the launch in over more than 20 countries, our aim to spread happiness worldwide is getting wings. 

Happiness is an inside job. Since the world around is changing of fast, it has become wiser to trust our inner world. Getting to know that inner world can be a long journey, but at the same time an interesting one. Happinez inspires its readers in their journey to find inner peace. It bridges the gap between the mind and the heart, between beauty on both the inside and outside. With articles, interviews, travel reports, insights, recipes and a unique beautiful rich design the magazine is a present to yourself. It is the first magazine that brings real depth without compromising attractiveness and accessibility.

Name: La PA Digitale
Description: La PA Digitale è un progetto di informazione e formazione online dedicato al mondo dell'amministrazione digitale.

Name: embedded.com
Description:
embedded.com is the resource for everything embedded systems designers and developers need to do their jobs, from the latest products, design and coding trends and tips, source code, to practical design information, discussions, features and industry happenings. Special features include editorially selected and curated collections and archives for deeper research.

embedded.com also offers community features enabling developers to share their own content, ideas, and experiences directly with the embedded community. This is brought through moderated discussions, blogs, and video and audio content.

Name: Infection Control Today
Description: Infection Control Today addresses the most pertinent infection prevention principles and practices for healthcare professionals working in the infection control department, the operating room, the sterile processing department and the environmental services department of acute-care hospitals. Infection Control Today's comprehensive educational platform includes the print publication and its Web site, as well as the Infection Control Education institute and the ICT Conference on Professional Development. Content focuses on all aspects of the prevention and control of hospital-acquired infections (HAIs), including evidence-based protocols, industry guidelines, standards and regulations, HAI-prevention economics, clinical trends, advancements in HAI-prevention technology, news analysis and professional development issues.

Name: 經濟一週 EDigest
Description:
We educate, We analyse,  We inspire !

EDigest is a finance brand and platform for more than 40 years in Hong Kong,. We make investment, business and economic content as everyone's  food for thought. And to empower you with the business and financial understanding to pursue your lifestyle and dreams!

Name: News Tank RH management
Description:
Filiale du groupe News Tank Network, News Tank RH est un media global dédié aux acteurs des ressources humaines, de la formation et de la négociation sociale. Il fournit en temps réel des informations et données stratégiques. 100 % numérique, neutre, rapide et concis, News Tank RH mobilise une équipe de rédacteurs spécialisés, d'experts et de contributeurs. 

News Tank RH propose à la fois des dossiers de fond, des indicateurs, des interviews et des tribunes de dirigeants, des analyses, ainsi qu’un annuaire des personnes et des organisations.  

Nos services sont accessibles sur abonnement. News Tank RH fonctionne sans publicité, dans le respect d'une charte déontologique exigeante, autant de garanties de l’indépendance de l’information produite.

Name: International News Media Association (INMA)
Description:
The International News Media Association (INMA) is the world's leading provider of global best practices for news media companies looking to grow revenue, audience, and brand amid profound market change.

OUR MEMBERS:

INMA members are executives at the world's leading news media companies. INMA today has more than 16,000 members at nearly 900 media companies in 70+ countries. Members are typically c-level executives involved in leadership and executive management, advertising, audience, digital, marketing, product development, and research.

OUR VISION:

INMA aspires to be an essential resource in the multi-platform transformation of media companies that produce quality journalism and relevant content.

OUR MISSION:

INMA identifies for its members the best ideas to grow audience, revenue, and brand of news media companies through:

    Sharing of global best practices.
    Spotting of trends, commonalities, and outliers.
    Identifying new business model opportunities.
    Rewarding new ways of building brand and corporate value.

WHAT WE DELIVER:

This mission is achieved by providing members unprecedented access to thousands of ideas and professional contacts via blogs, case studies, conferences, publications, sales and marketing campaigns, and networking tools. INMA also shares its vision with cutting-edge presentations and interviews involving media industry conferences, media industry leaders, the advertising community, and private consultations.

Name: JamesSuckling.com
Description:
James Suckling is one of the world’s most powerful wine critics, and his scores are widely popularized and used among consumers, collectors and wine trade worldwide, especially in Asia. Combining over three decades of tasting experience — 200,000 wines and counting — and extensive wine knowledge, his dedicated website JamesSuckling.com gives you premium access to more than 60,000 tasting notes and wine ratings.

Founded in 2010, JamesSuckling.com is an international platform that releases succinct tasting notes and authoritative wine scores. With a global reach of five million annually, JamesSuckling.com publishes an array of enriching content, including videos, documentaries, annual tasting reports and informative articles. To encourage wine trade and consumers to drink great wines, JamesSuckling.com gathers the most prestigious and renowned wineries around the globe to organize numerous large-scale wine tours, events and master tastings in major cities in USA, Europe, China and Thailand. With two regional offices in Hong Kong and Bangkok — which are comprised of a professional team of 15 tasters, editors and marketing experts — JamesSuckling.com is one of the fastest-growing media companies in the wine business, and in 2022, the team rated more than 22000 wines were tasted and rated.

www.JamesSuckling.com
Facebook/Twitter @JamesSuckling
Instagram @james.suckling

Name: Daft.ie
Description:
Daft.ie, Ireland's No.1 property website, was founded in 1997 by brothers Eamonn and Brian Fallon. 

Today Daft.ie is part of Distilled  - Ireland's largest online publisher. Distilled includes websites such as Daft.ie, Rent.ie, Let.ie, Property.ie, Gumtree.ie, DoneDeal.ie and Adverts.ie.

Name: iProUP
Description: iProUp es un portal de noticias online de Argentina especializado en tecnología, economía digital, blockchain, criptomonedas, inteligencia artificial y start ups

Name: We Love Brussels
Description: WeLoveBrussels is an innovative communication platform serving as Brussels' premier inspiration hub since 2014. We curate the best ideas, culture & lifestyle tips, city affairs, business news and urban trends. Our publications reach a highly engaged readership and a community of city aficionados with more than 150.000 followers on social media channels.

Name: Airtime
Description:
With Airtime’s tools, you’ll look your best and make a better impression whenever you’re on video.

Camera → Show up like you mean it
Creator → Present with your presence
Stacks → Collaborate instead of screenshare
Screen Recorder → record once, replay forever

Video meetings are unavoidable.
Making an impression is optional.

Name: e-fundresearch.com
Description:
For more than 20 years, e-fundresearch.com serves thousands of professional investors as a leading B2B platform with news, research, online and offline conferences around the topics of fund selection and institutional capital allocation.

In addition to ongoing reporting from our independent editorial team and peer group analysis from our in-house research department, our Vienna-based Fin-& MediaTech team offers investors from Germany, Austria and Switzerland exclusive & customized access to the latest (multi-media) market insights from thousands of investment experts from asset management companies around the world and across a wide range of asset classes with our proprietary NewsCenter service. 

In addition, e-fundresearch.com also acts as arguably the most efficient communication platform in the entire fund industry: with just one click, registered investors are able to submit queries to asset managers, request documents, as well as arrange online and offline appointments. In summary: Digital matchmaking at it's best.

Curious? We look looking forward to having an active dialogue with you.

Name: The Skinny Confidential
Description: The Skinny Confidential is a lifestyle brand, blog, book & podcast. Created by Lauryn Evarts Bosstick the mission is to inspire and empower women to be the best versions of themselves.

Name: Evolve Media, LLC
Description:
Evolve Media is a premium publisher of leading enthusiast destinations for influential men and women.  

Leveraging proprietary advertising and publishing technologies, as well as hundreds of talented content professionals, Evolve Media offers premium and engaging content to its readers, while offering marketers the tools needed to execute custom, content-led marketing solutions that reach its audience of over 78 million people globally each month.  

Our mission is simple; we deliver Content, Context and Community.

Name: Business of Bouffe
Description:
Business of Bouffe est un média 100% dédié aux coulisses de la Bouffe

Destiné aussi bien aux professionnels qu’aux particuliers, en quête de transparence et d’authenticité, Business of Bouffe donne la parole à tous les acteurs du secteur, de la terre à l’assiette. Selon nous, “il faut bien connaître les choses pour les apprécier à leur juste valeur”. Ainsi, notre mission est de créer des contenus immersifs et sincères, basés sur le temps long, pour aborder les sujets en profondeur. Le tout dans une ambiance décontractée !

Name: Platform Africa
Description:
Set up by representatives of the business, legal and media communities in Mauritius in 2016, Platform Africa is a high level forum and news portal which seeks to showcase what Mauritius can do as a platform for Africa on the one hand, and what Africa can do for the world on the other. 

Platform Africa focuses on providing first hand news and views from those who are already doing business in Africa in the areas of finance and the economy, sustainability, leadership, innovation, health, lifestyle, culture and entertainment. Towards this end, Platform Africa acts as a media partner for high level events regarding Mauritius and Africa and targets an audience of business leaders, investors, entrepreneurs, government representatives and international institutions across the continent.

Our team is passionate about shaping an African narrative that is meant for an African audience, telling stories that showcase the progressive and resourceful nature of its people, and bringing to the fore sharp and incisive opinions from the continent’s leaders that resonate with its youth. We believe that it is high time for Africa’s story to be told by those who call Africa home and fully comprehend the traditions, beliefs and values that are an integral part of the continent’s rich history and will forge a stronger Africa based on the solidarity and cultural identity of its resourceful and vibrant people.

Name: Macau Business
Description:
Macau Business is a glossy 4-color, 132 page, monthly magazine in A4 format. Launched in May 2004 by “De Ficção - Projectos Multimedia” it was the first English-language magazine focusing on business and the economy of Macau and the surrounding regions. Over four years running, ''Macau Business'', has established itself in the English-language community. 
Every month Macau Business presents a range of in depth stories about the development, challenges, economy and financial situations of Macau and the region, with sections dedicated to Gaming, property, finance, politics. Macau Business also runs company profiles, CEO interviews, investigative reports, comprehensive analyses, and a 20 page thematic special every month.
The magazine is available online (www.macaubusiness.com). As well other media from the same group: MB.tv, Macau News Agency, Business Intelligence magazine 商訊 (Chinese) and Essential Macau.

READERSHIP
Since it was launched in May 2004, Macau Business has grown 750% with its circulation reaching 35,000 copies. The majority of the readers are male (60%), aged between 30-45 years; they are high-income individuals from business, finance, gaming and property backgrounds who are researchers, bankers, lawyers, investors, analysts, CEOs, MDs, ITs, academics, Journalists and Media staffs.

DISTRIBUTION
Macau Business is available by subscription and is sold at bookstores, newsstands and convenience stores in Macau and Hong Kong. Its fast growing overseas subscriptions cover Japan, Australia, Taiwan, Singapore, Canada and USA. It is also found in Macau's executive clubs and the lounges of four and five star hotels, plus restaurants, airport lounges, golf clubs, etc. It's also available in Air Macau and Turbo Jet vessels.

Name: Montevideo Portal
Description:
Bienvenidos a la cuenta de LinkedIn de Montevideo Portal, el primer medio 100% digital de Uruguay. En este espacio, les acercaremos las últimas noticias referidas a nuestra sección de Negocios y Tendencias. 

Por más noticias de Uruguay y el mundo, ingresá en nuestros sitios: www.montevideo.com.uy
twitter.com/portalmvd
facebook.com/portalmvd

Name: Milkround
Description:
Milkround is a leading digital resource for UK school leavers, students and graduates in their early career stages. Comprising of milkround.com and milkround.com/school-leavers, we help students find their dream career - and help them get there through our rich careers advice site.

For employers, Milkround can collaborate with you to create truly engaging recruitment campaigns to ensure you find top talent to fill your roles - from apprenticeships, to graduate schemes, to internships and placements.
Our unique technology ensures your adverts are seen by the most relevant candidates - so you can be sure applications are of a high quality.

Remember to follow us on Twitter @milkroundrec for news and HR updates, and to join us in our Linked In group: The Graduate Recruitment Den - powered by Milkround.

For the latest news and industry updates, take a look at our blog: https://milkroundrecruiter.com/

Name: Unlock Blockchain
Description:
UNLOCK is the only #media platform of its kind so far in the #MENA and #GCC region discussing how institutions can use #blockchain to create a more efficient, competitive, smart #government, smart #economy and reinvent businesses.
#UNLOCKBC sheds light on what #Blockchain #NFTs #crypto #tokenization #DeFi can do for government, businesses and individuals across the #GCC #MENA region. It is a media, event organizing, public relations and business development platform that brings together blockchain, crypto ecosystem players and users.

Name: The Christian Science Monitor
Description:
The Christian Science Monitor is an independent global news organization. Monitor journalism goes beyond the headlines and monitors progress. Over its century-long history, the Monitor has won 7 Pulitzer Prizes and more than a dozen Overseas Press Club awards.

You can learn more about the Monitor at: https://www.csmonitor.com

Keep reading and follow our coverage: 
https://www.facebook.com/ChristianScienceMonitor/

Name: Nukkad Official
Description:
नुक्कड़ का एकदम सिंपल मतलब है ‘कोना’, जैसे मुड़ती सड़क का कोना. वही सड़क का कोना जहां होती है आपकी पसंदीदा चाय की दुकान . जहां बिताते हैं आप सुकून और हंसी मजाक के दो पल. जहां मिल जाते हैं हर मुद्दे के एक्सपर्ट. जहां हुई चाय की चर्चाओं से बदल जाती है देश की राजनीति. उसी माहौल की उपज है भारत का ये डिजिटल वीडियो प्लेटफॉर्म 'नुक्कड़'. यहां आपको मिलेगा फुल इंफोटेनमेंट और देशभर की खबर, पर ख़बरों की रेस से हट कर. थोड़ा संयम से थोड़ा विस्तार से, खूब परख कर और कतई आराम से. 
इस अड्डे की सबसे ख़ास बात ये है कि यहां इनफार्मेशन के साथ-साथ मिलेगा एंटरटेनमेंट का तड़का. क्यूंकि किस्सा सुनाने वाले पत्रकार नहीं बल्कि हमारे आपके बीच के किरदार होंगे, जो करेंगे देश की बातें देसी अंदाज़ में . फिर चाहे वो पॉलिटिक्स हो या इकॉनमी, स्पोर्ट्स हो या सिनेमा, धर्म हो या विज्ञान, होगी हर वो बात जो आपके लिए जरूरी है. 

नुक्कड़ की जरूरत क्यों->

इंडिया में कोरोना से ज्यादा तेज़ अगर कुछ फैला है तो वो है इंटरनेट. आज देश के करोड़ों लोग अपने अरबों घंटे मोबाइल और इंटरनेट के इस्तेमाल में गुज़ारते हैं. अगर इसी कीमती समय को सही दिशा में इस्तेमाल किया जाए तो देश को भी सही डायरेक्शन मिल सकती है. यही सोचकर हमने डिजिटल दुनिया के सबसे लोकप्रिय फ़ॉर्मेट 'वीडियो' में जरूरी इनफार्मेशन देने की ठानी है वो भी एकदम इनफॉर्मल होकर. इनफॉर्मल होना ही हमारी यूएसपी है. हम ज्ञान के साथ सोफिस्टिकेशन का ठप्पा नहीं लगवाना चाहते. आपका मनोरंजन भी करवाना चाहते हैं, लेकिन काम का मनोरंजन. ताकि हम आपके दिमाग के साथ-साथ दिल में भी उतर जाएं. इसलिए नुक्कड़ पर हर शो को होस्ट करते हैं फिक्शनल किरदार जो बोलते हैं आपकी जुबान. 



नुक्कड़ पर क्या-क्या मिलेगा?

वैसे तो हमारा मेन आइटम है, नुक्कड़ के ‘वीकली शो’. ये शो लोगों की ज़िन्दगी से जुड़ी हर ज़रूरी केटेगरी से हैं. साथ ही गला काट कम्पटीशन में बने रहने के लिए हम इनफार्मेशन वाले पोस्टर, मीम और मैशप वीडियो वगैरह भी उचित मात्रा में बनाते रहते हैं.
Get in touch with us for anything and everything related to Content and Native Content Marketing.

Description:

Our team of experienced journalists, including award-winning senior reporter Kim Helfrich and editor Guy Martin, who has been writing in the field of aerospace and defence since 2004, bring decades of combined experience to provide accurate and relevant news and insights on defence, security, and military technology affairs in Africa.
 
defenceWeb's website has seen significant growth over the last decade, with a readership of 250,000 unique monthly readers and over 1,500,000 page views as of February 2023. Our audience extends not only in South Africa but also in other parts of Africa, the Middle East, Europe, and North America.
 
Our products include daily defence and security news on our website, a daily no-cost newsletter delivered to your inbox, relevant industry events, and video content. Don't miss out on critical news and insights - subscribe to defenceWeb for your daily dose of aerospace, defence, and security updates! 
 
Join our community today and stay informed on the latest developments in African defence and security. Subscribe now at https://bit.ly/defenceWebnews

Name: The Centrum Media
Description:
The Centrum Media (TCM) is Pakistan’s first all-digital, independent news network. TCM was formed by a group of multi-talented video journalists and filmmakers living and working within Pakistan. Tired of the way the mainstream news in Pakistan covers certain stories, we decided to make use of our diverse international experience and create a new way of telling the news.

Generating social impact is at the core of what we do. The TCM team reports on important social and political stories, highlighting the human voices at the center. Known for our access, TCM brings unseen and untold stories to our audiences, in formats we know they want to watch. As a result, TCM is innovating how information is spread in the modern world. Combining passion with unparalleled digital skills, we are transforming the Pakistani news landscape for now, with global aspirations in the future.

Since its launch at the beginning of January 2017, TCM has produced over 3000 videos with 450 million total views and a monthly reach of 25 million. This rapid growth places TCM as a premier online platform for information and news in Pakistan.

TCM Originals: https://bit.ly/3mzWIBU

Description:

Kicking off back in 2005, when Kim Kardashian was still best known for carrying Paris Hilton’s shopping bags, PTV started as a world-first ‘Plastizine’ (DVD magazine, for the uninitiated), resonating with young Aussies in an entirely new way.

Since then, PTV has continued to kick massive goals, whether it’s taking home Media Brand Of The Year at the Mumbrella Awards for two consecutive years (2015 + 2016), or working on mammoth campaigns with giants like McDonald’s, Nike, Telstra, Microsoft, CommBank and more.

Créatifs en tout genre, marketeurs, annonceurs, agences de pub, agences événementielles, studios de design, boîtes de production, médias, photographes, illustrateurs et étudiants en communication issus du Luxembourg et de la Grande Région composent sa communauté de followers. Des internautes pour la plupart très actifs sur les réseaux sociaux.

Marlena Stell founded Makeup Geek in 2008 on YouTube to review products and educate her fans on product ingredients, application, and the beauty industry. In 2011, she started her own cosmetic brand, Makeup Geek.  Since 2011 the product offerings have increased and we are working towards creating a full-line of cosmetic products. Currently we have eyeshadows, blushes, bronzers, highlighters, pigments, lip products, brushes, create your own palette, and complete palette options.

Our products are always high-quality, cruelty-free and ethically-made. Makeup Geek has one office location in Jackson, Michigan, and is available globally via our website.

Quer conversar com Os Agilistas? É só mandar sua dúvida/sugestão para @osagilistas no Telegram ou pelo e-mail osagilistas@dtidigital.com.br que nós responderemos em um de nossos conteúdos!

Name: The Market
Description: The Market NZZ is a financial media platform in Switzerland that addresses investors and capital markets participants. The Market NZZ focuses on delivering in-depth analysis, inspiration and actionable ideas around global macroeconomic issues, financial markets, industries as well as individual companies. We follow a strict «no noise» policy: No news, no noise, no superficial clickbait. Subscribers receive two to three deeply researched analytical pieces per day. Publishing language is primarily German, with select items in English.

Name: Gallery Media Group
Description:
Gallery Media Group is a modern day media company.  The company's overall mission is to 'Make Positivity Louder'. GMG focuses efforts on where consumer attention currently lies and continues to shift. 

Gallery Media Group is the parent company to PureWow, a social portfolio of 50+ brands including @cocktails, @moms, and @recipes, and an experiential arm, Gallery House, that pops up during cultural moments for brands and creators to collaborate for content. The Company also has a robust influencer marketing business with a vast creator network. 

The company was founded in 2010 by CEO, Ryan Harwood, and is now part of VaynerX, the Gary Vaynerchuk-owned holding company.

Name: Women In Business Magazine
Description: WOMENINBUSINESS est le premier site digital marocain indépendant d'information dédié à l'entrepreneuriat féminin et à l'environnement des affaires des femmes entrepreneures, porteuses de projets ou dirigeantes. Le but de WOMENINBUSINESS est de promouvoir l’entrepreneuriat féminin dans toute sa diversité, pour donner la parole à des femmes inspirantes et audacieuses qui ont su dépasser tous les clivages par leurs talents et leurs compétences. Notre plateforme s’adresse à toutes les femmes à la recherche d'informations, d’accompagnement spécifique, d'évènements sur l'entrepreneuriat féminin, mais aussi à toutes les lectrices et tous les lecteurs, qui seraient intéressés de découvrir des parcours hors normes de femmes qui ont réussi à créer, gérer ou développer des entreprises

Name: Tech Wire Asia
Description:
Tech Wire Asia is an independent tech news website that covers enterprise and technology in Asia. In-depth features and analyses from writers and bloggers across Asia provide cultural insights, alongside daily news and stories.

Tech Wire Asia focuses on the way start-ups and small-medium enterprises use technology to grow and prosper. Content is written for innovators, entrepreneurs, business managers and change makers who are passionate about technology and turning ideas into solutions.

Name: WHO'S WHO in FRANCE
Description:
Who's Who, Le Média pour valoriser tous ceux qui font bouger la France au travers de leurs innovations, de leurs expertises, de leurs initiatives d’excellence, dans tous les secteurs et sur tous les territoires.

Réseau incontournable des personnalités qui font bouger la France, le Who’s Who in France regroupe 20 000 membres actifs sélectionnés par un comité indépendant : 20 000 référents dans leur domaine professionnel qui illustrent la French Touch d’aujourd’hui.

Être membre du Who's Who, c'est l'assurance de participer à un réseau puissant permettant des connexions au plus haut niveau et d'être identifié comme référent dans sa sphère d’activités.

Pour en savoir plus, rendez-vous sur www.whoswho.fr et inscrivez-vous à la newsletter : https://www.whoswho.fr/newsletter

Name: CalMatters
Description: Your nonprofit & nonpartisan state newsroom dedicated to explaining how government impacts our lives.

Name: MedCity News
Description:
MedCity News provides trusted healthcare innovation news and analysis for busy professionals and senior healthcare executives. We cover the healthcare ecosystem – payers, providers, healthtech startups, investors, medtech, diagnostics and biopharma companies — and how they are striving toward value-based care. We report on health IT startups, AI companies, life science companies, and hospitals reimagining care to improve outcomes and reduce costs.

Stay informed with our daily newsletter and weekly BioPulse and StartUPDATES newsletters. Explore thought leadership through our MedCity Influencers program, and discover opportunities for healthcare startups in our MedCitizens community. Join us at our events, including the MedCity INVEST Conference, to connect with the healthcare ecosystem.

Name: Tip & Shaft
Description:
Tip & Shaft développe des contenus à forte valeur ajoutée en s’appuyant sur une newsletter éditoriale innovante, diffusée chaque vendredi, uniquement par email, auprès de plus de 12 000 abonnés : coureurs, sponsors, journalistes, communicants, prestataires, fournisseurs et fans de courses à la voile.

Son taux d’ouverture est supérieur à 50 % depuis le premier jour.

Name: FranchiseWire
Description: FranchiseWire is your resource for the latest franchise news and updates on leading brands. www.franchisewire.com

Name: MetDaan
Description:
MetDaan is the new generation of media for digital-first millennial women; we create, curate, and distribute content for the digital scene. 

We have created an ecosystem integrating our audience, content creators, social editors, and brands onto a single platform designed to inspire women to explore their own creativity and live their best lives.

Through our +50 channels across different social media platforms, we generate monthly numbers such as:

5B+ video views
1B+ unique viewers
250M+ followers

In addition, we work with influencers to consolidate their viewership and help them grow their reach, community, and revenue.

Name: KUY Media Group
Description:
KUY MEDIA GROUP:
- KUY! Channel Networks (KUY! Entertainment and others)
- KUY! Productions
- KUY! Media Web & App

KUY! Entertainment is a digital content platform that covers all aspects of Indonesian lifestyle and entertainment, brought to you by the creative minds of Raffi Ahmad, Gading Marten, and Fachri Albar.

Through our original programs and digital platforms, KUY provide relevancy and immerse stories from the people's favorite idols and figures.

https://www.kuyentertainment.com/
https://www.youtube.com/c/KUYEntertainmentofficial
https://www.instagram.com/kuyentertainment/

Contact Us: info@kuymediagroup.com

Name: Extradixital
Description: Portal online referente de la información de actualidad sobre medios, comunicación, marketing y publicidad en Galicia. Contáctanos en galicia@extradigital.es.

Name: Bergamonews.it - Quotidiano Online
Description: Bergamonews è il quotidiano online di Bergamo e provincia: informazioni libere e gratuite da tutta la Bergamasca e l'Italia. Dal 2008 è aggiornato con costanza e precisione, garantendo un'informazione capillare su tutto il territorio bergamasco.

Name: Grail Talent
Description: Representing pioneering creators that are shaping the future of entertainment

Name: Plan Bio
Description:
Plan Bio est un média d'information professionnelle dédié à l’actualité de la filière bio et de la consommation durable. 

Plan Bio s'adresse à l'ensemble des maillons de la chaîne de la production à la distribution en passant par les institutionnels. Magasins bio, grande distribution, vente directe, EAP, RHF ou encore pharmacies, notre média B to B s'intéresse à tous les circuits offrant un débouché à la filière de l'agriculture biologique. 

Retrouvez chaque jour sur ce fil nos enquêtes exclusives sur le secteur ainsi que les actualités les plus chaudes traitées par notre rédaction.

Name: The Guild
Description:
The Guild is a dynamic and forward-thinking organization dedicated to empowering the global business community. As the umbrella organization for various specialized divisions, including SME Futures, Guild Live, and Guild TV, we serve as a beacon for enterprises navigating the complexities of modern markets.

SME Futures: Our flagship media platform, SME Futures is a dedicated division focused on supporting small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). Through targeted resources, mentorship programs, and networking opportunities, SME Futures aims to empower SMEs to thrive in competitive markets, driving economic growth and innovation. You can visit our website at www.smefutures.com

Guild Live: Guild Live is our interactive platform for fostering collaboration and knowledge exchange. Through webinars, workshops, and virtual events, Guild Live brings together industry experts, thought leaders, and entrepreneurs to discuss key trends, share insights, and explore new opportunities for growth and development. Some of our flagship events include: SME on Cloud Leadership Yatra, Business Innovation Tour, HR Futures, Cloud+Ai Innovation Summit

Guild TV: Guild TV is our multimedia platform dedicated to showcasing inspiring stories, insightful interviews, and thought-provoking content from the global business community. From success stories to industry analyses, Guild TV offers a diverse range of programming aimed at informing, educating, and inspiring audiences worldwide.

Through innovative platforms and initiatives like SME Futures, Guild Live, and Guild TV, The Guild provides resources, expertise, and opportunities tailored to the evolving needs of businesses, from small and medium-sized enterprises to large corporations. Our mission is to drive innovative and sustainable business practices, foster collaboration, and encourage the exchange of knowledge and ideas across industries.

For more information, visit www.theguild.in or follow us on

Name: Autoweek
Description: Staying on top of What's Next in cars.

Name: labsoflatvia.com
Description: Media platform providing information from and about Latvian startups, technologies and innovations to the world. Check our site & contact us for #dealflow from #Latvia:

Name: UK News Group
Description:
Have you got a story you'd like to share? 

With other regional newspapers and digital platforms concentrating on the big, breaking news, UK News Group remains dedicated to shouting about the success of local SMEs up and down the country.

We publish daily news on behalf of the business community; from trading success, new appointments, and statistics, to award wins, charity activity, and upcoming events.

For us, our growing portfolio of online news sites is all about celebrating business success. 

Advertising with us means that you have the option to focus on one specific region or the UK as a whole; spreading your business messages far and wide to your target audience.

Our advertising options include:

 Homepage leaderboards
 Article page leaderboards
 Homepage MPUs
 Article page MPUs
 Footer tile listings

What's in it for you?

Exposure - we get around 40,000 monthly views, along with 4,000+ people signed up to our weekly email and 8,000+ followers on Twitter, 3,000+ on UK News Group LinkedIn Page, 25,000+ on my personal LinkedIn and 1000+ on UK News Group Facebook Page. We also add hyperlinks/do-follow links to every article to maximise SEO for yourself/clients.

If it's coverage you are after, or if you have a press release you want to send over, please drop me or message or email me on: olly@uknewsgroup.co.uk

If you are interested in advertising on our site, we also have great advertising opportunities, feel free to email me on: olly@uknewsgroup.co.uk for a copy of our Media Pack or a press release with an image to help us promote the good news for you.

Website: www.uknewsgroup.co.uk
Twitter: @UKNewsGroup

Name: TEDxGateway
Description:
TEDxGateway has the same passion as TED:  Spreading Ideas & Opening a gateway to innovation. Our mission is to reach out and inspire people to learn, share and discuss “Ideas Worth Spreading” that have the power and potential to make a difference in our lives, and our world.

TEDxGateway will make headway into various aspects and industries and talk about how to take innovative ideas forward in a country with such great diversities and a phenomenal potential to be the next super power in the world. The first edition of TEDxGateway will gather some of the best creative and active thinkers from across the globe – from entrepreneurs to artists : inspiring, discovering, generating and sharing ideas worth spreading in diverse areas.

We are a non-profit initiative based on the principles of social entrepreneurship by which we simply mean that we place a good and inspiring cause at the centre of our efforts and activities, and apart from the direct costs associated with the conferences and organizing we use all income to foster that cause and help a community forming around it.

Name: TA Dialogues
Description:
TA Dialogues is India’s largest platform for Talent Acquisition Function, with a reach of over 1 lakh professionals. 

Set up with an objective of deepening the impact of talent acquisition function, it is the perfect platform for knowledge sharing, insights and reflections on TA. We bring together various stakeholders to enable a seamless flow of ideas and bring out the best of thought leadership. 

It all began with an idea to curate a platform directed towards bringing together the niche community of TA professionals and highlighting the issues in this world. Our journey began after numerous interactions with the community and realizing the need for a platform that can integrate learning, knowledge sharing, and insights. It started with a small gathering called Recruiters’ Breakfast Series in September 2016, and it soon went on to become the torch bearer for facilitating discussions around the future of talent acquisition industry and challenges faced in day to day business. We have had 8 events in the past two years in Bangalore and Mumbai, which were graced by more than 1000 Talent Acquisition professionals.

You can connect with us at connect@tadialogues.in.

Name: CMSWire
Description:
Produced by Simpler Media Group, CMSWire is the leading publication covering customer experience and digital experience methodologies, tools and operations. We speak to CMOs, contact center leaders, customer service leaders, customer experience leaders, senior marketing technologists and chief data officers. Our daily updates, research, video series, podcasts and learning events act as your guide to delivering game changing customer experiences.

CMSWire.com publishes 150+ unique monthly articles, offers educational webinars and draws together a community of over 5 million influential digital business leaders composed of software buyers, seasoned practitioners, vendors and analysts.

Our clients include industry leaders such as Adobe, SAP, Amazon Web Services, TransUnion, Salesforce, Medallia, Optimizely, Acxiom, Sitecore, Teleperformance, NiCE and many others.

Name: News Tributário
Description: News Tributário tem como objetivo propagar informações e conteúdos relevantes, atualizados e completos sobre a área tributária, do Brasil e do mundo.

Name: Electric Monster
Description: Electric Monster is managed by industry veterans who have built global kids and family franchises. Powered by world-class audience development methods and data analytics, we partner with leading digital properties that have exciting growth potential.

Name: L'Express Éducation
Description:
À propos de nous 

Le groupe L'Express lance L'Express Éducation, une initiative dédiée au secteur de l'éducation et plus spécifiquement à l'enseignement supérieur, avec pour objectif d'aider les étudiants et leurs parents à choisir de façon éclairée la bonne école. 

L'Express Éducation n'est pas un simple portail de mise en relation entre écoles et étudiants. Inspirés par notre succès avec L'Express Franchise, nous avons l'ambition d'impacter l'écosystème de l'enseignement supérieur et de l'executive.

À la manière d'un salon physique, les écoles viennent exposer sur notre plateforme avec des pages vitrines, véritables spin-offs de leurs propres sites, offrant une immersion complète grâce à des tournages réalisés sur place. 

Notre mission est de créer un espace permanent et dynamique pour l'enseignement supérieur, soutenu par une stratégie social media ambitieuse grâce à notre studio interne. Nous proposons également une série d'initiatives pour enrichir l'expérience de nos utilisateurs : des awards annuels pour célébrer les acteurs les plus influents de l'enseignement, des cahiers trimestriels intégrés à l'hebdo, ainsi qu'une programmation hebdomadaire d'événements physiques et digitaux variés.

L'Express Éducation, c'est en quelque sorte le premier salon permanent de l'enseignement supérieur soutenu par un média national, offrant des opportunités uniques et un impact significatif pour tous les acteurs du secteur éducatif.

Rejoignez-nous pour façonner l'avenir de l'enseignement supérieur.

Name: HEXABIM
Description: Welcome to hexabim.com, where you can learn, discuss and meet. A new adventure at the heart of construction : the digital model. Our ambition : to create an independent platform available to professionals who seek to exchange, share and find solutions to the challenges they face in contributing to a digital model.

Name: iProperty
Description:
With iProperty.com.my, you can discover consumer insights, news, and trends on the Malaysian property market, upcoming events, and product solutions. We’re constantly innovating and evolving our practices to stay ahead of the curve and change the way you experience property.

Connect with us here on LinkedIn to keep up-to-date on the iProperty.com.my journey.
Location: Mid Valley City, Lingkaran Syed Putra, Kuala Lumpur

Name: Legal Futures
Description:
Legal Futures is the leading news resource tracking the fast-evolving legal landscape. Written by professional journalists, it provides cutting-edge daily news coverage on alternative business structures, new market entrants, regulatory change and innovation in all its forms. Its unique blend of hard-hitting journalism, market intelligence and expert analysis makes it the first port of call for anyone interested in keeping pace with the transformation of the legal market. It frequently breaks important news stories ahead of the other trade press and broadsheets.

As a truly independent news site, Legal Futures is able to provide proper scrutiny of the regulators and representative bodies in the law, and ask the tough questions, whilst delivering fair and objective reporting. Widely respected and well read by industry experts – with even the chair of the Legal Services Board posting comments – Legal Futures has become the go-to source of information on the new legal market.

Name: Expanrr
Description:
Expanrr improves lives that strive to thrive and pushes them to capture that 'space' where there is immense potential to be unlocked. 

Our mission is to create an aura, by educating, motivating and inspiring masses to share their idea, widen their horizon and thrive.

We greet all you enthusiasts with the vested power of entrepreneurship in you, to contribute to a better future and a wide spectrum of growth. 
Join us in celebrating the spirit of entrepreneurship in India!

Name: The Electricity Hub
Description:
The Electricity Hub is a privately owned entity operating under the auspices of Nextier Group. Our multifaceted initiatives aim to address critical aspects of the power sector and contribute to its enhancement and sustainability.

We are a one-stop hub for news, data, events, analysis and general information on Africa’s energy industry. We exist to collate and disseminate credible energy industry data and information.

The Electricity Hub's expertise spans corporate communications, information dissemination, stakeholder engagement, technical advisory, media and publicity initiatives, event management, education, and awareness campaigns.

Our flagship programme, the Power Dialogue, creates a platform for stakeholders to proffer solutions to issues in the sector. Each dialogue session culminates in a comprehensive policy report, encapsulating key insights and recommendations. We also engage in several initiatives and programmes, including the Sustainable Energy Education Drive (SEED), which target schools and communities to raise awareness, impart knowledge, and promote proactive engagement in sustainable energy practices.

Name: Manifold Times
Description:
Exclusive industry updates. Timely information. Expert analysis. Singapore’s first independent bunker publication Manifold Times brings you insights from the world’s largest bunkering port.

To us, it’s more than just about bunkers. We strive to steer the sector toward a sea of transparency, one that benefits players in today's knowledge-based economy.

Manifold Times aims to build a platform that offers value for every participant in the bunker supply chain via collaborations with key partners and an unwavering desire to inform; it’s not just informing readers on what's happening at the bunker forefront, but also behind the scenes.

Headquartered at the heart of the Asia, our established network of trained reporters form a strong foundation to bring you unparalleled insights to the world’s key bunkering hub and beyond. Our vision is to emerge as an industry-leading bunker publication from Asia.

Name: INDOZONE
Description:
INDOZONE is a multi-platform news and entertainment media focus for Millennials and Gen Z.

INDOZONE is a Tech and Digital company, mostly recognize us through the famous tagline #KAMUHARUSTAU (English: you must know). Released in 2019, news portal INDOZONE (www.indozone.id) created with vision to become media with highest engagement, influential and designed towards the needs of Millenials and Gen Z.

Beginning from Instagram Account @indozone.id in 2014, INDOZONE has become fast growing hub for Millenials and Gen Z viewers in the dynamic Indonesian market. PT Indozone Media Indonesia established in 2018, will continue to work towards fullfilling the needs of Millenials and Gen Z, and inspiring to the Indonesia's young generation.

We're hiring GOOD people with great PASSION!
Please send your CV to: hrd@indozone.id, let's discuss!

Name: Facto | Platform voor Facility Management en Huisvesting
Description:
Facto is hét platform voor facility professionals. 

Facto Online | www.facto.nl 
 Blijf op de hoogte van het dagelijkse nieuws uit de facilitaire wereld
 Lees praktijkverhalen, interviews en verdiepende whitepapers
 Ontdek interessante blogs van professionals uit het veld
 Verken de vacaturebank

 Facto Congres met 200 deelnemers en veel interessante lezingen/workshops

      kunstmatige intelligentie!

Facto Magazine
