      https://www.vakmedianetshop.nl/boeken/facto-magazine/ 

Facto is onderdeel van uitgeverij Vakmedianet.

Name: People's Archive of Rural India
Description: PARI is both a living journal and an archive. It generates and hosts reporting on the Indian countryside that is current and contemporary, while also creating a database of already published stories, reports, videos and audios from as many sources as we can. All of PARI’s own content comes under the Creative Commons and the site is free to access.

Name: Hack Tu Startup
Description:
Un podcast sobre crecimiento personal, bienestar y propósito

En Hack Tu Vida creemos que el verdadero cambio empieza desde adentro. No importa en qué punto estés: si buscas claridad, inspiración o nuevas herramientas para transformar tu día a día, estás en el lugar correcto. 

Cada episodio es una invitación a pausar, reflexionar y reconectar contigo. Conversamos con expertos, líderes conscientes y personas reales que comparten sus historias de transformación, sus aprendizajes y hábitos que generan bienestar. Aquí no hablamos de hacer más, sino de vivir mejor: con propósito, equilibrio y autenticidad.

Nos enfocamos en generar impacto en el proceso de formación de empresa y su camino al éxito. Aquí se forman ideas y se apoya el talento latinoamericano.

Name: GamesMarkt
Description:
GamesMarkt is the trade medium of the German-speaking games industry. 

GamesMarkt covers topics, trends and participants from the German game development scene, interviews founders and portrays companies from indie teams to triple-A studios. GamesMarkt offers extensive market analyses, reports on the most important trade fairs and events, and has been a must-read for the movers and shakers of game marketing in all its facets - physical and digital, mobile or stationary - for over two decades.

GamesMarkt lists the best sellers as well as all new releases and presents the most important new releases and revenue generators of tomorrow. GamesMarkt is also otherwise the first port of call for anyone who wants to get involved for professional reasons, whether from politics or science, education or the media, and all service sectors that do business around and with the games industry.

Name: Nouvelles Écoutes
Description:
Studio de podcasts natifs
 Des récits audacieux qui bousculent
 Séries, enquêtes et documentaires à écouter en intégralité et en avant-première avec l'abonnement Nouvelles Écoutes +

 Nouvelles Écoutes c'est aussi une agence de création audio qui s’appuie sur des voix émergentes et des talents reconnus pour raconter des histoires de marques contemporaines et intemporelles.

 Vous êtes une marque ? Contactez-nous à partenaire@nouvellesecoutes.fr
 Des commentaires ou des mots doux ? Écrivez-nous à bonjour@nouvellesecoutes.fr

--
Nouvelles Écoutes est une marque de podcast français qui produit et diffuse un catalogue de créations originales, destiné à tous les publics. Exigeant et iconoclaste, le studio accompagne les talents audacieux, et met tout son savoir-faire au service de la création et de programmes authentiques et originaux. Ses podcasts narratifs -documentaires ou fictions- et ses talk-show mordants à la langue drôle et parfois acerbe, surprennent et bousculent.

Avec Nouvelles Écoutes, sortez des sentiers battus.
--
Au-delà de ses programmes originaux, Nouvelles Écoutes est derrière la régie premium Native*, la seule régie intégrée au cœur d’un studio de production, et qui regroupe les podcasts natifs parmi les plus écoutés de France. Nouvelles Écoutes est aussi un studio de création audio en marque blanche, qui conseille et accompagne ses annonceurs dans la conception, la réalisation, la diffusion et la promotion de leurs podcasts.
--
Depuis septembre 2022, Nouvelles Écoutes s’est installé comme le leader du podcast en France avec l’entrée à son capital de PodX Group, groupe suédois dédié au développement des studios de podcasts, et l’acquisition de Studio Minuit.

Name: Zeteo
Description:
Founded by award-winning journalist, best-selling author, and all-round troublemaker Mehdi Hasan, Zeteo – which comes from the ancient Greek word for ‘seeking out’ and ‘striving’ – is a new media organization that seeks answers for the questions that really matter, while always striving for the truth. 

Through hard-hitting interviews, engaging podcasts and newsletters, and compelling op-eds and essays from an array of high-profile contributors – reporters, authors, celebrities, comedians and more – we will speak truth to power… and have some fun along the way. A broad range of voices you may not always agree with, but who bring important viewpoints to the conversation.

Name: MoneySavingExpert.com
Description:
MoneySavingExpert.com (MSE) is the UK’s biggest consumer website. It provides millions of users with free, independent, editorially-led information about all things money. The goal for everyone working at MSE is simple – we’re dedicated to cutting consumer bills and fighting hard for financial justice for everyone. We get around 15m Money Savers to our website every month. Our weekly email is full of exclusive deals, tricks and MoneySaving guides, all aimed at helping people make the most of their cash. The MSE Forum is a lively and supportive community, with more than 1.5 million users taking part in 3 million discussions ranging from making the most of your credit card to good old-fashioned thrifty budgeting. In addition, our Cheap Energy Club takes the hard work out of switching energy and saving on energy bills whilst the newly launched Credit Club is a great way of managing an array of financial decisions.

Founder and Executive Chairman, Martin Lewis, created MSE in 2003 for just £100. The site grew speedily and in September 2012 joined the MoneySupermarket.com Group PLC. Over the years, MSE has become a major disruptor, leading on innovation and developing cutting-edge tools. The influence Martin and Money Saving Expert have over financial awareness, consumer empowerment and public policy is second to none. 

But what really makes MSE stand-out from the crowd is the Editorial Code, which lies at the heart of everything we do. Regardless of your role at MSE, it’s everybody’s job to champion the consumer - and that makes us a truly unique, exciting and rewarding place to work.  If you are inspired by what we do or see yourself as a passionate consumer champion, and have the grit and enthusiasm along with the skills we seek, a career in MSE might just be the right career step you are looking for.

Name: CO— by U.S. Chamber of Commerce
Description: CO— is a publication of the U.S. Chamber of Commerce focused exclusively on helping you grow your business. Wherever you are in your entrepreneurial journey, we hope you’ll find advice, ideas and solutions to your most pressing business challenges.

Name: Brews News
Description: Brews News is the Australian brewing industry's trusted media source.

Name: openDemocracy
Description:
openDemocracy publishes high quality news analysis and opinion pieces on stories from across the world.

Through reporting and analysis of social and political issues, we seek to:
- educate citizens 
- challenge power and 
- encourage democratic debate across the world. 

With human rights as our central guiding focus, and open-mindedness as our method, we ask tough questions about freedom, justice and democracy.

Established in 2001, openDemocracy is a non-profit federation comprising of the Main site and a number of editorially and financially independent Sections.

We publish up to 60 articles a week and attract over 8 million visits per year.

Name: Reporte Inmobiliario
Description:
Reporte Inmobiliario es el único sitio que reúne toda la información de bienes raíces de Argentina y Latinoamérica; aquí usted encontrará los datos y herramientas imprescindibles para tomar decisiones de inversión. En nuestro sitio encontrará editorial y opiniones de los más prestigiosos referentes del mercado. 
Absolutamente independiente, este proyecto no está comprometido con ningún operador del mercado.

Name: kreativv ID
Description:
"We inspire and encourage young creatives in Indonesia"

kreativv ID adalah creative content platform yang berkomitmen untuk menginspirasi dan mendorong anak muda di Indonesia yang berminat atau menggeluti industri kreatif. 

Platform ini tidak hanya berfungsi sebagai media dan pengembang komunitas, tetapi juga sebagai agensi pemasaran bagi brand-brand yang memiliki kesamaan visi guna meningkatkan brand awareness & engagement secara online maupun offline.

Name: Views
Description: Views is a new-generation cultural media brand that tells the story of youth and its influences through video, photo, and editorial formats. Active online, across social platforms, and in print with its quarterly magazine, Views publishes original daily content on fashion, music, and sport. With a community of over one million people and collaborations with leading global brands, Views has established itself as a key reference in contemporary culture.

Name: If Saint-Étienne
Description: If Saint-Etienne est un pure player d'information politique et générale sur Saint-Etienne et la Loire. Nous traitons de l'actualité politique, économique, juridique, loisir... Avec un traitement magazine de l'info, nous prenons de la hauteur sur les sujets pour les décrypter. N° CPPAP 0927 Y 94319

Name: T'as l'mental ?
Description:

Name: Splann ! Lanceur d'enquêtes
Description:
{Fr} « Splann ! », lanceur d'enquêtes en Bretagne

En Bretagne, derrière la carte postale se cachent des sujets sensibles que les journalistes peinent à traiter. Puissance de l’industrie agroalimentaire, nouvelles infrastructures énergétiques, présence militaire, connivences politiques, radicalisation des luttes… La Bretagne regorge de sujets qui nous interrogent, dont la portée dépasse notre région.

Les citoyen·nes ont droit à des enquêtes journalistiques indépendantes nécessaires au bon déroulement du débat démocratique. « Splann ! » entend y contribuer en enquêtant là où l'intérêt général le requiert. Comme chez « Disclose », notre parrain, nos enquêtes sont financées par des dons de particuliers et des fondations philanthropiques puis publiées gratuitement, en breton et en français, par des médias partenaires ainsi que sur splann.org.

{Bzhg} « Splann ! », kevredigezh gentañ gouestlet d’ar c'hazetenniñ-enklask e Breizh
E Breizh e vez kuzhet sujedoù kizidik 'zo diaes d'ar gazetennerien diskoachañ anezho. Bezhin glas, agro-industriezh, saotradurioù a-bep seurt, labouradegoù da broduiñ energiezh, tachennoù an arme, liammoù kreñv a zo etre darn eus ar bolitikerien hag an embregerezhioù braz ; tachennoù "ZAD"; stourmoù sokial hag ar gwask a zo lakaet war ar gevredigezh gant ar polis… Mod pe vod, er mare-mañ, emañ an nen o klask gouzout penaos ‘ta, e c’hall mont endro ar gevredigezh. E Breizh ez eus ur bern sujedoù hag a zo e kreiz an dalc’hoù-se.

Droed o deus an dud da c'hoût diwar enklaskoù dizalc'h. Setu ar pezh 'vo graet gant « Splann ! » Soutenet gant Disclose, ar model ekonomikel a zo a memes hini: enklaskoù-kazetenniñ ac'hantet digant keodedourien ha kevredigezhoù, nemet ar re a zo stag ouzh embregerezhoù pe strolladoù politikel. Er fin e vez roet, evit mann, ar pennadoù d’ar mediaoù a genlabour : gante e vez embannet pe skignet an enklaskoù evit ma vefe tizet ar muiañ a dud. Kavet e vo ivez, digoust, ar pennadoù war lec’hienn internet splann.org.

Name: mesdames.media
Description:
Mesdames.media est né de l’association de 2 femmes des médias : Maïtena Biraben et Alexandra Crucq. Productrices associées au sein de Mesdames productions elles ont décidé en plus de leur activité dans l’audiovisuel de lancer leur 1er média digital sur les femmes de plus de 45 ans.

Mesdames.media est né du constat de ses 2 créatrices ! La femme de 50 ans est mal racontée ! 
50 ans c’est la fin des débuts mais ce n’est pas le début de la fin !  50 ans c’est comme la puberté avec une carte bleue (merci Madame Foresti) et un cerveau (ajoute Maitena Biraben) ! 50 ans c’est à nouveau du temps pour elles : les enfants sont partis ou sur le point de ! Elles sont au top de leur carrière et souvent à cet âge là de leur pouvoir d’achat ! Elles ont la santé & elles sont actives ! Conscientes du temps qui passe elles se réalisent ou réalisent leurs rêves : monter une boîte ? Quitter son mari ? Se mettre à la musique ? Écrire un livre ? Se mettre au sport ?  … Bref c’est l’âge de tous les possibles ! Celui où enfin les femmes ne sont plus au service des autres ! 

En france 1 femme sur 2 a plus de 45 ans .
9 millions de femmes ont plus de 50 ans.
Et demain elles seront encore plus nombreuses. 

Mesdames.media leur donne la parole.
Les conseille. Les divertit. Les écoute.

Name: Forbidden Stories

By protecting and continuing the work of reporters who can no longer investigate, we can send a powerful signal to enemies of the press: "Killing the journalist won’t kill the story". 

Forbidden Stories is a non-profit project. We rely on charitable foundations and on financial support from the public.

Name: Climate & Capital Media
Description:
Climate&Capital was conceived as a means to prompt meaningful action on climate issues. We’re here to inform, embolden, and connect a diverse, ever-growing cohort of entrepreneurs, executives, financiers, academics, investors, activists, NGOs, and policymakers — all of whom have a vested interest in building and influencing the climate economy. 
 
We know that’s a bold mission. But we’re living in an era of urgent transformation — one that demands individual and collective global action. To battle the climate crisis, we all must claim new responsibility — and be willing to operate on unfamiliar ground. This is about action for all, about dissolving national borders, and about giving new consideration to cooperation among institutions and corporations.
 
Yes, we’re hopeful. We’re inspired by the change we see around us. Where others see darkness ahead, we remember the incredible leaps humankind has made in the face of adversity.
 
Unlike other media companies, we’re climate-first. We don’t cover everything under the ESG sun; we focus on agents of change and the business of the climate economy. Indeed, that is more than everything. Because global warming touches everyone, everywhere.
 
We believe the world of business and finance can do exactly what it should: direct capital toward climate solutions. Our job is to promote that process by informing, encouraging, and bringing together individuals and organizations engaged in developing climate solutions.
 
The world has reached an unprecedented inflection point, and Climate&Capital endeavors to address the needs of this urgent transformation; to promote the remarkable individual and collective initiatives that have distinguished human development throughout history.

Name: Les Lueurs
Description:
Des interviews sincères et authentiques.

On est comme vous ! Une petite équipe à la recherche de solutions et de conseils pour être heureux dans la folie de nos vies. On cherche la paix intérieure et à concilier tout ce qui est important pour nous : nos potes, notre famille, notre vie pro, nos couples, notre santé et même notre vie spirituelle... ! Facile non ?

Sauf que c'est galère...et que ces questions intérieures sont infinies. On les appelle : "Nos questions de 2h du Mat" !

Alors pour trouver des réponses à ces questions, nous sommes partis en quête. Et cette quête, nous en avons fait un média.

Tous les 15 jours, on vous partage (via la Newsletter Les Lueurs, la chaine Youtube ou nos chaines de Podcasts) une nouvelle question de 2h du Mat' qui peut tous nous faire réfléchir. 

Pour y répondre, on invite une personnalité, un expert ou un anonyme. Des discussions filmées sur un format "au coin du feu" où chaque invité a un rôle d’éclaireur et accepte de parler de sa réalité personnelle et de sa vie derrière son personnage...

On fait tomber les masques...et ça fait un bien fou. 

Rendez-vous dès maintenant sur LesLueurs.fr

À très vite,

Name: Banda OÁZ
Description:

O grupo apresenta um repertório diversificado que vai do Rock ao Pop, passando por Samba, Axé, Sertanejo e Reggae, sempre com arranjos envolventes e uma performance contagiante.

Com identidade única e energia marcante, a OÁZ transforma qualquer evento em uma experiência inesquecível, adaptando-se a diferentes públicos e ocasiões — de bares e casas noturnas a eventos corporativos e festivais.

In 2018, RYOT launched a state-of-the-art motion capture studio with the mission to create new content formats of the future. Highlights include 2 Emmy Award wins and 3 nominations, 3 Academy Awards nominations, a Future of Media Peabody Award, and consecutive official festival selections at Sundance, Tribeca Film Festival, Cannes Film Festival and SXSW. RYOT has recently produced a 10-part docuseries for Quibi in partnership with Lebron James' SpringHIll Ent., and the 7min animated music video for Lil Dicky's Earth which has garnered 244MM video views in partnership with Scooter Braun's SB Projects.

The world around us is full of events. Events that manifests themselves in so many forms. As a human, our curiosity is to understand and keep a track of whatever that is happening around us. We also like to know the uncovered mysteries behind anything within or outside the scope of our vision.

As a person, everyone can not have their own mission of uncovering every bit of news around them and here comes the role of Us.

PMN or "PMN Patralok" is a News portal, or say, a team of Journalists who like to explore, understand, uncover and present the information of whatever happening around us, whether local or international, scientific or artistic, natural or human developed. 

We like to present the news in a simplistic manner, with easy and simple understanding language. If the news is simple, you get a plain, pure and simple update. If there is something more to dig deeper, our people is on work!

At present, we deliver our content in Hindi and English, and our work domain includes Geo Politics, International Relations, Crime, Politics, Sports, Entertainment, Lifestyle, Health, Technology, Gadgets, Science, Culture etc.

Name: GDN Online
Description:
Gulf Daily News together with the GDN Online is Bahrain’s leading English language media platform providing 365 days / 24-hour coverage of local, regional and international news. Presented in print, online and through social media, the Gulf Daily News and GDN Online are considered to be Bahrain’s most authoritative and respected news outlets. 

With an average daily print circulation of over 8,500 copies and an online readership of over 8,500 visitors every day, the total estimated readership of almost 40,000 across a multi-national section of Bahrainis and expatriates as well as engaging with thousands more on social media. The majority of our readers live and work in Bahrain and in addition, the media reaches a number of regional and international subscribers who have a serious interest in the Kingdom’s news and development. 

The Gulf Daily News has the most extensive home delivery service in Bahrain. The online edition is available from 6am each day providing our readers with the flexibility of reading either the print or web editions with fully enabled mobile and tablet facilities to accommodate any device. 

Editorial content is varied and detailed with local, regional and world news, current business news and global sports coverage. Regular advertising features, Readers’ letters, a ‘Leisure’ section and busy Classified advertising pages all help maintain the Gulf Daily News as Bahrain’s leading and most popular newspaper. 

Gulf Daily News media provides a total promotional opportunity utilising print, online and social media in bundled packages. This ensures that advertisers’ messages achieve exceptional exposure and value through a combination of print and online promotion, supported with social media reaching thousands of followers.

Name: La Nouvelle Tribune - LNT.ma
Description:
Aller de l’avant, se réaliser, défricher de nouveaux champs, servir l’information de manière honnête et exhaustive, c’est le credo de La Nouvelle Tribune depuis sa fondation en novembre 1995. Et s’il est de nouveau exprimé aujourd’hui, c’est parce que Impression Presse Édition, la société anonyme éditrice de cet hebdomadaire d’informations générales, a décidé d’entamer un tournant irréversible, en pleine connaissance des nouvelles et impressionnantes tendances qui caractérisent désormais le champ de l’information.

En effet, après avoir en l’an 2000 ouvert un site Internet, www.lnt.ma, en avoir plusieurs fois modifié la maquette, implémenté notamment le “e-reader” et proposé chaque semaine, gratuitement, l’intégralité de la version papier sur ce site, c’est un grand bond qualitatif que nous réalisons aujourd’hui grâce au Web 2.0.

La Nouvelle Tribune, en version papier et hebdomadaire continuera de paraître, de proposer des informations et analyses de qualité, pertinentes et actuelles, mais, elle sera alimentée et précédée, chaque jour, chaque heure, chaque minute, le cas échéant, des informations, vidéos, photos, commentaires, breaking news et autres contenus de blogs qui seront présents sur LanouvelleT.ma adresse générique de notre portail.

L’internaute, quels que soient ses centres d’intérêt, sera servi et choyé dans l’objectif de satisfaire toutes les attentes et habitudes de cette nouvelle catégorie de lecteurs qui, jour après jour, prend de plus en plus de place dans l’espace médiatique national et mondial.

Bienvenue donc sur ce portail qui, marocain par ses créateurs, ses animateurs, ses responsables, n’en sera pas moins le réceptacle, le reflet et le vecteur de tout ce qui peut intéresser, interpeller et concerner Internet et ses utilisateurs.

Fahd Yata

The Community Care group is at the heart of your social care career. We offer a selection of products that work together to give social care professionals constant support in the ever-changing social care sector.

Description:
Conçue par des experts de l'économie et de la finance, Allnews, première plateforme financière digitale suisse en langue française, a pour mission d’être un rendez-vous de référence.

Allnews entend recueillir et synthétiser nouvelles et analyses pour offrir en un coup d'œil l'information cruciale pour suivre l'évolution des marchés. La plateforme proposera des contenus tout au long de la journée en libre accès.

Forte d'articles rédigés par des journalistes spécialisés et de contributions émanant de plus de 250 institutions financières de renom, Allnews est à l’écoute du secteur financier et s’adresse aux investisseurs institutionnels, aux investisseurs privés, aux banques, aux gestionnaires d'actifs, aux gérants indépendants, et à l'ensemble de l'écosystème financier suisse de langue française.

Allnews remercie de leur soutien ses partenaires et notamment Citywire, Dukascopy,  FundInfo, MorningStar, S&P Global et SharingAlpha.


A propos d’Allnews:

Allnews est une plateforme media digitale dédiée au secteur financier suisse de langue française. 
Composée d’anciens collaborateurs de la NZZ, du Temps et de l’Agefi, l'équipe d'Allnews est dirigée par sa rédactrice en chef, Nicolette de Joncaire.
De 2010 à 2017, Nicolette était journaliste économique et financière à l’Agefi. Elle était aussi, depuis 2012, rédactrice en chef du magazine WORK, depuis 2014, du magazine Commodities et depuis 2016, corédactrice en chef du supplément Indices. Nicolette a passé auparavant plus de 25 ans dans les services financiers et fondé deux sociétés de conseil en systèmes financiers à Londres et à Genève. Elle est titulaire d'un master en économie de l'université de Paris.

Name: La France Agricole
Description:
Éditeur français leader de l’information et des services aux professionnels : agriculteurs et acteurs du monde agricole, vignerons et professionnels de la vigne et du vin, entreprises de l’agroalimentaire et des métiers de la boulangerie pâtisserie, le Groupe France Agricole rassemble 9 médias, dont La France Agricole. 
Après la 2e guerre mondiale, tout est à reconstruire, y compris la presse. Une poignée d'agriculteurs créent alors un journal au service du monde agricole : La France Agricole, dont le 1er numéro paraît samedi 9 juin 1945. La France Agricole se revendique « d’aucun parti, d’aucun syndicat et d’aucune confession ». 
Objectif : informer, en toute indépendance, avec un hebdomadaire conçu « Par des agriculteurs, pour les agriculteurs », signature qui figure encore à ce jour dans l’ours.
Au fil des années, La France Agricole devient l'hebdomadaire professionnel le plus diffusé d’Europe, avec à ce jour plus de 110 000 exemplaires.
Le Groupe France Agricole s’est bâti autour de ce titre, puis de la création et du rachat d’autres marques médias: L’Eleveur laitier & Pros du lait, Agrodistribution, Machinisme & Réseaux, La Vigne & Vitisphere, Le Lien Horticole, Phytoma, La Toque, RIA. Il a également développé des activités avec une offre numérique pour chaque titre, une maison d’édition : les éditions France Agricole, ainsi que des événements comme le salon Innov-Agri, piloté par GFA Events, ou encore Bulles Expo et Dionysud,  ainsi que le trophée national des lycées agricoles, 
« TNLA », créé en 2000 par L’Eleveur laitier et La France Agricole et organisé chaque année au salon international de l’agriculture avec le concours général agricole. Le Groupe France Agricole compte 180 collaborateurs et une soixantaine de correspondants et pigistes.

Name: Aramco ExPats
Description:
Who are Aramco ExPats?
Aramco ExPats are expatriates living and working abroad, their spouses and children, former employees, and annuitants of Saudi Aramco the largest supplier of crude oil and natural gas liquids in the world.  Saudi Aramco employs 54,000 employees from around the world, among them geologists and engineers, computer and laboratory scientists, plant workers, marine biologists, pilots, firefighters, physicians and teachers. Many expatriates live and raise their families in Saudi Aramco funded compounds that offer state-of-the-art school systems, recreation facilities, and comfortable family living.

The first expatriates and their families were the founders of a thriving Aramco ExPats community.  Whether playing Bridge or golf, hosting tea parties or holiday celebrations, gathering at the commissary, dining hall or children’s sporting events, organizing clubs, bazaars, or chat groups, the primary aim of the community is to foster friendship and fellowship.

Aramco ExPats Online Community
The overwhelmingly positive experiences and collective memories of Aramco ExPats while working and living in Saudi Arabia along with continued interest to stay connected after leaving the Kingdom creates a sustainable voice for furthering friendships and imparting knowledge on Saudi Arabia.  Aramco ExPats online community, www.aramcoexpats.com, provides the medium for this association, communication and fellowship to continue.

Name: Future of Good
Description:
Future of Good is a digital media and learning organization with a mission to enable a smarter social purpose world. We deliver nuanced insights, analysis and knowledge through high-quality journalism, learning programming, and data and research offerings. Tens of thousands of impact-oriented professionals and entrepreneurs read Future of Good weekly, within nonprofits, social enterprises, social service agencies, philanthropic foundations, CSR teams, co-ops, and more.

We aim to challenge conventional journalism by being far more inclusive in our sources, incorporating lived experience, delivering nuance, being trauma-informed, and deeply caring for our journalists.

---

Our Why & Mission

Social purpose teams across Canada are facing tremendous transition, growth, and opportunity, particularly as they adapt, evolve and grow in a post-pandemic world.

From volunteerism to DEI and technology to wellbeing, there are enormous mission-related opportunities and complexities in the social purpose world, that every team has to understand, learn and navigate.

We believe that smarter teams accelerate social change. That’s why we exist.

Our mission is to equip teams in non-profit, philanthropy, humanitarian aid, corporate, and government with smart social purpose news, insights and knowledge so they can Do More Great Work. 

---

Our 3 Core Offerings:

Social Impact Journalism
Our journalists craft insightful stories every day that inform, enrich and inspire people working in social purpose teams across the country.

Data Insights
We produce research and datasets that offer nuanced analysis and insights on the trends and shifts shaping the social purpose world so leaders can better navigate opportunities and shift practices. 

Learning & Knowledge
We develop and deliver learning events that offer professional development and knowledge resources that changemakers can use right away.

Published online and supported with weekly e-newsletters, Fibreprovider.net enables the spectrum of organisations driving the UK’s fibre rollout to keep up to date with the latest commercial, regulatory and planning news alongside insight and analysis from sector experts. 
In addition to the varied news, Fibreprovider.net hosts regular online events with invited guest speakers aimed at informing and sharing best practice within the fibre community.
Fibreprovider.net is published by BPL Business Media Limited - the UK's leading specialist ICT and telecoms media, event and insight business.

Name: ASOTU | More Than Cars
Description:
ASOTU is the modern media movement trusted by thousands of dealers and industry partners who believe that thriving people are at the center of a thriving and profitable industry.

We draw the industry together by creating people-first educational content with community driven insights that drive our education, top news commentary, podcasts and events. 

We believe the franchise dealer network is both the best avenue for consumers to purchase and service their vehicles with and has the greatest opportunity for community impact in our country.

And we are gathering others who believe it too!

Name: Yesil Ekonomi
Description:
Yeşil Ekonomi, founded in 2009, publishes on renewable energy, climate change and sustainability in Turkey.


www.yesilekonomi.com

Name: Healthcare Design
Description:
Healthcare Design provides expert insight and eye-catching coverage of the design, planning, architecture, and interior design of healthcare environments, delivering authoritative and timely content through multiple channels to engage and shape the industry. In addition to its print and online publications, Healthcare Design’s industry-leading conference and webinars offer educational opportunities for earning CEUs and networking with peers. With industry partners in The Center for Health Design, AIA, AAH, ASID, and IIDA, Healthcare Design honors excellence through its annual awards and showcases. 

Healthcare Design Conference + Expo is the industry’s ultimate networking, education, and product-sourcing event. Learn about the latest research and strategies in healthcare design, and discover innovative products that support the thoughtful design of hospital and clinic environments. Leave with new connections, new ideas for current and future projects, and earn AIA, IDCEC, EDAC, and nursing LUs to meet your continuing education goals.

Editor-in-Chief Anne DiNardo 
anne.dinardo@emeraldx.com

Name: Madame Architect
Description: Madame Architect is an online magazine celebrating the extraordinary women that shape our world, challenge the status quo, and advance our culture through policy, innovation, and design. For pitches, see our website for guidelines and email us at hello@madamearchitect.org.

Name: Media4Growth
Description:
Media4growth (www.media4growth.com) is a digital media arm of Outdoor Asia magazine, tracks the latest news updates on global, national and regional OOH business developments including media acquisition, people movement, account wins, regulatory interventions, policy outcomes, ooh events, insignts on emerging DOOH, Green printing, etc.

Read the latest news, analysis and commentary on global & Indian Out of Home (OOH) & Digital OOH Advertising business with focus on media investments, media planning/buying, creativity, adtech, innovative solutions, ad policies regulations, talent acquisition, and more.

Name: La Martingale Podcast
Description:
Dans La Martingale, Matthieu Stefani reçoit des experts de la finance – chefs d’entreprise, investisseurs, consultants – qui partagent leur expérience et leurs conseils avisés en matière d’épargne, de patrimoine et de gestion des finances personnelles. 

Le podcast qui parle d’argent, mais pas que. Finances personnelles, investissement, épargne, patrimoine - tous les sujets seront abordés sans tabous pour aider chacun à y voir plus clair dans la gestion de ses biens. 

• 1er podcast français sur les finances personnelles
• +175 épisodes
• 1 épisode tous les jeudis
• Animé par Matthieu Stefani, entrepreneur et également créateur du podcast Génération Do It Yourself
• 200 000 écoutes chaque mois

Abonnez-vous sur votre plateforme d'écoutes (Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Google Podcast, Deezer, etc.). Et échangez avec d'autres auditeurs sur Discord !

Ecrivez-nous à contact@lamartingale.io

Name: Detailfolk.dk
Description:
På detailfolk.dk finder du gratis daglige branchenyheder, spændende blogindlæg og nye karrieremuligheder. Vi er Danmarks førende branchesite og har det største jobmarked målrettet detailbranchen på tværs af branchekategorier.

- På detailfolk.dk har vi været i gang siden juni 2012, og vi brænder for retail og e-handel.
- Vi har mere end 40.000 besøg om måneden – og siger stolt tak for tilliden.
- Gratis daglig nyhedsmail giver dig Danmarks bedste overblik.
- Ingen betalingsvægge eller medlemskab.
- Danmarks mest specialiserede retail-jobmarked med nye karrieremuligheder i butik og på kædekontorer.

Name: The Finance Story
Description:
The Finance Story is a news and career insight platform dedicated to Finance Professionals and the Financial Services sector. 

With millions actively engaged in finance, tax, accounting, and related fields, no media brand is giving you the lowdown on how the market's dancing and how it's going to groove with your career. 

That's where we jump in!

We spill the beans on market moves, career hacks, tech tips, and more. Our vibe is all about helping you make killer decisions for your career and your team.

Our vibrant Finance community spans India and Dubai, uniting Public Accounting Professionals, Fintech Professionals, Investment Professionals, Corporate Finance professionals (controllers, CFOs, FP&A), Risk Management Professionals, Tax and Treasury professionals.

Name: SB Nation
Description:
SB Nation is a home for being delighted, informed and surprised by sports, built on a network of team sites made by and for the modern sports fan – always connected and completely obsessed. Come fan with us!

SB Nation is one of the fastest growing sports properties (comScore) and part of the Vox Media family; joined by The Verge, Vox.com, Polygon, Eater, Racked, Curbed, and Re/code. Vox Media is redefining the modern media company by empowering the smartest creative voices with the technology to create and distribute premium content, and that connects with an audience of 165 million.

Name: LT Pulso
Description: La multiplataforma de negocios, economía y actualidad más completa y confiable de Chile. Noticias, análisis, indicadores, valores bursátiles de Chile y el Mundo además de entrevistas que complementan nuestra edición papel y cobran vida gracias a videos, fotos y material interactivo
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Mic
Description: Mic is a digital news company for society’s changemakers, who most influence and impact the world.

Name: Food And Beverage News
Description:
FAB News, formerly know as Food & Beverage News, is part of a London based Media Group. We aim to bring you stories, events and more, related to the Global Food and Beverage Industries. We deliver online via a website, weekly news digests and our quarterly E-zine.

Do send your stories and releases to news@fabnews.live.

Name: Racing Post
Description:
Welcome to Racing Post – the ultimate destination for premium horseracing and sports betting content.

Founded in 1986 as a daily newspaper, Racing Post has evolved into a market-leading multimedia company at the heart of the racing and sports betting industries. Today, we deliver a powerful blend of award-winning journalism, trusted data, expert tips, and cutting-edge digital products.

From our renowned horse racing coverage to best-in-class sports betting insights including  football, golf, and boxing, Racing Post is a go-to source for fans and professionals alike. Our comprehensive suite of products includes our must-have mobile app and user-focused website, while our growing B2B division powers racing and sports betting content across some of the biggest horseracing, betting and media brands in the world. 

Headquartered in stunning South Bank Central with views of the Thames, our collaborative culture connects teams across multiple offices and remote locations.

Looking to join a passionate, innovative team with real career growth potential? Explore our opportunities and be part of the Racing Post journey.

Name: Digital Terminal
Description: Digital Terminal (Part of NEWS DOT MEDIA PVT. LTD., India’s Leading Technology Media House) popularly known as DT has been serving the Indian ICT industry since more than 14 years and has become one of the leading platforms for tech news in India. The online portal updates entire IT community quickly and effectively on any news or information related to the tech world. The portal remains a pioneer in serving the industry with its true and in-depth analysis of the market. The portal has become a lifeline for the IT channel partners as it gives them entire information and news to stay competitive in the market.

Name: Reuters Breakingviews
Description:
Reuters Breakingviews delivers agenda-setting financial insight. Every day, we comment on the big financial stories as they break in the United States, Europe, the Middle East and Asia.

Expert analysis is provided by a global team of 30 correspondents based in New York, Washington, London, Hong Kong, and Beijing.

Through Thomson Reuters’ 500,000 desktops and the breakingviews.com website, our columns reach financial professionals ranging from asset managers and senior corporate executives to private equity partners, investment bankers and lawyers. We also syndicate selected content on reuters.com and in 15 influential publications including The International Herald Tribune, Slate and The Globe & Mail.

* Views you can use: Breakingviews regularly anticipates market and stock movements. Our writers always make a call.
* Intelligent and independent: Breakingviews doesn’t tell you what’s happening; instead we explain why, providing genuine insight and provoking fresh ideas.
* Speed of thought: Breakingviews reacts to stories as they develop. We give you a considered view in near real-time – faster than mainstream media.
* Sceptical and provocative: writers are free to take their own line. Often contrarian, our writers have license to be sharp and provocative – where the view demands it.

Breakingviews journalists are available for live and pre-recorded broadcast interviews. To book an interview, or for any media enquiries, please contact one of the press contacts.

Sign up for a free trial of our professional service at http://www.breakingviews.com/trial

Name: Panamá Banking News
Description: Compartimos noticias, información, innovaciones y datos relevantes sobre banca, negocios, economía y tecnología de Panamá y el mundo.

Name: Animal Político
Description:
Animal Político es un medio nativo digital que reúne a periodistas, diseñadores, programadores y editores de video para crear contenido con rigor, precisión y pensado para servir a los ciudadanos.

Es un medio que pone en el centro a la ciudadanía, privilegiando el diálogo con ellos y la cobertura de temas que los afectan como la corrupción, la inseguridad, la desigualdad en el país, la violencia de género y la discriminación.

Name: SuínoBrasil
Description: A SuínoBrasil é a mais nova mídia brasileira especializada em suinocultura. Somos parte do Grupo de Comunicação AgriNews, das já conhecida de todos aviNews Brasil e nutriNews Brasil. Confira e  se atualize com as principais notícias do setor e com artigos técnicos de qualidades escritos pelos mais renomados profissionais da suinocultura nacional.

Name: Social Work Today
Description:
Social Work Today www.socialworktoday.co.uk 
Media partner to The International Federation of Social Workers @IFSW
Social Work Today has been developed to give professionals a sector-specific platform that creates the networks and links to provide social work information from across the UK and the wider global community.  It has been the result of much research into the needs of the profession and has come from many years' of experience from the team behind Compass events, the market-leading free training and jobs fairs for social work. 

The social work sector is ready for something different and SWT offers a positive platform for social work professionals to keep up to date with news, features, research and recruitment campaigns.

In addition to delivering the most recent news, training and jobs every weekday via our free e-newsletter, we also offer the chance for online learning, CPD and a new way for social workers, advertisers and employers to engage with each other.

Due to the current situation, the face-to-face element of recruitment has become even more difficult, so we also provide a solution to this with an online events platform that enables employers to connect with professionals in meaningful ways. Advertisers are able to host sponsored webinars, as well as book and conduct Zoom interviews with potential candidates through the www.socialworktoday.co.uk site.
 
As potential job seekers, social workers will get the opportunity to view many aspects of what a social work department can offer as an employer.

Go to our website to sign up for our daily e-newsletter and to engage with the social work issues of today.

Name: El Watan
Description: Le quotidien El Watan a été lancé le 8 octobre 1990, dans le sillage des réformes politiques, par vingt journalistes regroupés dans la SPA El Watan. Premier journal indépendant du matin, d’expression française, à être édité en Algérie, il a basé sa ligne éditoriale sur un traitement objectif de l’information, en développant des analyses pertinentes, une vérification rigoureuse des informations publiées et un souci constant d’ouverture à l’ensemble des sensibilités politiques du pays, notamment celle de l’opposition démocratique.

Name: finances news hebdo
Description:
Créé en 1998, Finances News Hebdo, premier hebdomadaire marocain d’informations financières, a su instaurer les bases d’un développement durable qui lui permettent, aujourd’hui, d’être un journal de référence dans le paysage médiatique. La crédibilité acquise par notre publication prend racine dans notre respect rigoureux de la pratique journalistique, circonscrite autour de l’éthique et de la déontologie.
Des valeurs que nous avons érigées en principe de base et qui gouvernent, chaque jour, tout acte que nous entreprenons dans le sens d’informer nos lecteurs en toute rigueur et objectivité. D’où notre devise: «Nous ne donnons pas juste l’information, mais l’information juste».
Tout le sens de cette devise est à apprécier sous l’angle de la profession que nous exerçons, mais également au regard de notre credo, à savoir l’information boursière et financière, laquelle ne tolère aucune approximation ni aucun jugement hâtif.
C’est pourquoi toute une équipe de journalistes spécialisés est sans cesse mobilisée afin de livrer des informations pointues et conformes aux exigences de nos partenaires et lecteurs. Tel est le cas par exemple de la rigueur que nous observons dans la publication périodique de la communication financière des entreprises.
Tout travail est cependant perfectible. C’est d’ailleurs à ce titre que nous sommes constamment dans une dynamique de progrès et d’amélioration de notre produit, tant au niveau de la forme que du fond. Ce qui explique la nouvelle maquette que nous avons adoptée et qui se veut plus aérée, mieux agencée et beaucoup plus riche en terme de contenu. Le tout emballé dans l’objectivité et la rigueur professionnelle.
C’est votre souhait, et nous en faisons une exigence.

Name: theGrio
Description:
TheGrio.com, owned by Entertainment Studios LLC, is the first video-centric news community site devoted to providing African-Americans with stories and perspectives that appeal to them but are underrepresented in existing national news outlets. TheGrio features aggregated and original video packages, news articles, and blogs on topics from breaking news, politics, health, business, and entertainment, which concern its niche audience.

The goal of TheGrio is to be the news portal that satisfies the desire of African-Americans to stay informed and connected with their community. TheGrio’s editorial mandate is to focus on news and events that have a unique interest and/or pronounced impact within the national African Americans audience.

Name: BINGE AUDIO
Description: Binge Audio, le média podcast qui raconte le monde de demain.

Name: Truly Twenties
Description:
As the ultimate survival guide, Truly Twenties is here to help you navigate your way through your twenties with the most relatable and inspiring content. You'll find careers advice, the latest good news and stuff to keep you going when you need it the most.  

Truly Twenties aims to highlight different experiences from a diverse range of twenty-something year olds, who will discuss their stories or advice from what they have learnt during this decade so far.

Name: LASIA SENEGAL
Description: Ce blog s’adresse aux élèves, aux étudiants, aux jeunes diplômés et à toutes les personnes intéressées par l’actualité éducative au Sénégal et ailleurs, mais aussi par des trucs et astuces pour mieux réussir leurs parcours d’apprentissage et leurs projets socio-professionnels.

Name: News Tank Mobilités
Description:
News Tank Mobilités est le vecteur d'expression et de notoriété des élus et dirigeants du secteur des mobilités.

Filiale du groupe News Tank Network, News Tank Mobilités est l'agence d'informations économiques et stratégiques des politiques de mobilités des collectivités, des entreprises et de leurs partenaires.
News Tank Mobilités mobilise une équipe de journalistes spécialisés, d'experts et de contributeurs. 

Outil d'intelligence économique et d'influence, il donne aux élus et décideurs abonnés la faculté de connaître et de comprendre au mieux le secteur des mobilités et de leur décarbonation et contribuer ainsi à la réussite de leurs projets. 

Outre l'accès au média d'informations économiques et politiques, être abonnés est aussi pour nos lecteurs l'opportunité d'accéder à nos matinales politiques "Rdv Debrief Mobilités", événements de networking confidentiel à forte valeur ajoutée organisés chaque mois avec les principaux élus / parlementaires en charge des mobilités.

Nos services sont accessibles sur abonnement. News Tank Mobilités fonctionne sans publicité, dans le respect d'une charte déontologique exigeante, autant de garanties de l’indépendance de l’information produite.
@NewsTankMobilités

Name: Megayacht News
Description: MegayachtNews.com is the first, and only, independent website devoted to educating American luxury-yacht owners and buyers. We help these savvy consumers and their representatives make better-informed decisions when it comes to commissioning and using their yachts. Equally important, from day one in 2007, MegayachtNews.com has only published all-original content, for real stories of real interest. Articles focus on the leading builders, designers, marinas, cruising destinations, and more.

Name: Revista Ferroviária
Description:
A Revista Ferroviária é a mais tradicional mídia jornalística do Brasil voltada para notícias sobre o setor metroferroviário, infraestrutura ferroviária/logística e mobilidade urbana. A publicação é distribuída regularmente desde 1940, ano de sua fundação. 

A RF impressa, atualmente com circulação bimestral, contempla editorias exclusivas, que falam sobre negócios, operação ferroviária de carga e de passageiros, indústria, estudos de mercado, artigos técnicos/acadêmicos, estatísticas de movimentação, além de entrevistas com personalidades importantes do setor ferroviário.  

Com uma tiragem de 3 mil exemplares, a RF é distribuída através de nosso mailling list, assinaturas, feiras e eventos. 

O Portal da Revista Ferroviária www.revistaferroviaria.com.br  é atualizado diariamente pela redação da Revista Ferroviária, registrando média aferível de 161.934 visualizações de página mensal.
 
O Site contém a versão digital da Revista Ferroviária e edições anteriores que permite a visualização de todo o conteúdo da versão impressa. 

A newsletter cobre o noticiário nacional e internacional do ponto de vista da economia, dos negócios, da política, inovação e preservação, contém notícias preparada por uma equipe qualificada e um clipping dos principais portais/jornal de conteúdo do Brasil. 

A editora tem no portfólio outros produtos voltados para o mercado, como o Anuário RF, que traz uma radiografia completa do setor ferroviário, o Mapa das Estradas de Ferro e o videocast Pod nos Trilhos, plataforma de entrevistas com personalidades relevantes da ferrovia, para uma conversa desenvolta e informativa sobre esse mercado no Brasil.  

Anualmente, organizamos também o Prêmio Revista Ferroviária, considerado o maior evento metroferroviário do Brasil. 

Anuncie, assine e seja um parceiro da Revista Ferroviária.
Contate-nos: + 55 (11) 4412-8845 (11) 99173-0970

Name: Beef Central

Name: Kitco NEWS
Description: Kitco Media is a global financial and commodities media leader with an average monthly audience of 6 million unique users. Kitco News garners tens of millions of organic video views monthly across Facebook, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, and affiliate partners distributed video platforms. At the heart of the media division is the Kitco News team, reporting on the metals, commodities, financial, and crypto markets with accuracy and objectivity. Our goal is to help investors make informed market decisions through in-depth reporting, daily market roundups, interviews with prominent industry figures, comprehensive coverage (often exclusive) of important industry events, and analyses of market-affecting developments. Our vision is to empower audiences with unbiased commodity news, differing views and a global perspective.

Name: People Of India
Description:

(Insta: @officialpeopleofindia, @kahaniyan_poi, @swades_poi)

Name: Our Grandfather Story (OGS)
Description:
We're a digital channel dedicated to exploring Southeast Asian stories, with over 5 million monthly viewers. We seek to connect and inspire the region through authentic storytelling and candid perspectives. 

OGS is a media brand under UNFOLD Asia. Find out more: www.unfoldasia.com

Name: ausbiz
Description:
We're Australia's only continuous live-streaming network dedicated to business and markets and we pride ourselves on delivering an independent and balanced perspective.  

Unlike some of our competitors, our expert guests do not pay to join us on ausbiz; and we'll always be honest with you about what's marketing and what's not. We're genuinely curious about businesses, markets, start-ups, and the people who make them tick.  

ausbiz partners with business, providing a platform to inform, inspire and share with our stakeholders. We know business is about more than just numbers; it's about people. And we love nothing more than talking to them.

Since launching in 2019, our community has grown to over 120,000 members and interview more than 100 experts every week!

Name: HR News - HR a management
Description:
HR News gives you the courage and impetus to make a difference. In a few minutes, you will learn procedures that can help you better solve problem situations that arise in the workplace and in your personal life.

Thanks to HR News, you have a helper next to you who monitors developments in the field of managerial development, human resources management and self-management on your behalf.

Own author's articles and interviews with personalities, Czech annotations of foreign materials focused on news from the field of management, human resources management and marketing, personnel changes in managerial positions in the Czech Republic and glosses.

HR News offers links to online resources from around the world, from which you can draw inspiration.

Name: Small Caps
Description:
Small Caps is Australia's #1 site for keeping investors informed on stock market news and information of ASX listed small cap companies across all sectors.

Small Caps provides investors with information on ASX listed small cap companies.

The site features articles on ASX listed companies, trending industry topics and news, the latest announcements, market data, charts and pricing tools, interviews with CEOs/Directors, videos, podcast, stock market events and roadshows, upcoming IPOs, a free newsletter and much more.

Small Caps covers all sectors of the market.

Website: https://smallcaps.com.au/
Newsletter: https://smallcaps.com.au/subscribe/

Name: The Penny Hoarder
Description:
The Penny Hoarder, a Clearlink company, is one of the largest personal finance websites reaching millions of readers each month across the country. Its purpose is to share actionable articles and resources to teach people how to earn, save and manage their money. 

We provide competitive salaries, benefits and other perks to all our employees. We love working with results-driven, talented professionals. If you want to be inspired daily by a team that truly makes a difference, we encourage you to apply to join our team.

Competitive compensation
Generous paid time off and 10 paid holidays
401(k) match
Subsidized medical insurance, as well as dental, vision, disability and supplemental plans
Life insurance with options to buy up

Name: Sustainability Middle East News
Description:
ABOUT SMEN

Sustainability Middle East News (SMEN) is a news publishing platform drawing on years of experience in the sustainability arena, specifically in the Middle East. 

Our aim is to bring new energy to the sector, with a threefold mission to: 

1.	Inform the Middle East region with regards to the latest developments in sustainability
2.	To be a core driver of positive change
3.	To be a pioneer in bringing together key voices from academia, governance and business to create a cleaner, greener, and happier Middle East region

SMEN aims to achieve this mission via a range of interactive publications (both digital and in print), daily news and insight, unforgettable industry-leading events, and special seminars. 

WHY SMEN? 

SMEN has a unique place in the sector and region as the team behind it has extensive experience in both. 

Firstly, SMEN is an offshoot of CBM Media Group, a Dubai-based publisher and 5-star events company known for producing the highly esteemed transport and logistics title Transport & Logistics Middle East (TLME), as well as a string of highly successful events such as The Transport & Logistics Excellence Awards, Future of Logistics Conference & The Transport & Logistics Innovation Awards in Dubai.  

With this backing, SMEN already has a deep understanding of the importance, power, and potential of sustainable developments as transport and logistics is innately tied to this core issue, meaning that SMEN already works with several big industry names and renowned academics on green-related matters. 

Secondly, SMEN management has prior experience in running industry-leading sustainability-focused titles, while fostering an international editorial team with experience writing on sustainability for a number of years, as well as hosting events in this specific area. 

For any inquiries, please feel free to reach out to our editorial team at smenews@cbmmediagroup.com.

Name: Economica.net
Description:
Economica.net acoperă toate zonele de interes din economia României, dar oferă cititorilor săi şi informaţiile de pe pieţele internaţionale. 
Conţinutul editorial al Economica.net este asigurat de o echipă editorială experimentată, formată din 12 jurnalişti.

Name: Digital Health Today

Join our community to learn more about the latest advances, leading research and best practices for growing and scaling digital health solutions.

FORESIGHT Climate & Energy’s audio journalism helps you grasp the energy transition in your sector and beyond in just 15 minutes a day. With our app-based, hands-free format, gaining expert insights into energy's complex and interconnected future has never been easier to fit into your daily routine.

https://apps.apple.com/dk/app/foresight-climate-energy/id1533422616

Join us in shaping the future of the energy transition.

Sign up for our newsletter: http://eepurl.com/iHPf6U

Name: Italian Podcast
Description: A volte può bastare ascoltare un video per darti la motivazione necessaria in una giornata no. Qui potrai trovare un video nuovo ogni giorno per vedere le cose da un'altra prospettiva, per riflettere, per sorridere e per motivarti. Cosa aspetti? Seguici per non perderteli.

Name: Pillole di Economia
Description:
Pillole di Economia è un autorevole punto di riferimento in Italia per centinaia di migliaia di appassionati di economia, investimenti e finanza, nonché per coloro che aspirano a sviluppare una solida consapevolezza finanziaria. In un Paese dove la formazione e l’alfabetizzazione finanziaria sono essenziali ma spesso carenti, l’obiettivo del progetto è di ridurre questo gap.

Pillole di Economia crea contenuti multimediali originali, con un tone of voice iconico e riconoscibile, rendendo accessibili concetti economici complessi e supportando le persone nel prendere decisioni informate. Inoltre, aiuta le aziende ad approcciarsi a un target molto attento e consapevole, fornendo risorse indispensabili per raggiungere e informare consumatori e risparmiatori consapevoli.

Name: Undercurrent News
Description:
Undercurrent News is a global seafood price reporting agency (PRA), news and data provider. 

UCN provides the global seafood sector with data-driven news on prices, supply, trade, policy, mergers and acquisitions and company developments. 

The company has built proprietary global and US wholesale pricing platforms, in addition to a seafood trade tracker.

Name: politykazdrowotna.com
Description:
politykazdrowotna.com jest jednym z największych i najchętniej wybieranych portali zdrowotnych w Polsce. Jesteśmy postrzegani jako najbardziej wiarygodne źródło informacji poświęconych systemowi ochrony zdrowia w Polsce i na świecie, ale także edukacji zdrowotnej dla mediów niebranżowych. Nasi dziennikarze regularnie występują w roli ekspertów w mediach publicznych i komercyjnych, a artykuły i wywiady poświęcone zdrowiu, jako części gospodarki, cytowane są przez media o największym zasięgu w Polsce. 

W czasie rozwoju epidemii, kiedy wiarygodność, rzetelność i szybkość podawania informacji są kluczowe, byliśmy najchętniej odwiedzanym branżowym portalem medycznym w Polsce i 12 na świecie w kategorii Public Health And Safety.  Nasze publikacje i raporty poświęcone aktualnej sytuacji w zdrowiu, polityce i gospodarce śledziło ponad 3,5 mln czytelników. 

Redakcja Polityki Zdrowotnej mieści się w jednym z najciekawszych miejsc na mapie Warszawy -  Varso Place, którego częścią jest Varso Tower - najwyższy budynek w Unii Europejskiej. Do Państwa dyspozycji oddajemy zaawansowane technologicznie przestrzenie, w tym profesjonalne studio nagraniowe, gwarantujące najwyższą jakość rejestracji dźwięku i obrazu, a przy tym niespotykaną atmosferę w biznesowym środowisku Cambridge Innovation Center.

Jesteśmy wyłącznie organicznie rozwijającym się portalem. Działamy szybko, wyczerpująco i rzetelnie. Naszymi czytelnikami są nie tylko politycy, decydenci, pracownicy systemu ochrony zdrowia, zbudowaliśmy także szerokie grono odbiorców, którzy nie są związani z branżą medyczną, a poszukują sprawdzonych i przystępnie podanych informacji dotyczących zdrowia, systemu i nowych technologii.


Będzie nam miło z Państwem współpracować.

Name: Haitian Times
Description:
The Haitian Times was founded in 1999 as a weekly English language newspaper based in Brooklyn, NY. Since 2012, it has morphed into an online only publication broadening its audience to include Haitians from all over the world. The newspaper is widely regarded as the most authoritative voice for Haitian Diaspora. It is also considered one of the best ethnic media publications in the United States.

Our aim is to share the stories of Haitians across the Diaspora, shed light on issues that impact Haitian enclaves and highlight the achievements of changemakers in our community.

Name: News Tank Culture
Description:
News Tank Culture est un média dédié aux professionnels du secteur culturel et des ICC, spécialisé dans quatre domaines : Musiques ; Spectacle vivant ;  Musées, monuments, patrimoine, art contemporain et marché de l’art ; et Nouvelles Images.

Seule offre d’informations économique, politique et institutionnelle sur ces différents champs, News Tank Culture est un média indépendant et innovant, 100 % numérique, neutre, concis et souvent exclusif. 

News Tank propose des dossiers de fond, des indicateurs, des interviews et des tribunes de dirigeants, des analyses, ainsi qu’un annuaire des personnes et des organisations du secteur culturel.

News Tank Culture organise chaque année le forum Think Culture, afin de penser les nouveaux enjeux de la culture et de partager les innovations.

@NewsTankCulture

Name: JournalismUK
Description:
Journalism.co.uk is a Brighton-based independent media company providing industry news coverage, job opportunities and training for media professionals. 

Since 1999, we’ve been dedicated to helping journalists and newsrooms find career success. Our articles are packed with information, advice, resources, tips, and interviews with industry experts.

We are the company behind the Newsrewired conference, where we invite the brightest minds in the business to speak on cutting-edge developments in digital publishing. Previous Newsrewired speakers have worked for some of the most important and most innovative organisations on the scene, including Reuters, the BBC, Headlines Network, TBIJ, Tortoise and many more.

As well as our editorial, Journalism.co.uk is your one-stop shop for career development opportunities. Apply for top media vacancies on the jobs board, advertise your freelance services on the directory, publish and browse press releases, or boost your skills with one of our training courses.

The world is in need of quality journalism. We’re here to help you create it. Visit https://www.journalism.co.uk to get involved.

Name: Londonist Ltd
Description:
Londonist is your guide to the capital and everything that happens in it. That means news, reviews, events, food and drink, culture, the history and future of the city.

We publish the hugely popular website londonist.com, produce lively, relevant, quality London content, manage multiple Londonist social media channels and host original live events. 

Londonist.com was established as a hobby blog in 2004 by a bunch of London enthusiasts, the first European edition of the NYC-based Gothamist Network. Londonist Ltd was created in 2010 to operate the website as a UK franchise and the business was built from the ground up, establishing revenue streams through display advertising and an innovative sponsored content offer. 

Today, Londonist attracts over 1m unique visitors and over 3million pageviews every month. Our combined social media following exceeds 1m fans. We employ 10 staff and commission work from a large network of freelancers. 

Our business offers a fantastic platform for London cultural institutions, entertainment venues, businesses and brands to reach one million Londoners with an avid London interest, through online promotional opportunities. Visit our advertising website: http://www.londonistltd.com/

Name: Lepetitjournal.com
Description:
Créé en 2001, lepetitjournal.com est devenu le média de référence des Français expatriés et des francophones dans le monde. Notre  mission  est  d’apporter  actualités  et  informations   pratiques au travers notre réseau de 45 éditions. Nous  relayons  ainsi  les  activités  de  l’ensemble  des   institutionnels, entreprises et associations porteurs de projets pour les Français et francophones de l’étranger. 
 
Totalement gratuit et indépendant, lepetitjournal.com offre un contenu riche et varié, grâce à sa rédaction internationale et ses partenaires journalistes implantés localement. Le site web regroupe des rubriques thématiques et des infos par ville.

Ces informations sont également relayées chaque jour aux 120.000 abonnés à notre newsletter gratuite. Désormais, chaque mois ce sont plus de 350 000 visiteurs qui consultent plus d’un 1,2 million de pages vues sur notre site.

Notre audience est constituée principalement :
- de Français   (cadres   expatriés   et   leur   famille,   chef   d’entreprise   /   artisans,   diplomates,   membres du réseau culturel, VIE/VIA, étudiants en échange,...)
- d’un   public   francophone   et   francophile   (décideurs,   professeurs et étudiants de Français,...  )

Name: Dimensione Infermiere
Description:
La mission di DimensioneInfermiere.it è quella di portare qualità nell'informazione e nella cultura infermieristica, pubblicando solo il meglio che i professionisti sono in grado di produrre e che noi tutti vorremmo leggere. Senza infantili copia/incolla, ridicole fake news, cronaca spicciola, gossip di bassissimo livello o articoletti acchiappa-like; tutte cose, queste, che non ci interessano affatto e per cui altri, ormai, si sono specializzati.
Nato nel 2016 dal progetto di un giovane infermiere insieme alla casa editrice Maggioli, ad oggi il blog si è arricchito di elementi fondamentali e di professionalità diverse, che faranno di tutto per renderlo un vero punto di riferimento per chi è interessato solo ai migliori argomenti e approfondimenti. Perché il tempo di un infermiere che legge è importante, non va sprecato. E perché a noi interessa solo chi cerca di aggiornarsi e vuole crescere davvero.

Name: Yachting International Radio
Description:
Yachting International Radio's story is one of passion, innovation, and a commitment to giving a voice to the global yachting community. Founded by Rhea Rouw, the platform was born out of a desire to create a space where the stories of the yachting industry could be told, celebrated, and shared with the world. Recognizing a gap in the industry for a media outlet that focused not just on luxury yachts but also on the people, culture, and behind-the-scenes aspects of yachting, Yachting International Radio set out to fill that void.

From the beginning, Yachting International Radio has been about more than just boats. It’s about the lifestyle, the challenges, and the triumphs of those who live and work on the water. The platform has grown to become a trusted source for news, interviews, and content that spans all aspects of the yachting world—from industry insights and technological innovations to personal stories and profiles of the people who make the industry what it is.

Yachting International Radio is particularly proud of its commitment to inclusivity and diversity within the yachting community. The platform actively seeks out and amplifies voices from all corners of the industry, with a special focus on underrepresented groups such as women in yachting. This dedication to telling a broader, more inclusive range of stories has set Yachting International Radio apart as a leader in the industry, not just in media coverage, but in shaping the future of yachting culture.

With a growing audience and an expanding range of content, Yachting International Radio continues to evolve, always staying true to its core mission: to connect, inform, and inspire the yachting community worldwide.

Name: Robert Choi | Author & Speaker
Description:
I’m a trauma-aware strategist, speaker, and author who spent nearly two decades leading complex HR and organizational change across public institutions, intelligence agencies, and billion-dollar systems. But behind the titles and outcomes was a deeper truth: I was surviving, not thriving.

My work today focuses on exposing the hidden emotional costs of productivity and distractions—and helping people and systems build something more sustainable. Through my upcoming TEDx talk, From a Human Doing to a Human Being, and my new book of the same name, I challenge the cultural myth that our worth is tied to our output. I don’t preach hustle. I teach people how to feel safe slowing down to really meet themselves.

Because success without peace isn’t success—it’s just high-functioning survival.

Name: TDAH
Description:
Le TDAH adulte est un sujet encore mal appréhendé par la société.

Cette page LinkedIn a pour objectif de sensibiliser sans stigmatiser avec 3 objectifs principaux : 

• Partager de l’information fiable sur le TDAH adulte 
• Partager des posts ludiques et illustrés faciles à partager
• Faire connaître le TDAH au monde du travail 

L’équipe derrière cette page est une équipe de personnes directement concernées par un TDAH.

Nous croyons à l’importance des échanges et de la diversité des communications. 

Nous partageons :
- des propos de spécialistes du sujet (psychologues, psychiatres, etc)
- des études (françaises ET internationales…)
- la parole des personnes concernées (l’humour est possible !)

Notre secteur d’action est principalement le monde du travail.

• Nous réalisons des sensibilisations dans le monde du travail 
• Nous formons les RH, managers, salariés à l’impact du TDAH au travail 
• Nous nous engageons sur le sujet de la santé mentale depuis 2019 et avons travaillé avec de nombreuses entreprises. 

Spécialistes du monde professionnel et des enjeux de QVT et diversité, nous sommes convaincus que le monde professionnel a son rôle à jouer. 

Merci à toutes les entreprises qui nous font confiance. 

Pour les demandes : catherine@tdah.io ou 07.82.08.34.13

Name: Le Diplomate média
Description:
« Le Diplomate, le media de la géopolitique et de la diplomatie du réel ! »
Qui sommes-nous ?
Le Diplomate a pour ambition d’être un site d’information, un magazine de géopolitique et une revue d’actualité stratégique, qui sera accompagnée d’une édition papier trimestrielle et d’un service de vérification d’informations.

Cette nouvelle approche de communication globale fondée sur le décryptage est plus nécessaire que jamais, dans cette actuelle révolution numérique planétaire et à une époque où la frontière entre information et désinformation, « guerre » des fake news, vérité et mensonge, manipulation et contre-manipulation, est de plus en plus perméable.

Le Diplomate est né presque un an après le début de l’invasion de l’Ukraine par la Russie. Cette grave crise a de nouveau plongé l’Europe pacifiée, post-Seconde guerre mondiale et post-Guerre froide, dans le tragique et la guerre interétatique (que l’on croyait pourtant réservée aux pays du sud ou d’Asie).

Or, en période de conflit, et c’est tout à fait normal, la désinformation, ce fameux « brouillard de guerre », sévit de plus belle et bat son plein. La propagande, pas seulement du côté russe ou des dictatures anti-occidentales en général, mais également de la part de « l’Occident global », est omniprésente.

D’où la nécessité vitale d’un décryptage que l’on ne peut laisser aux seuls journalistes de profession ou pire, à des « observateurs » patentés, déconnectés des réalités et hors-sol, eux-mêmes souvent victimes de « l’instant » et relais, volontaires ou pas (pour les plus naïfs !), de propagandes idéologiques partisanes ou étatiques et de lieux communs politiquement corrects qui s’auto-alimentent d’une chaine d’info à l’autre.

Cabinet secretaries and Ministers start their mornings with our analysis. CEOs shape strategy around our reporting. Advocacy leaders rely on our insights to move policy. Innovation has always been a core tenet of our story. At launch, we bet that depth would trump scale, that talent would trump traffic, and that politics would become central to modern life. In 2011, we made another bet and launched POLITICO Pro to help decision-makers understand the business of government, transforming both how they shape government action and the business of journalism itself.

These bets have made POLITICO the most successful digital news startup of its generation and the indispensable resource for leaders who shape the future. Today, we are a rarity in media: a growing, profitable, and sustainable news organization.

POLITICO is a subsidiary of Axel Springer SE, a family-owned transatlantic media company headquartered in Berlin and New York. Axel Springer is dedicated

Political professionals read POLITICO. Public policy professionals need POLITICO. And those who hunger to better understand Washington and government power centers around the globe go to POLITICO first.

Name: Nieman Journalism Lab
Description:
The Nieman Journalism Lab is an attempt to help journalism figure out its future in an Internet age.

The Internet has brought forth an unprecedented flowering of news and information. But it has also destabilized the old business models that have supported quality journalism for decades. Good journalists across the country are losing their jobs or adjusting to a radically new news environment online. We want to highlight attempts at innovation and figure out what makes them succeed or fail. We want to find good ideas for others to steal. We want to help reporters and editors adjust to their online labors; we want to help traditional news organizations find a way to survive; we want to help the new crop of startups that will complement — or supplant — them.

We are fundamentally optimistic.

We don’t pretend to have even five percent of all the answers, but we do know a lot of smart people. Primary among them are our readers; we hope your contributions will make the Lab a collaborative exchange of ideas. Tell us what’s happening around you, or what should be.

We hope you enjoy the work we do, and that you’ll join the conversation as it evolves.

Name: Freakonomics
Description: It began when New York journalist and author Stephen J. Dubner went to Chicago to write about award-winning economist Steven D. Levitt for The New York Times Magazine. Dubner had been reluctant to take the assignment (he was in the middle of writing a book about the psychology of money). Levitt was reluctant to be shadowed by a journalist (but his mother loved the Times Magazine, so he gave in). The article came out, and led to an unexpected partnership. Levitt and Dubner wrote Freakonomics, a book about cheating teachers, bizarre baby names, self-dealing Realtors, and crack-selling mama’s boys. They figured it would sell about 80 copies. Instead, it took up long-term residency on the Times best-seller list, and went on to sell more than 4 million copies in 35 languages. Then they wrote SuperFreakonomics. It also became a worldwide best-seller. A lot of other stuff happened, too. A blog. A documentary film. Jon Stewart and Beauty and the Geek! Lectures. A pair of pants. A radio show. Not bad for a partnership born of such profound reluctance.

Name: NEWJ
Description:
NEWJ (New Emerging World of Journalism Limited) is one of India’s fastest growing media-tech companies, founded by  Shalabh Upadhyay and Kunal Chaudhary and backed by Jio Platforms Limited. It is a video-only, mobile-first publisher focused on creating and producing high impact video content for the smartphone obsessed young Indian.

Founded in 2018, the company’s mission is to tell stories that matter to India’s masses and remains committed to helping build a ‘Digital Bharat’ as well as grow the country’s Digital Knowledge Economy through impactful and India-centric storytelling. An important part of the mission is to reduce the urban-rural divide in India’s new media space by leveraging data and tech to serve one of the largest and fastest growing news markets in the world.

As a “social-first” publisher, NEWJ incorporates stories of all genres under an umbrella platform and is present in thirteen languages namely Hindi, English, Tamil, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, Telugu, Kannada, Punjabi, Odia, Assamese, Urdu, and Malayalam. From politics (NEWJ Rajneeti) and entertainment (Filmy) to sports (Game On) and informative and explainer stories (Desified), NEWJ covers it all.

NEWJ aims to scale up its capabilities in visual storytelling with a focus on #BharatFirst and has aggregated over 16.9 billion views since inception reaching an audience of tens of millions across a dozen social media and OTT platforms. It offers its partners and clients 9 times higher engagement rate and 5.5 times higher view to audience ratio compared to average industry standards As many as 850 video stories produced by the ‘NEWJRoom’ have recorded over a million views each.

NEWJ was ranked 35th amongst the top 50 Global Digital Media Companies by Tubular Labs Ltd

Name: Poder360
Description:
O Poder360 é uma empresa de jornalismo profissional. Publica textos, fotos, vídeos e newsletters diariamente. Sua sede é na capital da República, Brasília.

Começou em 18 de abril de 2000. Nesta data, o jornalista Fernando Rodrigues passou a publicar uma página sobre assuntos políticos. Em 22 de novembro de 2016, a página se transformou no Poder360.

Depois de várias reformulações, o Poder360 é a operação jornalística nativa digital sobre política e assuntos do poder mais antiga em atividade contínua na internet brasileira.
