Name: International Consortium of Investigative Journalists (ICIJ)
Description:
The International Consortium of Investigative Journalists tells stories that show how the world really works, triggering positive change.

We are driven by the belief that citizens have the right to be better informed, that access to independently sourced facts is not only essential for democracy but is also a fundamental human right.

Transparency is at the center of everything we do.

ICIJ has directed the largest cross-border reporting initiatives in history, convincing reporters across the globe to set aside traditional rivalries to uncover corruption, abuses of power and grave harms inflicted on the world's most vulnerable people. We work with a global network that includes more than 100 media partners and hundreds of the world’s best investigative journalists.

Our track record of breaking stories that rock the world has made ICIJ an indispensable news source, and a leader in the global battle for truth.

For more information about ICIJ, see http://www.icij.org/about

Name: Light Reading
Description:
Light Reading is an independent B2B digital media platform providing daily news, analysis and insight for the global communications networking and services industry. Our broad readership and solid reputation make us the leading resource for telecom, mobile and cable network operators, cloud services players and all the companies that develop and supply them with technology, applications and professional services. Light Reading has over 500,000 qualified registered users, our websites attract over 1.3 million monthly page views and our newsletters are sent out to 220,000 opt in subscribers.

Our brand is also active across all social media channels, with over 100,000 members and followers. The Light Reading Group incorporates a dedicated research division Heavy Reading, over 15 successful annual industry events including its flagship Big 5G Event (formerly the Big Communications Event), several targeted online communities (including Security Now, Connecting Africa and Broadband World News) that dig even deeper into key areas of the global communications industry and its sister industry news site Telecoms.com.

Light Reading is the go-to, independent online news analysis and opinion portal for the global communications networking and services industry that comprises telecom, mobile and cable network operators, the cloud services players (including the web-scale giants) and all the companies that develop and supply them with technology, applications and professional services.

The Light Reading team has been identifying and reporting on the key communications industry trends since the turn of the century and has an unrivalled team of experienced journalists and editors based across North America and Europe that informs and (we hope) entertains those involved in this vital multi-trillion-dollar sector.

Name: in a nutshell – kurzgesagt
Description:
Kurzgesagt (German for „in a nutshell“) is a Munich-based YouTube channel that wants to make science and humanism appealing to as many people as possible.

Founded in 2013, we create content that sparks curiosity, puts things into perspective, and makes science fun and accessible. We are convinced that good things take time, care, and precision. In an age of information overload, we produce content that has value and that people actually notice and remember. 

There is no boring topic, you just have to tell a good story.

We deliver comprehensive and unbiased coverage through multimedia platforms, fostering a deeper understanding of the energy sector and inspiring positive action. Join us on LinkedIn for the latest industry insights, trends, and innovative solutions as we shape a sustainable and thriving future together.

Name: The Africa Report
Description:
The Africa Report is one of Africa's leading news organisations, recognised internationally for its impartial and authoritative stance. Every day we deliver original reporting, sharp analysis and informed opinion, to guide you through Africa's 54 diverse political and business environments.

We are a digital newsroom delivering an informative, intelligent insight to this most dynamic continent on daily basis and a quarterly print magazine.

Whether you are running a digital start-up in Nairobi, a banker in Johannesburg, a public official in Accra, or simply briefing the boss, you will find in The Africa Report the analysis and context you need and that you will find nowhere else. 

Don't get boxed in by today's opinions.
Visit https://www.theafricareport.com, follow us on LinkedIn, Facebook and Twitter, and subscribe now: https://www.webscribe.co.uk/magazine/theafricareport 

The Africa Report is published by Jeune Afrique Media Group (JAMG), the premier publishing and events company in Africa. JAMG produces the weekly magazine Jeune Afrique, and the leading continental business meeting, The Africa CEO Forum.

Construímos uma relação de respeito com o mercado editorial e nos tornamos parâmetro para o mercado e para grandes profissionais. Name: The Cannabis Conversation
Description:
As cannabis remerges from 80 years of prohibition, stigmas are being broken down, positive research is finally being allowed, and new and varied applications of the plant are being developed every day. 

From medical cannabis, cannabidiol (CBD), and other cannabinoids being used to treat symptoms such as anxiety, pain and epilepsy, to hemp being used for seeds, oil and as an amazing sustainable material - the much maligned and misunderstood cannabis plant is giving birth to a multi-billion dollar global industry.

I want to find out more about what's happening, and I'm bringing you along for the ride. Join me on the podcast as I speak to a wide variety of guests who are helping to shape this nascent sector, including patients, lawyers, doctors, scientists, entrepreneurs, investors and many more.

Please also get in touch at www.canverse.global to see how we can help your cannabis business grow

Name: PharmaStar
Description:
I nuovi farmaci in commercio in Italia, le novità dall’Ema e dall’Fda. I nuovi trials clinici  che hanno per oggetto lo studio dei farmaci. Le notizie di business provenienti dal mondo farmaceutico. Questo e molto altro è possibile trovare su PharmaStar, un giornale on-line sui farmaci, registrato al tribunale di Milano, che viene aggiornato a getto continuo.  
Sul sito internet è possibile trovare quasi 30mila articoli e oltre 7mila video interviste ai protagonisti della medicina che consentono di avere una visione ravvicinata di quanto accade oggi nel mondo del farmaco.
Si tratta di un servizio gratuito rivolto a farmacisti, medici, giornalisti scientifici nonché al management farmaceutico e a tutti coloro che sono interessati ai progressi nella medicina. Il giornale è realizzato da una redazione composta da giornalisti scientifici e medical writer.
La medicina è la nostra passione.

Name: Elite Daily
Description: Elite Daily is a site for and by women who are discovering the world, and themselves in the process. Our writers, like our readers, come at life from a wide range of backgrounds, but we're all eager to learn about the world around us in a way that’s relatable, honest, and fun. But most of all, we’re in search of experiences — the kinds that could change our night, the kinds that could change our mind, and the kinds that could change our life. In the meantime, while we figure out where we stand, we’re here to help each other stand up for our friends, our beliefs, and, most of all, ourselves. And when nothing goes according to plan (does it ever?), we'll be here to laugh along with you.

Tech Insider has quickly become the #1 tech publisher on Facebook, and is the leading producer of technology video online.

Name: Eco-Business
Description:
Established in 2009, Eco-Business is Asia Pacific’s leading business intelligence and advisory platform dedicated to advancing sustainable development.

We produce trusted, high-quality multimedia content exploring the world’s most pressing challenges—and the solutions driving change. Our work is aligned with the 17 United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) and supported by a 15-year archive of news, analysis, research, and events on sustainable development topics.

Beyond journalism, we deliver research, consulting, and thought-leadership platforms that create strategic value, inform policy, strengthen business practice, and enable cross-sector collaboration. Our work has earned international recognition and multiple regional and global awards.

Headquartered in Singapore, we have a presence in Manila, Kuala Lumpur, Jakarta, Bangkok, Hong Kong, Beijing, and London. Our partners include Fortune 500 companies, multinationals, governments, multilateral institutions, civil society organisations, and philanthropic foundations committed to shaping a more sustainable future.

Name: Daily Stoic
Description: Daily Stoic is a community built around the teachings of Stoicism. Stoicism is a practical philosophy. The main thinkers that the Daily Stoic focuses on in stoicism are Marcus Aurelius, Epictetus, and Seneca. The Daily Stoic is a guide to how to practice Stoicism in your daily life, the daily routines of Stoicism, and is a practical guide to Stoicism.

Name: DROIT&PATRIMOINE
Description:
Magazine juridique incontournable, Droit & Patrimoine offre un traitement transversal et expert du droit patrimonial tout en s’intéressant à l’actualité des différents acteurs de ce secteur :

L’actualité interprofessionnelle vue du côté des acteurs du conseil patrimonial
Un dossier de fond traité de manière pluridisciplinaire
Des études pratiques, montages et consultations
L’actualité jurisprudentielle et législative décryptée par les meilleurs experts
Il traite toutes les matières ayant une incidence sur le patrimoine et permettant son optimisation (fiscalité, successions et régimes matrimoniaux, immobilier, contrats, droit des sociétés, etc.).

Name: The Cinemaholic

From long-form explainers to reviews, The Cinemaholic has everything to meet the informational needs of all types of movie, tv, and anime lovers. It is no surprise then that millions of cinephiles visit The Cinemaholic every month.

Name: AMBCrypto
Description:
AMBCrypto was founded in 2018 with a mission to simplify and bring the latest blockchain and cryptocurrency news to our readers. We have quickly grown into the digital news source for an emerging generation of cryptocurrency enthusiasts, reaching more than a million readers on a monthly basis, across the globe.

Over the past years, our news coverage has evolved from covering price-specific updates to in-depth features that include leadership insights from the industry. As the sector has grown from a fringe group to a major financial sector, our site and authors evolve with the times to provide the readers with the most relevant news.

Thank you for reading AMBCrypto. Your trust in us is important, and we will continue to tell the stories that need to be told.

Name: Herstory
Description:
Le 30 septembre 2024, 10 ans après sa création, Les Éclaireuses a ouvert un nouveau chapitre de son évolution et est devenu Herstory. 

Herstory c’est un média féminin iconique, comme il en existe dans la presse écrite et qui n’ont pas encore réussi le pari de conquérir le monde social.

Notre volonté ? 
Offrir aux jeunes femmes un média internet léché mais proche d’elles, qui raconte la vraie vie, prend le pouls de la culture et met en avant les sujets qui vont les aider à prendre leur place dans la société.

La puissance d'une communauté de femmes :
+1 M Followers sur Instagram
+3M Followers Facebook
+83K Followers sur Tiktok

Nos spécialités : 
LE BRAND CONTENT - faire rayonner les marques grâce à un contenu de qualité, une caution éditoriale forte et une équipe créative pleine d'idées. 
Notre savoir-faire : Permettre aux annonceurs de créer une véritable connexion émotionnelle entre leurs marques et notre communauté. 

LE TESTING PRODUIT - avec notre communauté Le Club Herstory, nous apportons d'importants insights à nos partenaires, un excellent SEO, un grand bouche à oreille en sélectionnant minutieusement les testeuses les plus enclines à partager leur expérience. 

L'INFLUENCE - sur tous les réseaux sociaux avec la création d'un puissant collectif de micro-influenceuses Tiktok et Instagram en France 

LA CREATION D'EVENT sur mesure pour mettre en relation nos annonceurs et notre communauté ultra ciblée et qualifiée.

Our vision is to establish and maintain a ‘New Order’ of media advertising with data and content at the heart of everything we do.

We have offices in Riyadh, KSA; Dubai & Abu Dhabi in the UAE, Cairo in Egypt and Doha in Qatar.

inv3stir apporte donc une véritable valeur ajoutée à ses followers, car elle leur épargne le temps mis à rechercher et sélectionner les bonnes informations, et elle leur fait découvrir les éléments les plus pertinents de l'actualité business d'Afrique.

Name: We are Ukraine
Description:
We are Ukraine – is the repository of the truth about the Russian-Ukrainian war and the strength of Ukraine.

It brings together the key facts about the world's support of Ukraine, opinions of the Ukrainian and world leaders, insights into Ukrainian resilience, economy, culture, history, and calls to action with links to various verified sources.

On February 24th, 2022, Russia launched an all-out military invasion of Ukraine by land, air, and sea, having accumulated over 170,000 troops on our borders in the north (Belarus), east, and south (Black Sea). It’s the biggest attack by one state against another in Europe since World War II. 

We are witnessing the destruction of an already fragile system of international security. At the time this text is written, hundreds of Ukrainian civilians have become casualties of this war, including innocent children. 

We are asking you to share the truth about what is happening. In doing so, you will be standing with Ukraine in its fight for its freedom and your own. Together we will ensure a lasting 21st-century peace. 

You can share the facts and messages once or share a new one every day. You can share these on social media, use them in publications and any other forms of communication.

This project was created by the Ukrainian Emergency Collective of enthusiastic crisis management and communications professionals united by one single purpose of ensuring that all people around the globe understand: today, the future of humankind is being decided in Ukraine. The project was initiated by the One Philosophy group of companies.

Name: The Student Journals
Description:
The Student Journals is an independent, non-partisan online magazine that gives UK university students a platform to express their individual opinion. You can voice your opinion on any matter, whether they be social, economic, political, educational or even sport and culture related. The site is here to provide opinion on a multifarious number of issues.
----------------------------------

There are three main reasons why TSJ exists:

1. We (a group of university students) felt that university students do not have an outlet from which to express their opinions on a national level.
2. We realised that students did not have opportunities to get involved in journalism at a higher level (while getting noticed by national media).
3. We wanted to develop the style of budding journalists and allow them to achieve their potential.

Thus, through TSJ, hopefully this is all now possible.

Awards: Shortlisted for Guardian Student Media Awards 2011

The portal is run by Münchner Gewerbehof- und Technologiezentrum GmbH (MGH), the organization that operates Munich’s industry centers.

The portal has become the standard initial point of (virtual) contact for startups in and around Munich. It strives to present both content and players objectively, independently and transparently. Munich Startup sheds light on the regional ecosystem and encourages networking between entrepreneurs and potential partners, investors and mentors. All key stakeholders in the Munich Startup community are involved. Ultimately, the aim is to establish Munich and the surrounding region as the location of choice for fast-growing young companies in Europe.

L'obiettivo di chi ha pensato la rivista online LOGISTICAmente.it è da un lato quello di trasferire cultura, know how ed esperienza specifica; dall'altro quello di creare un punto di incontro che coinvolga e possa offrire informazioni sulla logistica e interessanti spunti di riflessione.

Anche per questo motivo, abbiamo ampliato l'offerta di servizi organizzando corsi brevi di formazione logistica, allo scopo di fornire gli strumenti per analizzare ed eventualmente innovare l'organizzazione logistica aziendale.

Name: The Fuller Project
Description:
Since we launched in 2015, our reporting has influenced new legislation, helped end life-threatening practices, and led to large scale releases of public data. For example, our investigations have led to increased funding for maternal health care, helped rescue migrant domestic workers held against their will, prompted a major fashion brand to end abuse at their garment factory, introduced legislation to ban virginity testing, and fueled policy changes on the minimum wage for tipped workers.

We report exclusive stories centered on women that otherwise would not be told. Our long-standing focus on women, especially those facing racial or other forms of bias, leads to journalism that by challenging conventional thinking inspires action.

Our journalists spotlight critical issues and expose injustice with in-depth reporting published in renowned news outlets such as The New York Times, The Washington Post and Foreign Policy, and inside the largest and most respected newsrooms around the world from Afghanistan to India to Kenya. Partnering with legacy news outlets ensures our rigorous reporting reaches the broadest global audiences.

Our reporting is relied on by policymakers, corporate leaders, influencers and individuals across the globe, leading to better outcomes for women and their communities. As women’s standing in society improves, so does the potential for stronger democracies, and economic and political stability. A single authoritative story about women can create awareness to spark change.

Name: Trapital
Description:
I'm Dan Runcie, and I started Trapital to elevate the culture I love. The artists I once looked up to are now some of our most successful business leaders. But they rarely got the coverage they deserved.

I’ve spent my career in business reading deep strategic breakdowns on every other industry, but never hip-hop. Honestly, I was over it.

Where were the folks who looked like me? Where were the business leaders who repped what I cared about?

I first started writing about the business of hip-hop as a hobby. It was something to explore while I was job hunting after business school. My personal Medium page led to freelance writing gigs at major publications. The bylines were cool and all, but I still didn’t feel like I made an impact.

The business of hip-hop needed its own home. Trapital was launched in March 2018 and has grown ever since.

Trapital’s memos, essays, and podcasts are followed by the leading executives in music, media, tech, and more. Trapital has been seen in The Wall Street Journal, New York Times, NPR, CNBC, Axios, and more.

Learn more at trapital.co

Name: GhanaWeb
Description:
GhanaWeb is Ghana’s leading digital news and online advertising portal that is democratizing journalism, promoting freedom of expression and empowering content creators.

The open platform launched in 1999 operates under the laws of the Netherlands, a legal setup that allows Ghanaians to express themselves freely through opinion articles, multimedia content and comments.

The platform also hosts millions of user-generated content published through the GhanaWeb Reporter which is a digital media sharing platform integrated into the GhanaWeb App to give citizen journalists and content creators direct access to publish a wide range of local content.

According to the Alexa website traffic statistics, GhanaWeb is very popular among Ghanaian migrants in the United States, United Kingdom, Germany, Canada, Italy, South Africa, Netherlands, France and many other countries.

These loyal visitors and the millions of readers in Ghana have made GhanaWeb the most popular news website in Ghana and ranked the third most visited website in the country after Google and YouTube.

Editorial Team

GhanaWeb is updated with original content out of Accra by a team of editors and journalists who work around the clock to ensure balanced and unbiased coverage of the news. 

The privately-owned independent and objective portal has a team of web developers and designers who regularly improve the technology and design of the platform which has been built to be fast and efficient for its 4 million unique visitors each month.

GhanaWeb is part of the AfricaWeb Holding group, an advertising and digital solutions provider for African publishers. AfricaWeb also owns MyNigeria.com, CamerounWeb.com and TanzaniaWeb.com among other country-specific portals as part of its goal of developing viable independent news portals as well as advertising and publishing solutions for Africa. 

GhanaWeb’s Editorial Team adheres to the Editorial Standards and Policies of the AfricaWeb Group.

We also build developing countries’ capacity for communicating science and technology through our regional networks of committed individuals and organisations, practical guidance and specialist workshops.

Our main office is based in Wallingford, Oxfordshire but we have a worldwide network of registered users, advisors, consultants and freelance journalists, predominantly from developing countries, who drive our activities and vision.

فیدیبو اولین و بزرگترین فروشگاه قانونی کتاب الکترونیک فارسی است که از اسفند ۱۳۹۲ فعالیت خود را آغاز کرد. فیدیبو یک سامانه چندسکویی تولید و پخش کتاب الکترونیک است که قوانین حق تکثیر ایران را رعایت میکند.
فیدیبو علاوه بر اینکه بزرگترین پلتفرم ارائه دهنده کتاب الکترونیک و صوتی است، علاوه بر آن دستگاه های اختصاصی نیز در جهت ترویج و تسهیل کتاب خوانی در کشور تولید کرده است. از آن جمله میتوان به فیدیبوک، اولین دستگاه کتابخوان فارسی با تکنولوژی جوهر الکترونیک اشاره کرد که در سال 97 به دست مهندسین شرکت فیدیبو طراحی و تولید شد.
همچنین فیدیباکس ابتکاری دیگر از فیدیبو است که در نقش یک کتابخانه عمومی الکترونیک در سال 97 تولید شد و در متروی تهران به بهره برداری رسید. همچنین این محصول در سال ، 98 توسعه پیدا کرده و در حال حاضر اکثر دانشگاه های مطرح تهران از جمله امیرکبیر، تهران، خواجه نصیر و ... از خدمات آن بهره مند هستند.
شرکت فیدیبو در حال حاضر یکی از شرکت های زیر مجموعه دیجی کالا است.

Name: Journal des Français à l'étranger
Description:
Pourquoi créer Le Journal des Français à l’étranger ?
Jean-Pierre Pont, éditeur du Journal des Français à l’étranger, avait créé, en 1995, le journal Vivre à l’étranger, repris par Studyrama. Ces derniers en ont arrêté la version papier il y a huit ans et, depuis, il n’y a plus aucun journal sur la mobilité internationale dans les kiosques.
Il est donc parti de ce constat : l’offre d’information et de partage pour les Français qui souhaitent partir à l’étranger ou qui ont déjà fait le choix de s’installer est assez morcelée.
Le Journal Les Français à l’étranger et les livres numériques répondront aux besoins des expatriés : un contenu spécialement dédié à la mobilité internationale, rédigé par une équipe de spécialistes de l’expatriation.
Ce trimestriel est le produit papier d’un futur site internet qui sera lancé au mois de mai. Complémentaire, ce site sera essentiellement un site communautaire qui fonctionnera autour de 3 thèmes :
• Les témoignages de personnes vivant à l’étranger ou sur le retour et qui souhaitent partager leur expérience ;
• Les questions de ceux qui s’interrogent et veulent êtres rassurés ;
• Les réactions.
Vous pouvez d’ores et déjà nous signaler votre envie de partager votre expérience à travers le contact du crowdfunding. Le journal et le site internet seront enrichis par vos témoignages et par les questions qui vous préoccupent. 
Qui sommes-nous ? Des experts de la mobilité internationale !
L’éditeur : Jean-Pierre Pont
Expert en mobilité internationale depuis plus de quarante ans, Jean-Pierre Pont a fondé le magazine et le site « Vivre à l'étranger.com », a été l'auteur du « Guide du routard de l'expatrié de 1999 à 2005 ». Il a partagé son expertise sur France Info dans la chronique « Français du monde » (2005 à 2009) et sur TV5 dans les émissions « France 2007 » et « Destination réussite » (2007 à 2008).
Après avoir travaillé dans plus de 15 pays, Jean-Pierre Pont, éditeur délégué de La Voix de France Magazine, édite ce nouveau périodique… Partagez son aventure !
Les rédacteurs :
• Emmanuel Langlois
Journaliste à Radio France depuis plus de quinze ans, Emmanuel Langlois s'est spécialisé sur la thématique de la mobilité internationale au cours de sa carrière. Il est le chroniqueur de l'émission « Français du monde », diffusée sur France Info et l'auteur de « S'expatrier : vous en rêvez, ils l'ont fait ! » aux éditions Studyrama.
• Didier Bras
Après avoir été secrétaire de rédaction pour Le Nouvel Observateur pendant plus de dix ans, Didier Bras a été le rédacteur en chef de nombreux hors-séries. Il contribue aujourd'hui à plusieurs périodiques, dont « La Voix de France Magazine ».
• Nathalie Laville
Ancienne secrétaire générale de la rédaction des guides du Nouvel Observateur, Nathalie Laville a contribué a de nombreux supports médiatiques traitant de l’expatriation : rédactrice en chef du magazine « Vivre à l’étranger », rédactrice pour « La Voix de France », elle a aussi contribué à plusieurs sites dédiés aux expatriés (Start Les Echos, Alternatives Economiques...).

Our story began in 2016. The aim was to cover the gap in the information provided around the rock industry in Greece.

Within the following two years, we enriched the page with topics that covered not only the Greek, but also the international stone market, as well as subjects of the wider stone industry.

Today, our page is available in three languages: Greek, Italian and English and numbers more than 10.000 unique users from all over the world (India, Italia, America, Turkey etc.)

The Stonenews.eu team posts daily rich content that includes: articles, surveys, statistical data records, news and multimedia material. The subjects covered among others are: characteristics, procedures of the stone market and the minerals as well as the trends in architecture, decoration and sculpture. Our activity also includes participation in international exhibitions and events, capturing the pulse of the industry.

With an experience of many years in the field and a full understanding of the modern market’s needs, we have developed a series of services for the multi-level promotion of the companies of the field (Digital Marketing, E-mail Marketing etc.) and the best possible utilization of the data provided (Consulting, economical analysis, Statistical reports) for their further industrial development.

Name: Opinio Juris - Law & Politics Review
Description:
Opinio Juris is a journal created by Domenico Nocerino and Domenico Pone and is meant to be a tool for information and study on topical legal and political issues. 

The name, partly recalling the subjective element of customs, defines the international vocation of the journal, which aims to integrate a space in which free and independent views can be shared, that is meant for professionals, students and enthusiasts of law and domestic and foreign policy.

The journal consists of two main sections, Opinio and Jus. The first mostly develops current issues and is divided into areas dedicated to geopolitical and historical insights, analysis of the general election in the world, as well as interviews with experienced academics, diplomats and aid workers.

Jus, instead, is meant for legal information only. It aims at contributing to the critical debate on the main issues regarding Italian Law, as well as European and international, through the publication of essays, comments and annotation to judicial measures drawn up by professionals of the industry.

Along with the two primary sections there is also Reportage, a space dedicated to the description, by photographic surveys, of the environment, the context, the background of a specific event of project.

To complete the offer for the readers, there is also the Services area, where it’s possible to request legal advices, sponsorships for editorial and photographic projects, as well as events with debate and awareness purposes in line with the contents of the journal.

Name: Acik Kaynak Fikirler
Description: Teknoloji ve İş Dünyasının Önceden Bilinmesi Gereken Eğilimleri Ama önce, Açık Kaynak Fikirler’in size nasıl yardımcı olabileceği hakkında konuşalım. Burada yaptığımız şey, bilişimciler, iş insanları ve yöneticiler için, teknoloji ve iş dünyasının gelecekteki yönelimleri hakkında bilgi, yorum ve on line eğitim sağlamaktır. Burada okuyacağınız her makale, popülizm ve reklamdan uzak, tamamen tarafsız saf gerçeğe dayanır. Günümüzde güncel, gerçek ve tarafsız bilgiye ulaşmanın çok zor olduğunu biliyoruz. “Teknoloji ve iş dünyası ile ilgili herhangi bir konuda bilgi almak istediğinizde, ya belirli firmalara ait ürün tanıtımları ile, ya da gerçek veriye dayanmayan, arama motorlarında en üstte yer kapmak için popülizmi fazla kaçmış, üstelik çoğunlukla tarihi geçmiş haberlerle karşılaşıyorsunuz… Bu bilgilerle kariyerinize yön veremezsiniz! “ Çünkü, yarının dünyasında başarılı olmak için yaptığınız işi sürdürülebilir kılmanız gerekiyor. Bu da Dünya’yla eşzamanlı hareket edebilmeyi, sektörü doğru koklayabilmeyi ve yönelimlere göre kariyer yatırımı planlamanızı gerektiriyor. Gelecekte sürdürülebilir başarı için, gerçek bilgi ve yorumlara trend olmadan önce ulaşmanız gerekiyor. Açık Kaynak Fikirler’de yayınlanan makaleler, Dünya’nın en önemli teknoloji ve ekonomik araştırma kurumlarının , teknolojiye yön veren dünya devi şirketlerin, konusunda söz sahibi uzmanların güncel event, rapor, yayın ve görüşlerinin yakın takibi, karşılaştırılması ve yorumlanması üzerine hazırlanır. Ayrıca, haftalık bir, e-posta bülteni ve (henüz hazırlık aşamasında olan) ücretsiz bir linux eğitimimiz var. Hepsi size gelecekte başarılı olmanız için gereken tavsiye ve kaynakları sunmak üzere tasarlandı. Eğer tarafsızsanız, farklı düşünmeye inanıyorsanız, ve herseye sorgulamak hayat mottonuz ise lütfen sizde “Açık Kaynak Fikirler” topluluğuna katılın.

Name: Daraj Media
Description:
Daraj is an independent digital media platform created by experienced journalists. Our goal is to offer Arabic speakers an alternative kind of journalism, free from political funding and influence, which controls other mainstream Arab media institutions.
We are committed to making the access to truth a priority, through professional and ethical journalism. We publish investigative pieces, op-eds and feature stories in a variety of formats: written, visuals, video, and audio.

Daraj covers important issues with a focus on under-reported topics like women and minorities’ rights, environmental and climate changes, freedom of thought, belief and expression, and gender identity. We firmly believe in partnerships and collaborations, and so we republish content from other platforms that share our values.

We at Daraj aim to start a conversation between different generations of authors, journalists, designers, and technology experts. We want to move from a traditional media model to a more modern one, where multimedia allows a more direct interaction between the platform and its users.

To be editorially independent, we believe in the necessity of being financially independent. This is why Daraj is a commercial company, with plans of becoming a for-profit one at a later stage. Until then, we receive international funding, while always making sure to be completely transparent about the money we receive.

With Sutradhar our objective is to give these storytellers a platform to tell mythological stories from their local tradition and culture to a wide audience through mobile phones. Unbias the News creates a space for journalists who experience structural barriers in the field. We are a remote, cross-border newsroom by Hostwriter working towards a more equitable and inclusive world of journalism.

Let’s face it: The current media system is not representative for the audience it serves. Newsrooms in the United States have remained more white and male than other work places, the largest migrant communities in Germany have no representation among editors-in-chief at leading news outlets and Indian media is an upper-caste fortress.

But diversity is not a moral question, it’s a question of quality! We aim to open up the field to emerging voices and local journalists who have not yet had the privilege to publish at big legacy outlets due to structural barriers or discrimination. 

Know more about us here: https://unbiasthenews.org/about-us/

Name: EqualVoice
Description:
“Seeing is believing”

EqualVoice, an initiative launched by the Ringier Group, harnesses the power of journalism and technology to champion gender equality. It was launched in November 2019 by CFO Annabella Bassler and co-founded by Katia Murmann.

The core mission of EqualVoice is to amplify women's visibility in the media, addressing the disparity where 72% of Swiss media reports focus on men—a figure that aligns with the global statistic of 75%, as reported by the Global Media Monitoring Project 2020.

Central to this mission is the "EqualVoice-Factor," a semantic algorithm that measures the representation of women in text, images, and videos. Validated by ETH Zurich, this tool provides scientifically documented insights into media content.

Beyond measurement, EqualVoice offers editorial teams resources like the book “the EqualVoice Mindset” or the newly developed EqualVoice Assistant,an AI-based tool to promote conscious and inclusive content creation. The initiative also facilitates workshops and maintains a Female Experts List to ensure diverse voices are featured in media narratives.

Expanding its reach, EqualVoice has been integrated into 32 media brands across seven countries, collectively reaching 50 million users..

Through these efforts, EqualVoice strives to create a media landscape where women and men are equally represented, fostering genuine and diverse role models for society.

Nel tempo, la piattaforma si è arricchita di funzionalità innovative come la sezione cerco/offro lavoro, il magazine online e la produzione di video professionali.

Grazie alla collaborazione con partner di rilievo e all’esperienza acquisita nel mondo digitale, QdMT si è evoluto in un’agenzia di comunicazione a 360°, composta da 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢 𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐢 𝐧𝐞𝐥 𝐬𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐳𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐢. Name: Maison de Retraite Selection - MDRS
Description:
MDRS un site pas comme les autres...

MDRS est le premier réseau social pour les personnes en RECHERCHE d'une maison de retraite ou d'une résidence services.
Une sorte de "Guide Michelin" des maisons de retraite. 

Sur chaque fiche résidence, une multitude d'informations sont communiquées ; Tarifs, spécificité, équipe pluridisciplinaire, lieux de vie, propreté, pathologie accueillie, les aides sociales.... et l'avis de l'enquêteur qui a visité l'établissement de façon anonyme pour y placer un proche. 

MDRS c'est 20 ans d'expertise dans l'évaluation des maisons de retraite sur plusieurs critères, au niveau national. Une vision UNIQUE du parc, par une équipe d'enquêteurs qui sillonnent la France pour vous, tout au long de l'année, pour vous livrer leur avis sur plus de 11 000  résidences recevant des Seniors.

Pour la huitième année consécutive, MDRS propose à toutes les maisons de retraite qu'elles soient publiques, privées, associatives, médicalisées (EHPAD) ou pour séniors autonomes de participer à un grand concours national.

L'objectif de ce concours est de changer le regard du Grand Public sur les Maisons de Retraite. Mais c'est également l'occasion d'impliquer les résidents, les salariés, les familles autour d'un projet fédérateur, créateur de liens pour égayer le quotidien de tous les résidents.

Vous le savez, toutes les maisons de retraite ne se ressemblent pas. C'est pourquoi MDRS vous propose de vous ouvrir leurs portes.

Chaque résidence a la possibilité de vous présenter à sa façon, comment la Vie continue dans sa maison, à travers une vidéo, un texte, des photos. 

Humour, défi, belles histoires, surprises, témoignages, tout est permis. 

Pour suivre notre actualité, n’hésitez pas à suivre  à vous inscrire sur notre newsletter et à nous suivre sur les réseaux sociaux.

Description:

Nosso blog fala para as pessoas livres de espírito, aos rebeldes e a quem ama aventurar-se e conhecer o novo.

Novas culturas, novas pessoas, novas experiências.

Nós falamos para aqueles que não querem viver a vida apenas aos finais de semana ou durante as férias e que querem viajar o ano todo.

Nós mostramos que a tecnologia é essencial para trabalhar de forma remota, seja do conforto de suas casas ou de uma praia na Tailândia – e que este sonho é possível.

Nós mostramos a todos aqueles que querem viajar que planejar uma viagem e realizar o sonho de conhecer outros países não é um bicho de sete cabeças.

Nós ajudamos nosso público a trabalhar de forma remota e a viajar melhor.

Be free.

Be freela.

Name: Offbeat
Description:
Offbeat is able to reach the social-first generation through innovative, owned media properties and can generate fandom through their 1B+ follower network across social media through meme marketing, TikTok influencer activations, custom sound creation, bespoke AR Lens creation, and virtual influencer brokerage and creation.

They do this for some of the world’s biggest brands, specifically the brands that sit at the intersection of lifestyle, entertainment, and culture, including Netflix, Universal Music Group, Warner Music, Twitch, TikTok, Hooters, McDonald's, Cheesecake Factory, and Diageo.

Offbeat began by disrupting traditional media and social media marketing industries by offering brands a far more organic way of reaching the younger generations who were spending their time in news feeds rather than watching TV. Offbeat has since been disrupting the world of influence and fame by pushing the virtual influencer industry forward. Offbeat has done this through VirtualHumans.org, brokering relationships between virtual influencers and brands, and by creating complete bespoke virtual beings for their owned properties and with brands across the globe.

Offbeat’s deep and long understanding of the younger generation is what has kept them leading their industry since day one and is why their founding team was some of the first to have millions of followers across accounts on Twitter, then Instagram, then Snapchat, then TikTok. This is also how they became pioneers of the virtual influencer industry, with the best tech to create virtuals.

Offbeat is based in Atlanta, Georgia, and is backed by investors such as Mark Cuban and Atlanta Ventures.

Are you ready to reach the digital generation? Visit our website and let's chat.

Description:

Depuis 2017, je suis immergé dans le monde des entrepreneurs à succès, découvrant et partageant les secrets de leur réussite. "Le Déclic", vous offre un accès privilégié aux histoires de ces personnalités inspirantes qui ont su créer la différence et provoquer un déclic dans leur parcours professionnel. Je suis Alec Henry, l'initiateur du mouvement @Entrepreneurs.com et je suis là pour vous aider à trouver votre propre déclic.

Dans chaque épisode, je partage avec vous des rencontres uniques et captivantes qui vous permettront d'identifier les éléments clés de la réussite entrepreneuriale. Grâce à ces échanges, je vous offre une perspective unique pour vous inspirer, vous motiver et vous guider dans votre propre cheminement.

Alors, n'attendez plus ! Rejoignez-nous sur "Le Déclic" et découvrez comment, vous aussi, pouvez faire la différence. 

Transformez votre quotidien grâce aux précieux conseils de ceux qui ont déjà réussi. 

Abonnez-vous dès maintenant pour ne manquer aucun épisode et déverrouillez votre potentiel entrepreneurial !

Name: Putman Media
Description:
Putman is a privately held B2B media firm with 75 years of experience serving manufacturing communities. Clients who have worked with us for awhile often describe us as fast, flexible and friendly, or something along those lines. That is a reflection of the fact that we attract very capable people who are entrepreneurs at heart and love the business and the people in it. And they are empowered to act quickly, but thoughtfully in creating great media products and services.

Our print magazines are some of the finest in their respective fields (we think they are THE finest) in large part because we have an experienced and passionate editorial staff, and because they report to a VP Content, not a publisher. A lot of media companies say "content is king", but we put our money where our mouth is on this subject.

In digital media we are successfully expanding the community we built with print and are bringing visitors more actionable, unique content and tools for doing their work. With regard to clients, we are leading the dialogue on ROI and successfully integrating print and digital efforts. A few examples include our use of best in class analytics, ad serving and campaign reporting, and launching the first ever client consulting team, aimed at offering VIP clients counsel on "best practices" in marketing to our audiences.

Our mission is to improve people's lives with inspiring, positive and meaningful projects. 

What do we do? 
We are making history on the global media market, developing online content in 7 different languages. Each month, 100+ million people visit our sites. 

Who is in our team? 
We currently have more than 200 specialists in different countries. They include developers, analysts, editors, video editors and others. The main distinguishing feature of Fabiosa Media specialists is their desire to constantly grow, develop and learn new things. 

Why do people like to work at Fabiosa Media?
● We work on creating and developing our own projects. There is no outsourcing. 
● The company values the initiative of its workers and their ability to work independently. 
● The ideas and suggestions of everyone are heard, and good ideas are quickly implemented and tested out. 
● Clearly stated goals and priorities help workers focused on important tasks and organize their work properly. 
● Weekly meetings with managers give employees an opportunity to get feedback on their work and understand how to achieve the best results. 
What we offer: 
● Comfortable working conditions: an office with all the modern conveniences (including free lunch & snacks, game rooms and many other amenities) 
● Professional growth: internal trainings and seminars, access to educational materials, paid training and courses outside the company 
● Fair compensation that allows employees to focus on project development and their own professional growth

● Corporate and team-building events, where we celebrate the successes and achievements of our teams and the company.

Name: LSWR Group
Description:
LSWR Group promuove ed è riferimento di una conoscenza competente, credibile e sempre aggiornata per tutti i professionisti che operano nell'ambito medico e giuridico. Dal singolo professionista agli enti statali dedicati, dagli scienziati e gli studiosi del settore ai gruppi universitari, LSWR Group è parte integrante e propositiva di queste anime pulsanti della società del futuro. Se e quando la tecnologia potrebbe individuare strade troppo aride e sommarie, LSWR Group sa proporre immediatamente degli anticorpi professionali in cui prevalgano sempre la corretta formazione, la precisa informazione, l'analisi della singola parte ma anche la visione d'insieme.

LSWR Group conosce nitidamente i sentimenti che i nostri clienti provano ogni giorno quando affrontano decisioni importanti. Per questo motivo LSWR Group sa come essere al loro fianco, con soluzioni e servizi che sappiano migliorare la qualità e l'efficacia del loro operato. La responsabilità di LSWR Group si estende anche oltre la singola esperienza quotidiana: vuole essere un partner affidabile ed innovativo per contribuire al miglioramento complessivo del sistema giuridico e di quello sanitario, sia nei paesi all'avanguardia che in quelli in fase di sviluppo.

Per LSWR Group lo spirito di servizio è parte integrante del suo agire: non esiste medicina senza etica, non esiste giustizia senza valori. Il nostro supporto professionale e tecnologico ha sempre come punto cardinale questa visione rigorosa della deontologia. Le sollecitazioni della modernità e l'aumento esponenziale di sfide spesso probanti, possono incutere timore o addirittura lasciarci sedurre da strade più facili e meno ortodosse. LSWR Group ha dimostrato di saper consigliare e operare sempre dentro i ristretti ma vigilati argini di un'etica comprovata.

Nosso principal objetivo é incentivar o desenvolvimento do setor através da promoção do conhecimento técnico e científico, em parceria com as indústrias, entidades de classe, institutos de pesquisa e centros acadêmicos, colaborando com o potencial criativo dos profissionais.

Name: On n'a jamais fait comme ça - Le Podcast RH
Description:
RH, recrutement, marque employeur, communication, IA… 
On n’a jamais fait comme ça est le podcast des DRH et professionnel·les RH qui veulent faire autrement.

Vous entendez souvent «On n’a jamais fait comme ça» ? 
Moi aussi. Et c’est justement pour ça que j’ai créé ce podcast.

“On n’a jamais fait comme ça”, c’est une conversation sans langue de bois entre DRH, dirigeant·es et expert·es pour : 

- découvrir des approches innovantes 
- comprendre les enjeux Ressources Humaines actuels 
- s’inspirer de solutions concrètes et réaliser sa veille RH

Je suis Florent Letourneur, fondateur de We Feel Good, agence conseil marque employeur et communication RH et corporate.

Je reçois des chefs d’entreprises, DRH et spécialistes des ressources humaines comme Thomas Chardin, Laurent Brouat, Charlène Hemery, Maud Grenier, Léo Bernard ou Nicolas Pasetti.

Ensemble, on vous parle de : 

 recrutement, formation, intégration 
 marque employeur, communication interne 
 culture d’entreprise, engagement, fidélisation 
 diversité, inclusion, RSE, IA 
 leadership, carrière, droit du travail, transformation RH

Ce podcast est pour vous si vous êtes : 

- DRH, RRH ou professionnel RH 
- Dirigeant ou manager intéressé·e par les sujets humains 
- Étudiant·e en RH ou passionné·e par l’avenir du travail 

Cela m’a donné envie de vous aider et à voir notre métier RH différemment.

Je suis Florent Letourneur, fondateur de We Feel Good, agence conseil en marque employeur et communication RH et corporate, et vous propose de nous retrouver dans ce podcast avec mes invités.

Name: Energija Balkana
Description:
Dobro došli na Linkedin stranicu Portala Energija Balkana.

Energija Balkana je portal na kome možete pratiti vesti iz sveta enegetike, održivog razvoja, energije i ekologije.

Uvek aktuelna i značajna kao ključni faktor u ekonomskim, društvenim i geopolitičkim dešavanjima, energetika, a samim tim energija, već dva veka utiče na život pojedinaca, država i globalne zajednice, kao i na ekonomiju i održivi razvoj.

A energetika se ne može pratiti bez saznanja o dešavanjima iz sveta nafte, gasa, izgradnje gasovoda, vetroparkova i ostalih obnovljivih izvora energije, kao i njihovom uticaju na životnu sredinu i živi svet koji nas okružuje.

To je razlog zašto se tim portala Energije Balkana, pre svega, bavi energetskim temama, a u fokusu nam je i ekologija i pitanja vezana za održivi razvoj. Razvoja nema bez obrazovanja i nauke, a sve to je, naravno, povezano sa ekonomskim temama - finansijama, IT sektorom, digitalizacijom, kao i proizvodnjom, od savremene industrijske do organske proizvodnje u poljoprivredi... i ne može da se razvija bez energetike, odnosno, energije.

Zato su energija i energetika, uključujući teme vezane za naftu, gas, naftovode, održivi razvoj i životnu sredinu teme na koje se naš portal, Energija Balkana, fokusira.

Hvala što nas pratite,

Vaš,
Tim Portala Energija Balkana

Enerji, şehirler ve çevre konusunda 10 yıla yaklaşan gazetecilik tecrübemizle bu konudaki tüm gelişmelerden sizleri haberdar etmeyi, okumayı seven ve bu alana ilgi duyan herkesle bir araya gelmeyi  amaçlıyoruz. Bu keyifli yolculuğu birlikte sürdürebilmek için siz de konuyla ilgili güncel haberlerinizi iletebilir ve en son haberlere e-bültenimize kayıt olarak erişebilirsiniz.

O Desabafo se tornou um projeto editorial com imersão em temas que impactam o comportamento e as relações humanas. Todo mês escolhíamos um tema relevante para aprofundar e criar conteúdo. Tivemos empresa parcerias durante essa jornada com por exemplo a 99 jobs, Natura e Fundação Telefônica Vivo.

Ficamos quase 10 anos decodificando e explicando diversos assuntos para o nosso público. Passando por gênero, raça, saúde mental, empreendedorismo e muitos mais. Agora chegou a hora de pensar mais 10 anos. Dessa vez vamos estimular a criação de soluções.

Em 2020, o Desabafo Social se torna uma plataforma de inteligência coletiva para produção de conteúdo, resolução de problemas e geração de renda através de desafios sociais. Utilizaremos a tecnologia ItsNoon para geração de renda.

Name: BioEconomia
Description:
BioEconomia nació con el objetivo de impulsar la transición hacía una economía baja en carbono, a partir de la transformación de biomasa vegetal, animal y microbiana en alimentos, energía y materiales.

El cambio climático pasó a ser la principal preocupación ambiental. Al 2016, 18 de los últimos 20 años están entre los 20 más cálidos desde que se llevan a cabo mediciones (160 años). Las consecuencias ya se están manifestando con fenómenos climáticos extremos, como inundaciones o sequías inéditas. 195 de los 197 países que pertenecen a las Naciones Unidas han acordado contener el aumento de la temperatura muy por debajo de los 2ºC respecto a la era preindustrial en 2015 en lo que se conoce como “Acuerdo de París”

Para ello la bioeconomía jugará un rol clave a partir de la fotosíntesis como proceso de captura de carbono, potenciado por la biotecnología aguas arriba de la agricultura. Y aguas abajo por una economía circular basada en los procesos tecnológicos modernos, que permitan valorizar los residuos y efluentes como materias primas o insumos para nuevos procesos.

La bioeconomía representa una importante contribución al cumplimiento de planes ambientales y energéticos de la sociedad. La utilización de la biomasa y sus derivados como fuente de energía limpia representa un gran aporte a la matriz energética, descentralizando la generación y mejorando la provisión de energía en las economías regionales, resolviendo un estrangulamiento crónico.

La bioeconomía también está íntimamente relacionada a la responsabilidad social empresaria, el fortaleciendo las economías regionales basadas en la agroindustria, el agregando valor a la producción primaria, creando empleo de calidad en el interior productivo del país, permitiendo arraigar a los jóvenes en sus localidades de origen.

El nuevo paradigma productivo de la bioeconomía genera grandes oportunidades a los países de la gran cuenca fotosintética latinoamericana.

Acompañar este proceso es nuestro objetivo.

The Stack World was founded with a simple belief: when women have access to clarity, community, and practical tools, everything changes.

What started as intimate conversations about work, ambition, and self-development has grown into a global platform supporting women to build intentional careers and businesses — on their own terms, and together.

Over the years, we’ve created thousands of events for women across cities and online, designing spaces that feel honest, culturally relevant, and genuinely useful. Our programming centres real growth — from navigating career transitions and leadership, to building confidence, skills, and momentum.

Alongside our community work, we partner with world-class brands including Squarespace, Nike, Google, Veuve Clicquot, and Bentley Motors, among others — creating thoughtful, high-impact experiences for ambitious audiences. Our work helps brands connect with women in ways that feel meaningful, not performative.

Today, The Stack World is home to a global membership of mission-driven women, with weekly Sunday online workshops at 7.30pm GMT for Premium Members, alongside resources, conversations, and community accessible via The Stack World app.

We’re here to support women to grow with confidence — personally, professionally, and collectively.

 Join the community via the app: https://apps.apple.com/app/id1566911389

Name: Comunicazione Tecnologica
Description:
Siamo una società di marketing e comunicazione specializzata nella produzione di immagini e video in computer grafica per l'industria.


Chiunque progetti, produca o promuova prodotti dall’elevato contenuto tecnologico ha la necessità di spiegare le caratteristiche del proprio prodotto con concetti semplici, senza però banalizzarne i contenuti ma, anzi, riuscendo a trasmettere tutta la tecnologia in essi contenuti e quindi il loro valore.

Comunicazione Tecnologica traduce la complessità in immagini di forte impatto visivo e di grande comprensibilità senza trascurare l’accuratezza tecnico-scientifica, per poi fondere concetti, immagini e filmati in piani integrati di comunicazione che sfruttino tutti i media a disposizioni.

Le realizzazioni di Comunicazione Tecnologica costituiscono pertanto strumenti di supporto estremamente persuasivi, utili sia alla costruzione di un immagine aziendale moderna che direttamente alla forza vendita, formidabili strumenti per aumentare prestigio e fatturato.

Description:
Kamera, Licht, Ton — und alles was dahinter liegt: Postproduction, Broadcast, Streaming. film-tv-video.de liefert tägliche News, Tests, Broadcast-Reports und andere topaktuelle Stories aus der Film-, Broadcast- und TV-Branche — über Equipment, Hersteller, Anwender, Produktionen, Workflows.

Die ganze Branche. Online.

Name: Midwest Tape, LLC
Description:
What started in 1989 as a family-owned video rental store grew into a trusted partner dedicated to helping libraries thrive. A single suggestion to sell VHS tapes (remember those?) to public libraries inspired our founder, John Eldred to start Midwest Tape LLC – and set our mission in motion. 

Fast forward to over 35 years later, we provide libraries across North America, New Zealand, and Australia with innovative products and equitable access to content. Backed by a passion for exceptional service and a deep understanding of library needs, we fuel libraries with unparalleled access to top-tier media content including physical media (audiobooks, DVDs, CDs, and read-a-longs) as well as our digital platform, Hoopla Digital. 

Hoopla, available on iOS, Android, and desktop, combines our decades of media expertise with modern technology to deliver an all-in-one experience for libraries and their patrons. With one of the strongest catalogs in the digital library space, Hoopla empowers libraries to reach patrons wherever they are. 

We proudly partner with our library partners and content providers to strengthen communities through access to educational resources and entertainment experiences. Since 1989, our commitment has remained the same: supporting libraries with solutions that make a difference because strong libraries build healthy communities.  

 Download Hoopla in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store 
 We’d love to hear from you at info@midwesttapes.com
 MidwestTape.com | HooplaDigital.com  

____________________________________________________________________________________ 

Excited about making a difference in libraries and communities? We’re always on the lookout for passionate people to join our team! 
Browse our open positions at www.midwesttape.com

Name: Blog In Lyon
Description:
Blog In Lyon est un Webzine co-fondé en 2016 par Clarisse BRET et Mickaël SOLER.

Nous proposons à nos lecteurs de découvrir Lyon sous un angle original et dynamique. 

Visites de Lyon, valorisation du patrimoine, vidéos, photos, visite virtuelle, portraits de Lyonnais au parcours ou au savoir-faire atypique, agenda des sorties, bons plans, tourisme, fonds d'écran à télécharger... 

Notre objectif : Être un média local dynamique et moderne qui met en avant Lyon, son patrimoine et son histoire, et valorise le savoir-faire et l’esprit d’initiative des Lyonnais qui entreprennent et font rayonner notre ville.

Name: Startup Success Stories India
Description:
Startup Success Stories  is an initiative of Nextgen Omnitech to bridge the gap between new entrepreneurs and current market trends. We aim to present the latest market trends in a simple language for all entrepreneurs to benefit from. 

Our goal is to train and inspire those who want to become entrepreneurs and change the world. We constantly provide motivational, news and startup-related articles, with a focus on trends and stories to help entrepreneurs gain insight into the current market. We share ideas and provide opinions on existing ones, encouraging people from all corners of the country to chase their dreams. 

Our team of qualified writers work diligently to bring you daily updates on the success strategies of successful entrepreneurs. We strive to provide informative and valuable content that will aid in the development of your entrepreneurial skills. 

Our aim is to play a significant role in shaping the entrepreneurial community in India, and to change the way people read about entrepreneurs and business trends. We're here to help entrepreneurs achieve their goals and provide them with the latest business updates. If you have a story to share, please reach out to us on info@startupsuccessstories.in and we'll help you share it with the world.

Name: Space24.pl
Description:
Space24.pl to wiodący polski serwis zajmujący się zagadnieniami z obszaru szeroko pojętej techniki kosmicznej. Codziennie dostarcza tematycznych informacji i wieści, a także autorskich komentarzy, raportów oraz pogłębionych analiz dotyczących kluczowych aspektów technologicznych, gospodarczych i naukowo-badawczych użytkowania przestrzeni kosmicznej. Serwis Space24.pl działa i komunikuje wielowątkowo, wykorzystując pełen przekrój form przekazu: w postaci słowa pisanego, nagrań audio i materiałów wideo obejmujących relacje z najważniejszych wydarzeń branżowych, a także opinie decydentów, naukowców oraz specjalistów związanych z problematyką działalności i polityki kosmicznej.

Treści publikowane na Space24.pl dotykają wielu odrębnych obszarów zainteresowania (zwłaszcza polityki kosmicznej, przemysłu, bezpieczeństwa, systemów satelitarnych czy też rozmaitych systemów transportu kosmicznego). Dodatkowo współzależność zachodząca między Space24.pl a pozostałymi serwisami Grupy Defence24 zapewnia efekt synergii informacyjnej.

Name: Layar
Description:
Founded in the summer of 2009, Layar quickly gained international attention as one of the first mobile augmented reality browsers to hit the market. Our open development platform attracted thousands of developers from all of the world to create AR content as millions downloaded the Layar App for iOS and Android, making Layar the world's most popular platform for AR.

Today, as part of the Blippar group, Layar is a global leader in Augmented Reality and Interactive Print, helping to bridge the gap between the print and digital worlds. Together, Layar and Blippar have collaborated with many of the world's top brands, including Pepsi, Coca-Cola, Procter & Gamble, General Mills, Anheuser-Busch, Elle, Glamour, Honda and BMW.  The Layar and Blippar mobile apps have been downloaded over 46 million times, providing brands with access to a rapidly expanding audience of tech-savvy consumers eager to "unlock" the physical world with digital experiences.

Layar is based in Amsterdam, The Netherlands. The Blippar group is headquartered in London with additional offices in New York, Chicago, San Francisco, Los Angeles, India, Turkey, Japan and Spain.

Name: My East Coast Experience Media
Description:
Our goal is to communicate the experiences of our region’s newcomers.

By sharing their stories, from their struggles and cultural adjustments, to their victories and achievements, we strive to inspire others.

We hope to inspire East Coasters to welcome immigrants with open minds and open arms, and we hope to inspire newcomers to stay, take advantage of the region’s amazing opportunities, make the East Coast their home and flourish. We believe this growing population can and will add to our already vibrant and rich Atlantic Canadian culture.

We bring the best of Africa to the world.

We welcome you to the BellaNaija Experience.

Name: Food Bank News
Description:
Food Bank News is the first and only publication to acknowledge the critical role that food banks play in the health and well-being of millions of people living in the United States. We believe that hunger can and should be eliminated, and that better flow of information, ideas and best practices between members of the hunger-relief community will help reach that goal.

Our mission is to create a community where those working in the charitable food system can gain access to news, information and resources to help them achieve the goal of eliminating hunger. By promoting conversation and information exchange about best practices in the charitable food banking system via an independent, national news source, Food Bank News aims to generate more effective and lasting solutions to hunger.

Name: The News Lens 關鍵評論網
Description:
The News Lens was founded in August 2013. We are a group of people who aren’t satisfied with the current media and want to make a difference. The founding team includes experienced editors, professional managers with years of overseas work experience, passionate web developers, and a lot of great interns, friends, and contributors.

The media we dream about not only tells the facts, but also offers diverse perspectives on easy to access platforms such as smartphones, tablets, PCs, or wearable devices. It is built for readers in the social media age for them to share, discuss, and become more involved in the issues they are interested in.

News Worth Knowing, Voices Worth Sharing.


The News Lens 設立於2013年8月。我們是一群對於現今媒體不滿又想要做出一些改變的人。有一直在媒體產業的編輯，有多年在海外各地工作的專業經理人，還有對於網路技術有熱情的開發者，以及一群對於我們這個夢想有興趣，願意一起幫忙的實習生、朋友以及許多外稿作者。

我們夢想中的媒體是除了陳述事實之外，還能夠提供多元、不同方向的觀點，並為智慧手機、平板、電腦等不同平台提供各自適合閱讀內容。也讓社交網路世代的使用者，能夠更輕鬆的分享、討論和參與他們有興趣的議題。

Name: bici.PRO
Description:
Un nuovo web magazine per seguire tutto il bello del ciclismo (strada/pista/cross/gravel, maschile e femminile).

Il gruppo di lavoro di bici.PRO è costituito da un nucleo di giornalisti con esperienza editoriale ventennale. 

Professionisti che hanno seguito tutti i più grandi eventi del calendario nazionale e internazionale: dal Giro al Tour, dalle Classiche alla Vuelta, dagli europei ai Campionati del Mondo fino alle Olimpiadi. 

Giornalisti tecnici in grado di raccontare ed esporre con competenza e soprattutto con autorevolezza le caratteristiche, le particolarità e - perchè no - anche i... segreti dei diversi prodotti che arricchiscono l’offerta commerciale del settore del ciclismo. 

E poi la forte struttura del marketing e della comunicazione digitale, che veicola quotidianamente bici.PRO nella grande famiglia degli appassionati, tra i gruppi sportivi e tra i “preziosissimi” ciclisti praticanti. Ma anche tra gli addetti ai lavori, tra le aziende stesse, per creare connessioni di lavoro ugualmente importanti.

Name: iq digital media marketing gmbh
Description:
iq digital media marketing gmbh is one of the leading sales organisations for quality digital media and media brands. As a joint venture company of the FAZ Verlag, Süddeutsche Zeitung Verlag, ZEIT Verlag and the Handelsblatt Media Group iq digital stands for high penetration of premium and special interest target groups.  
The portfolio includes high-class publisher sites online and mobile in the areas of news, finance, business, politics and IT as well as healthcare: websites like FAZ.NET, Handelsblatt Online, SZ.de, WirtschaftsWoche Online and ZEIT ONLINE keep decision-makers informed daily, up-to-the-minute about all relevant news. From April 1, 2018 the business cluster will be further enhanced by the digital website of business magazine "brand eins". 
The digital portfolio also includes areamobile, Edison digital, INGENIEUR.de, jetzt, karriere.de, Orange by Handelsblatt, Spektrum.de, SZ-Magazin.de and ze.tt as well as the B2B network “fachmedien und mittelstand digital“.

Name: AOP Association of Online Publishers
Description:
The UK Association for Online Publishing (AOP) is an industry body representing digital publishing companies that create original, branded, quality content. AOP champions the interests of media owners from diverse backgrounds including newspaper and magazine publishing, TV and radio broadcasting, and pure online media.

Formed in 2002, AOP publishes original research, hosts forums, awards and conferences, covering a range of topics from managing online communities and adapting content for mobile, through to optimising partnership opportunities, SEO best practice, behavioural targeting and audience measurement.

Our research, which is available exclusively to members, includes a monthly Digital Landscape Report, a bi-annual Census of AOP members’ businesses, in addition to other sector-specific projects. Publisher members are granted access to four industry committees, which cover a range of commercial activities, research, B2B and product development. AOP’s committees meet regularly to share knowledge and advice to continually improve their digital businesses. As of 2011, Publisher members are also entitled to free places at our monthly forum events, while Associate (Supplier) members get generous discounts.

Membership also grants companies a range of other event discounts, such as for our annual Awards and Summit, other industry events/training and access to exclusive networking roundtables and dinners throughout the year.

BricoRetail.ro brings the latest news mainly from Romania but you can also read the most important global news from the industry.
We also created a new category on our B2B publication - CEE DIY retail - which bring together news, in english, from Central and East Europe markets related with DIY and home improvement retail. You can find it here: https://www.bricoretail.ro/cat/cee-diy-retail.

Name: Architektura-murator
Description:
Profesjonalny miesięcznik o architekturze. Organizator konkursów i wystaw. Nagrodzony 30 nagrodami i wyróżnieniami za grafikę okładek.
Od 1994 roku nasze czasopismo nieustannie towarzyszy wszystkim ważniejszym wydarzeniom architektonicznym w kraju i na świecie, specjalizując się w architekturze realizowanej w Polsce.
Nasz zespół nie zajmuje się wyłącznie pracą nad gazetą. Organizujemy konkursy (ŻYCIE W ARCHITEKTURZE, Konkurs studencki), wystawy (Polska. Ikony architektury), inicjujemy pokoleniowe spotkania (Młodzi do Łodzi) i wiele innych wydarzeń.
Tworząc „Architekturę”, postawiliśmy sobie za cel przekazywanie zawodowej wiedzy o architekturze, promowanie najlepszych polskich osiągnięć w tej dziedzinie, popularyzowanie tematyki architektonicznej na forum społecznym, pobudzanie dyskusji na temat architektury

Name: Antincendio Italia
Description:
Antincendio Italia nasce per diffondere la cultura della sicurezza antincendio.
Il fuoco è un fenomeno straordinario che merita una grande attenzione, poiché è sempre nuovo e sempre diverso.
Per questo occorre studiarlo in ogni suo aspetto, in termini di prevenzione e protezione.

Con Antincendio Italia nasce un network che unisce ingegneri, tecnici, produttori e operatori del settore.
Obiettivo del portale è rilanciare le riflessioni, gli studi e le esperienze, per conoscere l’oggetto condividendo le informazioni.

Parte degli articoli presenti nascono dal confronto sul gruppo di discussione “VVF Incendio ed Antincendio Ritorno alla base”.
Per contribuire con un articolo puoi scrivere a info@antincendio-italia.it.

AMEinfo’s core strength lies in the breadth and amount of content covered – posting more than 1,500 stories a week, in English, across 15 verticals.
 Leading media group Mediaquest Corp added AMEinfo to its growing portfolio of B2B and B2C magazines, digital and online networks, and events, in June 2013. Mediaquest Corp publishes in three languages and operates an international network across Algiers, Beirut, Dubai, Jeddah, Riyadh and Paris. Celebrated titles include: Gulf Marketing Review, Communicate, Saneou Al Hadath, TRENDS, Policy, Arabies, Marie Claire Arabia and Marie Claire Lower Gulf, Haya, Aficionado and Autocar Middle East. In the online and digital arena, Mediaquest Corp operates Dotmena. A premium networking platform for advertisers and publishers to expand their reach in the Middle East, it attracts more than 35 million unique visitors annually.

AMEinfo.com attracts 2.2 million business executives per month from the Middle East or with business interest in the Middle East region, from a broad range of industry sectors including banking, finance, IT, telecom, real estate, tourism and luxury. The site’s broad content is read by mid to senior level professionals across a variety of disciplines. Advertisers use ameinfo.com to communicate at a business-to-business and consumer level to a high income audience. AME Info’s database of registered subscribers is now 125k+ and can be segmented by country, industry and seniority.

Name: PipelineOnline.ca
Description:
Pipeline Online is Saskatchewan’s Energy News, focusing not only on oil and gas, but the related industries that make use of the same people, companies, equipment and expertise. This will include geothermal power production, helium, lithium, and solution potash mining. There will also be extensive coverage of power generation, as it’s all related. 
This will be 21st century journalism, allowing for things like video stories and podcasts. But unlike most other news sites, it won’t be about the soundbite. Pipeline Online will provide the depth, knowledge and analysis that no one else does regarding the Saskatchewan energy sector. Where other media might write five paragraphs, here you might find five stories. 
It’s about Saskatchewan, for Saskatchewan. You’ll see coverage from the Lloydminster area of Alberta, and we’ll show some love to the southwest Manitoba oilpatch (no one else does. Heck, half the time the Manitoba government doesn’t even know it’s there.) Pipeline Online will be on the ground, from Lloydminster to Kindersley, Shaunavon to Carlyle. Our contributors know and understand Saskatchewan, and are either from here, have worked here, or have other ties. 

Pipeline Online is owned and operated by editor Brian Zinchuk, who spent 12 year as editor of Pipeline News, from 2008 to 2020.

Description:

Fundats benytter sin uafhængighed til kritisk og troværdig dækning af danske fondes almennyttige indflydelse og bidrag i samfundet. Vi sætter lys på rammevilkårene for såvel erhvervsfonde, almene fonde og fondslignende foreninger. Og vi følger aktørerne og den interne debat om fondsbranchens rolle og samlede deltagelse i samfundsudviklingen.

Fundats formidler nyheder, analyser og tendenser om fondssektoren, dens aktiviteter samt effekterne af de almennyttige indsatser i samfundet. Vi skriver om det, der skaber pengene i fondene, om dem der plejer formuerne eller datterselskaberne og deler ud af overskuddet. Vi dækker det løbende branchestof om aktører, fondsledelse, drift og donationer i det filantropiske fondsmiljø. Det handler om politik, økonomi, investeringer, fondsjura, moral, kunst, velfærd, klima, sammenhængskraft og livsglæde.

Name: Intelekto
Description:
Intelekto, le média des entreprises qui construisent la société de demain.

Quelle place pour les entreprises dans la société de demain ?

L’exploitation des ressources – humaines, environnementales, numériques et financières – a, depuis des années, donné lieu à des opportunités de développement et d’innovation. Mais leur épuisement conduit à des dérives dont il semble parfois difficile de sortir. Mal-être psychologique, pollution carbone, cybercrime, inflation… Chaque succès a son revers. Et les gouvernements ne sont plus les seuls responsables pointés du doigt. Dans le viseur des consommateurs, des régulateurs et des activistes ? Les entreprises, dont ils attendent qu’elles jouent sur plusieurs terrains. Celui de la croissance, toujours ; et celui du bien commun, enfin.
Une équation qui peut sembler compliquée. Mais pas question de trouver des parades... Il n’est plus possible pour les entreprises de botter en touche. La nouvelle Sainte-Trinité ? La transparence, l’engagement et les valeurs.
La mission est de taille, mais pas impossible. Dispositifs RH ambitieux, solutions numériques innovantes, engagements environnementaux, nouveaux modèles d’organisation… Il est temps de donner la parole aux entreprises qui montrent la voie. À celles qui prouvent qu’il est possible de repenser ce qui ne fonctionne plus, de bouleverser les codes établis, de se battre non pas uniquement pour leur chiffre d’affaires mais pour un monde plus pérenne. Entrepreneurs de talent, penseurs de notre temps et chercheurs novateurs ont leur place dans nos colonnes. Ensemble, ils doivent nous aider à repenser les entreprises pour construire la meilleure société pour demain.

Name: Do It In Paris
Description:
Dive into the inspiring story of Véronique Roger-Vasselin CONSTANTINOFF, a French woman who carved a path for herself in the unforgiving world of media. With a burning passion for fashion, art de vivre, and the beauty of Paris, she decided to create her own platform and share her favorite discoveries with the world.

From her humble beginnings as an intern at Harper's Bazaar France, Véronique captured the hearts of many with her unique style and love for fashion and haute couture. As a renowned fashion editor, she brought elegance and sophistication to the pages of the world’s most prestigious magazines. But that was only the beginning of her journey. Véronique then explored the world of the French art de vivre, sharing her knowledge and expertise through exclusive fashion columns.

She allowed readers to immerse themselves in the world of luxury and refinement, providing an exceptional added value of up-to-date news, dreams, beauty, and a touch of humor for her audience.

Beyond her talent, what truly sets Véronique apart is her ability to paint an image that is both youthful and distinctly Parisian.

Proud of her heritage, she is a member of the Rochambeau Chapter, The NSDAR, an organization that unites women whose ancestors fought alongside Lafayette for American independence. 
She symbolizes the spirit of cooperation and respect between the two nations.

Véronique continues to shine with "Do It In Paris", the leading digital media, which allows her to share her favorites and insider tips for making the most of Paris and all the city has to offer. She embodies independence, creativity, and French charm, captivating Americans with her authenticity and unwavering love for the City of Light.

Name: Black Health Matters
Description:
Black Health Matters African Americans have poor health outcomes on nearly every disease index; we're either at higher risk for developing an illness or we die from it in greater numbers. While access to health insurance and socioeconomic status play a significant part in these health disparities, we also lack awareness about a lot of preventive steps we could take to better our health, and we're in denial, too. Black Health Matters will provide information about health and well-being from a service-oriented perspective–with lots of upbeat, positive solutions and tips.

The site features:

Our Health: Articles on health and wellness and the latest health and medical news, particularly as it impacts African American and Afro-Latin audiences
Beauty: Beauty and lifestyle stories, including tips on skin care, hair care, nail care; detailed pieces about the plastic surgery industry and reconstructive surgery following illness
Mind & Body: Using the mind and soul in healing to promote wellness, this channel explores the role spirituality and inspirational techniques play in overall well-being
Nutrition & Fitness: Healthy takes on cultural favorites, ways to lighten up dessert and snack foods; in-depth stories about why some populations have difficulty following healthy eating directives; nutrition news; fitness; ways to avoid illness through diet and exercise
Black Health Matters does not provide medical advice, diagnosis or treatment.
About Us: Black Health Matters Multi-Channel Communications, LLC

Name: Bienvenue Au Capital - Podcast PE
Description:
"Bienvenue Au Capital-Podcast PE" est le podcast des femmes et des hommes qui rachètent et investissent dans des entreprises non cotées. Le nom de cette activité : le Capital Investissement (ou Private Equity).

Toutes les 2 semaines, je discute avec des acteurs expérimentés du capital investissement qui ont financé, accompagné ou encore racheté des entreprises formidables. Mon objectif est de nous permettre de comprendre leurs parcours, leurs problématiques et leurs stratégies pour nous inspirer, et profiter de leur expérience.

Au fil des épisodes nous pourrons découvrir des secteurs, positionnements et histoires différentes; et nous aborderons plusieurs stratégies d'investissement, du capital-développement (entreprise en croissance) au capital-transmission (entreprise mature) en passant par le capital-retournement (entreprise en difficulté).

____________
____________

Si vous avez des questions après l’écoute d’un épisode, ou si vous souhaitez en savoir plus sur un sujet ou un secteur d’activité n’hésitez pas à me contacter sur linkedin je me ferai un plaisir de vous répondre directement ou de poser la question à mes invités.
