Mission
We are guided by the following beliefs:

1. News stories should be told by journalists who
rely on facts, not spin.

2. News reporting should be useful, fun, and
fearless.

3. A nimble news operation available across all
digital platforms can attract viewers and make
money.

Name: Madison 365
Description: Madison 365 is a nonprofit new media enterprise intended to keep Greater Madison and Wisconsin’s communities of color informed, and to report news from their perspective. We will ensure that all voices are heard, because all voices matter. We intend to use excellent multimedia journalism to dig deeply into the issues within and between communities of color, and the rifts between minorities and the majority culture. The conversations we start will not always be comfortable. We believe tension and disagreement, when coupled with respect, will lead to positive change. Madison365 will go beyond simply informing Madison on what is happening in its community of color. It will provide ways and means to actively get involved in these communities, foster deep and meaningful discussion, and begin to develop real solutions for our city. Madison365 will dig deep into our often overlooked and neglected communities and be a catalyst for change. People want to talk, and people want to act. At the moment there is no forum for all communities of color to join with the majority community in productive, respectful dialog. No media outlets are able or willing to pursue the issues deeply. Very few local journalists come from communities of color. Madison’s communities of color want and deserve a well-rounded media outlet of their own. In addition to applying our excellent brand of journalism to the difficult issues, we will cover sports, entertainment and lifestyle topics from the perspective of the community. Madison365 will be the community’s media outlet. It will be funded and guided by members of the community, with additional funding from sponsors, grants and events.

Name: Energizing India Podcast
Description:
We are a team that is passionate about electric mobility & helping change how people commute. We noticed a few years ago that, unlike the ICE industry, the electric mobility ecosystem was still not working cohesively and that the different silos (policy making, regulatory, vehicle OEMs, battery manufacturers, charge point operators, charging infrastructure manufacturers, power companies, design consultants, etc) were not talking to each other. More pertinently in many cases they didn’t even know the others existed. So, we decided to give a voice to this industry sector by creating the Energizing India Podcast in an endeavour to create a narrative on how to facilitate faster adoption of EVs in India.

The podcast features conversations with key protagonists & leaders within the EV sector in India. Conversations are unfiltered and candid and allow listeners to form their own opinion on subjects. Energizing India also features short editorials if you instead prefer a view point on major issues impacting the industry, based on solidly researched data and facts. We are a microcosm within the industry but see our role as punching above our weight to bring all of us together to change how we commute, the air we breathe and even they way we live our lives.

Covering nano to mega influencers, LEMON automates up to 90% of campaign operations including briefing, content review, payments, and reporting, turning influencer marketing into a scalable and efficient system.

With expertise in user-generated content (UGC) advertising, LEMON transforms genuine creator content into high-return paid media. Through advanced targeting and analytics, we ensure every campaign reaches the right audience for maximum engagement and conversion.

C CHANNEL Indonesia also acts as a creative-tech partner for companies across beauty, fashion, FMCG, F&B, and lifestyle industries. Our clients include Ajinomoto, Unicharm, Unilever, Uniqlo, KAO, and prominent agencies in Indonesia.

We believe in the power of creativity strengthened by technology.
Our mission is simple: make marketing more human, efficient, and impactful.

Name: Setor Moveleiro
Description:
Portal Setor Moveleiro
Frente aos desafios atuais e a forma acelerada com que o mundo vem se transformando, a plataforma Setor Moveleiro – conteúdo estratégico – surgiu em abril de 2020 com o objetivo de preencher uma lacuna já há bastante tempo existente na cadeia moveleira: soluções estratégicas para a prospecção de negócios e tomada de decisões assertivas, colocando a indústria de móveis brasileira em paridade com os principais movimentos em ascensão no mundo.

Em um contexto onde uma pandemia mundial mudou as formar de relação e convivencia, inclusive no mercado b2b moveleiro e tendo sido responsável pela construção de um novo paradigma social, influenciando novas formas de consumo e portanto novos métodos de gestão, nossa meta é contribuir de modo propositivo para que empresas moveleiras possam rever seus modelos de negócios – inclusive aqueles que estão dando certo por enquanto -, antecipando demandas futuras de um “novo normal” que começa a ser moldado hoje.

Reunindo uma equipe heterogênea e multidisciplinar, composta por profissionais com décadas de experiência no setor moveleiro dentro e fora do Brasil, estamos prontos para, juntos com você, propor reflexões e compartilharmos insights na busca do desenvolvimento saudável e contínuo de um dos setores mais importantes para o viver.

Name: L'Oeil de la E-santé
Description:
L'Oeil de la E-santé, le média vidéo  des "Grandes Tendances de la E-santé" de Interaction Healthcare. 

 Depuis 2016, vous êtes de plus en plus nombreux ( Plus de 4 000 participants  en janvier 2024 !) à participer à notre journée annuelle chaque fin janvier pour tout comprendre des actualités et des innovations du secteur de la santé numérique. 

  Pour notre 8ème édition, une proposition a été partagée par toute la communauté qui nous suit : Que cet événement puisse continuer tout au long de l'année sous une autre forme, pour partager plus régulièrement les actualités du secteur de la santé numérique

Nous savons que vous êtes toutes et tous des passionné(e)s, comme nous, de ce que les innovations et la technologie peuvent apporter aux patients et au professionnels de santé et pour cela, vous trouverez de nombreux contenus :

Name: Maroc Info | La Voix des Jeunes
Description:
Maroc Info | La voix des jeunes est un média alternatif né d'une initiative prise par un groupe d’étudiants en sciences sociales et qui consiste en la mise en place d’une plateforme médiatique gérée et enrichie par les jeunes marocains.

D’une part, il s’agit pour nous de délivrer l’actualité sur différents domaines avec nos lunettes de jeunes esprits, citoyens et patriotes ; et d’autre part, viser des sujets bien précis pour mettre en exergue les éléments et facteurs responsables ou potentiellement responsables du développement de notre Maroc, ou, à l’opposé, du freinage et du ralentissement de celui-ci.

Nous permettons aux jeunes, selon leurs intérêts, d’exprimer leurs opinions sur une plateforme qui touche de plus en plus de marocains -résidents et MRE, et ce, concernant tous les domaines, partant du culturel et social, jusqu’à la diplomatie, passant par la politique –marocaine- et l’économie.

Notre objectif est d’apporter un nouveau contenu au panier médiatique marocain, représentant  une catégorie de la population, ou, ne serait-ce qu’une partie d’elle, qui ne manquera pas de prendre les rênes du pays dans quelques années, motivés par leur fierté et leur patriotisme, et déterminés à mener un changement long-termiste efficace et efficient.

Il est en effet, de notre devoir en tant que jeunes, de sensibiliser nos concitoyens quant aux problématiques liées à leur quotidien, mais surtout à leur futur et à celui de leurs enfants, et ce encore, concernant tous les domaines.

Name: iatronet.gr
Description:
Το iatronet.gr είναι ένα από τα πρώτα και μεγαλύτερα Ελληνικά portal με θέματα υγείας, προληπτικής ιατρικής, διατροφής, φυσικής κατάστασης και αισθητικής.

Πρόκειται για έναν από τους πρωτοπόρους στην κατηγορία του στην Ελλάδα και έχει σχεδιαστεί για να δίνει γρήγορα, εύκολα και πάνω απ' όλα υπεύθυνα πρακτικές πληροφορίες που αφορούν το «ευ ζην» του ατόμου.

Το περιεχόμενο του iatronet.gr συντάσσεται από μεγάλο αριθμό διακεκριμένων επιστημόνων (ιατροί, διατροφολόγοι, ψυχολόγοι, φυσιοθεραπευτές κτλ) που προσφέρουν τις γνώσεις και την άποψή τους ανάλογα με το γνωστικό τους αντικείμενο. Ο κάθε ένας από τους Συνεργάτες αρθρογραφεί βάσει του τομέα του και η Συντακτική Ομάδα του iatronet.gr φροντίζει για την παρουσίαση των θεμάτων στην αντίστοιχη κατηγορία.

Η διαρκής ενημέρωση, η τακτική ανανέωση και ο εμπλουτισμός του περιεχομένου του iatronet.gr δίνουν τη δυνατότητα στους χρήστες για μία υπεύθυνη και όσο το δυνατόν πληρέστερη πληροφόρηση και πρόσβαση σε τράπεζες πληροφοριών και ιατρικών δεδομένων. Παράλληλα παρέχουν έγκυρη πληροφόρηση για προϊόντα που αφορούν την προσωπική υγεία και υγιεινή.

Το iatronet.gr παρέχει τις αξιόπιστες και έγκυρες υπηρεσίες του στους έλληνες χρήστες από το 1999.

Το iatronet.gr βασίστηκε σε μια ιδέα των στελεχών της ΘΗΡΑΤΡΟΝ που πιστεύουν ότι το κοινό θα πρέπει να αποκτήσει περισσότερες και πιο υπεύθυνες πληροφορίες σχετικά με την προσωπική του Υγεία.
Με αρτιότερη, πληρέστερη και ταχύτερη πληροφόρηση και επικοινωνία, πιστεύουμε ότι οι επισκέπτες στην σελίδα του iatronet.gr κατανοούν καλύτερα τις καταστάσεις της υγείας τους. Αυτό τους ενδυναμώνει και έτσι συνεργάζονται καλύτερα και αποδοτικότερα με τον γιατρό της εμπιστοσύνης τους.

Name: Security Architecture Podcast
Description: If you are like us, you have probably been struggling with the gap between what marketing says a security technology will do, to fully testing and evaluating solutions before you make a decision, and then seeing something different when you actually implement the solution in your environment. So, we started this podcast. It is our hope that we can start to influence the security industry, or at least provide you with some better information to help you make a better decision when you are looking at all the security technologies.

Name: Bristol24/7
Description:
Bristol24/7 is the leading independent media outlet in the South West both in print and digital reaching over half of the Bristol population.

As well as sharing stories and voices from across Bristol, we work with other companies and organisations to create impactful community projects. To date these include Voices24/7, Talking LGBT+ and the Young Chefs Programme.

Structurally we are a community interest company, which means that we reinvest any revenue that Bristol24/7 generates into supporting the local community and furthering our mission. Nice, huh?

Made of a small team of humans that all really care about Bristol, there has always been one big question at the core of our brand/ organization: how can we help shape a better Bristol? 

Underpinned by values of independence, integrity, inspiration, investment (in the people of Bristol) and inclusion we share stories from across the city and hope to inspire positive change.

Name: KONXION
Description:
Om KONXION

Det er ikke tilfældigt, at vi kalder os KONXION [kån’nek’sjån]. For os handler det nemlig om at skabe connections, forbindelser. Vi er en virksomhed, som lever af at skabe forbindelser mellem mennesker, mellem brands og kunder og mellem strategi og salg – i en verden der er blevet digital.

Som virksomhed er vi “født” digitale og sådan tænker vi også! Vi baserer vores løsninger på baggrund af data fremfor mavefornemmelse. 

Tiden indbyder til at skabe nye forbindelser. Med den teknologi, der er til rådighed i dag, har virksomheder mulighed for at skabe tusindvis af forbindelser til nye og eksisterende kunder. Kort sagt vi målretter dit budskab til den rette bruger, på det rette sted, og på det rette tidspunkt - dét er modern marketing.    

KONXION er i 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016 og 2017 udnævnt af Børsen til Gazelle virksomhed.
KONXION har seks år i træk modtaget AAA-rating for højeste kreditværdighed.
KONXION er i 2012 kåret som den mest innovative virksomhed i Aalborg kommune. 
KONXION var i 2013 nomineret og finalist til BrainsBusiness Adward. 
KONXION vandt i 2014 i samarbejde med Kolding Storcenter en SOLAL Gold Award.

Name: Camping Business
Description:
Camping Business helps professionals in the European camping industry keep up to date with all the latest business news and market trends in this sector. A source of B2B information in the camping industry, with a unique global perspective and an international team of correspondents delivering daily news online at www.campingbusiness.it and a biweekly e-newsletter. 

Camping Business features exclusive interviews with senior management from the industry, reviews of the major exhibitions and reports about the latest market trends, plus in-depth profiles of companies who specifically manufacture components or provide services for this sector. 

Camping Business is essential reading for everyone working in any business related to the camping industry. 

Camping Business is an editorial product of Fuori Media, a Milan-based publishing house specializing in B2B magazines such as the quarterly Aboutcamp BtoB and Camper Professional.

Another flagship of Fuori Media is Golden Camping (www.goldencamping.com), the online magazine aimed at that group of tourists looking for rewarding and exclusive outdoor experiences: a media focused on the world of camping and high-end recreational vehicles, glamping and new trends, with a carefully selected network of open air structures.

Name: Publications Agora France
Description:
Créée en 1997, Publications Agora France est l’une des sociétés d’AGORA, le plus large réseau d’entreprises indépendantes de presse spécialisée au monde. 

Présentes sur les cinq continents, les entreprises d’AGORA véhiculent la même vision et philosophie : célébrer la vertu de penser par soi-même et de prendre ses propres responsabilités, que ce soit en matière de finances personnelles, de santé ou de réussite.   

Le nom « Agora » a été décidé par Bill Bonner en 1978. Le mot est un terme grec pour « marché ». Bill Bonner voulait concevoir la première place de marché mondiale pour les idées, avec des opinions et des avis originaux, alternatifs et surtout utiles. 

Les rédacteurs de Publications Agora France et plus généralement d’AGORA dans le monde ont à cœur d’aider leurs lecteurs à mieux comprendre le monde dans lequel ils vivent et à agir en conséquence. Que ce soit en matière d’économie, d’investissement, de santé ou encore de développement personnel, AGORA incite ses lecteurs à cultiver un esprit vif et anticonformiste.  » Parfois nous avons raison, parfois nous avons tort, mais nous sommes toujours dans le questionnement », telle est la devise d’AGORA.   

Publications Agora France publie actuellement plus d’une quinzaine de lettres et services, principalement dans le domaine de la finance personnelle et du patrimoine.

Name: L'Indipendente
Description:
Informazione senza padroni 

Siamo un gruppo di giornalisti/e e operatori/operatrici della comunicazione. Con L’Indipendente vogliamo portare in Italia un’informazione coraggiosa, scomoda quanto serve, ma al tempo stesso sicura, al riparo da notizie non verificate o di dubbia provenienza. Questa è la nostra sfida.
Ogni giorno i media generalisti pubblicano centinaia di notizie, buona parte servono solo ad attirare click e tra quelle importanti molte vengono trattate in modo distorto, per non scontentare investitori, sponsor e padrini politici di riferimento.
Le notizie più importanti, verificate e senza filtri: questo vogliamo offrirvi. E lo faremo senza utilizzare titoli clickbait e con un’attenzione rigorosa ad evitare qualsiasi fake news. Abbiamo un occhio di riguardo per l’ambiente – e non solo a parole – e per le tematiche importanti che i media tendono a tacere: i movimenti sociali, i diritti civili, i lati oscuri della geopolitica e della globalizzazione, le vicende dei popoli schiacciati dal neoliberismo. Siamo indipendenti, senza alcun legame con grandi aziende, multinazionali e partiti. E sarà sempre così perché questa è l’unica possibilità per fare una vera informazione, libera, imparziale e realmente al servizio dei lettori.
Costruiamo insieme un nuovo, ambizioso e autorevole giornale online: un’informazione – finalmente – senza padroni.

Name: Ouest-France Communication

Name: MARCAS POR ESCREVER
Description:

Através de produção de conteúdo própria, o MARCAS POR ESCREVER tem por objectivo ser a plataforma de excelência sobre a actualidade destes sectores, dando voz a novas projectos, marcas emergentes e a todas as histórias da lusofonia que se destacam no mercado. Com uma equipa jovem e multicultural, o MARCAS POR ESCREVER desenvolve-se diariamente com base na pluridade, na irreverência, na liberdade, na isenção e acima de tudo na transparência, procurando sempre dar espaço a marcas que estão a escrever a sua história. 
Escrito em português, o MARCAS POR ESCREVER, destaca diariamente o que está a ser desenvolvido na lusofonia e pretende demonstrar a relevância que marcas locais têm no ecossistema. Uma das palavras de ordem do MARCAS POR ESCREVER é impacto: damos voz a acções ou momentos de marca que, com a sua relevância, causam impacto, e consequentemente mudança ou crescimento. 
Escrevemos para todos aqueles que estão a escrever a sua marca e que pretendem que cada capítulo da sua história seja relevante.

Name: Merci A&M
Description:
À propos de nous
MERCI A&M. est une société privée fondée en 2021 et créée spécifiquement pour aider et soutenir les entreprises déjà engagées ou envisageant de faire du commerce international. Nous avons plus de dix ans d'expérience pratique du commerce international mondial, nous sommes donc en mesure de fournir des solutions à la multitude de défis rencontrés dans les activités d'exportation quotidiennes. Grâce à notre expérience, nos connaissances et notre expertise, nous aidons de nombreuses entreprises différentes à exporter une gamme très diversifiée de produits vers une large sélection de marchés internationaux. Nous sommes également fiers de notre capacité à développer et à maintenir des relations clients à long terme, comme indiqué sur notre page de témoignages. Beaucoup de nos clients sont restés avec nous depuis la création de l'entreprise. Donc, que vous ayez besoin d'une aide occasionnelle ou d'un soutien continu, que vous envisagiez d'exporter pour la première fois ou que vous soyez un exportateur expérimenté cherchant à développer davantage votre activité d'exportation, veuillez nous contacter pour une discussion gratuite et sans engagement sur la manière dont nous pouvons vous aider.

Name: Revista Móbile 360°
Description:
A Alternativa Editorial - Revista Mobile, editora especializada em comunicação para o setor moveleiro, está no mercado há 29 anos, com um único objetivo: promover o setor moveleiro no mercado nacional e internacional.

A editora detém hoje aproximadamente 95% do mercado publicitário, sendo reconhecida líder não só em faturamento, mas também em credibilidade – um dos valores mais importantes no negócio da comunicação.

Tal número só pôde ser atingido devido a três metas que são a maior característica da empresa: eficiência e garantia de retorno aos anunciantes, qualidade de conteúdo e foco do material editorial produzido, e seriedade e competência de uma equipe preparada para atender as especificidades do setor moveleiro.

Com isso, a Revista Mobile tornou-se a maior editora da América Latina de publicações especializadas para o setor moveleiro, com o banco de dados mais completo do segmento moveleiro. Além disso, a atuação internacional da editora ao longo dos últimos 15 anos trouxe uma visão globalizada, com contatos e informações importantes de primeira mão ao setor.

Mas a notoriedade da empresa vai além das publicações. Isso porque a editora realiza anualmente o prêmio Top Móbile - marcas mais lembradas, prêmio top of mind do setor moveleiro.
	
A Revista Mobile é membro da IAFP - International Alliance of Furnishing Publications, entidade que congrega os 15 principais veículos de comunicação especializada no setor de mobiliário mundial.

Name: GUAP
Description:

Founded in 2015 our magazine is an innovative magazine bridging the gap between print & digital using augmented reality. It redefines the norm by presenting the world with a new & unique way to recognise the untold, unseen & unforgettable young talent. Each issue showcases & profiles some of the best youth talent whose work, whether that be in music, fashion, business or the arts, needs to be seen or heard worldwide.

As well as producing an online & quarterly print magazine, we produce a range of video content, curate events including live music, exhibitions etc, deliver workshops and work with our audience to produce experiences & content for major brands/institutions including Nike, ICA, Southbank & more.

Name: Broadband TV News
Description:
Broadband TV News  is the Industry’s No.1 Information Provider bringing news, analysis and comment on the delivery of digital television, around Europe and the World.

Our constantly updated website centres on Europe’s leading platforms, their business decisions and technology choices. Whether it’s merger talks, regulatory challenges, high definition, over-the-top, streaming or HDR, we’ll bring you the inside track. Beyond Europe we update you on the major developments in the United States and Asia.

Every lunchtime Broadband TV News is delivered direct to your inbox. There is also a weekly email, Central & East Europe, which brings you a concise summary of the last seven days news in that region.

Founded in 2003 by former Cable & Satellite Europe journalists Robert Briel, Julian Clover and Chris Dziadul, Broadband TV News provides readers with a concise summary of what’s happening in cable, satellite, mobile and IPTV for busy decision-makers through a combination of advertising supported and paid for products.

Our fusion of editors brings together three writers that are probably the best known in the sector. They also happen to own the company. Cambridge-based Julian Clover has been on the media beat since 1989; Chris Dziadul is a recognised expert on the Central and East European markets; and Netherlands-based Robert Briel has worked for the Veronica organisation and the content division of UPC. Jörn reports on the latest development in the DACH market, Germany, Austria and Switzerland. He has worked as a freelance journalist since 1992, specialising in digital media, broadcast technology, convergence and new markets.

The editors are regularly on the road, attending press briefings, conferences and events. Broadband TV News also organises its own events in the form of the Business Briefings that have taken place in a number of European cities.

Description:
Lie Detectors is a Europe-wide journalist-led non-profit that works to help teenagers, pre-teens and teachers tell news facts from news fakes and navigate the shades of bias in between. It advises the EU within the High Level Expert Group on Fake News and of the Expert Group on Digital Literacy which work to find sustainable solutions to the spread of misinformation and to boost news literacy in Europe.

Lie Detectors selects and trains professional journalists for classroom visits designed to start the conversation with school children and their teachers on how to consume news online in an ever more challenging digital universe.  

Lie Detectors is funded by Hansjoerg Wyss and the Wyss Foundation and accredited by the Kind Baudouin Foundation. We are filling permanent positions and and rolling internships on a regular basis as we operate in new countries. 

Lie Detectors has no interest in telling young people what to think and takes no money from commercial or political entities. It aims to empower them to base their choices on reliable information and be actively aware of bias and persuasion. Child safety is nothing new: children worldwide have long been taught not to accept sweets from strangers. As they increase their consumption of media, they need news literacy to do so wisely.

Name: Free Guest Post
Description:
Free Guest Post makes it easy for publishers and writers to meet and share content quickly and efficiently. Guest posting is one of the most effective link-building methods in today’s SEO world.

It has the ability to push you to the top of the search engine rankings in a natural, organic way by publishing content on relevant blogs. Unfortunately, it is also one of the most expensive tactics because of the time and effort involved. The issue we face is two-fold: for the writers, it is time-consuming and costly to produce content, only to then go approach publishers – most of which don’t reply. For the publishers, simply putting a “write for us” page on your site is not enough to generate steady content, and most publishers don’t have the time to go out and actively look for writers that will be a good fit for their site. While there are many sites out there that help both parties find guest post opportunities right now, they all require logging in to an external site and going back and forth with an individual publisher/writer until an agreement is made.

Our Free Guest Post plugin will virtually eliminate the searching for both the writers and the publishers. Writers can submit content to the plugin or on FreeGuestPost.com. Publishers that download the plugin will then have relevant content show up directly in their WordPress control panel, and can accept posts from there without ever having to log in elsewhere.

Name: Matopiba Agro
Description:
Nos últimos anos, o acrônimo “Matopiba” (região que abrange a maior parte do estado do Maranhão, todo o território do Tocantins, o Sudoeste do Piauí e o Oeste da Bahia) ganhou projeção nacional e internacional.

Considerada a última fronteira agrícola do País, o Matopiba deixou de ser promessa para tornar-se realidade: atualmente, a região é responsável por 10% da safra nacional de grãos, com a possibilidade de dobrar a produção nos próximos 10 anos.

Com 337 municípios, cerca de 6 milhões de habitantes e uma área de 73 milhões de hectares, o Matopiba, caso fosse transformado em um estado, seria a quarta maior unidade federativa do Brasil: um território duas vezes maior que a Alemanha e quase três vezes maior que o estado de São Paulo.

O Matopiba tem 91% do seu território inserido dentro do Cerrado, bioma que abriga nascentes de oito das doze bacias hidrográficas do País.

Matopiba Agro - O canal de informação do agronegócio

Tendo em vista a necessidade de levar informação de qualidade sobre o Matopiba para o Brasil e o resto do mundo, foi criado no início de 2017 o site Matopiba Agro – O canal de informação do agronegócio. Com atualização constante das principais notícias referentes ao agronegócio, o Matopiba Agro cobre os principais eventos agropecuários da região, além dos eventos corporativos das empresas
parceiras do site.

Com um número de acessos crescente, o Matopiba Agro é uma ótima vitrine para as empresas do agronegócio divulgarem a sua marca, produtos e serviços, através de publieditoriais e vídeos.

Funcionalidades do site

Além de notícias do agronegócio, o Matopiba Agro conta com a seção “Clima e Tempo”, com informações atualizadas sobre o clima das principais cidades do Matopiba; a TV Matopiba, com vídeos de eventos agropecuários e corporativos, e o Matopiba Classificados, a maior vitrine do agro no Matopiba, onde o cadastrado poderá colocar à venda sua máquina ou implemento agrícola.

Name: Nevo EV Review Ireland
Description:
Hello and welcome to EV Review Ireland, Ireland's No 1 EV YouTube Channel. My name is Derek Reilly and I’m Ireland’s first EV only reviewer. What do I mean by that? There are lots of car vloggers and bloggers out there, motoring journalists and they focus on all types of vehicles where I'm specifically focusing on battery electric vehicles. I won’t be reviewing hybrids, mild hybrids, soft hybrids or even plug in electric hybrids. I especially won’t be reviewing self charging hybrids . 

Why am I only reviewing electric vehicles? I think they are the future and I’m going to focus this channel on that. It’s not an ideal time to set up a channel with a global pandemic sweeping the world and I can't get out into cars. Once we get out and about again I’m looking to produce quality reviews that answer the questions that EV drivers and EV curious have to ask. We'll be reviewing everything from electric cars and mopeds all the way up vans and trucks and everything in-between. 

We've had such a great response to my reviews on www.theeffect.net. I've been writing electric vehicle reviews since 2019 that we are going to continue the written reviews on that website but we decided to launch the youtube channel and the twitter account (@EVReviewIreland).

So if you are interested in EVs here in Ireland please subscribe to the channel and hit the notification bell to get notified when I post a new review. I’m really excited to launch this channel to drive the adoption and awareness of EVs in Ireland. Remember if you think an EV is for you, leave it to me and I'll review.

Somos um portal de jornalismo que apresenta uma lente de aumento sobre o universo das crianças, com qualidade e integridade editorial. Acreditamos que informação protege, acalma e oferece perspectivas plurais de ser e estar no mundo. 

Princípios e valores
Oferecer um espaço acolhedor e seguro, com um jornalismo que inspire confiança e seja referência em informação e reflexão sobre as infâncias. Temos o compromisso de defender os direitos das crianças, respeitando o contexto de cada família, a diversidade e os Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável com qualidade e integridade editorial.

Nossos compromissos
Direitos da criança
Respeito ao contexto de cada família
Diversidade
Um espaço seguro e acolhedor
Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável

O que oferecemos?
Jornalismo que inspira confiança, analisando e colocando a realidade em perspectiva.
Linguagem acessível, leve, inovadora, propositiva e acolhedora.
Informação que move para a reflexão sobre a realidade e as demandas das infâncias brasileiras.
Discussões sobre o lugar da criança (0 a 12 anos) em casa, na escola e na sociedade; e a diversidade das famílias brasileiras.

Glavni i odgovorni urednik poslovnog portala CAPITAL.ba Siniša Vukelić dobitnik je Nagrade Evropske unije za istraživačko novinarstvo u BiH 2016. godine.
Novinari portala CAPITAL.ba su dobitnici nagrada za najbolji pisani izvještaj o korupciji u BiH u 2017, 2018 i 2019. godini po ocjeni Antikorupcijske mreže u BiH (ACCOUNT).

Osnivač portala CAPITAL.ba je Udruženje za promociju evropskih standarda i unapređenje poslovnog ambijenta.
_________________________________________________________________________________

Portal CAPITAL.ba was established in 2007 by the Association for the Promotion of European Standards and Improvement of the Business Environment Banja Luka. 

CAPITAL.ba is one of the most-read and most-quoted portal not only in Bosnia and Herzegovina, but also in the region. The main goal of the portal is - to provide business people, investors and citizens with fast, accurate and up-to-date economic information from Republika Srpska, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and the region. Our slogan “Information is capital” best shows the commitment to publish only multiple sources verified news.

The outstanding work of Portal Capital journalists has been recognized with numerous awards, including the European Union Award for Investigative Journalism in Bosnia and Herzegovina 2015 for a series of investigative bank (Balkan Investment Bank – Banka Srpske) robbery stories and awards of the Anti-Corruption Network in BiH (Account) for the best written investigative stories about corruption (three years in a row).

Name: The First
Description: There is a massive group of Americans whose voices are rarely heard. They’re passionate, smart, and most of all engaged. They don’t subscribe to cable or satellite and wouldn’t relate to the current cable news offerings even if they did. Not surprisingly, up to now, they’ve been grossly under-represented in the media.   They’re conservative in their views, but never beholden to any party’s talking points. Independent thinkers who rely on things like the facts, context, and perspective, to inform their ideology. Podcasts and YouTube play a role, but there’s currently no single brand for them to call home.   They are why we created The First.   The First is a network designed to give rise to a new generation of influencers. It is not cable news. It is not a place for competing pundits to verbally bash each other using the talking points of the old guard. Instead, it’s a forum for new thought, new approaches, and an enlightening voice for a new America that embraces the founding principles and ideals that formed the greatest country on the planet.  The First.  The fresh new voice for a new generation.

We cover women leaders, source their perspectives, their analysis and ideas on everyday issues in their area of expertise. 

How We Work

We are committed to  changing  the narrative about women's leadership role in Africa.  We present the SHE voice. We cover the issues through SHE lens. Name: FIJ Nigeria
Description:
The Foundation for Investigative Journalism (FIJ) is an independent, not-for-profit organisation that combats injustice, holds power to account and speaks for the voiceless. Founded by ‘Fisayo Soyombo in June 2020, we seek to uncover the truth by bypassing officialdom and neutralizing propaganda, and making it accessible to the public in a way that eases and influences their everyday decision making.

MISSION
Our aim is to free our audience from the shackles of vested interests and propagandists who have mastered the art of information manipulation to the detriment of public interest. We seek to dig out, distill and dispense the real truth to the general public while limiting the spread of half-truths disguised as news.

Through our works, we free the powerless from their oppressors, assist the helpless to get justice and hold the government to account — all in a bid to strengthen democracy and advance the society.

VISION
Our vision is to use journalism as a tool for bettering the world, beginning from Nigeria. We want our journalism to help make Nigeria a more habitable place for all, especially for the lowly. We’re also determined to raise a new generation of Nigerian journalists that will value integrity, objectivity, impartiality and public interest over their pockets.

MediaStorm has led a paradigm shift in digital storytelling. Our in-depth reporting and original use of audio, video, and interactive graphics create compelling stories that get noticed. We have been nominated for 17 Emmy Awards and won two Alfred Dupont Awards. Name: letsdiskuss
Description:
Let’s Diskuss is a newly formed online discussion website hosting question-answers and blogs, functioning in both Hindi and English. 

This discussion forum aims at bringing to the forefront, the world knowledge that is still entrapped in the form of printed books, written manuscripts, people’s experiences, memories, memoirs, and the very way of living. We believe that all this hidden knowledge should be converted into information and be accessible to as much population as it can. And we found no way better than the one which helps human beings evolve –questioning and pondering over the questions surfacing –to realize what we believe.
    
Let’s Diskuss, henceforth, hosts a plethora of users who believe in questioning the ways of the world to make it a better place, and seeking the answers to their general queries also. It houses a panel of experts from different fields, committed to solve any query that the users might have. The panel inculcates top class tech-enthusiasts, journalists, doctors, surgeons, educators, fashion analysts, content writers, and above all, thinkers. This team of experts participates in the discussion with our daily users and the practice has given way to the generation of an intellectual community in which discussions on various categories take place simultaneously. Seen from this angle, our website contributes in the creation of useful information for internet users.
 
Apart from the question and answers, Let’s Diskuss also allows its users and experts to publish their blogs on the website. Blogs are there so that the free flow of knowledge is not restricted to just questions and answers.
  
All the information and knowledge provided and gained through our discussion forum is related to eleven categories in total. They are Science and Technology, Current issues, Finance, Sports, Education, Food and Cooking, Astrology, Health and Beauty, Entertainment and Lifestyle, Cars and Bikes, and Others.

Name: Fil'm Hafızası
Description:
Biz kimiz?
Fil’m Hafızası, filmlerde hayat bulan, replikleri fil hafızasıyla hatırlayan, bağımsız ve hakettiği değeri görmemiş yapıtlara hayat vermeyi amaç edinmiş insanların oluşturduğu bir topluluktur. 2011’de küçük bir Facebook grubu olarak başlayan oluşum, şu anda gönüllülük esasına dayalı kocaman bir bağımsız sosyal sinema platformu olarak yoluna devam ediyor. Bu platformda karşılaşacaklarınız;

*Popüler kültür dışındaki türlere ilgi duyan bilinçli ve özgün sinemaseverler
*Tür, dönem, imdb puanı ayrımı gözetmeksizin yapılan film tanıtımları ve eleştirileri
*“Unutulmaya yüz tutmuş filmler” klişesinden koparılmış Yeşilçam klasiklerine saygı duruşu
*Tematik film gecelerinde Türk sinemasının genç yetenekleriyle tanışma fırsatı
İstanbul’un keyifli mekanlarında gerçekleşen etkinlikler ve yeni deneyimler

Misyonumuz
*Ülkemizdeki sinema algısını geliştirmek ve iyileştirmek
*Farklı ve alternatif bir sinema içeriği üretmek ve paylaşmak
*Sinemaseverlerin birlikte sosyalleşebilecekleri ve yeni deneyimler yaşayabilecekleri ortamlar yaratmak
*Sinemanın diğer sanat dallarıyla ilişkisini güçlendirmek

Vizyonumuz
Ülkemizde sinemaya verilen değeri yükseltmeyi temel amaç edinmiş en farklı sosyal platform olmak

Değerler
Eğlenceli, bağımsız, paylaşımcı, yenilikçi, araştırmacı

Motto
Keşfetmenin keyfi

Name: Digital + Technology Collective
Description:
Formerly known as AIMIA, the Digital + Technology Collective (ACS trading as Digital + Tcechnology Collective) draws together Australia’s digital ad technology experts including pioneering digital and technology focused powerhouses, agencies, in-house digital teams and major industry suppliers.

As the driving force for great ideas in digital and digital technology, we are committed to creating a culture that allows for innovation and opportunity to thrive.

D+TC exists to:

- Encourage and support the growth of D+TC members and the digital industry at large
- Act as a medium of education and support for its members and the industry through a number of services
- Represent D+TC members and the digital industry to the broader business community

In twenty years, D+TC has provided a number of industry services and initiatives which have mirrored the ever-changing digital landscape. From the introduction of the prestigious annual AIMIA Awards, to starting the IAB Australia, D+TC has a longstanding history of celebrating and supporting the growth of the digital industry.

D+TC membership represents the full spectrum of the digital content, services and applications industry. Our membership includes Australia's top digital power houses, digital content, services and applications companies, and major industry suppliers.

Our activities and initiatives are driven by and for our members. We actively encourage participation from D+TC members to ensure that we lead the digital industry through an exchange of ideas and insights.

Name: Tuesday's Thanks Podcast
Description:
Tuesday's Thanks Podcast, hosted by Brian Proctor, is a captivating and insightful show that revolves around the power of gratitude. Each week, Brian engages in conversations with influential industry leaders, delving into their personal and professional journeys. This podcast serves as a platform for these remarkable individuals to express their heartfelt appreciation and offer thanks to the people who played pivotal roles in their success.

Brian Proctor skillfully guides the discussions, weaving together stories of triumph, resilience, and gratitude. Through intimate interviews, listeners gain valuable insights into the challenges and triumphs faced by these accomplished professionals. The podcast serves as a source of inspiration for aspiring individuals looking to carve their own paths in various industries.

Moreover, Tuesday's Thanks Podcast goes beyond personal narratives. It also offers an innovative approach to employee recognition within the corporate world. By highlighting the significance of gratitude, the podcast serves as a powerful tool for enhancing employee engagement efforts. Companies can draw inspiration from the stories shared on the show and implement gratitude-driven practices within their organizations, fostering a culture of appreciation and boosting overall employee morale.

With its concise and impactful format, Tuesday's Thanks Podcast delivers weekly episodes brimming with gratitude, wisdom, and motivation. Brian Proctor's empathetic interviewing style creates an atmosphere of authenticity, making each episode a delightful and meaningful listening experience. Whether you are an industry professional seeking insights or a company aiming to strengthen employee engagement, this podcast is a must-listen. Tune in and discover the transformative power of gratitude.

Name: Greenletter Club
Description:
Non. L’écologie n’est pas un sujet comme un autre. Ce n’est pas une idéologie. Et non, les médias n’en parlent pas assez. Parce que le changement climatique va tout changer : les pluies, les vents, les températures. Mais aussi la mode, l’agriculture, les transports et même la guerre.

Ça vous perturbe ? Nous aussi. A quoi ressemblera la France en 2050 ? Doit-on arrêter de prendre l’avion ? Il y aura-t-il des guerres de l’eau ? 

Ces questions sont complexes. Ultra-complexes. Pour chaque sujet, nous prenons le temps de discuter pendant une heure avec des spécialistes. Des vrais. Des gens qui travaillent au quotidien sur ces questions. Des scientifiques, bien sûr. Mais aussi des responsables d’ONG, des experts de l’énergie ou des capitaines d’industries. 

Ça vous intéresse ? 
Bienvenue au club.

Name: Fortino Studios (Formerly Short Form Pros)
Description:
Fortino Studios is a strategy-led creative production studio that helps modern marketing and brand teams turn clarity into content that actually performs.

Today’s brand teams aren’t short on ideas, they’re short on time, internal bandwidth, and scalable systems. Content demand keeps increasing across channels, stakeholders want consistency, and internal teams are expected to move faster without sacrificing craft. That’s where we come in.

We partner with in-house creative, brand, and marketing teams to design and produce modular, evergreen photo and video assets that can be deployed across campaigns, social, brand, and performance channels, without creating more work downstream.

Our approach is simple:

Start with clarity (what the brand stands for and what needs to be communicated)

Build content systems, not one-off assets

Execute with premium production that holds up across platforms, formats, and time

We specialize in:

Brand films and campaign content

Evergreen photo + video asset libraries

Social and performance-ready content systems

Executive and founder-led storytelling

Large-scale productions with multiple stakeholders and approvals

Fortino Studios operates as an extension of your internal team, aligning with brand guidelines, navigating approvals, managing complexity, and protecting quality from pre-production through delivery. 

We are trusted to lead projects where expectations are high, timelines are tight, and the work needs to hold up long after launch.

Our work has generated millions of views across platforms, but more importantly, it has helped brands:

Clarify and strengthen their positioning

Support rebrands and go-to-market moments

Enable demand generation and performance marketing

Attract top-tier talent and executive trust

Build durable content foundations that scale

We work best with teams who care deeply about craft, understand the value of systems, and want a partner who thinks beyond the deliverable.

Name: alanews
Description:
alaNEWS produces images and video reports in journalistic style, developing them using both the professionalism of the reporter the technical ability of production and post-production. In our videos are included live and investigative report.

alaNEWS is formed by a group of professional journalists who have a global vision, so they  have skills in the textual services, too. 
We produce radio reports by “raw material” (Voice, interviews) or "turnkey" services, personalized according to the request of the customer.

Our competencies and skills are used to follow live, on the field, the most important sports events to realize multimedia news reports.

In audiovisual production sector, alaNEWS works also creating and publishing formats, developing  our jobs with an eye to multimedia.

The job of alaNEWS staff, in fact, is always based on the main idea to use the Internet and the live streaming to have a quick and total circulation of the reportages.

Our team of professionals is looking towards commercial partnerships, too, offering web oriented integrated communication services. 
The range of products offered, goes from the creation of a press office to the organization of corporate communications.

Name: The Fix Media
Description:
News media is going through a massive transformation. The Grand Restructuring of Advertising Revenue has left many publications vulnerable, and the effects can be felt around the world.

We want to be part of the solution. The Fix, if you will. We aim to be a trade magazine for media professionals. This is a paper for us, and about us.

While the great disruption in media is global, the story is different in each part of the world. The Fix is European. We believe that our motley, multiethnic and polyglot region has specific problems to solve – especially compared to relatively homogeneous societies of the US or even China – and thus also needs specific solutions.

Language can be a barrier to spreading successful templates and industry best practices – one which we hope to break down with the help of our diverse network of contributors, journalists and experts. Our lingua franca is English although native speakers in our team are a minority (just like Europe).

We believe the transformation of our industry is so fundamental that in many ways we need to rethink solutions from scratch. In order to get the best ideas, we need to look across our business – giving voices not just editors but also photojournalists, engineers, or product managers. But we are also interested in the insights we can glean from other industries and how they can improve our work.

Our stories aim to shed light on the media itself, the business practices and economic trends. To break down the success stories and understand what we can learn from the failures. But first and foremost, elevate the discourse around media to an evidence-based, reasoned level.

As a growing media, The Fix is always on the lookout for new authors and contributors with fresh ideas and expertise in journalism. Feel free to reach out to us with any ideas!

As an integral part of the Gannett Co. since 2000, the nation's largest newspaper chain, The Indianapolis Star stands at the forefront of a dynamic media landscape, ensuring that the essence of central Indiana resonates far and wide.

We believe that every individual and business has distinctive aspirations. Recognizing this, The Indianapolis Star excels in tailoring solutions to meet your unique needs. Our team of experts is poised to accompany you from conceptualization to creative execution, ensuring your objectives find the spotlight they deserve.

Nestled in the heart of Indianapolis, we are more than a newspaper; we are a conduit for community connection. The Indianapolis Star boasts a dedicated team of reporters and resources, poised to keep you informed about the latest happenings while fostering a sense of belonging within central Indiana. Join us in this journey of exploration and engagement at The Indianapolis Star.

Name: Tijdschrift voor HRM
Description:
Het Tijdschrift voor HRM slaat een brug tussen kennis en beleid. Hiermee wordt beoogd een bijdrage te leveren aan de professionalisering van het human resource management in Nederland en Vlaanderen. Wij doen dat door het publiceren van artikelen, columns en boekbesprekingen. Deze worden opgeslagen in een database, die het hart vormt van de website. De database bevat meer dan 500 items. De meeste artikelen worden geschreven door wetenschappers, onderzoekers en adviseurs. Bij de selectie is relevantie voor de beroepspraktijk een belangrijk criterium. De artikelen zijn toegankelijk geschreven met een populair wetenschappelijke toonzetting. Er is altijd sprake van een stevig onderzoeksfundament; soms theoretisch, soms gebaseerd op casestudies, soms op wetenschappelijk onderzoek. Maar altijd degelijk onderbouwd. Ze zijn gericht op HR-professionals in de beleidspraktijk en studenten HRM. De artikelen zijn peer reviewed.

Alle bijdragen zijn vrij te downloaden, te verspreiden en te gebruiken. Dit wordt mogelijk gemaakt door onze partners in de beleidspraktijk en in het hoger onderwijs.

Name: BusinessDaily.gr
Description: Με πρωτογενή ρεπορτάζ, άρθρα και αναλύσεις, η δημοσιογραφική ομάδα του BusinessDaily.gr απευθύνεται στο κοινό που επιδιώκει να εμβαθύνει στα θέματα της οικονομικής ειδησεογραφίας. Παρακολουθούμε στενά την πορεία της οικονομίας, τη δραστηριότητα των επιχειρήσεων, τις κινήσεις των αγορών, αλλά και όλα όσα αφορούν τη ζωή μας.

Name: Pinturas y Negocios
Description:
Pinturas & Negocios es un portal dedicado a comunicar las principales novedades del sector de las pinturas y la construcción. Nace como una iniciativa de la Cámara Argentina de Pinturerías (CAPIN) para comunicar las principales novedades de un sector que no contaba con un medio especializado. 

CAPIN se fundó el 16 de octubre de 2006. Surgió a partir de la idea de algunos de los principales dueños de Pinturerías de Capital y Gran Buenos Aires de crear una Cámara que representara al sector de ventas de pinturas. Es la única asociación civil que agrupa a sociedades comerciales y personas físicas que ejercen el comercio mayorista y minorista de pinturas.

Name: Bookstr
Description:
At Bookstr, we bring book lovers together at the intersection of book culture and pop culture. We have a passionate audience of 1.5 million who engage with authors, books and all aspects of book culture. 

We connect to our audience through our website Bookstr.com and our social channels, via articles, videos and interviews. Our Facebook Live interviews allow our audience to fall in love with authors they may not otherwise have discovered. 

Bookstr believes that the value of books lies not only in the stories they tell, but in their ability to bring people together and unite them through shared experiences. 

The company was relaunched in March 2018 with new leadership and ownership headquartered at the Helmsley Building in New York City.

Aqui o leitor encontra matérias-primas com nome INCI, formulações, processos, tendências e lançamentos do mercado, indicação de uso, contato com o ponto de venda para o produto final e tudo isso de forma colaborativa.

O Cosmetoguia é uma ferramenta prática e confiável de consulta, que integra todos os níveis do mercado, da bancada de desenvolvimento de produto à prateleira no ponto de venda, conectando indústria e mercado.

Name: Snip-Noticias de Panamá

Estamos enfocados como  medio digital de alcance internacional,  a transmitir información de alto impacto e interés en el ámbito económico de Panamá.

Name: Night Owl Cinematics
Description:
Night Owl Cinematics is an award-winning content hub offering full-service digital production capabilities with a commitment to delivering effective and efficient marketing solutions. 

Founded by Ryan Tan and Sylvia Chan back in 2013, the goal of delivering Singapore’s best quality entertainment to every single household has expanded and is recognised well beyond its services as a Singapore-based production company. Up to date, the content produced has generated over 800 million cumulative views on our ever-growing social platforms (YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok) to reach out to users globally. 

Over the last 8 years, NOC has a proven track record in stretching marketing dollars to deliver outstanding ROIs to help achieve marketing goals. Having collaborations with over 77 brands (Ministry of Communications and Information, AirAsia, Garena, Grab, DBS among many others) across government bodies, education, technology, retail, FMCG, finance, travel, and F&B industries, count on us when we say we know best. 

Besides recruiting and managing talents; our artiste academy team today is responsible for grooming over 50 multi-talented individuals that hone the skills of event hosting, acting in commercials and TV series, voiceovers, artiste appearances and building authentic social media presence. 

We’ve produced over 1,200 videos ranging from infotainment, food reviews (Food King), reality TV (kNOCk OUT!), Corporate, short films, event coverages among others. 

With quality assurances from using industry’s very best RED 8K Professional Cameras to deliver stunning resolutions, and perfecting sound design with IMBA interactive, we only get the best entertainment delivered to your screens. 

NOC’s expertise in non-traditional media accompanied by the capabilities of our multifunctional team is how we are able to maximise your budget to achieve optimum performance. 

To join our team, connect with us via careers@noc.com.sg.

Description:
Ok so here is a question for you…Have you ever put money in a marketing campaign, with a brilliant idea, and got below par in results? If you said no…don’t lie. We know what it’s like having that perfect vision ruined completely to the point of embarrassment. 

Our goal is to become your daily partner for your content. We will always recommend you what’s best for you. We never take the easy way out. You want to call us at 3 in the morning because you need content? DO IT! We will do it for you. Creating content is not a chore for us, it’s a pleasure.

Name: Sachin and Adam
Description:
We tell the raw stories of the world’s tech leaders, by asking the vulnerable questions that no one else does. Guests have included former Prime Ministers, unicorn tech founders and the world’s top investors.

Join us for these interviews and get a real behind the scenes look into 25 year old best friends building the company of their dreams.

Name: Catch News
Description:
Catch is a contemporary new digital platform about the ideas and events shaping the world.

It aims to filter and provide news-on-the-run for an impatient new generation. But it will also offer context and insight for influencers and the deeper consumer of news.

When opinions are shrill and polarised, we hope to create a middle ground and build bridges. When there is set thinking, we hope to stand apart and go against the wind.

We are committed to the founding values of the Constitution and ideas of social equity and justice. But our content will range over everything -- from hard news to hard rock. 

Part of the highly-regarded Rajasthan Patrika group, Catch quite simply hopes to curate a space -- a voice -- you will grow to like and trust. 

We will reflect a dual personality: challenging but constructive, eclectic but mainstream, provocative but playful.

The world is complex, exciting, layered, evolving, always interesting. We hope to be the same.

Name: KapanLagi Network
Description:
Now is KLN time!

When first conceived by Steve Christian and Eka Wiharto in 2003, the goal was to build an internet technology company that would change the media content industry in Indonesia. As mobile phone users began reaching critical mass in Indonesia, KapanLagi.com seized the opportunity to provide entertainment content for these individuals. 

From its humble beginning as a five-person team consisting of mostly engineers, KapanLagi.com has grown to become one of the largest homegrown Internet companies in Indonesia with 500+ employees today. Along the way, new verticals were created including Bola.net (for sports enthusiasts), Vemale.com (devoted to topics of interest to women), Otosia.com (for automotive fans), and Merdeka.com (our flagship general news site).

In 2014, KapanLagi.com embarked on a new beginning through a merger with Fimela Network, founded by Ben Subiakto and Dian Mulyadi. Fimela Network is a lifestyle beauty network that operates several verticals covering Fimela.com (a glamorous online beauty and fashion vertical), Sooperboy.com (devoted to all aspects of man’s lifestyle), and Muvila.com (for movie enthusiasts).

Combined, this network of popular online destinations is now known as KLN : KapanLagi Network and stand as a symbol for creativity, innovation, and perseverance. 

With offices currently in Jakarta, Malang and Yogyakarta, and readership of over 40 millions per month, KLN is only getting started. We believe that great ideas need great people. As such, KLN will continue to groom young talent to give them early opportunities to create something significant and meaningful. This talented workforce along with the firm belief that “Your ideas can change people’s lives” will ensure that the company will continue to grow and make an impact both locally and globally.

Tomorrow must be better than today… in all aspects of life.

Le tout, pensé pour une jeunesse connectée et adapté aux formats numériques modernes des réseaux sociaux.

Nous ne faisons pas que transmettre l’information, nous la rendons accessible, pertinente et inspirante, pour que chaque jeune puisse se sentir impliqué dans les défis et les opportunités de sa société.

Name: FASI.eu
Description:
The only information portal where you can find all the funding provided by development policies, a single source with articles, incentives, events, tenders, projects, and programmes for Companies, Associations, Universities, Research Centres, Local Authorities, Foundations, NGO and Individuals. 
In addition to daily monitoring of calls for proposals and tenders with a personalized email alert, it provides online and 'in-house' training to organizations and companies, as well as planning events and communication projects.

Name: Mediacités
Description:
Mediacités renoue avec les fondamentaux du journalisme en mettant à l’honneur l’enquête.

Il n’y a pas d’action et de choix éclairé possible sans une information exigeante et indépendante. Ce principe, valable à l’échelle d’un pays, l’est aussi à l’échelle locale.

Journal multi-villes, Mediacités concentre ses moyens sur quatre grandes agglomérations – Lille, Lyon, Nantes et Toulouse – pour répondre à ces différents constats :

1. La presse nationale enquête rarement sur des enjeux régionaux et métropolitains.
2. La presse locale (PHR/PQR) se consacre peu à l’investigation.
3. La décentralisation et la montée en puissance des métropoles a permis l’émergence de pouvoirs forts (politiques, économiques, culturels, etc.), sans réel contre-pouvoir médiatique.

Name: CIO France
Description:
CIO France bénéficie de toute l’expérience du réseau International d’IDG, créateur de la marque CIO.

Depuis son lancement en France en 2003, CIO a créé un lien unique avec une profession en pleine mutation et confrontée à des enjeux majeurs et toujours plus stratégiques. Déconnecté de l’information immédiate CIO privilégie avant tout : les retours d’expérience, les grandes interviews de DSI, le décryptage des stratégies IT.

Avec ses nombreux événements (conférences, dîners, petits-déjeuners) organisés chaque année, CIO est un vrai réseau d’échanges et de networking pour les décideurs IT. 

CIO est une marque du groupe IT News Info comme :
- Le Monde Informatique https://www.lemondeinformatique.fr/
- Distributique http://www.distributique.com/

http://www.itnewsinfo.com/

Name: Respect My Region
Description:
Respect My Region was established at Central Washington University back in 2011. Starting off as a clothing company that heavily supported local hip-hop, over the years we have grown into a lifestyle brand and top 100 music (hip-hop) website.

We’ve been media partners for the largest music festivals, cannabis conventions, and have supported hundreds of events all along the west coast. RMR loves local music and cannabis culture from all regions and we’ve made it our mission to support local every way we know how.

Make sure to check out our site and let us know who we need to cover!

Name: Talentéo
Description:
As a French recruitment agency, Talentéo sources disabled candidates, helps you fit them in your teams and appear as a key handicap-friendly company more than just pretending you are.

Talentéo is the first actor in the Human Resources ecosystem to understand that in order to take disabled employees onboard, social media is a tool that cannot be neglected. Indeed, the new tools do not change the recruitment approach. Our process is still based on a clever and efficient sourcing, simple interactions, suited evaluations and an appropriate integration in the team.

But our team thinks that companies need to grow in parallel with candidates behaviors. The web has become the most powerful media, and has changed the way people communicate and introduce themselves. We are there to make sure you don’t miss any real skilled profile because he would be disabled, atypical, unaware of your offer, or just not in your resumes data base.

Name: Modern Campground
Description:
Modern Campground is an extensive news platform devoted to delivering the most recent news and insights from the outdoor hospitality sector. As the authoritative source for information about RV parks, campsites, outdoor resorts, and glamping, we strive to offer you the most pertinent and engaging content from around the world.

Our team of skilled writers and industry experts is devoted to delivering unique, high-quality articles that cover the most important developments and trends in the outdoor hospitality business. From interviews with industry leaders to in-depth analysis of current events, we provide a variety of informative and engaging content.

In addition to our written material, we also provide a variety of innovative tools that make it simple to keep up with the most recent news. You may listen to every item on-the-go, subscribe to our news on your preferred podcasting platform, and even connect with other industry experts via our exclusive columnists and highlighted interviews.

Modern Campground has something for you, whether you're an RV park owner, campground owner, outdoor resort owner, industry supplier, or simply an outdoor enthusiast. Follow us now to stay informed of the latest outdoor hospitality industry trends.

StarNews Mobile is Africa’s first media company with a mission to give financial freedom to African content creators.

Description: ownerIQ is the @InmarInc Data and Media Plaform focused on leading the data market’s evolution towards transparency, relevancy and choice. ownerIQ brings the most valuable consumer data to market– explicit shopping and purchasing data from retailers and brands– to power a new data economy: The Second-Party Data marketplace. Second-party data is sourced transparently from the marketing partners a brand is already working with, or brands that share data with non-competitive brands in exchange for compensation. This new market provides better quality data inputs to power all marketing tactics, and enabling fundamentally new marketing tactics, such as enabling a brand’s retail partners to leverage the brand’s data to support sell-through. Voted Best Data Management Platform by Digiday, ownerIQ directly ingests data on consumer engagement with a brand’s website, e-commerce transactions, off-line transactions and CRM data and enables that data to be shared with marketing partners within platform according to the brand’s preferences regarding security and usage. Over 1,500 partners are active in ownerIQ’s second-party platform and 700 of these partners share their data with other brands. Additionally, over a thousand of these partners are buyers of second-party data using it to activate media and drive marketing outcomes. In 2017 ownerIQ was named to the the Inc. 5000, received Digiday’s Signal Award for Best Data Management Platform and was recognized by The Boston Business Journal as one of the 50 Fastest Growing Private Companies. ownerIQ was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Boston, MA and has offices in NYC, Chicago and Seattle.

We’re what Facebook would be if Facebook allowed everyone to socially sexually self-identify and self-express (which sadly, they don’t).

MLNP was founded by former advertising executive Cindy Gallop, who dates younger men and realized through personal experience that when we don’t talk openly and honestly about sex in the real world, porn becomes sex education by default. In 2009, Cindy launched the original iteration of MLNP - ‘Porn World vs Real World’ with a TED talk that went viral. The extraordinary global response made her realize she’d uncovered a huge global social issue, and she turned MLNP into a business designed to do good and make money simultaneously - mlnp.tv.

Description:
Fondata dalla giornalista Eleonora Voltolina, la Ventidue è una società editrice di Repubblica degli Stagisti, testata giornalistica online, dal 2009 punto di riferimento dei giovani che si affacciano al mondo del lavoro. 

Con il suo network di aziende "virtuose" RdS Network, il bollino OK STAGE riconosciuto a quelle aziende del network che rispettano tutti i punti della Carta dei diritti dello stagista e gli AWARDS conferiti a quelle aziende del network che si sono distinte su alcuni punti chiave. 

Ha promosso una politica di valorizzazione di chi rispettava lo strumento stage, in contrasto con chi invece ne abusava. Pubblica esclusivamente annunci di stage di aziende che hanno sottoscritto la sua Carta dei diritti dello stagista.

Il suo evento annuale Best Stage si è appena svolto lunedì 15 giugno 2015, alla presenza del sottosegretario al lavoro Luigi Bobba, l'assessore al Lavoro del Comune di Milano Cristina Tajani e l'Europarlamentare membro della commissione lavoro Brando Benifei. Durante il convegno sono intervenuti anche il professore Alessandro Rosina e i top manager di aziende dell'RdS network come Nestlé, PwC, Everis, Tetra Pak, EY, BOSCH  e tanti altri. Consulta la lista sul sito http://www.repubblicadeglistagisti.it/initiative/rdsnetwork/chiarostage/le-aziende-aderenti/

Name: The Western Journal
Description:
The Western Journal is a news company that drives positive cultural change by equipping readers with truth. 

As Americans — and indeed, readers around the world — continue to lose trust in traditional newspapers and broadcast networks and their claims of objectivity and impartiality, The Western Journal is rapidly filling the gap as a trusted source of news and information. The Western Journal is staffed by an experienced team of editors, journalists and media experts who both recognize the stories that matter to everyday readers and provide a truthful and unfiltered view of current events.

Nearly 40 million unique visitors read WesternJournal.com monthly, putting the site securely among the Top 200 most-visited websites in the United States, according to global traffic analysis by Alexa. The Western Journal continues to break new records in engagement and trust in a rapidly shifting media landscape.

The Western Journal is committed to its founding principles: truth, honesty, integrity and accountability. These values are demonstrated through accurate, insightful reporting of information and events happening around the world.

WesternJournal.com is a property of Liftable Media Inc., a Top 100 digital publisher in the U.S., according to Quantcast.

Read more at http://www.westernjournal.com.

Outre une newsletter hebdomadaire et des évènements mensuels, Mediatico permet de découvrir une communauté d'acteurs qui redonnent du sens à l'économie au travers de ses interviews vidéo très courtes, de portraits engagés, ou encore de reportages sur le modèle économique des structures de l'ESS. L'audience de Mediatico.fr dépasse les 150.000 personnes par mois, sur l’ensemble de ses réseaux de diffusion. 

Mediatico propose par ailleurs différentes prestations à des entreprises ou à des collectivités clientes : productions vidéo, formations à l'éthique en entreprise, média-trainings pour prendre la parole en public, animations de tables rondes... N'hésitez pas à nous contacter : contact@mediatico.fr

But also for aspiring Scientists, anyone science adjacent and perhaps even hobbyists. Together we will be trying to bring back the fun in science. We all know the scientific field can be difficult and hard at times and it is easy to lose sight of our passion and enthusiasm. In this podcast we will talk about the good, the bad, the drama, the ridiculousness and also success and failure in a hopefully fun and enjoyable way. Sometimes life as a PhDer can feel like a soap opera and having some fun with that is what we want to do.

Name: LIFE.com
Description:
LIFE.com was an archival photography site dedicated to spotlighting the excellence and breadth of the photojournalism practiced by LIFE photographers between 1936 and 1972, focusing on the magazine's coverage of everything from World War II and the Civil Rights Movement to Vietnam, the Space Race, science, politics, technology, sports, the arts, Hollywood, pop culture and everything else under the sun.

Posting at least one new gallery a day, LIFE.com contextualized breaking news; engaged in the current national dialog around issues that affect Americans and people around the globe; brought to light photographs and stories that are long-forgotten or, frequently, that never ran in LIFE magazine; celebrated legendary photographers (Eisenstaedt, Bourke-White, W. Eugene Smith, Ralph Morse, Paul Schutzer and others) who were on staff at LIFE, as well as lesser known masters (Nina Leen, Michael Rougier, Grey Villet, Bill Ray, et al.) whose work deserves rediscovery; revealed the stories behind some of the most iconic and moving images of the  20th century -- often in the words of the men and women who made the pictures; and illuminated, through deep archival research, interviews and a thoroughly contemporary editorial voice and vision, the way in which LIFE magazine's photographers and writers not only chronicled the signal events and people of the mid-20th century, but often helped -- sometimes consciously, sometimes inadvertently -- to shape that history.

Our Approach

With a team of highly skilled professionals Picturepost Studio offers a wide range of services to cater to the diverse needs of the entertainment industry.

Services:

Editing: Picturepost Studio provides expert commercial and film editing services, ensuring seamless transitions, precise cuts, and enhanced storytelling for a captivating cinematic experience.

CGI (Computer Generated Imagery): The company excels in creating lifelike computer-generated imagery, utilizing cutting-edge technology and artistic expertise to bring imagination to life on the big screen.

VFX (Visual Effects): Picturepost Studio offers top-notch visual effects services, enhancing scenes with stunning visuals, realistic simulations, and mind-blowing special effects that leave a lasting impact on the audience.

HDR Grading: Picturepost Studio provides high dynamic range (HDR) grading services, enhancing the color, contrast, and overall visual appeal of films and videos, creating a more immersive viewing experience.

Film Mastering for OTT Platforms: Picturepost Studio ensures the technical and creative quality of films for OTT (Over-The-Top) platforms, adhering to platform-specific standards and delivering content that meets industry requirements.

Commercial Mastering for Channel and Digital Platform: The company specializes in commercial mastering, preparing content for broadcasting on television channels and digital platforms, optimizing the visual and audio elements for the best viewer experience.

Picture post Studio boasts a cutting-edge production facility, equipped for projects of all sizes and complexities. Our team excels in creativity, technical know-how, and timely excellence.

Name: Italia Che Cambia
Description:
Dal 2012, informazione e biodiversità. Articoli, video, podcast, annunci, formazione e una community con la porta sempre aperta. Piccole e grandi soluzioni per cambiare il mondo. E se non cambia il mondo, almeno cambi tu.

Il tutto ispirato dalla consapevolezza/visione espressa da Paul Hawken nel suo “Moltitudine inarrestabile”: noi siamo già maggioranza, ma non lo sappiamo. Pensiamo di essere soli e sole, isolati e isolate, “strani”, e invece siamo parte di un grande movimento mondiale. Un movimento silenzioso e frammentato che però è pronto a emergere e mostrarsi in tutte le sue sfaccettature.

Il nostro obiettivo, quindi, è duplice: da un lato far emergere questa italica moltitudine – che abbiamo potuto incontrare in anni di incontri in giro per le venti regioni italiane – e dall’altro contribuire alla costruzione di un nuovo paradigma culturale che metta al centro la demercificazione della realtà, le relazioni umane, la facilitazione, i processi non giudicanti, la sostenibilità umana, ambientale, economica e sociale.

Per farlo abbiamo realizzato un giornale, una mappa, dei portali territoriali e una campagna di attivazione dei territori attraverso le proposte emerse dalle “visioni 2040”.

Name: AL-Monitor
Description: Al-Monitor is a global newsroom headquartered in Washington, D.C. with a network of over 160 authors and analysts around the world.  Founded in 2012, Al-Monitor’s mission is to foster a deeper understanding between the Middle East and the international community with analytical pieces from some of the most trusted, independent authors from across the globe. It seeks to monitor the pulse of the Middle East through its award-winning platform and publishes a diverse set of perspectives, connecting those in the Middle East with those who have a desire to better understand a region that is so rapidly changing.  Al-Monitor’s authors write for those who want to go beyond the headlines — readers who want to explore the nuances of regional politics, but also want to better understand the social and cultural context of the Middle East as seen, experienced and understood by those who live there. Name: Hamelin Info
Description:
Hamelin est un média en ligne de référence qui se spécialise dans l'hygiène publique et l'actualité de la lutte anti-nuisibles. 
Nous sommes dédiés aux acteurs du marché de la lutte antiparasitaire, y compris :

-Les fabricants, les laboratoires, les distributeurs de produits biocides ou alternatives,
- les centres de formation CertiBiocide ou CertiPhyto,
- les centres de formation techniques anti-nuisibles (Cepa), 
-les auditeurs de risques sanitaires liés aux nuisibles et pesticides,
- les applicateurs et les techniciens hygiénistes.

Notre mission est de fournir à nos lecteurs une source fiable d'informations et de ressources de qualité, tout en offrant un espace pour la communauté de l'hygiène publique et environnementale. 
Nous sommes un point central pour les dernières actualités, les avancées technologiques, les réglementations et les meilleures pratiques en matière de lutte anti-nuisibles.

Hamelin.info propose des articles approfondis, des analyses et des conseils d'experts sur une variété de sujets pertinents pour le marché de l'hygiène publique et environnementale, tels que la dératisation, la désinsectisation et la désinfection. 

Nous fournissons également des rapports de marché, des évaluations de produits, des interviews d'experts, des événements sectoriels et bien plus encore.

En tant que source d'information de premier plan pour les professionnels de la lutte anti-nuisibles, nous nous efforçons de fournir un contenu éducatif et informatif pour aider nos lecteurs à améliorer leur pratique et leur efficacité. 

Rejoignez notre communauté pour rester informé sur les dernières tendances et les développements du marché de l'hygiène publique et environnementale.
www.hamelin.info

Name: FFW - Fashion Forward

A PLATAFORMA FFW É COMPOSTA PELO SITE  FFW.COM.BR, A REVISTA BIANUAL FFWMAG, O FFW APRENDER E PROJETOS ESPECIAIS. A CONVERGÊNCIA DE TODOS ESSES FORMATOS SOMAM O PRESTÍGIO E AUTORIDADE DA REVISTA IMPRESSA, A SATISFAÇÃO INSTANTÂNEA E ALCANCE DO DIGITAL E A EXPERIÊNCIA DOS EVENTOS.

Lançado em 2009, o site FFW é a voz independente mais confiável da moda no Brasil, celebrando estilo, ideias, cultura e os criativos emergentes e pioneiros estabelecidos em todos os gêneros. O FFW ganhou seguidores de norte à sul do Brasil como um recurso diário essencial para criativos e empreendedores de moda. É frequentemente descrito como "indispensável", "leitura obrigatória" e "um vício".

Somos lidos mensalmente por mais 500 mil fãs e consumidores de moda e tendências.

A FFWMAG é um revista bi-anual e colecionável em formato especial marcada por sua convergência com o site FFW.

O FFW está presente nas principais redes sociais onde tem uma audiência altamente engajada que soma mais de 600 mil seguidores.

O FFW Aprender nasceu com o propósito de promover educação de forma descentralizada contribuindo para o  desenvolvimento das pessoas de norte a sul do país. A proposta dos cursos mensais online é oferecer de uma maneira atual e acessível a oportunidade de evolução profissional e pessoal ao aprender com top profissionais que são referência em suas áreas de atuação. Há uma ampla diferença em aprender uma habilidade com o melhor talento em uma área e é isso que oferecemos.

O FFW realiza eventos onde experiências, conexões e networks acontecem, reunindo um mailing próprio altamente qualificado. 

A plataforma FFW cria e produz projetos especiais de conteúdo e tem entre seus clientes marcas nacionais e internacionais Adidas Originals, Burberry, Mercedes Benz, Sebrae, Calvin Klein e Spotify entre outros.
