Name: Rolling Stone Brasil
Description:
Em 2006, a revista Rolling Stone chegou ao Brasil! Gisele Bundchen ilustrou a capa de outubro daquele ano, oficialmente, a primeira edição. Também eram destaques entrevistas com Jack Nicholson, The Killers e Slayer, além de um especial sobre Bob Dylan.

Desde então, foram publicadas 144 revistas continuamente. A partir de 2018, a Rolling Stone Brasil migrou para o formato majoritariamente digital (publicou outras duas revistas impressas, edições especiais). É uma referência de conteúdo de cultura - com publicações diárias de entrevistas, análises, reviews e textos especiais.
Em 2019, ano inteiramente digital, a Rolling Stone teve uma audiência de quase 67 milhões de acessos, uma média de 5,2 milhões mensalmente.

Name: How Brands Are Built
Description:
How Brands Are Built is a blog and podcast where branding professionals get into the details of what they do—and more importantly, how they do it.

Most branding blogs focus on news, opinion, or high-level theory. How Brands Are Built takes a different approach by keeping it practical and tactical. If those other resources give you a 30,000-foot view, this is where the rubber meets the road—where you can find tips, tools, and other useful resources to help you build brands.

The podcast is hosted by Rob Meyerson, a San Francisco-based brand strategist. On each episode, he interviews other strategists, designers, writers, researchers—anyone who’s part of the world of branding. Season one is about naming. Season two is about brand positioning.

On the blog, you’ll find posts by branding experts—from agencies and client-side brand teams—on topics such as brand strategy and positioning, naming, brand architecture, messaging, brand voice, visual identity and logo design, package design, market research, and more. How Brands Are Built will also feature informative series of posts like Definitions, Useful Lists, and Best of the Web, where we scour the internet for the best examples of branding content or tools we can find.

To get in touch with with any questions or comments, please contact us. You can also submit a post, get information about advertising with us, or list your company on our agency directory.

Name: FutureCFO
Description:
The digital finance organization is still an emerging concept in many organizations, and CFOs are still one step remove (behind) from the center of digital-transformation efforts, even though they own and manage much of the relevant business information that feeds such initiatives.

According to McKinsey, CFOs and the finance team are expected, by the CEO and the board, to provide real-time, data-enabled decision support. A McKinsey survey of CFOs revealed there is desire to take on the leadership mantra, including applying digital to finance tasks. But efforts to do so are hindered by lack of understanding, knowledge and experience of how and where to begin.

FutureCFO is about empowering the CFO and Finance Team to take on the leadership in digitizing not only the department but empowering the entire organization towards the goal of harnessing the power of technology and digital to innovate existing processes and create new business models. It provides a platform for the CFO and Finance team to exchange views, share knowledge and experience, and acquire expertise and concepts to help them pursue a position of leadership within the organization and drive the transformation of the organization – be the leaders of change and innovation.

FutureCFO is a whole-owned media platform of Cxociety Pte. Ltd. Visit www.cxociety.com for more information.

Name: Fabricat în RO
Description:
Nu știm alții cum sunt, dar noi, cei de la fabricatînRO, când ne gândim la oamenii pe care îi cunoaștem, la locurile în care am fost, la lucrurile pe care le-am văzut, la ceea ce suntem, am fost și vom fi, ne saltă inima de bucurie. Acum, mai mult decât oricând. Acum, când, într-un context național nefavorabil întreprinzătorilor,  am găsit calea prin care putem stârni interesul față de oamenii, ideile, locurile și lucrurile frumoase din această țară.

Pentru asta am format o comunitate cu oameni din toate colțurile țării, uniți de aceleași valori: cunoaștere, solidaritate și dezvoltare.

Căutăm să cunoaștem, de la mic la mare, lucruri și idei dezvoltate între granițele acestei țări, pentru ca, înainte de a privi în grădina altuia, să știm cine și ce și-a găsit locul sub bucata noastră mioritică de cer.

Suntem solidari cu cei ce vor să vadă mai mult, să evolueze și să pună bazele unor proiecte care au menirea de a ne lărgi orizonturile. Îi susținem pe cei care își folosesc iscusința pentru a face lucrurile să meargă, în ciuda tuturor; oamenii care adună în jurul lor comunități, concep lucruri frumoase, continuă tradiția, au inițiativă si inovează.

Dorim să contribuim la dezvoltarea României ca spațiu cu oameni, povești, istorii, tradiții și locuri care ne demonstrează și susțin identitatea.

Pe scurt, prin fabricatinRO.ro, ne-am însușit misiunea de descoperi și transmite mai departe povești românești.

Name: OjoPúblico
Description:
OjoPúblico es una organización de noticias con sede en Lima. Actualmente es uno de los medios de investigación digitales con mayor audiencia en Perú y uno de los principales referentes del rubro en Latinoamérica. Se fundó como una asociación sin fines de lucro en el 2014 y desde entonces explora narrativas audiovisuales innovadoras, cubre agendas que otras organizaciones no abordan, impacta en políticas públicas, y promueve y articula redes colaborativas de periodismo, a nivel local y transfronterizo.
Desde el 2014, sus contenidos han obtenido algunos de los premios más importantes de periodismo de la región y fueron llevados a la televisión en formato documental. Sus investigaciones han tenido gran impacto en la vida política del país en los últimos años. OjoPúblico ha sido distinguido en diferentes oportunidades por su cobertura de temas vinculados a corrupción, industrias extractivas y la investigación del poder corporativo. Dos veces ganador del periodismo global de datos (2015 y 2020), cuatro veces el premio a la Excelencia periodística de la Sociedad Interamericana de Prensa (SIP), el el Digital Media Award, finalista en los Premios Gabo (2020), Premio Nacional de Periodismo y Derechos Humanos, otorgado por la Coordinadora Nacional de Derechos Humanos (2015). El 2019, OjoPúblico obtuvo la mención de honor en el LASA Media Award otorgado por la Asociación de Estudios Latinoamericanos de EE.UU. 
En el 2021, el Digital News Report de la Universidad de Oxford (Reino Unido) ubicó a OjoPúblico entre los medios digitales más importantes y leídos del Perú y el Paris Peace Forum seleccionó al proyecto “Chequeos en Lenguas” de OjoPúblico como uno de los 80 proyectos más destacados para solucionar desafíos globales.
OjoPúblico es colaborador del Consorcio Internacional de Periodistas de Investigación (ICIJ), y participó en la investigación global Panama Papers, que obtuvo el Premio Pulitzer.

Name: CINS - Center for Investigative Journalism of Serbia
Description:
Center for Investigative Journalism in Serbia (CINS) from Belgrade is a unique organization in Serbia, engaged in investigative journalism in order to provide trusted and accurate information, based on facts and evidence, which will help citizens to better understand the occasions.

CINS won the prestigious award European Press Prize in the investigative journalism category in 2017.

We also received six annual national awards for excellence in investigative journalism – in 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014 (two awards) 2015 and 2017.

In 2017 we won first Balkan Fact-checking award and EU Delegation to Serbia award for investigative journalism.

At the time when he was editor-in-chief of CIJS, Stevan Dojčinović received the 2013 regional award ‘Jug Grizelj’ while he was one of seven members of the international investigative team that won the Daniel Pearl award for cross-border investigative journalism in 2011.

The focus of our work are organized crime and corruption that negatively affect the lives of people in Serbia. We are working on research projects and stories that encompass all spheres of society: education, sports, health, employment, politics, drugs and cigarette smuggling, falsification of documents and drugs, and other financial scams.

CINS was established in 2008. year by the Independent Journalists Association of Serbia (IJAS). Today we are modern, autonomous and independent news agency and our stories are published on leading web portals in Serbia, and the number of visitors to the www.cins.rs is increasing.

We are part of an international network of Organized Crime and Corruption Reporting Project (OCCRP), which brings together journalists and independent research organizations in Eastern Europe and Central Asia.

CINS is funded from grants, with a tendency to be sustainable organization, that would cover the operational costs of the organization.

Traduzir para fácil entendimento o conjunto de normas técnicas de bombeiros e das diversas entidades regulamentadoras bem como a legislação municipal, estadual e federal para o uso correto e para as diversas práticas empresariais.

Colocando à disposição do mercado, um banco de dados atualizado de profissionais de emergências e urgências, salva vidas, socorristas, bombeiro profissional civil, segurança patrimonial e segurança pessoal, profissionais treinados e capacitados em instituições consolidadas.

Em nossas páginas ou ações, teremos sempre um grupo de profissionais e empresas com real comprometimento com suas responsabilidades sociais, preocupadas com o momento em que vivemos, porém com o legado para gerações futuras.

Esperamos através de reportagens e matérias atender ao anseio da sociedade, dos colaboradores diretos e indiretos dos nossos parceiros que nestes dias carece de informação para a segurança e tranquilidade seja no trabalho no seus momentos de lazer ou ainda na tranquilidade do seu lar.

Campfire is Auddy’s end-to-end private audio solution – an encrypted platform plus full creative, editorial, and operational support from an award-winning team.

Now you can deliver human-voiced updates to the right audiences – with security, segmentation, and real engagement analytics built in. 

We created Campfire for organisations that need their story to captivate their community, drive action, and rest easy knowing the message will only be heard by the listeners it was meant for. 

Use Campfire to easily launch a high-impact audio program for:
  • Internal comms — Reach employees with leadership messages, change updates, onboarding, and training – without adding meetings or inbox noise
  • Marketing and community engagement – Build deeper relationships with customers, members, or communities through exclusive, segmented audio
  • Investor relations – Share interim investor updates, earnings context, and CEO/CFO briefings – securely and access-controlled

Separately, we empower our podcast advertising clients targeting the UK and DACH regions to high-impact podcast campaigns built around authentic, host-endorsed storytelling – focused on unique listeners, not inflated impression counts.

Follow Auddy for practical insights on modernising communication, private podcasting, and how leading organisations use podcast-style storytelling to cut through the slop.

*Auddy currently serves markets in the US, UK, EU, and APAC regions.

Name: The Design Collective Magazine
Description:
Founded in 2019, The Design Collective Periodical is a curated, hand-picked and carefully edited assemblage of the latest in architecture, design and art. It serves as an independent digital publication and online magazine that aims to be at the forefront of creative journalism. TDC also functions as a community which recognizes and acknowledges upcoming talents, initiatives and organizations from different parts of the world.

In association with people of various disciplines, a fresh edition is compiled periodically and released online, a preview for which is available on social media. The end result is a selective amalgamation of different mediums such as visual narratives, critical reviews, articles, graphics and illustrations that aim to offer insight into an intriguing creative spectrum.

Name: NEXTpittsburgh
Description: The must-read online publication about the people driving change in Pittsburgh and the innovative things happening in the region. We publish stories daily including in-depth features, biz + tech news, city design news, Pittsburgh jobs, arts and cultural events and guides to neighborhoods. Launched in March 2014, NEXT attracts more than 200,000 visitors monthly. Check us out and sign up up to get our newsletter.

Name: Words That Count
Description: Words That Count is an initiative that documents stories of successful African women in STEM fields to present the various prospects on the STEM spectrum to young girls mapping their careers in STEM. The scarcity of female role models in the STEM field makes it hard to close the gender gap in this field. Knowing STEM women personally might be hard but having a website where many of them can be found for reference mitigates the challenge.

Name: Huddle.Today
Description:
Huddle is a Maritime business publication that tells the stories of the creative, innovative, and interesting entrepreneurs working in the Maritimes. We have journalists in Halifax, Saint John, Moncton and Fredericton who report on the issues and events that help or hinder their ability to create wealth and employment.

Huddle has a broad definition of entrepreneurship, knowing that it exists in many sectors, including but not limited to IT, energy, agriculture, tourism, food and beverage, health and culture. We are a news site, and a gathering place for people with ambition who, through their companies and communities, want to help build stronger economies. That includes owners and operators of businesses, people who work for them, and people invested in the success of local companies and communties.

At Huddle, our philosophy is simple: we believe that business is good.

Business creates jobs, opportunities and wealth, things we need more of here in our part of Canada. Business is creative, powerful and a force for positive social change.

We’re passionate about the entrepreneurs making a difference in our region. Too often business in the Maritimes is viewed with suspicion or even resentment. That’s holding us back, so we want to help change that mindset.

Name: Arsenic
Description:
Arsenic is social-first talent management and media company. We’ve collaborated with celebrities from: Diplo, Skrillex, Steve Aoki, Nick Cannon, Gore Verbinski, Tyga, G-Eazy, Nervo, Future, Cassie, Lil Jon, Post Malone, and more. Brand partners have ranged from: Bud Light, Warner Bros Records, Lionsgate, Whispering Angel Rose, Anheuser-Busch, Bebe, Ultra Music Festival, Rockstar Energy Drink, MeUndies, Virginia Black (Drake’s whiskey brand), Hakkasan, Nitro Circus, SBE and more.

1 million creators have applied to be part of Arsenic. Creators with an aggregate following of over 250 million have worked with us. We were the 1st to execute a "takeover" on Snapchat, the 1st to employ an Instagram MCN, and the 1st submission-based Instagram magazine. Now we are at the cutting edge of social media monetization for a diverse range of clients that include creators at the top of their fields in TV, live performance, and modeling.

Name: Utility Analytics Institute (UAI)
Description:
UAI is an online community and membership organization for power utilities looking to realize desired business outcomes using data analytics.

Our membership experience allows  power utility and solution provider members to share insights, knowledge and practical application techniques. UAI is the leading organization enabling our members to connect, collaborate, and calibrate on the most effective ways in which to leverage their data and analytics.

https://utilityanalytics.com/

Name: Matthew Berry's Fantasy Life
Description:
Founded by the "Godfather of Fantasy Sports", Matthew Berry's Fantasy Life is a multi-media content company that delivers engaging and entertaining content to a purpose built community of avid football fans.

Fantasy Life covers fantasy sports from every angle including Daily Fantasy Sports and Sports Betting. With a roster of world class content creators, Fantasy Life is delivering the very best content, data and tools to fans looking for that winning edge.

Fantasy Life content platforms:
-Daily Newsletter delivered to 300k+ fans with industry defying engagement with open rates over 50%.
-Fantasy Life on SiriusXM, M-F 11a-1p starring Kendall Valenzuela and Peter Overzet
-Fantasy Life Vodcast featuring Dwain McFarland, Marcas Grant, Ian Hartitz, Pete Overzet and Chris Allen
-Over 2m monthly views across Social Media Platforms

Name: AIR (Association of Independents in Radio)
Description:
Since its 1988 founding by a group of freelance radio producers in New York City, AIR has grown into a hub for independent media makers. We identify, cultivate and connect audio storytellers across the U.S. and the world. AIR is committed to expanding the ecosystem where independents can do their best work, advocate for their needs and build thriving careers.

Our network currently includes 1,300+ independent audio producers, multimedia journalists, and public media stations and networks across 47 states and 30 countries. Our members are journalists, podcasters, story editors, audio producers, documentarians, engineers, sound designers, and creative media entrepreneurs.

Our small-yet-mighty remote staff, currently led by CEO Ken Ikeda, and AIR’s Board of Directors are committed to building a more equitable, sustainable infrastructure in collaboration with our vibrant, growing community of independent media makers.

Name: Dr.Good!
Description:
Dr.Good! est la marque santé et bien-être du groupe Webedia. 
Dr.Good! est à la fois un média, une agence de création de contenus et d'événements ainsi qu'un réseau de talents experts santé et bien-être.

Retrouvez-nous : 
https://www.facebook.com/DrGoodMag/
https://www.instagram.com/drgoodmag/"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8Cr5xpoHbkxz5Njt1QlKwg

Name: Voice of San Diego
Description: Voice of San Diego is a public-service, nonprofit news organization that focuses on in-depth and investigative reporting on issues impacting the San Diego region. It covers the issues that are crucial to the region's quality of life: its politics, educational system, environment, housing, economy and more.

Name: Short Form Pros
Description: We turn high-level entrepreneurs, investors, and CEOs into industry celebrities

Name: StyleCaster
Description:
StyleCaster, headquartered in New York City, is a premier style destination that delivers a daily forecast of need-to-know fashion, beauty, entertainment, and lifestyle intel for today’s Gen Z and millennial women. 

The site was launched in 2008—and acquired by SheKnows Media in August 2014. Visit STYLECASTER.com to learn more.

Name: Le Nouveau Gabon
Description:
Le Nouveau Gabon est un site d’information sur l’économie et la gestion publique du Gabon, fondé en octobre 2014. Le titre s’adresse essentiellement à un lectorat de décideurs et d’influenceurs : cadres et dirigeants d’entreprises, institutions nationales et internationales, professions libérales, investisseurs, bailleurs de fonds, consultants, journalistes et étudiants. 
La rédaction est assurée par l’Agence Ecofin, via un bureau gabonais, appuyé par une équipe africaine de journalistes spécialisés.

Name: elephant journal
Description:
Elephant Journal is dedicated to bringing together those working (& playing) to create enlightened society. Voted #1 in the US for #green on twitter twice.

We focus on "the mindful life": yoga, organics, sustainability, conscious consumerism, non-new-agey spirituality, the arts, enlightened education, wellness and adventure...anything that helps us to live a good life that also happens to be good for others, and our planet.

Name: Fitmist
Description: FitMist is an organization that focuses on Everything related to Fitness. Here at fitmist we care about the Human Body and we always try to aware people about the Importance of Fitness. Your Body is a Temple!

Name: Relatório Brasil - R.B.
Description:
O que é o R.B.?

-   R.B. é o resumo critico da informação econômica, política, social, com uma linguagem direta, simples e objetiva.

Qual a Missão do R.B.?

-   100% independente e gratuito, o R.B. simplifica a informação, toma uma posição a seu respeito e mostra assim qual o seu real reflexo no mercado.

O "R.B." representa uma opinião, não uma indicação, é proibida sua reprodução, sem a devida autorização, e qualquer crítica, dúvida ou sugestão, favor contatar: rb@relatoriobrasil.com

Name: Biznes&Handel
Description: Business | Handel | Rynek krajowy i międzynarodowy | Retail | FMCG

Name: China Files - Notizie dalla Cina e dall'Asia
Description: China Files è un collettivo di giornalisti specializzati in affari asiatici. Copriamo l'attualità di Cina, India, Asia Centrale, Giappone e Coree, fornendo news, approfondimenti e reportage scritti e audio. Potete leggerci anche su www.china-files.com.

Name: Dawn.com
Description: Official account of the Dawn Media Group’s digital arm. Focusing on job opportunities.

Name: Flow Games
Description:
O Flow Games é o maior ecossistema gamer do Brasil, com foco numa conversa honesta e verdadeira de quem ama jogar.

Com um portal especializado sobre notícias, presença carimbada nas redes sociais, e claro, um canal voltado 100% para falar sobre games, cobertura de eventos, premiações, interações com a comunidade e notícias atualizadas diariamente.

Name: 300GOSPODARKA
Description: 300GOSPODARKA jest serwisem informacyjnym, który pisze o polskiej gospodarce w kontekście globalnym oraz o globalnej gospodarce w kontekście polskim.

Name: Insider
Description:
O Insider acredita no poder das conexões, e o seu criador Nelio Xavier ama aprender novas habilidades conversando, se divertindo. 

E por aqui não rola fazer isso sem incluir. Depois de nos ouvir você pode até nos confundir com um MBA ou com um Mastermind de algum guru, afinal a gente aprende e se conecta com pessoas que são referências no seu mercado. A diferença é que não cobramos milhares de reais pra te entregar isso. 

Somos um podcast, uma mesa redonda semanal sobre habilidades comportamentais, digitais e de gestão, somos o Insider.

Para nos ouvir, basta apertar o botão no topo da página. 

Novos episódios todas as terças.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Hablemos de Dinero
Description:
Llevarte bien con el dinero está bien y es normal. Si no es así, hay que poner manos a la obra!

Como periodistas especializados en temas financieros queremos acercarte la información necesaria para tu bienestar financiero.

Gasta bien, vive bien!... Hablemos de Dinero.

Name: BRAVE COMMERCE Podcast
Description: MikMak Founder & CEO Rachel Tipograph and Profitero’s President Sarah Hofstetter host a podcast tackling what’s relevant in eCommerce today for the world’s biggest brands. Each episode they’ll share tips worth millions in sales, while interviewing the bravest marketers on how to navigate eCommerce’s latest consumer and retailer dynamics.

Name: GrowthSpotter
Description:
GrowthSpotter is a daily digital newsletter focused on providing market-leading intelligence on Greater Orlando's property transactions, early-stage development and related financing of real estate. It is a product from the Orlando Sentinel Media Group. 

GrowthSpotter's dedicated team of reporters write at a high level of detail for a professional audience of subscribers, most of whom identify as developers, contractors, architects, civil engineers, real estate brokers, bank lending managers, private equity groups and real estate attorneys. 

Orlando consistently ranks as one of the top cities in the U.S. for growth, business friendliness and job creation. Florida has 6 of the fastest-growing metro areas in the U.S and metro-Orlando’s population grew to 2.3 million. 

GrowthSpotter launched in May 2015. In late October of that year, the website was honored with a 2015 EPPY Award by Editor & Publisher for Best Business/Finance Website in the under 1 million unique visitors category. The site has won EPPYs in 2017, 2019, 2021 and 2023.

Name: The Eye of Photography — L'Œil de la Photographie
Description:
Created in 2010, The Eye of Photography is the first online newspaper about photography in its widest range. Daily published in English and French,
with seven different articles per day and a dozen of pictures per article, it gives readers an overview of photography all over the word.

Read by an international audience, The Eye of Photography is a respected source of knowledge for the art world. Whether it be the most urgent news or the left-out events, every living forms of photography are in our pages. The newspaper has built a growing and living, worldwide-based community moved by images.

Name: Ondas Impressas
Description: Podcast feito sob medida pra você empresário, técnico ou criativo que milita no universo da impressão. Aqui, a jornalista Tânia Galluzzi e o consultor Hamilton Costa discutem, com a ajuda dos entrevistados, as tendências e os desafios da indústria da impressão. Do livro à embalagem, do banner ao display de ponto de venda, do têxtil à impressão 3D, cabe tudo nesse oceano de possibilidades.

Name: Special Effects Media South Africa
Description:
We're a Video Specialist Digital Agency.

As video continues to dominate through consumer demand online and as platforms prioritise video as a medium, we help you ensure you are always exceeding your goals in this environment.

If you are looking for a creative team to help you grow your business online or if you're looking for a strategic video production or influencer marketing team, we’re your turn-key solution.

With over 25 years of collective experience in building video strategies, Managing YouTube channels and making content, we can assist you to strategise, create a distribute content to drive real marketing success.

Name: The Metal Workshop - Shaping and Welding
Description: The Metal Workshop - Shaping and Welding

Name: Locked On Podcast Network
Description:
The #1 Sports Podcast Network | Your Team. Every Day. 

All sports fans are fans of their favorite teams first. In fact, true fans can never get enough information about their favorite teams. So, we deliver team-centric podcasts 30 minutes a day, year-round.

That is the proven premise behind the Locked On Podcast Network. Reaching local sports fans, wherever they live, Locked On taps into local sports passion on a massive national scale as one of the largest sports podcast networks in the country. For advertisers, that means the ability to reach fans on a national level and brand activate with hyper-localization, scale, and efficiency.

Today, Locked On is an industry-leading sports podcast network, producing more than 275 podcast shows, delivering an audience of over 40 million listens and views a month - and growing. 

The heart of the network is our local sports podcasts covering every NBA, NFL, MLB, and NHL team, and a massive roster of major college teams and conferences, plus fantasy sports and draft coverage. Locked On’s expert hosts cover the biggest stories, deliver in-depth game analysis, conduct insightful interviews, and provide an insider perspective that only a local expert can. From free agency and the draft to training camp, regular season, and playoffs. These trusted local personalities also possess true geotargeted brand endorsement power and flexibility.

Locked On Podcast Network was established in 2016 by David Locke, radio voice of the Utah Jazz and host of the Locked On Jazz podcast. Originating with a single podcast, the network is now one of the biggest podcast networks in the country. 

In 2021, Locked On was acquired by TEGNA, a leading media company that owns  64 local television stations across the country and is a digital innovator that reaches 60 million adults on its digital platforms each month, including OTT, station websites, social media, and Locked On.

Name: HerMoney
Description: HerMoney, the personal finance brand from Jean Chatzky, is a multimedia company changing the relationships women have with money...one woman at a time. Women have more money — in our own names — than ever before. We have more education. More earning power. More spending power. More power in general. Yet our confidence in our ability to manage that money (in particular, to invest it) has not grown at the same pace. To get us where we need to be, we need a resource that makes us feel comfortable, supported, and, at the same time, special and in-the-know. HerMoney — whether it's a newsletter you receive in your inbox, a site you visit, a podcast you listen to, a social feed you follow, or an event you attend — is that resource. It's a place you feel able to ask your questions and to share the tough lessons you've learned. It’s where you laugh, think, commiserate, help and plan. It gets you off the dime to take action — and taking action is what it's all about. Our mission is to help women take charge of our money, so we can take charge of and enjoy our lives.

Name: Images & Droit
Description:
Le droit est un levier de la cohésion sociale. Il est nécessaire qu'il sorte de la confidentialité. Telle est l'ambition d'IMAGES&DROIT (I&D), média destiné à la diffusion des savoirs juridiques, au bénéfice des professionnels, comme des profanes. Il porte la parole des principaux acteurs du droit et de ses plus éminents analystes, qu'ils s'expriment à l'occasion d'entretiens, de séminaires, de colloques, de vidéos et de podcasts.

Les auditeurs d’I&D verront et entendront des magistrats, avocats, professeurs, etc. qui acceptent de se dévoiler et d'expliquer ce qu'il en est de juger, de plaider ou encore d'être chercheur en droit. Ils trouveront à terme un décryptage de l'actualité conduit avec science et conscience, bien loin des rumeurs et de la "buzzitude".

I&D, est une chaîne de service public, de libre accès, conçue, produite et diffusée par un établissement public (Université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne, Institut d'Etudes à Distance de l'Ecole de Droit de la Sorbonne).

Name: Le coin des entrepreneurs
Description:
Le Coin des Entrepreneurs, le média online n°1 des créateurs d'entreprises !

Besoin d'informations, de conseils ou d'explications pour avancer dans votre projet de création d'entreprise et lancement de votre nouvelle activité ? Le Coin des Entrepreneurs vous accompagne ! 

Découvrez également notre nouvelle application digitale d'accompagnement à la création / reprise d'entreprise. Notre mission : vous aider à construire et concrétiser vos projets ! app.lecoindesentrepreneurs.fr

Name: Media1.hu
Description: Media1 is a Hungarian news portal about media at www.media1.hu. We publish exclusive stories, news, interviews, reports.

Name: GK
Description:
GK es el medio digital líder en el Ecuador. Su trabajo se centra en tres ejes principales: transparencia, medioambiente y derechos humanos (con un fuerte énfasis en género). 
Su periodismo ha destapado  graves casos que permanecían en la impunidad, lo que ha sido reconocido en Ecuador y América Latina por varias organizaciones. GK trabaja, además, en colaboración con una red de medios aliados en la región, con quienes produce anualmente varias investigaciones trasnacionales. 
Su equipo es diverso y, al igual que su audiencia, mayoritariamente femenino.

Name: Spoken
Description: Spoken, The AI Audiobook Company,  puts a full production studio in every writer’s hands — making high-quality audiobook creation simple, fast, and fully under their control.

Name: EUROPAVOX
Description:
Europavox is a music festival taking place in 7 European countries and an online magazine, written by professional music journalists from all over Europe.
It aims to serve European music industry professionals who wish to gain further insight into the European music market(s), European music fans curious to discover amazing new music outside the usual parameters, and European citizens interested in getting closer and more familiar with other European cultures and heritages.
Europavox.com intends to foster European musical diversity and create more visibility for artists, providing them and their professional entourage with useful information and new opportunities. It aims to be a knowledge database, a talent spotter and a source of inspiration that’s both fun and diverse.

Name: Tech & Co
Description: Toute l'actualité de la Tech sur tous les écrans avec Tech & Co !

Dans ce podcast, nous allons à la rencontre des entrepreneurs d’outre mer. Nous parlons d’entreprises, d’innovation, d’immobilier, d'indépendance, à travers le témoignage de femmes et d’hommes qui ont eu l'audace se lancer. Nous échangeons avec eux sur leurs parcours, leurs succès, leurs échecs et parlons de la particularité d’entreprendre dans les DOM.
Bonne écoute !

Name: IDK Technologies
Description:
IDK Technologies http://www.idktech.com is a complete one stop shop for your video and
multimedia needs, we are a streaming media solutions provider. Spun off from our Parent
company Vette Video, Our team of trained staff has experience with all aspects of video
production, from storyboarding your idea, shooting, editing and final compression for the
web, we can do it all.

Name: Carsolyse

Carsolyse: votre guide pour votre première voiture !
Abonnez-vous maintenant et restez toujours informé des dernières nouveautés automobiles avec des conseils utiles pour faire les bons choix.

Name: Sen
Description:
Our future, both on Earth and in space, is a story about all of us. We believe that everyone should be informed, educated and inspired to help shape what’s happening now and what happens next. 

Sen’s solution is to democratize space, using videos that are accessible to everyone. Together we can learn about planetary change and space exploration- allowing us all to be informed guardians of our home planet and explorers of space. 

We hope our videos inspire global change that will benefit all humanity. Please join us on our mission. Visit sen.com to find out more.

Name: Editorialge
Description:
We are no longer just a publisher. Editorialge Media is a Global Digital Venture Studio bridging the gap between Technology, Media, and Life.

Headquartered across the USA, UK, India, Bangladesh, and Estonia, we build the proprietary infrastructure that powers the modern "Global Citizen," including:

Innovation: ViewCord (The Office OS for Agencies) & RankPilot AI.
Education: Edutorial.org (Dual-Engine EdTech & Certifications).
Intelligence: Editorialge.com (Business & Auto-Tech Analysis).
Lifestyle: Tourinearth (Travel Tech) & Shop.Editorialge (Sustainable Goods).

Our Vision: To build the Operating System for a Borderless World.
Build. Scale. Live Better.

Name: Rio Grande Guardian
Description:
The Rio Grande Guardian was the first online newspaper to launch on the South Texas border, starting out in July, 2005. It is still the market leader, setting the pace and breaking news often before traditional media outlets.

The Rio Grande Guardian has an excellent reputation for accurate and thorough news reporting, with a specialty for border business, legislative, political, healthcare, environment, and education issues.

Name: EatTreat
Description:
EatTreat is India’s first and largest online food media network creating and publishing entertainment content for India’s highly engaged millennial audience. We create exclusive mobile-first content for each of our digital arms. 

We aspire to provide the best-possible brain-tingling matter and experiences to our community to consume and foster. EatTreat reaches out to 700K fans and followers across its digital platforms; accruing 30M social media views via long form and short form videos. Some of our most successful partnerships have been with well-known consumer brands such as Bira91, Dineout, Swiggy, DLF Hospitality and more.

Our audience experiences 360 degree coverage of community content that delights and educates in equal parts. Based out of New Delhi, EatTreat is a team of 45 passionate and talented people who strive to satisfy a basic need: Hunger.

For more info, visit: eattreat.in

Name: Think Media
Description:
Think Media is a team of content creators committed to bringing you weekly conversations around building your YouTube channel, personal brand, and business with online video. Over the last 10 years, we've created and refined the #1 YouTube Strategy Course in the world - Video Ranking Academy. 

Our mission is to help ONE MILLION purpose-driven people go full-time doing what they love and making an impact through the power of video.

Name: Industrieanzeiger
Description: Der Industrieanzeiger ist das praxisnahe Magazin für Top-Entscheider der verarbeitenden Industrie im deutschsprachigen Raum. Sieben Fachredakteure decken mit Fachbeiträgen, Übersichten und Interviews das große Spektrum der industriellen Themen ab, die kleine und mittlere Unternehmen umtreiben. Neben aktuellen Trendthemen wie Industrie 4.0, Elektromobilität oder der Mensch-Roboter-Kollaboration sind und leben wir Maschinenbau in all seinen Facetten: Antriebstechnik, Automatisierung, Energietechnik, Materialfluss, Rapid-Technologien, Robotik, Werkzeugmaschinen, Zulieferer.

Name: Posta
Description:
Somos los originales. Desde 2014 hacemos los mejores podcasts en español para audiencias, empresas y creadores. Trabajamos con marcas globales como Netflix, Uber, Microsoft, HBO, PlayStation, adidas, Globant, Mercado Libre y más.

Somos la productora de podcasts número uno de Argentina, pionera en América Latina. Desde hace una década estamos construyendo el futuro de los podcasts en español.

Desarrollamos un catálogo de más de 300 shows originales, muchos de ellos junto a marcas y compañías de medios argentinas e internacionales de primer nivel, como Netflix, Spotify, HBO, PlayStation, Uber, National Geographic, Mercado Libre, Globant, Microsoft y adidas, entre otros.

¿Tu empresa quiere hacer un podcast con Posta? Estamos buscando marcas y medios para seguir produciendo grandes podcasts. Si tienes una idea y quieres que colaboremos para desarrollarla o saber más sobre el trabajo que hacemos en Posta, contáctanos.

Name: CapeTownMagazine.com - For Moments of Joy
Description:
Our bold mission is DNA changing impact through moments of joy. For happier people. For a better place. Championing the most unique owner run businesses and its people. Unlocking magic around the corner. Creating a magnet that the world can not wait to be a part of. 

With an estimated reach of 4-6 million people per month in 2025/2026, CapeTownMagazine.com is Cape Town's online magazine and its story making ambassador worldwide, as well as around the corner. 

By bringing out the most unique experiences and discoveries in the biggest way, and the biggest experiences in the most unique way,  

Not only storytelling instead of selling, giving its readers one thing they would not want to miss, every day again. "Every second table came through them the first 2 months - it made my business...": We're storymaking. 

Story making in every channel except print: 

With its vast international readership, it is one of the key channels for the City of Cape Town in destination marketing as well. The online channels' three languages; English, German and Dutch cover the top 5 markets, with readership coming from 241 countries in total.

Description:

Platform architecture and design,  è un magazine bimestrale di cultura e aggiornamento professionale dedicato al mondo dell’architettura e del design.  
#Platformarchitecture #platformarchitectureanddesign

Name: Les Clés du Digital
Description:
Nouveau média en ligne, agréé par la Commission paritaire des publications et agences de presse (CPPAP) Les Clés du Digital a comme ambition de « Délivrer à ses lecteurs les clés pour conduire et réussir la transformation numérique». Il s'adresse à l'ensemble de l'écosystème de l'univers du Retail, des décideurs aux prestataires impliqués dans la transformation digitale des enseignes.

Fazemos jornalismo de soluções e de proximidade, complementando o nosso trabalho com encontros e iniciativas regulares, dentro e fora da malha urbana de Coimbra. Seguimos a linha dos chamados jornalismo cívico e jornalismo construtivo, que contrariam um certo negativismo dos media e aproximam leitores, histórias e respectivos protagonistas.

Somos uma publicação de pessoas e causas, e também mantemos uma agenda cultural, comunitária e colaborativa para quem quiser aceder facilmente a tudo o que se passa, partilhar com os amigos e inserir os próprios eventos.

Apontamos o foco para as respostas aos desafios de Coimbra e contribuimos para a construção de uma cidade e um ecossistema local melhor, mais sustentável, inclusivo e com mais oportunidades.  

Queremos pôr assuntos que interessam na mesa, dar voz e rostos à comunidade e convidar à reflexão e a fazer a diferença. Por isso tudo o que fazemos tem uma intenção mobilizadora. Em cada publicação e em cada encontro indicamos formas práticas para que cada pessoa se torne um cidadão mais activo.

Name: Podme
Description:
When Podme was created in 2017, donations, sponsorships, and advertising revenue were essentially the only ways for creators to be compensated for their hard work. While brands were eager to align themselves with well-known personality-driven podcasts, creators who shared stories about crime and drama from the darker corners of society had to operate their podcasts as hobby projects. The outcome was that many creators had to give up, compromise on quality, or release episodes with lengthy gaps in between. Out of this injustice, Podme was born.

Podme envisions enriching people's daily lives by unlocking the full potential of podcast entertainment. We aim to assist creators in realizing their dreams and crafting high-quality podcasts that elicit emotions, educate, and captivate all those who adore a captivating story. Since its inception, Podme has empowered numerous podcast creators to allocate more or all of their time to podcast production, thereby enhancing the podcasting entertainment landscape.

We are passionate about bringing you the best in audio content, welcoming you into the podcast bubble of curated content, including humor, conversationals and insight or nerve wrecking stories. Whether it’s for your everyday routine or your well deserved me time, we are always there for you.

We are Podme!

Description:

Weintraub was taking sabbatical from Mac IT development work while his wife was given a fellowship to study in France. The blog was a way to keep up with technology developments and nurture a writing career that was also taking shape at Computerworld, an IDG publication.

Mark Gurman joined the team when the logo still contained the coffee mug.

9to5 became a full time career in 2011 when Weintraub left Fortune Magazine, started up 9to5Toys.com and 9to5Google.com and continued ramping up with additional editors and reporters.

Now 9to5Mac averages over a half million pageviews a day and while the other 9to5 sites dont yet drive as much traffic, they are growing quickly.

Writing about technology for a living is a dream come true!

Name: Monthly Barometer
Description:
Prescient and succinct analysis of what’s out there – it scans the horizon for you. Since 2007 it’s been distinguishing the signals from the noise.
An analytical and predictive monthly newsletter that distills into one page those macro issues relevant to time-starved decision-makers.
We live in an era of mounting complexity and information overload. In such a context, trying to identify the most relevant analysis tends to resemble “drinking water from a fire hydrant”.
Our response is to focus on reducing complexity by conveying a simple (but not simplistic) message. 
To paraphrase John Maeda, we take away the obvious and add the meaningful.

Name: L'Expert Invest
Description:
En tant que plateforme de référence pour les professionnels de l'investissement en Europe francophone, notre mission est d'offrir une perspective indépendante et enrichie sur les dynamiques entre les sociétés de gestion et les sélectionneurs de fonds. Né de la fusion de fibee.fr et lexpertinvest.com, Capital Insight combine les forces de deux plateformes pour offrir un point d'entrée unique vers une couverture exhaustive des principaux acteurs du marché et fournir des tendances économiques, financières, numériques, et réglementaires en France, Monaco, Suisse et Luxembourg.

Notre contenu exclusif se concentre sur :

- Dossiers approfondis : Analyses détaillées des principaux acteurs de la gestion et de la sélection de fonds.
 - Ressources guidées : Informations pratiques pour naviguer efficacement dans l'environnement économique et financier, ainsi que dans les régulations et innovations numériques impactant vos métiers et vos décisions d'investissement.

Pourquoi suivre Capital Insight ?

- Rejoignez notre communauté pour rester informé des dernières tendances et évolutions du marché de la gestion de portefeuille.
- Profitez d'une expertise renforcée et de ressources précieuses pour soutenir vos décisions d'investissement et optimiser vos stratégies. 
- Grâce à nos analyses approfondies, comprenez le positionnement des décideurs de la sélection de fonds et gardez une longueur d'avance dans un environnement financier et un métier en constante évolution.

Ed è per questo che nasce Inspira Mente. Ogni giorno scegliamo i migliori podcast per aiutarti a mantenere i giusti livelli di motivazione per ricordarti di puntare di più su te stesso. Aiutandoti a cambiare e creare finalmente la versioen di te che più ti piace.

Every week we feature a guest who is leading in education, industry or public policy - and we hear their innovative ideas, actionable strategies and disruptive initiatives that are changing the technology landscape for the better. 

Hosted by author, speaker and manufacturing thought-leader Matt Kirchner, The TechEd Podcast is the only show where you get to hear from both sides of the education-industry continuum.

Name: Johdon agendalla
Description:
Johdon agendalla on johtamisen asiasisältöihin keskittynyt digitaalinen media. Sen tavoitteena on nostaa johtoryhmien ja hallitusten keskusteluun ajankohtaisia johtamisen teemoja ja ilmiöitä, juuri niitä aiheita mitä johdon agendalle kuuluu tai sinne pitäisi kuulua.

Kohderyhmäämme ovat ennen kaikkea Suomen tärkeimmät päättäjät ja vaikuttajat. Sen lisäksi haluamme tavoittaa laajasti lukijoita ja podcastien kuuntelijoita, jotka ovat erityisen kiinnostuneita johtamisen uusista trendeistä ja ilmiöistä. 

Johdon agendalla kattaa johdonagendalla.fi digimedian sekä vuosittain tammikuussa julkaistavan johtamisen teemoihin keskittyvän trendiraportin. Johdon agendalla kantaa ottavat johtajat ja asiantuntijat ovat omien alojensa suunnannäyttäjiä ja edelläkävijöitä - heitä yhdistää sekä rohkeus, että ennakkoluulottomuus, sekä kyky haastaa muiden ajatusten lisäksi myös omaa ajatteluaan. 

Vuonna 2022 kutsumme mukaan asiantuntijoita, joilla on näkemystä ja kokemusta erityisesti johtamisen murroksesta.

Name: Stereogum
Description: Stereogum.com was one of the first MP3 blogs and remains the leading online community for independent and alternative music news, downloads, and videos. Its audience includes passionate music fans, industry folks, and household names like Kanye West, Ben Gibbard, and Ryan Adams. Stereogum regularly features unknown artists who go on to become mainstream sensations such as Vampire Weekend, Arcade Fire, and Fleet Foxes. Cited for its commentary and band discovery everywhere from The New Yorker to FOX News, Stereogum’s awards and distinguished mentions include the Plug Award for best music blog, Blender‘s Most Influential People in Online Music, Village Voice‘s Music Blog Of The Year, and Entertainment Weekly‘s Best Music Website.

Name: Reveal from the Center for Investigative Reporting
Description:
Reveal is a nonprofit, independent, investigative radio show and podcast, which launched in 2013 and is listener-supported. It is heard by more than 1 million people each week across more than 500 public radio stations in the United States, and is produced by the Center for Investigative Reporting, which also produces the investigative magazine Mother Jones.

Reveal empowers the public through groundbreaking storytelling that sparks action, improves lives, and protects our democracy. Our mission is to hold the powerful accountable by reporting about everything from racial and social injustices to threats to public safety and democracy.

We are an independent newsroom (meaning we don’t have any corporate owners), and are accountable only to you, our listeners. We are based in San Francisco, and our staff is spread across the country.

Name: Kiwilimon
Description:
Kiwilimón is the largest digital cooking platform in Mexico that has over 4 million monthly visits that interact with their recipes, videos and tips. Since its launch in 2009 kiwilimón has revolutionized the way home cooks connect with each other through their own recipes offering their community dynamic content and becoming the leading cooking channel for advertisers. Kiwilimón currently has over half a million registered loyal users and over 13,000 cooking recipes.

Kiwilimón also has one of the most successful cooking apps in spanish that has reached over 300,000 downloads since their launch in 2013. It has been named one of Google's top apps of 2015 in Mexico and is also available in the apple store.

Name: NJ Cannabis Insider
Description:
NJ Cannabis Insider produces exclusive weekly content and monthly events geared toward those interested in the marijuana and hemp industries. 
Our team of renowned journalists from NJ.com and The Star-Ledger will inform you about the issues, policies, laws, regulations, politics and people making an impact on the cannabis industry, community and marketplace.

NJ Cannabis Insider will help you make smarter decisions and connect you with others in the industry.

Name: Center for Public Integrity
Description:
The Center for Public Integrity is an investigative newsroom that gives voice to the public and sparks change by going behind closed doors to reveal abuses of power in Washington.

We're also one of the country's oldest and largest nonpartisan, nonprofit investigative news organizations.  

We cover politics, national security, the environment, labor, immigration, tech and finance. Our data-driven investigations make a real-world impact and we strive to demonstrate that by following up with our stories and sharing our findings with diverse communities, policymakers, media, researchers and more. 

Sign up for our Watchdog newsletter so you won't miss out on a single story: bit.ly/WatchdogSubscribe

Join our membership program to support our reporting: members.publicintegrity.org

To find our work, partner with us or just learn more about the Center, visit: publicintegrity.org.

Name: Choiseul Magazine
Description:
Choiseul Magazine est le magazine de la relève, qui met en avant l’économie au prisme de celles et ceux qui la font.

Ce nouveau trimestriel économique se positionne comme un témoin attentif des bouleversements qui remodèlent notre quotidien et transforment les chaînes de valeur. 

Acteur engagé au service d’une France qui rayonne au sein de ses territoires, en Europe et à l’international, Choiseul Magazine donne ainsi la parole à la nouvelle génération de dirigeant(e)s au prisme de leur vécu, leurs expériences et leur capacité à intégrer les mouvements économiques, technologiques et géopolitiques.

Il est indépendant et ne se consacre pas à l’appui d’une seule cause, quel que soit son intérêt ou sa valeur. Il est ouvert à un large champ d’opinions et ne représente aucun consensus de croyance et aucune idéologie ou parti politique. Choiseul Magazine fait partie du groupe Choiseul.

Name: LatamList
Description:
LatAm List is an English-language news site covers startup and entrepreneurship news coming from all of Latin America, from Brazil to Mexico, Chile to Puerto Rico, to help English speakers stay up-to-date on recent acquisitions, investments, and launches. LatAm List is also a space for founders and investors to tell their stories in their own words.

We picked a shorthand format for these articles to provide pithy updates that are meant to inform you and provide resources to help you further educate yourself on the subject. If you would like to learn more about the startups we write about, please follow the links available in each article to view alternate coverage or to visit their website.

If you have any tips, or would like to submit a story for publication, please reach out! We love to hear about the latest news and trends changing entrepreneurship in Latin America.

From electric racing to eco-conscious football clubs, we cover the athletes, teams, and technologies driving the future of sport.
Our mission is to spotlight innovation, environmental action, and game-changing stories across the global sports arena.

Name: Imvizar
Description:
At Imvizar, it is our vision to revolutionise storytelling through truly immersive, storytelling experiences. We are pushing the boundaries through our user-centric interaction design process to create experiences which evoke emotion and connection unlike any other.

Over the last three years we have launched over 100 augmented reality experiences in 11 countries, for clients such as Salesforce, Bupa, Spike Island, Grant Thornton and many more. 

This year we will open spatial storytelling to creators around the world by launching Lureo, the world’s first no-code spatial storytelling platform.

Name: World Architecture News | World Interiors News
Description:
World Architecture News, incorporating World Interiors News, officially launched in September 2005 rapidly establishing itself as a key online resource and one stop shop for the latest architecture project news across the globe. WAN and WIN are now established as the leading suppliers of news and information to the global architectural and interiors communities. 

We're always on the look out for new projects so please contact us at waneditorial@haymarket.com.

"All architecture, and the interiors that lie within, have a vital impact on our lives.  

Despite the current challenges as the world grapples to manage the pandemic, the WAN Awards and the WIN Awards shine a light forward and promote the visions of the creative and outstanding work of innovative and imaginative architects and interior designers worldwide.

The awards are supported by World Architecture News (WAN) and World Interiors News (WIN) which provide a global news platform for architects and designers. In 2020, the site was regularly viewed by 221 countries worldwide.

It’s important to amplify and celebrate the positive news in these global sectors and 2020 saw the launch of Female Frontiers, Powered by World Architecture News. This new awards scheme, specifically designed for women in architecture, is supported by the extremely popular Women Build podcast. Each episode highlights inspirational women in the global architecture arena, asks what’s important to them and points the spotlight on outstanding projects.

Get involved with the Awards in 2021!"

Alison Carter, Editor, World Architecture News 

Submit your entry online:
WAN Awards >> wanawards.com
WIN Awards >> worldinteriorsnewsawards.com

Name: Pharmaradio
Description:
1-Pharmaradio  est la 1ère radio consacrée à l'univers de la pharmacie en France. Conçue pour être une radio d'information, elle s'adresse aux professionnels de la pharmacie et aux professionnels de santé.
- Le Flash Info Pharma s'adresse à toute l'équipe officinale et résume pour vous en 3 minutes toute l’information du médicament : l’actualité réglementaire et pharmaceutique (les retraits de lots, les ruptures de stocks, les AMM...). C’est l’information qui vient à vous et cette information-là est dédiée au titulaire, à l’adjoint, et aux préparateurs.
Le Flash Info Pharma est diffusé tous les matins du lundi au samedi sur www.pharmaradio.fr. Il est également disponible en podcast.
- Pharmaradio se déplace et diffuse également en direct des rendez-vous professionnels d'exception, (grandes conférences, programmes originaux depuis différents salons, émissions spéciales etc....).
2- Sonorisation des Officines : 2 200 pharmacies composent déjà le réseau de Pharmaradio Officine. Soit plus de 10 % des pharmacies sur le territoire et en Outre-Mer.
Pour être au plus proche des préoccupations des pharmaciens et de leurs équipes, un flash info quotidien de 3 min est diffusé en amont de l’ouverture des pharmacies afin d’apporter les informations utiles et concrètes à toutes les équipes au comptoir.
Pharmaradio Officine c’est une radio sur-mesure pensée et produite pour l’accueil de la patientèle et le confort des salariés et une programmation produite pour l’univers de la pharmacie, mise à jour chaque semaine, et des chroniques totalement dédiées à l’univers de la santé.

Name: Internet Sans Crainte / Tralalere
Description:
Internet Sans Crainte est le programme national d'éducation au numérique des jeunes et des familles. Il est opéré depuis presque 20 ans par TRALALERE, entreprise Edtech de l'Économie Sociale et Solidaire labellisée ESUS.

Internet Sans Crainte est l’une des 3 lignes d’action du programme de protection des mineurs du Safer Internet France opéré par Tralalere, aux côtés de la ligne d'écoute 3018 opérée par e-Enfance et de la plateforme de signalement Point de Contact.

Le Safer Internet France est soutenu par la Commission européenne dans le cadre du réseau Inhope/Insafe regroupant 38 pays.

En tant qu’organisateur et coordinateur en France du Safer Internet Day, la journée mondiale pour un Internet plus sûr. Nous proposons à cette occasion une campagne de sensibilisation nationale avec des actions à destination des réseaux éducatifs, des familles durant 2 mois.

Notre mission : 
- Donner à chacun – enfants, adolescents, parents, professionnels, collaborateurs – les moyens d’évoluer dans un environnement numérique plus sûr et plus responsable.
- Outiller avec des kits pédagogiques clés en mains, des campagnes nationales, des formations, des ateliers et des interventions thématiques.
- Accompagner les organisations à répondre à leurs enjeux numériques prioritaires.

Nos thématiques :
- Parentalité numérique
- Cyberharcèlement 
- Écrans et réseaux sociaux
- Citoyenneté numérique 
- Éducation critique à l’IA
- Culture et création numérique
- Info/Infox et haine en lignée
- Numérique sans écran
- Empathie et vivre ensemble 

Nos publics :
- Les médiateurs éducatifs (enseignants, animateurs, bibliothécaires…)
- Les parents et les familles
- Les collectivités, les institutions, les associations et les entreprises 
- Les enfants âgés de 3 à 18 ans

Engagez-vous à nos côtés :
- Organisez des actions de sensibilisation avec les ressources clés en main disponibles sur notre site.
- Devenez nos partenaires pour un Internet plus sûr.

Name: Iværksætterhistorier
Description:
Iværksætterhistorier er en dansk podcast, der har til formål at sætte iværksætteri på dagsordenen gennem gode, lærerige og underholdende historier fra iværksættere. Vores mål er at inspirere dem, der går med en iværksætter gemt i maven og skabe underholdning og viden til allerede etablerede iværksættere.

Vi interviewer spændende iværksættere med det formål at give danskerne et indblik i personerne bag nogen af Danmarks dygtigste iværksættere. Det gør vi fordi vi selv synes det er elskværdigt og motiverende at høre om hvordan andre har opnået succes. Det kan være en rejse med mange bump på vejen, men vi tør godt love, at der er rigtig mange guldkorn at hente fra vores gæster. Vi forsøger at ramme historierne bredt, så vi taler både med seniorer og teenager, kvinder og mænd, tech og non tech, samt kendte som ukendte cases.

Du kan finde podcasten på din foretrukne podcast udbyder og har du nogle indvendinger på hvordan vi kan forbedre formatet eller hvis du kunne have lyst til at hjælpe os, så vil vi vold gerne høre fra dig. Vi er på pletten, så skriv eller ring endelig til os, så tager vi en snak om det.

Vi ønsker jer alle en rigtig god lytter.

Name: Start
Description:
O START é um manifesto em favor do empreendedorismo de inovação. Nós buscamos a revolução na base. Queremos colocar em evidência projetos que mudarão o futuro nos próximos anos e soluções que já estão transformando mercados agora.

Nossa missão é dar destaque para o mercado mais importante da Nova Economia. No entanto, direcionamos nossos holofotes para a parcela dele que não recebe o destaque merecido. Por isso, noticiamos projetos jovens capazes de se adaptar a realidade dos negócios, visando transformar o mundo em que vivemos. 

Conosco, uma série de mantenedores acreditam neste ideal. Com eles, nós oferecemos a base e a vitrine necessárias para que jovens empreendedores se tornem conhecidos no mercado independente do estágio de sua startup. Com esse propósito, poderemos tirar grandes projetos do anonimato e, como consequência, mudar o rumo tradicional das coisas.

HelloCare’s content over the last two years has grown organically by listening to what the public wants.

The rights of older people are often neglected and HelloCare provides a fair, balanced view to make sure all voices are heard, however soft it may be.

All are important to bring about change, create transparency and bring topics to life that others in the sector may be afraid to discuss.

Nos lecteurs : Directeurs RH, chefs d’entreprises, responsables RH, responsables de départements, responsables de formation, cadres, consultants, conseillers en personnel…

AVEC NOUS, L’INFORMATION CACHEE DEVIENT VISIBLE !

Notre ambition :

Notre ligne éditoriale s’efforce de dénicher et révéler l’information qui fera la différence pour vous.
Un phare sur l’économie et le marché de l’emploi. 

Aucun sujet n’est écarté ! A 360 degrés, nous balayons l’économie suisse et locale ainsi que son marché de l’emploi. Au rendez-vous, nos lecteurs découvrent des publications qui impactent l’économie et influencent les mutations dans le marché de l’emploi. 

Une méthode originale :

Nos experts s’immergent dans tous les événements marquants de la place économique pour être au plus près de l’information. Ainsi, avec pédagogie et sans idéologie, ils vous livrent les clés de compréhension d’une économie devenue indéniablement complexe. Leurs analyses se forgent au travers des regards croisés d’interlocuteurs pertinents, chacun leader d’opinion dans son secteur d’activité. 

Un média collaboratif et hors des sentiers battus (think out of the box !)

Parce que Geneva Business News est la seule plateforme collaborative qui peut se nourrir de la richesse multiculturelle de ses experts, nos articles sont enrichis par des argumentaires diversifiés dans l’esprit de la Genève internationale. Nous enquêtons, décryptons et écrivons hors des sentiers battus. 

Voilà ce qui fait notre réussite !

Description: TAQA is a Mauritania-focused platform publishing, on a daily basis, updates regarding all issues, news, policies related to mining and energy fields. Our team pursues the latest information in order to offer to our readers useful reports, in-depth analyses and exclusive interviews with all stakeholders (public officials in charge of the mining and energy sector, international companies' executives investing in, local private operators….). All in all, we cover different areas of the entire energy value chain – from oil and gas exploration to renewable power and green hydrogen –, on top of the mining matters. In that respect, many contents' formats (texts, videos, motion graphics.. and so forth) will be utilized.  Our editorial line  First of all, Taqa is an independent media outlet. It has no political bias whatsoever. For us, the precision of information and the objectivity of analysis are of highest importance.  Secondly, our platform is a specialized website which delivers a high quality content focusing on mining -be it is industrial or traditional- and energy. We are reporting and investigating these areas, explaining what needs to be clarified, making it easy to read such a sophisticated and technical information. Finally, the website content is all about Mauritania. We cover also some regional and international informations which are relevant for the local energy sector or could revealed to be interesting for mauritanian public. Overall, we value great deal the respect of the journalistic norms and standards, pledging to observe these deontological norms in all what we do.

Per questo dedicheremo particolare attenzione alle Denominazioni di Origine e ai terroir, ovvero l'insieme di elementi culturali, ambientali ed economici che compongono la cornice nella quale i vini prendono forma.
Daremo inoltre spazio al biologico e ai progetti green sviluppati nei distretti vitivinicoli italiani, convinti che la sostenibilità sia la principale sfida che il vino nazionale dovrà affrontare negli anni a venire.

Name: Québec Circulaire
Description:

La plateforme a pour mission de fédérer la variété d’initiatives, d’outils et d’expertises actuellement dispersées et qui se multiplieront au cours des prochaines années.

Bien que plusieurs projets de recensement d’initiatives liés à l’économie circulaire aient eu lieu, les informations qui en ressortent sont bien souvent fragmentées par types de stratégies, régions, acteurs et secteurs d’activité. Pour qu’un véritable changement de modèle économique s’enclenche, la création d’un lieu de convergence permettant l’échange d’informations semblait essentielle. Québec Circulaire est donc la première étape d’un projet évolutif et collectif.

To address these changes, ensure the well-being of coastal communities, and stimulate the development of economic activities, actions to inform and share best practices are important. Name: UnHerd
Description:
When the herd takes off in one direction, what do you do?
UnHerd is for people who dare to think for themselves.

The Western world is divided and uncertain. In the realms of politics, morality, science and culture, establishment opinion is skittish, but assertive — quick to form a consensus and intimidate dissent into silence. Meanwhile, increasingly powerful anti-establishment voices are fast forming into their own tribes.

UnHerd tries to do something different — and harder. We are not interested in contrarianism, or opposition for its own sake; but we make it our mission to challenge herd mentality wherever we see it.

This may be to speak for people who are otherwise dismissed; to challenge lazy consensus; or to make the argument for dimensions of existence that are lost in the din. We seek out thinkers who can bring the broader wisdom of history, philosophy, science and religious thought to bear on the current moment.

We try to give a platform to the overlooked, the downtrodden and the traduced; and to people and places that the world has chosen to forget.

We have no allegiance to any political party or tradition. Our writers often disagree with each other. Our approach is to test and retest assumptions, without fear or favour.

The effect, we hope, is to get a little bit closer to the truth — and to make people think again.

Welcome to UnHerd.

Name: EnergyFlux.news
Description:
Energy Flux is a premium newsletter analysing global gas markets through the lens of Europe’s net-zero journey.

The newsletter is essential reading for anyone whose personal or professional interests overlap with the European energy transition, or who wants a better understanding of the role of gas in a volatile, decarbonising world.

Investors, energy companies, think-tanks, NGOs, legal firms and policymakers are the main recipients – but the audience is diverse and some of the most avid readers are curious individuals or energy aficionados without professional ties to this space. It’s a broad readership and everyone is welcome.

Why gas?

For better or worse, gas and LNG are still a pillar of the European energy system. Natural gas is both the hero and the villain of Europe’s energy transition, literally keeping the lights on when renewables fall short but at significant economic and environmental cost.

The economics of gas shot up the political agenda following Russia’s full invasion of Ukraine in 2022. Europe’s pivot to LNG triggered intense price volatility that sent shockwaves through global energy markets and squeezed consumers in all gas-reliant segments of the economy.

As the marginal generator, gas typically sets the power price. With Europe now leaning more heavily on LNG, understanding global LNG market dynamics is essential to understanding the economics of zero marginal cost generators (renewables and nuclear) in most western European electricity markets.

Yet this crucial fuel is poorly understood: price formation lacks transparency, trade dynamics are clunky and LNG contracts are opaque, to say the least. Energy Flux exists to shed light on these murky niches of the energy system, and to make sense of what’s driving market sentiment.

Find out more and sign up for free email updates: https://www.EnergyFlux.news

Currently in public beta phase, The Capital Quest has been founded by the team that scaled up India’s first curated, subscription-driven digital financial news platform focused on private investments.

The Probe is India's premiere digital news platform that focuses on four core areas of Journalism: Investigation, Solutions, Impact and Development. The Probe is a multimedia news platform that is independent and people-dependent. We are an investigative journalism-based news brand that believes in solution driven approach towards stories that matter to people. The Probe is a unique news start-up that stands at the forefront of digital storytelling combined with an impact-oriented form of journalism. 

The Probe is founded by one of India’s finest Investigative Journalists Prema Sridevi. The Probe’s leadership team involves the finest young minds of the country who are passionate about journalism and who believe that journalism is not a product but a process that involves people. We want to radically change the approach towards news and start unbreaking news and tell stories that are fact-based and credible. We believe that opinions do not matter, only facts do. We are committed to uncovering the truth because we believe that the truth does not reveal itself.

Description:
As the world’s largest premium video library and content distribution network we’re all about incredible video content and bringing it to screens everywhere.

We built VideoElephant so that we can make it easy for content producers to distribute and monetise their video globally and for businesses worldwide to connect with their audiences through extraordinary video experiences.

The VideoElephant library contains more than 7 million videos with over 6,000 added daily, from 2,000 content sources across more than 40 categories and 30 languages.  

VideoElephant sources, licenses, curates, and programmes premium video content distributing globally for content producers and delivering to online media, digital screens and streaming platforms worldwide as single VOD assets, feeds, and FAST channels.

For our clients we deliver access to millions of videos, with thousands added daily, from hundreds of sources across multiple categories and languages. Rights cleared, brand-safe, continually refreshed premium content with flexible commercial terms. 

For our content partners we deliver game-changing expansion of reach, revenue and brand with access to billions of impressions and millions of viewers across hundreds of clients globally. Expert curation, transparent reporting, unique data-driven insights and extraordinary performance.

Name: Jeeran
Description:
Jeeran launched in 2000 with a vision: To make the web relevant to the Arab world by empowering people and giving them the tools to generate their own local content.

Over the years Jeeran continued to evolve, and what started as a blogging service became one of the most established content portals in the region ‐ ranking among the top websites in the Arab world, generating over 25 million page views per month, and cultivating a community of more than 1.5 million members.

2010 marked the next phase in Jeeran’s evolution through the launch a new service that empowers Arab users to rate, review, discuss and discover places in their city.

Jeeran is built on the knowledge that more and more users base their purchase decisions on reviews and recommendations from real people ‐ friends and family. Turning to trusted sources is not new, but the social web has enabled people to refer to entire communities and networks.Jeeran is intended to facilitate these references, providing Arab users with the tools to connect to each other and to places in their city, basing their decisions on the reviews and recommendations of their local community.

We are now in more than seventeen Arabic cities distributed throughout the Arab region, including Jeddah, Riyadh, Dammam and Al Khobar in KSA, Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Sharjah in the UAE, as well as for each of Doha, Kuwait and Cairo. As for Jordan, starting from Amman to Irbid, Ajloun, Jerash, Zarqa, Salt, Madaba, Karak, Ma'an, and Aqaba.

A única publicação da especialidade com representantes nos quatro principais prémios da indústria automóvel: Carro do Ano em Portugal (Júri Permanente), German Car of the Year (convidado), Car of the Year e World Car Awards (Jurado).

Presente nas principais plataformas digitais da atualidade – website, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Podcast e newsletter – a Razão Automóvel é o título da especialidade mais influente em Portugal.

Em 2021, venceu na categoria de “Best Journalism Film” dos International Motor Film Awards (IMFA). Um prémio que em 2022, 2023 e 2024 voltou a nomear este título para a mesma categoria. Os IMFA são um dos mais prestigiados prémios de produção audiovisual do setor automóvel. 

A Razão Automóvel é uma empresa certificada pela Great Place to Work Portugal.

Name: The Business Transformation Network (The BTN)
Description:
The Business Transformation Network (BTN) is the world's home for business transformation content and networking, offering a unique thought leadership environment for over 40,000 + members around the ‘three pillars of transformation’; People, Process and Technology.

Our network of experts in their field showcase knowledge through the dissemination of ideas via videos, podcasts, articles, case studies, interviews and events.

We offer a variety of events, from more intimate roundtables, to an annual large-scale conference for over 1,000 people. We have partnered with companies like IBM, Sage, Cielo, CoachHub, HashiCorp, StarLeaf, Microsoft, FICO and many more on events of varying natures, covering topics including ‘Skills Transformation & The Impact on the Future of Work’, ‘Organisational Efficiencies - Embracing Evolving Technologies’ and ‘The Impact of Change Management on Successful User Adoption’. Working collaboratively with our partners allows us to deliver lasting partnerships which help share their knowledge with our network through varying means, like our events or content.

Our annual Excellence in Leadership conference has welcomed world-class industry-leading speakers, including Dave Ulrich (HR Guru), Kim Wylie (Global Director of People Development at Farfetch), Bruce Daisley (Author and Ex-VP EMEA at Twitter), Asif Sadiq MBE (Head of Diversity, Inclusion & Belonging at The Telegraph), to address over 1,000 attendees on a plethora of topics to help organisations adapt, thrive and transform, whilst also providing some solutions for tackling the issues they are facing.

ERUPT, our series of international events, showcases industry-leading organisations that have evolved from scale-up to scale-ups and beyond, highlighting market trends and the challenges that they are facing in a panel style Q&A session. We offer all of our events virtually and physically, with the option for virtual roundtables, conferences, webinars and panel sessions.

Name: Lyon Positif
Description:
LYON POSITIF est le média des acteurs engagés dans la transition du territoire de la métropole de Lyon. 

Autour de sa ligne éditoriale "rendre visible l'essentiel" il vous propose chaque jour le meilleur des récits locaux à impact positif !

Fidèle à sa vocation "d'être utile à ceux qui sont vraiment utiles", il repère et éditorialise, pour mieux les mettre en lumière, toutes les initiatives et projets qui concourent à faire bouger les lignes et avancer vers les transitions espérées et nécessaires, permettant ainsi de régénérer l'action par l'inspiration.

Associatif et collaboratif, il rassemble les contenus positifs et inspirants, sous tous les formats (reportages vidéos, podcasts, documentaires, articles) et réunit la communauté des bénévoles et des associations, comme des acteurs institutionnels et économiques, engagés sur le terrain 

Né lors du premier confinement, pour s'adapter à l’évolution de la société connectée (révolution digitale et numérique, omniprésence des réseaux sociaux dans l’accès à l’information, impact considérable de la vidéo) et répondre aux réels besoins citoyens (recherche d'authenticité, attente de pédagogie et quête du sens ) ce média est de fait le fruit d'une conviction, d'une nécessité et d'un choix : celui que l'on peut et que l'on doit regarder le monde autrement

Name: Environments for Aging
Description:
Environments for Aging serves an audience of planners, architects, interior designers, community owners and operators, and other professionals immersed in the planning, design, construction, and ongoing operation of senior living communities. The magazine is the industry’s premier source of insight, information, and inspiration, delivering to readers the latest senior living design news and in-depth coverage of new projects and trends.

Through our various channels, including the print magazine that’s published three times per year, website, and social media, EFA engages the senior living design community with highly focused content written by professional journalists and industry experts. Our goal is to help our audience navigate the current senior living market and achieve cost-effective, person-centered design solutions.

Environments for Aging magazine, its website, and annual Environments for Aging Expo & Conference are collectively the industry’s best source of information on the latest design trends for senior living communities that deliver person-centered, residential environments. Whether building a new project or renovating an existing space, Environments for Aging delivers the content architects, designers, and community owners and operators need, placing a spotlight on innovative design for senior care.

Environments for Aging helps readers keep a pulse on industry trends, such as best practices in assisted living facilities, as well as the latest senior living projects to be completed across the country and internationally. This coverage helps professionals discover new solutions for designing and building senior living environments, from independent living to memory care to skilled nursing.
