Name: Radio Nowy Świat
Description:
Radio Nowy Świat powstało dzięki uporowi: dziennikarzy, którzy na przestrzeni ostatnich kilku lat podejmowali próby stworzenia pierwszego radia internetowego z misją, a także słuchaczy, dla których radio jest czymś więcej, niż tylko medium.

Magda Jethon, Anna Krakowska, Wojciech Mann, Jan Chojnacki, Krzysztof Łuszczewski – ten znakomity zespół ludzi znających radio od podszewki uwierzył w szansę, jaką niosła ze sobą tęsknota słuchaczy.

Strach wiązał się wyłącznie ze sposobem, w jaki można byłoby przekuć wizję w rzeczywistość. Okazało się jednak, że wielu słuchaczy działających w ramach akcji “Ratujmy Trójkę” zadeklarowało wsparcie finansowe dla rodzącego się pomysłu.

Założony cel ogłoszonej w serwisie @Patronite zbiórki, którego osiągnięcie pozwalałoby na uruchomienie radia w ograniczonej formie, został osiągnięty dzięki rekordowemu wsparciu słuchaczy w niecałą dobę. Co więcej, okazało się, że ogłoszona przez nas potrzebna kwota została zwielokrotniona Państwa hojnością, a co za tym idzie – pozwoliła na stworzenie własnego zespołu serwisantów, reporterów oraz poszerzenie redakcji muzycznej.

Name: ecoekonomia.pl - bo biznes może być ECO
Description:
www.ecoekonomia.pl to portal o najważniejszych dla planety i gospodarki sprawach. Głównym założeniem wydawców portalu jest informowanie o tematach ekologicznych mających wpływ na codzienne życie, biznes oraz finanse. 
Ekologia to nie tylko lepsza jakość i nowoczesny styl życia. To przede wszystkim biznes! Możliwość korzystnego jej wprowadzenia widzimy na każdym kroku. W domu, w biurze, w fabryce, na bazarku i polu. Wierzymy, że szybciej i efektywniej pomożemy planecie, jeśli w sprawy eko będzie zaangażowany każdy. Nie tylko podczas segregacji odpadów, ale także robienia zakupów, prowadzenia biura czy produkcji ubrań. 

Ekologia jest ekonomiczna – to nie frazes, to fakt! Zmianę sposobu postępowania wymuszają na nas nie tylko rosnące ceny usług tzw. „nieekologicznych” zachowań, jak na przykład brak segregacji śmieci. Ekologia stała się element filozofii firm, ich strategii lub po prostu sposobem prowadzenia działalności.

Name: Off Investigation
Description:
OFF Investigation est un média d'enquête indépendant constitué fin 2021 autour de Jean-Baptiste Rivoire, ex-rédacteur en chef adjoint de l'émission « Spécial investigation » sur Canal +, et journaliste d'investigation. 

Animé·es par un fort esprit d’indépendance et le goût de l’irrévérence, nous mobilisons notre savoir-faire, notre déontologie et notre rigueur au service d'enquêtes non partisanes.

Aujourd’hui, toutes les chaînes de télés se méfient de l’investigation. Dans les groupes privés, on l’a tuée depuis longtemps au profit de sujets de société ou de « l’info en continu ». 
Après s'être vu supprimer la redevance par Emmanuel Macron, l’audiovisuel public, dernier bastion de l'investigation audiovisuelle, risque d'avoir de plus de mal à en faire. Quand un sujet est jugé trop « politique » ou trop « sensible », il a tendance à être écarté par crainte des foudres du pouvoir exécutif.

OFF assume d’enquêter sur des sujets qui dérangent. Nos articles enquête et nos documentaires s'efforcent de mettre en lumière les enjeux politiques et financiers qui se trament dans les coulisses de la République.

Dopo la condivisione di questa scoperta con l’amico Diego, programmatore e appassionato di tecnologia, i due cominciano a raccogliere le storie di chi gira il mondo lavorando con internet, cercando di capire le loro motivazioni, le opportunità che hanno avuto e come riescono a guadagnarsi da vivere in questo modo. Dopo un anno e mezzo di indagine, Alberto e Diego hanno scoperto una nuova filosofia di vita che ha fatto nascere Nomadi Digitali, un progetto online che verrà lanciato a breve. Obiettivo: condividere esempi, modelli, strumenti e risorse per imparare a diventare una persona libera e indipendente, in grado di guadagnare grazie ad internet, viaggiando e vivendo ovunque.

NOTA PER LE AGENZIE MARKETING: per scelta, NON abbiamo forza commerciale. Siamo la podcasting factory ideale per agenzie che presidiano un loro parco clienti e si affidano con fiducia a un team specializzato sul podcasting e NON in concorrenza

Ci occupiamo di tutto. Dal briefing all’idea, dalla realizzazione alla pubblicazione sulle piattaforme di ascolto, dal piano di lancio alla promozione.

We started in February 2020 as a digital-only publisher. When global motorsport was cancelled, we made an instant pivot to esports, creating what became the All-Star Series.

Over 15 of the next 16 weekends, we held a live race on Saturday evenings that attracted the best sim racers as well as some of the top real-world drivers. On top of this, the Legends Series put the likes of Emerson Fittipaldi and Mario Andretti against Fernando Alonso and Jenson Button in the highest profile sim racing races of all time.

We are committed to producing quality content regardless of whether that is online, in video or in podcast. We have employed the best writers to write the best stories.

We offer the most important insights and deeper analyses in what's going on thru the global landscape. Given the landscape is so vast, we focus on someone who have deep understanding of his or her own respective country and ecosystem. Name: Office of Cards
Description:
Have you ever felt oppressed by nonsense in your corporate job? Or experienced useless meetings in which nothing gets decided? Or maybe seen a good idea killed by a political play?

So have I.

And I understood that there were things I had to learn if I wanted to find a way to deal with these situations and succeed and be happy in large organisations. Based on the results (a significant acceleration in my career) I’d say I got something right.

This is why I wrote this book in which I share what I have learned, with no filter, saying what needs to be said, in a simple and approachable way. I hope this manual of Life Engineering can help you find ideas, and give you tools, to improve your success and satisfaction in any corporate job and, as many of these rules apply to various situations, in life as well.

Find more on www.officeofcards.com or @OfficeOfCards on Twitter.

Name: Ici Beyrouth
Description:
Ici Beyrouth est un site d’information, d’analyse et d’investigation générale avec une part essentielle de reportages et d’images, présent sur toutes les plateformes numériques. Né de la volonté d’un groupe de journalistes professionnels et de spécialistes bénéficiant d’une longue expérience dans la presse écrite et audiovisuelle, et soucieux de s’entourer d’une équipe de jeunes talents, ce site souhaite perpétuer la tradition de liberté d’expression et de journalisme de qualité, piliers essentiels de l’édifice libanais.

Affranchi de toute pression, de toute contrainte politique et comptant principalement sur votre soutien financier, Ici Beyrouth est un média libre, indépendant et engagé en faveur d’une résistance culturelle visant à promouvoir un socle de valeurs, portées par la francophonie, qui symbolisent le Liban et qu’il est aujourd’hui plus que jamais nécessaire de défendre contre toutes les menaces et agressions potentielles.

La mission d’Ici Beyrouth est de rassembler et de fédérer tous ceux qui partagent les valeurs fondamentales indispensables à la survie et à la pérennité de la République libanaise, en l’occurrence la souveraineté, l’indépendance, la neutralité vis-à-vis des axes régionaux, le vivre-ensemble, les libertés publiques, les droits de la femme et de l’homme, le pluralisme et la diversité politique et culturelle, la culture de l’Etat de droit et de la citoyenneté, le libéralisme économique, le droit à la différence, l’ouverture sur le monde, le rejet de la violence, la dignité de l’individu, la lutte pour la justice et contre l’impunité, le devoir de mémoire, la transparence, la bonne gouvernance, le droit à la santé et à l’éducation pour tous et la préservation d’un environnement sain.

Face à l’effondrement global sans précédent qui ébranle le Liban, nous souhaitons également transmettre un message d’espoir et contribuer à promouvoir de nouvelles valeurs positives pour un « autre Liban » – des valeurs axées sur la solidarité, le don de soi

Name: Prabhasakshi News Portal
Description:
Prabhasakshi is a Hindi-language news website, read largely by the Hindi-speaking belt namely Bihar, Chandigarh, Chhattisgarh, Delhi, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, Jharkhand, Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan, Uttarakhand and Uttar Pradesh.

It is one of the leading news portals launched in 2001, which is owned by Dwarikesh Informatics Limited. It strives to offer well-researched, practical, rich and highest quality content to its readers. 

The website is continuously contributing towards bridging the digital divide by providing Hindi content to its readers and viewers. It is embracing a holistic way of approaching content, which incorporates Indian values and Western technological expertise. 

Prabhasakshi.com has been a favourite of the Hindi readers in India as well as abroad for more than the last decade and a half. Presently, the content published on this portal is interesting, readable and of extremely refined quality and receives more than one million hits per day.

Many renowned journalists, writers, literates, cartoonists etc. have been associated with Prabhasakshi. Late Mr. Khushwant Singh, Late Mr. Arun Nehru, Late Mr. Dinanath Mishra kept writing regular columns for the portal. Presently, Shri Tarun Vijay, Shri Rajnath Singh Surya and Shri Kuldip Nayar, are some of the prominent writers associated with the portal as regular columnists.

Prabahsakshi.com actively uses the social networking platforms such as Facebook, Twitter, YouTube, Instagram and LinkedIn amongst many others to spread awareness as well as to pro-actively interact with its targets and receive their feedbacks.

The mobile app of the news portal (www.prabhasakshi.com) is also available on Google Play Store and Apple Store. Readers can also read the news on UC News, Daily Hunt and Tapzo.

Name: Damroo
Description:
Damroo is an audio streaming (B2C) & distribution (B2B) platform that treasures non-film/ independent music in a number of languages spoken in the country. 

India is a land rich in art, music, culture, and BOLLYWOOD. There was a time when we heard and thrived on Independent and Non-Film music along with the music from the Film Industry. They grew as parallel industries. Over the years, What we heard, what we consumed, our styles underwent a transition that’ pulled us more and more to Bollywood.

If you are wanting to dive into the heritage, the legacy of folk, regional flavors, for music that’ got lost in the larger sounds, the music that makes India what it is, that takes us back to the raw sounds of our Maestros like Kishore Kumar and Lata Mangeshkar, that takes you on a journey of some of India’s greatest voices, and the most promising, and upcoming talent, then Damroo is for you.

Damroo Plus:

If you are the rights holder of your song, Upload unlimited music from anywhere in the world and we’ll distribute it to every major online store. Caller Tunes services in select countries and operators. Keep your copyright & get paid.

Check out our App for more details.

Name: Léeme+
Description:
Léeme+ es una nueva plataforma de distribución de contenidos, que utiliza el modelo de suscripción "all you can read" para acceder a revistas de prestigiosas editoriales. 
En resumen, es el Netflix de la revistas!

Si trabajas para una editorial, puedes escribirnos para comenzar el proceso de integrar tus contenidos a Léeme+. Es muy fácil, se firma un contrato, recibes una clave de un portal de Administración Web y subes los PDF de tus revistas.
Puedes publicar revistas pagadas o gratuitas. En el caso de revistas pagadas, se compartirán los ingresos generados entre Léeme y todas las editoriales. 
En el caso de las revistas gratuitas, pueden ocupar a Léeme+ como tu plataforma de distribución, para cualquier pueda ver tu revista.

Léeme+ está actualmente disponible en la Web, pronto estará disponible en Android y también iOS (aprox Marzo 2019). Más adelante, también en Windows10 y Smart-TVs.

Si quieres trabajar con nosotros, escríbenos!

Name: VeneziePost
Description:
Su X: @VeneziePost
Su Facebook: www.facebook.com/vepost

VeneziePost è un portale di analisi sul “futuro delle Venezie”, una piattaforma di incontro e confronto, anche attraverso una rete di festival e di eventi, tra il mondo imprenditoriale, i professionisti, le istituzioni e il mondo scientifico ed accademico. Scopo di VeneziePost è costruire un contesto metropolitano che permetta di offrire servizi adeguati alla crescita del mondo delle imprese.

VeneziePost è un portale che quotidianamente fornisce un servizio di approfondimento ai propri abbonati (attualmente circa 1.000). A una ricca rassegna stampa mattutina, segue un aggiornamento in tempo reale di notizie di agenzia, comunicati e analisi dei nostri specialisti sui temi dell’economia, della finanza, della cultura e della vita delle istituzioni. Attraverso il Centro Studi di VeneziePost vengono fornite analisi su aziende particolarmente performanti o su dati elaborati da altri istituti di ricerca. Il sabato viene pubblicato Cult, il supplemento di economia della cultura, mentre la domenica viene pubblicato Monitor, il supplemento sui grandi temi economico-sociali.

Completa la ricchissima offerta informativa Venezie A Tavola, la guida enogastronomica di Luigi Costa, che ogni sabato, con Cult, fornisce segnalazioni di ristoranti, vini e prodotti del nostro territorio. La Guida è anche cartacea e viene pubblicata ogni anno a settembre, fornendo indicazioni sui 130 migliori ristoranti delle Venezie, sui vini, sulle birre artigianali e sui prodotti. Dispone anche di un sito www.venezieatavola.it

VeneziePost è anche una rete di grandi eventi e festival, che vedono protagonisti i più importanti nomi dell’economia, della finanza, delle istituzioni, dell’impresa e della cultura. Attualmente promuoviamo: Green Economy Festival, Festival Città Impresa, Galileo Festival dell'Innovazione, Trieste Next, WeFood, Open Factory.

Name: Kidiklik
Description:
Kidiklik, créé en 2010 par Céline Lollier et Anne-Cécile Béchu, est un média 100% digital au service des familles, spécialisé dans la promotion de sorties et d’activités pour enfants.

En 2015, les fondatrices remportent le Prix du Réseau Entreprendre. Leur modèle de développement innovant convainc le jury qui leur accorde un financement et le précieux accompagnement d'un entrepreneur bénévole. Peu de temps après, 5 nouvelles franchises départementales sont ouvertes et le réseau Kidiklik voit le jour. L’entreprise est aujourd'hui présente dans 28 départements français.

Son expertise ? Des parents indépendants qui connaissent leur territoire, testent les sorties avec des enfants et racontent leurs expériences avec passion.

Sa force ? Un réseau de franchisés disponibles, pleins de bonne humeur et soudés.

Kidiklik s’engage aussi dans l’apprentissage !
Nous avons à cœur de transmettre notre savoir et croyons en la nouvelle génération pour faire évoluer notre entreprise. C’est pourquoi, depuis près de 4 ans, nous investissons dans ce contrat d’avenir qui offre à nos deux apprenties la possibilité de se former sur le terrain, à nos côtés !

Name: Chamoisines podcast
Description:
Le monde de l'optique est riche de nombreuses professions, pas toujours connues ni mises en avant lors de nos études. Les débouchés selon les diplômes obtenus amènent généralement de nombreux questionnements, et les bifurcations possibles entre chaque profession également !

Chamoisines part à la rencontre des ces nombreux professionnels de l'optique, qui représentent autant l'aspect commercial, technique que celui de la santé visuelle : orthoptistes, opticiens, artisans lunetiers, optométristes, ophtalmologistes et bien d'autres encore.

Ce podcast s'adresse à tous : étudiants ou futurs étudiants, professionnels expérimentés ou moldus souhaitant en apprendre davantage sur le domaine de l'optique.

Chaque parcours est unique, et c'est ce qui en fait la beauté.


Le podcast est disponible sur toutes les plateformes d'écoutes : deezer, Spotify, Apple podcast, etc.

Name: B2B Asiakaskokemus
Description:
Suomalaisten B2B-yritysten tuotteet ja palvelut ovat maailman parhaimmistoa. Menestykseen vaaditaan kuitenkin tänä päivänä enemmän. Asiakkaan odotukset yhteistyökumppaneille kasvavat koko ajan - yhteistyön pitää olla helppoa ja sujuvaa, tarjottujen ratkaisujen tulee olla asiakkaan tarpeisiin sopivia ja arvoa tuottavia, ja yhteistyön pitää parhaimmillaan synnyttää kokemuksia. B2B-asiakkaiden kokemukset syntyvät luontaisesta kiinnostuksesta, annettujen lupausten lunastamisesta sekä onnistumisen tunteista, jotka sitouttavat asiakkaan yritykseen. Yritykselle lojaalit asiakkaat puolestaan tuovat kasvua, kannattavuutta ja kassavirtaa. 

Asiakaskokemuksen rakentuminen B2B -ympäristössä on monimutkaisempaa kuin kuluttajabisneksessä. Kokemus syntyy usealla eri tasolla ja odotukset ovat usein sidottu tehtäviin. Kuitenkin myös yritysten välisessä liiketoiminnassa asiakas on ihminen ja kokemus syntyy ihmisten välisessä kanssakäymisessä.

Haluamme auttaa yrityksiä rakentamaan tapoja tuottaa toistuvasti erinomaisia kokemuksia B2B asiakkaille. Siksi kirjoitamme aiheesta kirjaa. 

Kirja antaa moniulotteisen näkökulman B2B-asiakaskokemukseen sekä käytännön työkaluja sen kokonaisvaltaiseen kehittämiseen. Aihetta lähestytään usean eri teeman kautta aina strategiasta kulttuuriin, asiakasymmärryksestä mittareihin, teknologiaa ja tulevaisuuden mahdollisuuksia unohtamatta. Yritysesimerkkien kautta teoria muuttuu konkretiaksi ja arkeen vietäviksi ideoiksi.

Name: The Brief

Our name defines us. We aim to be an online media platform where companies can effectively see what’s going on in India in terms of business propositions, sectoral growth, financial affairs and how foreign employees from other countries living in India can make the most of their time here. 

Sounds good? There’s more!

Name: Bare Knuckles & Brass Tacks
Description:
Bare Knuckles and Brass Tacks is the tech podcast about humans. Hosted by George K and George A, this podcast examines AI, infrastructure, technology adoption, and the broader implications of tech developments through both guest interviews and news commentary.

Our guests bring honest perspectives on what's working, what's broken, and new ways to examine the roles and impacts of technology in our lives.

We challenge conventional tech industry narratives and dig into real-world consequences over hype. Whether you're deeply technical or just trying to understand how technology shapes society, this show will make you think critically about where we're headed and who's getting left behind.

Name: Shockdom
Description:
Shockdom è una casa editrice nata il 19 luglio 2000 e attiva da sempre nel mercato dei web comics. È ancora oggi il punto di riferimento per chi legge e crea fumetti online in Italia.

Attraverso la piattaforma Open Shockdom, permette a chiunque di aprire un blog di fumetti e soprattutto di entrare a far parte di una community di autori molto unita e attiva. Attraverso Shockdom molti bravissimi autori hanno raggiunto notorietà nazionale, sia chi aveva già un proprio pubblico sia chi invece ha cominciato con noi. I nostri autori hanno vinto diversi premi fumettistici a livello nazionale e sono stati i fornitori ufficiali di importanti testate.

La keyword della nostra casa editrice è innovazione. Siamo stati i primi in Italia a creare fumetti non per la carta ma per il web, i primi a fare fumetti su cellulari e tra i primi a fare applicazioni per fumetti.
Anche la piattaforma iComics.it segue questa nostra vocazione. Attraverso essa, infatti, qualunque autore può creare la propria applicazione per tablet o smartphone e venderla, guadagnando subito dal proprio lavoro.
 
Ma Shockdom è attiva anche come agenzia creativa, realizzando per le aziende clienti progetti di comunicazione molto efficaci.

Name: SoundStack
Description:
SoundStack is the independent, full-stack technology / services company for podcast and digital audio businesses – enterprise media, networks, hosting platforms, ad tech, and buy-side partners. 

Our collective experience of having built some of the most foundational platforms in digital audio informs our core belief: when podcasters and broadcasters work with independent tech providers that are free to put the publisher first, instead of a corporate media parent, those publishers run a more successful business overall. And when they’re healthy, the whole market is healthy, because everyone from advertiser to listener is dependent on great content.  

Constantly innovating to help publishers seamlessly deliver, monetize, and measure digital audio, our team of 75+ audio tech experts is guided only by what delivers the best results for our 14k+ partners. SoundStack is headquartered in Pittsburgh and is the combination of Media Creek, EmpireStreaming, Abovecast, AudioCatapult, and Live365 (which continues to operate as its own brand).

Name: Healthy Debate
Description:
Healthy Debate publishes journalism about health care in Canada. Free to read. Free to republish.

We launched in 2010 to provide in-depth, insider health coverage to the Canadian public. We've evolved to become an important source of health news and expert opinion.

Our competitive advantage is our access. Started from within a hospital research institute, supported by the University of Toronto Faculty of Medicine, and advised by health system leaders, we work amongst the individuals providing frontline care and doing ground-breaking research and advocacy.

We have three aims: be a trusted source of health media, provide open source content that is free to read and republish, and be a platform to teach health professionals and academics how to write for and speak to the public.

Name: Voyage Family
Description:
Voyage Family est le média voyage numéro 1 sur la cible famille qui se décline à travers un site web (3 millions de visiteurs par an, +30% par an depuis la création), une newsletter (40 000 abonnés), une communauté sur les réseaux sociaux (50 000 parents), un podcast, des mini-guides et un forum.

Depuis 8 ans, la mission de Voyage Family est d’inspirer les parents et de les aider concrètement à organiser des escapades basées sur la découverte des cultures, le partage avec les populations locales, et la reconnexion avec sa famille.

Voyage Family permet ainsi de :
- trouver du contenu inspirant, pratique et complet, fondé sur l’expérience réelle de familles voyageuses dans plus de 70 destinations dans le monde,
- échanger avec d’autres parents-voyageurs au sein d’une vaste communauté engagée et passionnée,
- se faire accompagner dans l’organisation d’un circuit sur-mesure en famille grâce à la mise en relation avec des agents de voyage sélectionnés.

Alors place au rêve ! Et à bientôt sur voyagefamily.com !

Name: Newschecker
Description:
At Newschecker, our aim is to limit and crackdown on the spread of fake news in society. We bring out the truth by examining the statements and claims made by public figures, personalities, media, and users on social media. We want to make people aware by exposing the hidden agenda, propaganda or intention behind disinformation.

Our mission is an unbiased one. We're loyal to neither people nor parties but the truth alone. And while the fact-checking industry continues to grow, there are still countless assertions that go unchecked. We exist to fill in the gaps.

We welcome our readers to send us claims to fact check. If you believe a story or statement deserves a fact check, or an error has been made with a published fact check, please send/contact us at checkthis@newschecker.in or WhatsApp us at 9999499044.

Newschecker.in is an independent fact-checking initiative of @NC Media Networks Pvt Ltd.

𝑭𝒐𝒐𝒅 𝑺𝒂𝒇𝒆𝒕𝒚 𝑻𝒆𝒄𝒉 (FST) informs, educates, and connects professionals across the global food safety ecosystem. 𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐚𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐮𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐨𝐫𝐬, 𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐟𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐨𝐫𝐠𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬, 𝐟𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬, 𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐬, 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐫𝐬, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐫𝐞𝐠𝐮𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐬.

Through 𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐥, 𝐢𝐧-𝐝𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐡 𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐲 𝐧𝐞𝐰𝐬, and 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫-𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐛𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬, we provide timely reporting and analysis on food safety technology, best practices, and regulatory developments. We also host 𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐯𝐢𝐫𝐭𝐮𝐚𝐥 𝐞𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 that deliver practical knowledge, expert perspectives, and actionable resources.

Since 2011, professionals have come to rely on 𝑭𝒐𝒐𝒅 𝑺𝒂𝒇𝒆𝒕𝒚 𝑻𝒆𝒄𝒉 for 𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞, 𝐡𝐢𝐠𝐡-𝐪𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 delivered through 𝐅𝐨𝐨𝐝𝐒𝐚𝐟𝐞𝐭𝐲𝐓𝐞𝐜𝐡.𝐜𝐨𝐦, our weekly newsletter, and our educational programs.

𝑭𝒐𝒐𝒅 𝑺𝒂𝒇𝒆𝒕𝒚 𝑻𝒆𝒄𝒉 supports informed decision making by helping industry stakeholders stay current on 𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐧𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐠𝐲, 𝐫𝐞𝐠𝐮𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐧𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐥𝐬 that advance food safety and protect consumers worldwide.

Description:
WorldTempus is the digital influencer of reference dedicated to luxury watches.

Established in 2001, the digital watchmaking daily belongs to GMT Publishing, which publishes the magazines GMT, Mountain Addict Gstaad, Skippers, voile & océan and Société Nautique de Genève and also holds the rights to the Geneva Watch Tour. Based in Geneva, GMT Publishing is a joint venture between the international media group Edipresse and Brice Lechevalier, founder of the aforementioned magazines.

The editorial team at WorldTempus is passionate, curious and extremely well informed. It comprises experts and renowned specialist journalists who provide, on a daily basis, high-quality information on new watches and trends, technical secrets and industry news. The WorldTempus watch database comprises over 12,000 watches that have been added over 14 years and 3,000 new items of text and video content are added to the site each year.

WorldTempus is based in Geneva (Switzerland) with a network of correspondents around the world.

Name: Habitante
Description:
Habitante.it è un progetto editoriale nato nel 2017 per essere il tuo punto di riferimento sui temi dell’habitat e l’abitare.

Habitante.it è il primo magazine della casa che mette al centro i reali bisogni degli abitanti, fornendo idee, consigli e ispirazioni sulla casa ideale di domani.

Co-costruiamo la casa ideale di domani

Habitante nasce da un progetto ideato per supportare l’Osservatorio sulla Casa di Leroy Merlin Italia e sviluppato insieme a Unione Nazionale Consumatori.

Come sarà la casa ideale di domani?

- Casa accessibile
- Casa attenta alla salute
- Casa comoda da vivere
- Casa smart
- Casa sostenibile

Dentro le case, oltre l'habitat

Punto di esplorazione, osservazione e riflessione, Habitante mette al centro i consumi dell’abitante e racconta la realtà delle case e delle differenti forme dell’abitare in base alle diverse culture.

La nostra redazione ogni giorno osserva, studia e racconta l’habitat di oggi, per co-costruire l’habitat ideale domani.

Wie wij zijn?
Jonge Historici is ooit begonnen als online uitgeverij met de missie om werkstukken en scripties van geschiedenisstudenten te publiceren die anders vergeten zouden worden. Alle content is open access – dus gratis en zonder inloggen – toegankelijk. Inmiddels heeft Jonge Historici zich ontwikkeld tot een breed platform voor jonghistorisch talent. Onze organisatie ontwikkelt zich voortdurend.

Okezone.com memiliki beragam konten dari berita umum, politik, peristiwa, internasional, ekonomi, lifestyle, selebriti, sports, bola, auto, teknologi, Travel, Food, Haji, Muslim, Warung kopi,dan Rubik Okezone.

TAJAM, SINGKAT, PADAT, DAN DINAMIS
Okezone.com resmi diluncurkan (Commercial Launch) sebagai portal berita pada 1 Maret 2007 dan merupakan cikal-bakal bisnis online pertama milik PT Media Nusantara Citra Tbk (MNC), sebuah perusahan media terintegrasi yang terbesar di Indonesia dan di Asia Tenggara. MNC juga memiliki dan mengelola bisnis media TV (RCTI, MNC TV, Global TV), media cetak (Koran Seputar Indonesia, Tabloid Genie, Tabloid Mom & Kiddie, majalah HighEnd, dan Trust), media radio (SINDO, Trijaya FM, ARH Global, Radio Dangdut Indonesia, V Radio), serta sejumlah bisnis media lainnya (mobile VAS, Manajemen artis, rumah produksi film, agen iklan, dll). Sampai dengan bulan September 2016, Okezone.com mendapatkan peringkat ke 15 dari Top 100 website terpopuler di Indonesia (Sumber: Alexa.com), peringkat ini terus naik yang disebabkan semakin banyak pengunjung situs yang mengakses Okezone.com setiap harinya.

Name: Voxeurop
Description:
Voxeurop is managed by the first European press cooperative to ever run a news media outlet. Its shareholders are journalists, translators, and readers from over 30 different countries. 

Europe is the focus of our reporting 

Climate change, democracy, migration and asylum, pressing social issues... The great challenges of our time do not stop at borders. To do its job properly, journalism can no longer be limited to purely national perspectives. At Voxeurop, we produce general-interest, multilingual reporting on the issues that cut across our societies, our borders, and our language barriers. 

We produce our own reporting and analysis, but we also translate over 400 European sources. At Voxeurop, thanks to translation, you can read in your own language an article from a Belarusian opposition newspaper, an in-depth feature by a Greek investigative publication, or a reportage by a Romanian newsroom. This is content you won't find anywhere else. 

As for our own work, it has been picked up by the big names in the European press: The Guardian (UK), The Kyiv Independent (Ukraine), Internazionale (Italy), Die Tageszeitung (Germany), Libération (France) and many others. Supporting Voxeurop means supporting this kind of networked journalism, which delivers high-quality information to tens of millions of Europeans. We owe our independence to those who support us. They give us our freedom to report on matters of public interest and to forge links across borders. Their loyal patronage means that our content is free to access. 

Support a transnational European media outlet. Join a community of readers in over 30 countries. https://voxeurop.eu/en/support/

Description:
Tras seis años, 24 números, 130 reuniones, 2.700 correos electrónicos, 30.000 cafés y una pandemia mundial… tenía que pasar. Nace Rúbrica Dixital!

Un nuevo espacio online con el que queremos informarte, entretenerte, inspirarte y, lo más importante… queremos que te sientas como en casa.
Porque sabemos lo complicado que es explicarle a tu madre en qué trabajas (sí, estar todo el día con el móvil es parte de nuestro trabajo ). Porque también hemos sufrido que nos envíen logos en word (y los famosos pequeños cambios ). Porque sabemos que ningún sobrino de ningún cliente sustituye a un buen social media (y aunque seguro que pinta muy bien, tampoco es capaz de construir tu marca ). Porque estamos a puntito de sacar el C1 de inglés gracias a los palabros del marketing  (tranquilos no nos estamos ahogando, sólo estamos pronunciando engagement) y por qué no decirlo... porque sabemos que las relaciones entre marketing y ventas o diseño e impresión no son siempre fáciles (pero en el fondo, nos adoramos ).

En definitiva, porque somos de los tuyos y te entendemos.

Profesionales del marketing, la comunicación, la creatividad, los eventos… Bienvenidos a vuestra casa digital!  www.rubricadixital.gal

Name: Cambio Colombia
Description:
Es una tragedia para el país, y también para el mundo, que entre los miembros de una sociedad no exista un acuerdo sobre cuáles son los hechos que forjan un determinado acontecimiento, porque es a partir de su conocimiento que cada persona puede interpretar la realidad y así formar una opinión propia sobre ella.

Por esa razón, Cambio será un aire fresco en medio de un mar de desinformación. Gracias a la búsqueda permanente de la excelencia periodística queremos servir a los ciudadanos poniendo por delante la información confiable y de calidad sobre cualquier interés político y económico. 

Cambio será ese medio que le da a los lectores las herramientas necesarias para tomar las mejores decisiones. 
 
Ese compromiso periodístico que asumimos con cada uno de nuestros lectores consistirá en buscar y analizar información veraz sobre Colombia y el mundo, datos útiles y contenido relevante para informar, formar y educar a nuestra audiencia. Además, Cambio publicará análisis internacionales que le permitan a su público ver al país en función de las tendencias globales políticas y económicas.

Al mismo tiempo haremos uso de la tecnología más innovadora, y esa que genera tendencia, para contar nuestras historias de manera atractiva y original.
 
Cambio se nutrirá de visiones múltiples y descentralizadas. Hará nacionales las voces de las regiones y se enriquecerá con la mirada de los jóvenes y de la Academia.
 
Por todo lo anterior, nuestras prioridades serán dos: por una parte, buscar y revelar la verdad con todos sus ángulos y, por otra, dar a conocer la realidad de las regiones, destacando no sólo sus problemas, sino también sus logros.

Name: ten31 Media
Description:
For a long time, I have been obsessed with creating something that mimics how people actually engage with specialist media.

The conventional news article – a long anecdote, a nutgraf that summarizes the story at hand, and a dive into specifics with plenty of hand-holding for a general audience – has its place, but I was much more interested in replicating the hyperkinetic exchange of ideas, intel and news I see in discussions between industry pros.

They prize context and color, numbers and humor. They don’t need to be told everything – but have an infinite appetite for the thing. They’ll toggle between a deep dive, tea spilling, history, narrative, and memes, and consume their industry content with even more delight and affection than content around sports and entertainment – this stuff IS their sports and entertainment.

I've started something new to capture and deliver that. ten31 is a publication that is NOT being built for journalists, publicists or a general audience. It is designed for you – industry insiders. It is radically different in tone and style and format than what you might be used to in B2B. It will offend some and captivate others. And it will be the most fun and useful thing you ever consume in the space.

The first product is "The Promote," a CRE newsletter with many inspirations: Puck, Mad Magazine, Dealbook, The Ringer, SPY, Asphalt Jungle, and of course, my former home, The Real Deal. Sign up for free below - it drops 3x a week.

Empresários, artistas, professores ou jornalistas. Familiares, amigos, vizinhos ou desconhecidos. Não importa a idade, a profissão ou a origem. Queremos dividir histórias que possam acender a centelha de inspiração que faz alguém tirar aquela ideia da gaveta, ter uma relação mais próxima com a sua comunidade ou então simplesmente levar o dia a dia com mais otimismo.

É essa atitude que nos leva a contar essas histórias. É essa atitude que faz um Fora de Série.

Name: ai-zurich
Description:
Wir schreiben nicht nur über AI, bei uns kannst du AI live erleben, mit ihr interagieren und live miterleben was sie so macht und wie sie Entscheidungen trifft.

Wie das geht fragst du dich? Dürfen wir vorstellen, unser neuestes Teammitglied: KAIA. Kennst du KAIA schon? Sie ist die jüngste Türsteherin der Event-Geschichte. Doch lass dich nicht täuschen vom Alter und dem süssen Look! Sie ist knallhart in der Sache und lässt nicht jeden rein! Also sei nett zu ihr, folge ihren Anweisungen und dann, so sind wir sicher, wird sie dich nicht vergessen, wenn sie am 30.April 2021 um Mitternacht ihre Entscheidung trifft, wer physisch vor Ort sein darf an der ai-zurich Konferenz am 6. Mai 2021 und wer sie von der Couch aus verfolgen darf (was sicher auch nicht schlecht ist).

Und nicht vergessen: Wenn du Teil unserer ai-Zurich Plattform wirst, dann nimmst du automatisch an der Konferenz teil. KAIA entscheidet dann aber, wer physisch kommen darf und wer eine #sofakonferenz bekommt. Also, hast du Lust, KAIA kennenzulernen?

Sophie Hundertmark hat ai-zurich (ai-z GmbH) gegründet um eine Plattform zu schaffen, auf der sich Interessierte, Professionals und Starter zu Themen rund um „Künstliche Intelligenz im Business“ austauschen können.
Angefangen haben wir mit einem Meetup in Zürich. Mittlerweile gibt es unterschiedliche Events (Meetups, Workshops, Konferenzen) in verschiedenen Städten im ganzen DACH Raum. 
Am 27. März 2019 fand erstmals die AI in Marketing Conference in Zürich, organisiert von Sophie, statt. Der Erfolg und die grosse Nachfrage der Meetups und der Konferenz haben gezeigt, dass das Thema von hoher Bedeutung ist.

Wie zijn de Belgische ondernemers? Wat zijn hun strategieën en straffe verhalen?
Wat ervaren ze als leuke momenten? Welke donkere periodes hebben ze al overwonnen?
We kennen allemaal de historiek en verhalen van absolute topondernemers als Willy Naessens, Marc Coucke, Wouter Torfs, etc. 
Maar wat speelt er bij de gemiddelde KMO, de kleine zelfstandige, of de start-up?
In onze podcast interviewen we geregeld één van deze Belgische ondernemers, die dag in dag uit keihard aan hun bedrijf werken. Of niet…en dat misschien wel delegeren aan anderen.
Wees klaar voor een hele resem tips, nieuwe inzichten en een kijk op de realiteit in onze Belgische ondernemingen.

Name: Digital Tour Bus
Description:
Beginning as just an idea in January of 2009, the Founder of Digital Tour Bus, Joshua Weidling, started developing an idea he came up with while brainstorming at his part time job at Goodwill. Out of this brainstorming session came a simple idea to change the way people know and interact with their favorite bands and artists. The idea was to find a way to get these acts to agree to let him have a look at different aspects of their lives on the road!

What started as just a simple video series giving fans an exclusive look at the "home on the road" of their favorite touring acts, over seven years ago, has blossomed into a full fledged platform with multiple different web video series, news content, contests, blogs and more. The longest running DTB series, Bus Invaders, which takes fans inside of the buses of their favorite artists, has features over 1,000 amazing acts, including: Twenty One Pilots, G-Eazy, Fifth Harmony, A Day To Remember, Megadeth, Newsboys and Matchbox Twenty.

The two additional series that are held near and dear by DTB's viewers, Gear Masters and Cooking at 65mph, have also feature a pretty incredible lineup of acts, including: for KING & COUNTRY, Andy Grammer, Whitesnake, B.o.B and The Winery Dogs. To round out our content program, we also produce the following web video series: Crazy Tour Stories, Dream Tour, Preshow Rituals, The Life of Tour, Tour Pranks and Tour Tips (Top 5).

The brand tagline "Bringing You On Tour" completely embodies our goal as a company, to bring fans closer the artists they love. We hope you enjoy our site and decide to come along for the journey!

Name: ProductCamp Berlin
Description:
ProductCamp Berlin is the only Barcamp in Berlin for product owners, product managers, product marketers, product designers, product developers, entrepreneurs, and everyone else with a passion for (digital) products, innovation, and collaboration. With more than 200 attendees, it is also one of Europe's largest. While we see new faces each time, many of our participants keep coming back because it was so much fun the last time! 

It is an international crowd of highly skilled and forward-thinking people with professional experience ranging from entry-level to Chief Product Officers. Our attendees come from startups and industry leaders such as Zalando, HERE Technologies, Rocket Internet AG, ImmobilienScout24, idealo, Otto, Burda, Useeds, Immonet, SoundCloud, Xing, agile42, Project A, and many more. 

ProductCamp Berlin is a Barcamp event. A Barcamp is a so-called “unconference” format. In practice, it means that the event is created on that day by the event attendees. So everyone attending can just bring a topic they would like to talk about, or run a workshop, or a roundtable discussion. The topics are pitched to the audience, voted on by the attendees, and allotted time slots and locations, creating the day's schedule on the fly. Our event is about connection, not perfection. It’s the ideal event to learn, teach, and network with other product professionals in an appreciative, positive, and curious atmosphere. 

The organizing team plans the event, secures the location, the necessary infrastructure,  and - thanks to our sponsors - lovely food and beverages for the day. Our amazing volunteers help to make the event run smoothly.

Ticket registration opens a couple of weeks before the event.

ProductCamp Berlin was brought to life in 2010 by Heike Roettgers. 

If you are interested in participating, sponsoring or helping to organize, please contact team@productcampberlin.org.

Name: Dave Cooper LIVE: An Editorial Series on Construction Innovation
Description:
Dave Cooper LIVE is an online video series on how technology, advanced building products and lean manufacturing processes are driving innovation in the AEC community, enabling professionals within the built environment to address global problem statements like the climate crisis, housing affordability, productivity and labor shortages.  
Shows are broadcast LIVE across multiple channels and deliver an authentic, un-edited conversation often driven by the online audience asking questions or making comments both with the featured guest and others watching. Information sharing and collaboration are the pillars of Dave Cooper LIVE as we believe that by working together, we can all Build It Better. 
With a strong focus on prefabrication, industrialized construction, and operational efficiencies, Dave Cooper LIVE brings together leaders from academia, government and Industry to share their knowledge, experience and challenges in managing global businesses in a highly regulated environment.  
Often broadcast from in-person events and on-location, Dave travels to advanced manufacturing facilities, trade shows, training facilities, job sites and more to deliver behind-the-scenes conversations on how homes, buildings and communities are designed, engineered, constructed, delivered, installed and operate. 
The Dave Cooper LIVE community thrives on two-way conversation, bringing market awareness to new entrants and industry veterans who are breaking down the traditional silos within the eco-system of the built environment. Discussing topics like building science, building codes and how to build more durable, resilient, sustainable homes and buildings designed for the way we live today and tomorrow. This is a conversation on how we can transform the construction sector as spoken by the people doing it, inspiring others can do the same. 
Live shows are every Monday / Wednesday and Friday at 1 pm eastern standard time www.YouTube.com/DaveCooperLIVE

Genau diese Situation lösen wir für Sanitätshäuser jeden Tag. Das ist unsere Spezialität.

Wir erstellen Einarbeitungskonzepte, die mit einer Software darauf ausgerichtet ist, Ihnen den Löwenanteil der Einarbeitung abzunehmen. Und schnelle Einarbeitung führt zu Entlastung, führt zu mehr Umsatz.  Sanistar bietet die Lösung!

Name: U2B
Description:
In a quickly changing career landscape, executives, professionals and postgraduate students are looking to stand apart from the scrum and training to become future leaders of the pack.

An MBA, an eight-week course on how to optimise client relations or news on innovations in project management learning software could mean the difference between unleashing your or your organisation’s success versus getting stuck in middling mediocrity.

Issues hindering mobility and lack of proximity to the world’s leading higher-learning business education institutions and short-term career growth courses have pushed the global workforce online. Finding what’s available, who needs it and how to best learn while sitting behind a screen are the most pressing issues for prospective students.

U2B is the source that gives you the information you need to map out your journey through the professional development landscape, without having to leave your desk or armchair.

We write stories and provide you the information you need to make the right decisions when it comes to professional growth, whether as an individual or organisation, giving you unbiased news and insights into the dense plethora of data out there.

We explain what you can expect to learn, why it’s relevant, and how it can ultimately impact your future.

Our content is written for future-facing business leaders and professionals – global change agents who, like us, see learning as a life-long process.

The team at U2B is part of Hybrid, the publisher of global web brands Study International, TechHQ and Tech Wire Asia. From our offices in the UK, Australia and Malaysia, we serve an international readership that spans the Americas, Europe and the Asia Pacific.

Our extensive experience in higher education and the online technologies used to facilitate learning help us identify the best innovations and institutions, giving insights and forging paths for the leaders of tomorrow.

Through U2B, we bring that information to you.

Description:
𝗕𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘂𝗲 𝘀𝘂𝗿 𝗟𝗲 𝗦𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁 𝗮̀ 𝗹𝗮 𝗟𝗼𝘂𝗽𝗲 

Plongez dans l'univers fascinant du sport d'une manière que vous n'avez jamais expérimentée auparavant. Ici, nous ne suivons pas les résultats et les classements, nous explorons les coulisses, les histoires inédites, et nous jetons notre loupe sur le monde du sport.

Imaginez un podcast où chaque épisode est une plongée profonde, une exploration des recoins méconnus de l'histoire sportive, des institutions et des événements. Nous ne nous limitons pas aux feux des projecteurs, nous éclairons également les coins sombres et les pépites oubliées.

Mais ce n'est pas tout. Nous donnons une voix à tous ceux qui ont une passion pour le sport, que leur discipline soit médiatisée ou non, olympique ou non. Le Sport à la Loupe est l'endroit où les récits authentiques rencontrent la perspicacité journalistique, où chaque athlète a une tribune, chaque événement une histoire, et chaque passionné un espace pour s'exprimer.

Rejoignez-nous chaque semaine pour des interviews exclusives avec des grands athlètes, des analyses approfondies et des récits qui transcendent les limites du terrain de jeu. Préparez-vous à voir le sport sous un nouvel angle, à découvrir des histoires qui vont au-delà des gros titres, et à participer à une conversation où chaque voix compte.

Bienvenue sur Le Sport à la Loupe - là où le sport devient une histoire à raconter.

Name: FranchementBien
Description:
FranchementBien, le média qui relaye l'actu 100% positive en France !

Résolument positif. Amoureusement français. Délibérément apolitique. Parce que nous avons un pays magnifique dans lequel il se passe chaque jour des choses franchement bien. Un flux quotidien de posts écrits par des contributeurs talentueux. A lire et à PARTAGER très largement.

Il ne s’agit pas ici de faire de la politique ou d’exprimer une opinion politicienne.

Il s’agit bien en revanche de mettre en valeur notre pays, la France, si riche, si talentueuse, et pourtant si pessimiste sur son présent et, plus grave, sur son avenir.

Les médias traditionnels seuls arrivent à plomber l’ambiance générale. Il faut dire qu’il est aisé de faire chou gras de la montagne d’informations négatives –et souvent, il est vrai, avérées- qui nous submergent chaque jour. Alors oui, la dette accumulée jusqu’ici par les générations d’après-guerre est préoccupante. Oui, la faillite annoncée de notre système social est inquiétante. Oui, la préemption excessive du système capitaliste par le secteur financier est insupportable. Oui, la part grandissante des laissés pour compte dans notre pays retourne le cœur. Oui, le refus pour une écrasante majorité de jeunes de se reconnaitre dans les hommes et femmes politiques qui nous gouvernent, de gauche comme de droite, pose la question de leur légitimité et de la vertu de notre système démocratique. Oui, la compétitivité de notre tissu de TPE et de PME est mise à mal par la lourdeur administrative et le poids des cotisations qui pèsent sur les résultats. Oui, les dernières évolutions sociétales imposées dans la douleur posent de vraies questions morales.

Il ne s’agit pas de le nier. Le diagnostic est là, clair, c’est une bonne première étape. Au moins en avons-nous pleinement conscience.

Néanmoins, il est urgent de cesser de voir constamment le verre à moitié vide. Et de considérer les forces sur lesquelles nous appuyer pour agir.

Name: RateMyApprenticeship
Description:
RateMyApprenticeship is the sister website of RateMyPlacement, formed by three Loughborough undergraduates, Ali Lindsay, Oliver Sidwell and Chris Wickson in 2007. RateMyApprenticeship entered the school leaver market in 2013 following The Richard Review, which highlighted the ‘lack of impartial advice’ for school and college leavers. The rise in tuition fees also made it crucial - now, more than ever - for young people to know and understand the alternatives to going to university.

Since then, RateMyApprenticeship has cemented itself as the go-to website for young people taking the first steps in their career, and attracts 100,000 monthly visitors. During National Apprenticeship Week 2022, we had over 46,000 students visit and search for their future employer.

Name: La Ramasse Salariale
Description:
La motivation, le bien-être, la santé mentale en entreprise...
En France, nous sommes complètement à la ramasse sur ces sujets-là !

Dans le monde professionnel, on se retrouve parfois confronté à des situations difficiles à vivre : du harcèlement, des discriminations, de l'exclusion, etc...

Comment gérer la violence au travail ? Comment se faire aider ? Quels droits invoquer ?

Dans le podcast "La Ramasse Salariale”, nous allons vous partager des témoignages exclusifs et des avis d’experts afin de comprendre et d’appréhender les situations difficiles mais aussi vous partager de belles réussites collectives. 

Nous souhaitons ainsi vous donner un aperçu de ce que pourrait être l’entreprise de demain.

Name: Zócalo Public Square

At a time when our country’s public sphere and our global digital conversation have become ever more polarized and segregated, Zócalo seeks to create a welcoming intellectual space and engage a new and diverse generation in the public square. We pursue our mission by convening events and by publishing ideas journalism. Because democracy is as much a culture as it is a system, we believe that creating meaningful opportunities for citizens to communicate with—and learn from—one another both nurtures and protects it.

Name: iNews.id
Description:
iNews.id adalah news portal berjaringan yang terdiri atas portal berita nasional dan portal daerah, bagian dari MNC Group. iNews.id mengusung visi menjadi portal berita nasional dan regional yang inspiratif dan informatif serta memiliki misi menyajikan berita dan fitur online yang enak dibaca, mendalam, akurat, atraktif (multimedia base), juga menginspirasi siapa saja, di mana saja, kapan saja.
 
iNews.id menyajikan konten beragam mencakup berita nasional (politik, hukum, megapolitan dan peristiwa), internasional, ekonomi, olah raga, lifestyle, otomotif, teknologi, dan travel. Berbagai konten itu diperkaya dengan berita-berita daerah dari seluruh Indonesia yang bersinergi dengan stasiun televisi iNews.

Berbagai konten iNews.id juga selaras dengan pemberitaan semua media di MNC Group, antara lain RCTI, MNC TV, GTV, MNC Channel, Koran Sindo, Okezone.com, Sindonews.com, dan MNC Trijaya FM.

Name: ReporteAsia
Description:
ReporteAsia es un hub de contenido especializado con información actualizada y análisis sobre Asia en español con foco en economía, empresas y negocios, desde una perspectiva latinoamericana.
ReporteAsia fue fundado por un equipo de especialistas en Asia, con experiencia académica y laboral en esa zona del mundo, conocimientos en idiomas y contactos con organismos gubernamentales y diplomáticos, universidades, fondos de inversión y empresas. Asimismo, con experiencia en el desarrollo de negocios y estrategias comunicacionales integrales en LATAM.
De esta manera, ReporteAsia constituye una combinación virtuosa entre información y negocios, pensada para ofrecer consultoría para la construcción de vínculos estratégicos y proyectos comerciales y de inversión, tendiendo un puente comercial y cultural entre Asia y América Latina.
Location: Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires , Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Nerdynaut
Description: Nerdynaut is a media organization dedicated to the nerdish community. We also publish books (book.nerdynaut.com).

Name: The Common Sense Network
Description:
We are a network of businesses on a mission to make democracy healthier by harnessing the power of togetherness

We work through three closely connected business

Common Sense: A multimedia news network dedicated to bringing opposite sides of the political spectrum together

Common Sense Plus: A specialist Youth marketing and research agency where we connect forward-thinking brands to young people (GenZ and millennials) 

Content Sense Studios: A podcast and video recording studio in London where we empower diverse storytellers to change the world for good by creating powerful content


We are an innovative approach to improving the way young people consume digital news.

To date, The Common Sense Network team is comprised of 24 people.

The Core team of 6 people is headed up by Founder and CEO Micheal Omoniyi, named 1 of 100 most influential BAME leaders in Tech by The Financial Times in 2019

We have also built a ‘common sense’ General Advisory Board of industry professionals in tech and journalism whose combined experience in media exceeds 80 years. These include current and ex-senior figures at the BBC, KPMG, The Economist, Buzzfeed and more.

Name: MiCuento
Description: MiCuento is a mobile and collaborative reading platform where kids become the main characters of their favorite stories and invite their friends and family to be part of interactive book apps. Basically, MiCuento comes to take out the dust from traditional children books, proposing a book 3.0: digital, personalized and collaborative.

Le média incontournable pour les acteurs des nouvelles technologies, l’innovation et la sécurité des données.

Name: cleveland.com
Description:
cleveland.com is the premier news and information website in the state of Ohio, attracting more than 19 million unique users every month. It provides 24/7 news and information from many sources to inform, engage and entertain readers.

cleveland.com features content like real-time news, sports, entertainment, lifestyles, politics and business news from Ohio’s largest newspaper, The Plain Dealer. It also features content from 11 Sun News publications covering more than 50 cities and neighborhoods across Northeast Ohio, as well as from other sources.

Advance Ohio operates cleveland.com and provides advertising services on the site and its mobile apps.

Name: HDnetwork
Description:
Da oltre dieci anni offriamo libera informazione sul mondo della tecnologia, abbracciando tutti i settori di maggior interesse e trend. Technology e Innovation. HDblog.it nasce nel 2008 con blog verticali che si moltiplicano rapidamente, con un focus diretto sui palmari e primi dispositivi mobili intelligenti. Da lì agli smartphone il passo fu breve, così, in questi anni, abbiamo seguito da vicino la rivoluzione digitale e assimilato quanta più esperienza per interpretarne le evoluzioni.
Realizzato da appassionati che fanno da dieci anni questo lavoro come fosse ancora il primo giorno, HDblog è cresciuto esponenzialmente ed è oggi il primo sito in Italia in ambito tech. Impegno, perseveranza e continua ricerca di nuove soluzioni contraddistinguono il nostro profilo, sia sul web sia sui canali social, Podcast e Telegram.

Name: E-marketing.fr, la réference des décideurs marketing
Description:
Marketing est la solution d'information sur abonnement de tous ceux qui font le marketing. 
- Le site emarketing.fr rend compte en temps réel du meilleur de l’innovation marketing et des best practices marketing en France et à l’international via deux chaines. Un canal thématique traitant des média, des nouveaux média, du marketing mobile, digital, des études... et un canal serviciel proposant un centre de ressources, une académie en partenariat avec Dunod...

- La newsletter quotidienne vous permet de rester en prise avec l’actualité de la communauté 

- Le mensuel se positionne la fois comme source d’inspiration et boîte à outils pour vous accompagner dans l'évolution des techniques marketing (marketing stratégique, études, marketing relationnel, digital, CRM/data, mobile, etc.).

Name: Why Should We Care About the Indo-Pacific?
Description:
Join hosts Ray Powell and Jim Carouso as they delve into the crucial issues defining the 21st century's pivotal region--one that spans from Hollywood to Bollywood. Learn to navigate its most important geopolitical, economic, military, environmental and cultural challenges, with a practical emphasis on why it matters.

Hosted by seasoned diplomatic and national security practitioners, each episode offers insightful analysis and thought-provoking discussions. From bustling cities like Beijing, Mumbai and Tokyo, through the diverse countries of Southeast Asia, down to the Australian Outback and the pristine islands of the South Pacific, expert guests help Jim and Ray explore the region's defining issues, emergent crises and future trajectories.

Discover the interplay of the U.S.-China strategic competition against the interests of rapidly emerging powers like India and Indonesia. Explore the complexities of regional alliances old and new like ASEAN, AUKUS and "the Quad". Understand the forces driving hotspots like the Korean Peninsula, Taiwan Strait, South China Sea and the China-India border ... and most importantly, why we should care.

Name: Portal Aquecimento Industrial
Description:
A Industrial Heating é considerada a mais respeitada e antiga revista do setor, sendo editada desde 1931. Os assuntos abordados na revista compreendem tecnologias como tratamento térmico, brasagem, sinterização, fundição, instrumentação, refratários, queimadores, fornos e outros processos térmicos. 


Público alvo
A revista é distribuída gratuitamente à profissionais do ramo térmico, compreendendo os diversos níveis hierárquicos de empresa. Além dos setores diretamente envolvidos como tratamento térmico, produção, engenharia, planejamento, é também dirigida a profissionais de outros setores indiretamente envolvidos, tais como: suprimentos, manutenção, laboratórios.


Perfil das empresas que recebem a revista
Tratamentos térmicos, mesmo in house. Neste caso, primordialmente de empresas da cadeia automotiva; Forjarias; Fundições; Siderúrgicas; Usuárias ou proprietárias de fornos industriais; Fornecedoras de equipamentos, insumos e serviços do ramo de tecnologias térmicas; Compradoras de serviços de tratamentos térmicos; Laboratórios de pesquisa metalúrgicos; Metalurgia do Pó; Recobrimentos Superficiais.


Tiragem
São 5.000 exemplares enviados gratuitamente via correio a um mailing selecionado. As revistas são também digitalizadas, disponibilizadas em nosso site e enviadas via email para um mailing de quase 9.000 contatos.

Name: Systems Contractor News
Description: For more than 25 years, Systems Contractor News (SCN) has led the systems integration industry through news analysis, trend reports, and as the authoritative source for the latest product and technology information.

Name: Slice of Finance
Description: “Slices” on the people and organizations in finance via news, thoughts, podcasts, spotlights and more!

Name: The Pitch Show
Description:
The Pitch is hosted by Josh Muccio, who brought the independent podcast to Gimlet in 2017. The show has been downloaded tens of millions of times since. Then in 2022, after the sale of Gimlet Media to Spotify, Josh purchased The Pitch back from Spotify, took the podcast independent again, and made it available on all platforms.

"The Pitch will keep you hooked."
– Brian Solomon, Forbes

"It’s addictive listening. I’ve been burning through the episodes."
– Andy Dehnart, Reality Blurred

In the early days of building a startup, founders make critical decisions that will shape their companies for years to come. The Pitch takes you behind closed doors and into the the world of startups: how people sell their ideas, what makes investors tick, and how these initial conversations can bloom into business deals—or die on the vine.

Name: PM (Politique Médiatique)
Description:
PM (@PolitiqueMédiatique) est le premier média jeune et digital dédié à l'économie, aux industries et savoir-faire français.


 Fondé en 2024, PM décrypte, sans parti pris, les enjeux économiques et d’affaires publiques des industries sensibles (défense, automobile, ruralité, esthétique, tabac, mode, luxe, voyance…).

 Notre mission : donner accès à une information économique claire, directe et accessible, en particulier aux jeunes, pour faire mieux comprendre l'économie et ses savoir-faire. 

 Avec un regard neuf, curieux et pédagogique, PM a touché en 10 mois plus d'1.5 millions de personnes à travers ses contenus, et ambitionne de devenir un véritable "Les Échos pour les jeunes". 

 En ce sens, nos formats sont pensés pour les réseaux sociaux :
– Débats entre dirigeant·e·s et citoyen·ne·s représentatifs,
– Interviews de décideurs,
– Reportages vidéo au cœur des territoires,
– Publications sur des questions grande consommation,
– Couverture vidéo de salons liés aux sujets économiques.

Si nous promouvons le débat et l'accès à l'information, notamment économique, PM est surtout un parti pris pour le partage des connaissances et l’accessibilité. Parce que les sujets inhérents à l'économie ne doivent pas être compris que par ceux qui les maîtrisent.

 Pour nous écrire : politiquemediatique@gmail.com

 Pour nous suivre sur les réseaux sociaux

Name: RTL Today
Description: RTL Today is Luxembourg's leading English language news source. Here are RTL Today we are passionate about keeping readers informed on all the breaking topics and providing entertaining original content. Our small but dedicated team provide up to the minute updates, profiles, videos, interviews and features. Be part of our growing audience.

Name: Le Grand Bain
Description:

Je suis Charles-Elias Farah, Conseiller en investissements certifié par l'autorité des marchés financiers

Name: KuB [KulturBretagne]
Description:
KuB est un média en ligne d’initiative régionale, édité par l'association Breizh Créative en 2017, financé par la Région et l’État. 
Né du constat que la place de la culture dans les médias est en régression constante depuis vingt, trente ans, notamment dans les régions, KuB propose un service public de mise à disposition gratuite et durable (minimum 1 an), de centaines d’œuvres éditorialisées : documentaires, fiction, courts métrages, spectacles vivants, films d’animation, clips, lectures...Toutes, en lien avec la Bretagne. 
KuB incarne ainsi l’ambition d’une région dans les domaines de la culture et des nouveaux médias.
Devenez notre mécène pour soutenir la création en Bretagne et son rayonnement culturel et artistique, en France et à travers le monde !

Name: IrishCentral
Description:
IrishCentral.com is the largest Irish digital media site in North America. 

IrishCentral.com, headquartered in New York City, is a site that features news and community for the global Irish community. Over 3.2 million people visit, share and interact on IrishCentral each month.

Our Linkedin page is dedicated to sharing business news in Ireland and the Irish American community in the US.

For all other Irish news visit our website or our Facebook and Twitter page.

Name: The Academic Woman
Description:
The Academic Woman (TAW) Magazine celebrates and shines a spotlight on women in academia by championing recognition, well-being and positive action for more women empowerment. 

We cover in-depth on the things that matter to those working within higher education and share news, updates and information from gender bias to fashion and wellbeing.

Our products include a print and digital quarterly magazine, The Academic Woman pin to champion recognition and create a sense of community/family, and monthly webinars and podcast.

Name: Médias en Seine
Description:

Name: Brown Girl Magazine, Inc
Description:
Founded as an online publication in 2008 in Houston, Texas, Brown Girl Magazine is now a multimedia company with a global reach.  

Brown Girl Magazine was created by and for South Asian women who believe in the power of storytelling as a vehicle for community building and empowerment.

Our Mission 

We empower and engage those who identify as South Asian women living in the diaspora with a hyphenated identity.  

Through features, interviews, opinion pieces and videos, you’ll find a variety of topics covered including trending news, politics, entertainment, beauty, lifestyle, love and relationships, religion and culture.

In addition to publishing hundreds of stories online, we have also built an offline network of supporters who attend our local events and help us become a sustainable business.

Our Story

Brown Girl Magazine provides a digital stomping ground for South Asians to share an unabashed platform for self-expression, cultural anchoring, and dialogue.

While our primary focus is to empower and uplift women, we support and ally with all gender identities. Many men have also joined us and the feminist movement, comprising 30 percent of our readership.

Thousand-year-old stigmas and taboos are fiercely chipped away with our diverse content, local and virtual events, and dynamic social media presence.

Our Vision

We will continue to serve as an anchor for South Asians who believe in gender equality by remaining steadfast in publishing multimedia content that provides connectors between our readers and the trailblazers, community leaders, and badass women in our global community.

Name: B2B Medea

Name: Bustld
Description:
Founded in 2016 by husband-and-wife team, Ryan and Samie Roberts, Bustld was developed to be an all-encompassing digital wedding platform that fills in the gaps that previously existed in the industry. Bustld uses a proprietary matching algorithm to pair engaged couples with wedding vendors who are the best fit, not who pays the most to sit at the top of the page. On Bustld’s all-inclusive platform, couples can discover, book and pay wedding vendors in one central location. 

Bustld is an entire family of resources for engaged couples. 

Marketplace: Wedding vendors and couples a like take a wedding quiz that fuels the algorithm to match them to each other based on fit. From there, couples can discover, book and pay wedding vendors all from one central dashboard.

LoveStream: A virtual wedding platform born from the COVID-19 pandemic in March 2020, LoveStream brings couples and their guests together through an easy to use, high-definition wedding livestream. LoveStream has produced more than 400 weddings viewed in more than 125 countries around the globe. 

Every Day I’m Bustlin’: A wedding planning podcast, created to provide insider tips and tricks for the every engaged couple.

View our open jobs here: https://www.lovestream.io/careers

Name: everymum
Description:
Since 2000, we've been helping women through all aspects of their parenting journey, from conception and labour, all the way through to breastfeeding, school, family finances, relationship advice and beyond. We listen carefully to mums in Ireland, to give them what they need to feel supported.

everymum is Ireland's largest and best-loved parenting community with a highly-engaged base of over 200,000 registered members. We have an active online presence of user-led and expert-led content, development emails, competitions, surveys, and a highly engaged social media community; as well as numerous offline touch points including nationwide events, free everymum gift bags distributed via SuperValu.. As part of Zahra Media Group, we're also part of a larger Parenting resource which contains the Ultimate Maternity Guide, and the National Parenting Product Awards.

That’s why everymum is Ireland’s most trusted pregnancy and parenting community for mums.

Name: Techshaw
Description:
Techshaw is a digital media outlet covering Pakistan’s startup economy.

We aspire to be different by bringing you timely narratives, data-driven analysis, and informed opinions. Our core is data, and our aim is to build on that.

No scoops. No breaking news. No clickbait.

Our mission is to inform and inspire by crafting smart narratives. Our goal is to be the most reliable source of information on the startup economy in Pakistan.

More info coming soon!

Name: Curiosity.com
Description:
The award-winning Curiosity Daily podcast from Curiosity.com will help you get smarter about the world around you — every day. In less than 10 minutes, you’ll get a unique mix of research-based life hacks, the latest science and technology news, and more. Discovery’s Cody Gough and Ashley Hamer will help you learn about your mind and body, outer space and the depths of the sea, and how history shaped the world into what it is today.

We hope you make Curiosity Daily part of your daily digital diet. Never stop learning!

Name: A to Z Creatives
Description:
A – Z Creatives is a creative hub based in the heart of Costa Del Brighton. 
Founded by Zoe Sugg and Alfie Deyes our forward-thinking team consists of a collection of social media and project managers, creative producers and branding divisions. 
We are a social media savvy, creative outlet who love nothing more than producing great quality content to assist in taking creators, brands and local businesses from A-Z. 
As the way we consume content continues to change, A-Z Creatives aspires to lead from the forefront of the social media revolution through creating, encouraging and supporting powerful collaborations between creators, brands and businesses.

Name: Mac Admins Podcast

Name: AGRATIME

Name: optikum - Magazin für Augenoptik und Optometrie
Description:
optikum, specialized magazine for eye optics and optometry.

The optikum informs continuously about the subjects of optometry, ophthalmic lens technology, version trends, contact lens optics, low vision, device optics, literature, law and occupational interests.

All articles are freely accessible. The optikum also send an info mail to opticians and technicians every 2-3 weeks. Opticians, optometrists and people from the industry can subscribe the optikum info mail for free.

Name: Celles qui Osent
Description: Celles qui Osent est un webzine faisant à la fois cohabiter des sujets légers, intellectuels et profonds. Nos centres d’intérêt sont divers et variés. À travers CQO, nous souhaitons créer un espace collectif, de proximité, où l’on narre les histoires de femmes aux destinées exceptionnelles, mais aussi les vôtres. Celles qui, avec une formidable énergie, souhaitent partager des idées, des projets, des points de vue : entreprendre, s’investir pour la planète ou pour des causes qui leurs tiennent à cœur. Faire des choses qui ont du sens. Merci à celles qui vont nous lire, nous écouter et nous faire confiance. Rejoignez-nous sur celles-qui-osent.com !

Name: Sassy Media Group
Description: Sassy Media Group is a fast-growing online boutique media company which creates local content for women in cities in Asia, the Middle East and Australia. Our brands are Sassy, Sassy Mama and Sassy Sale. We work with the best brands and businesses in the cities we operate in and have a dynamic team of talented and passionate individuals working with us.

Name: Au delà des frontières
Description:
Bienvenue sur Au delà des frontières, le canal d'expression privilégié de la diaspora.

Nous sommes une chaine Youtube mettant en avant des jeunes qui ont fait le courageux choix de quitter leur pays, familles et amis pour poursuivre un travail ou des études à l'étranger. 

Au travers d'interviews, d'échanges libres et de débats, nous donnons la possibilité à la diaspora de partager leur parcours, leurs expériences, leurs anecdotes et exprimer leur point de vue sur les thématiques de leur quotidien. Car le partage d'informations est la clé de toute évolution.

Embarque avec nous dans de belles aventures, au delà des frontières.

Name: Portada

Portada events and digital media drive Marketing Innovation and are the ideal platform to gain new business for brand marketers and marketing services suppliers. Portada provides marketing service vendors best in-class deliverables, including business development services, public relations and research/insights.


Follow us on Twitter: @portada_online

Description: Plateforme spécialisée dans l'information économique et financière de l'UEMOA

Name: It's a Material World Podcast
Description:
"It's a Material World" is a podcast that uncovers why materials science will change the world. We explore how materials are engineered to make an impact all around you and how they will play an even bigger role in your future. We also invite experts onto the show to share high-level insights on how MSE can make a difference in nearly any industry. The field of materials science and engineering is new and exciting, so hop on board now and you won't get left behind. 

Find us on your favorite podcast platform and give us a try! If you like it, go ahead and subscribe! If you want to meet other passionate materials scientists and engineers and discuss all things MSE, join our Discord community!

Feel free to connect with Daivd Yeh and Punith Upadhya on LinkedIn as well! We'd love to chat with you to discuss the latest breakthroughs in MSE, what you'd like to see from our podcast, and how to get more involved in the field of materials science and engineering.

Name: Raven Intelligence
Description:
Raven Intelligence is a free online community that helps customers select the best Consulting partner for their HR software project and ensure success.  

If you or your organization uses or plans to use SAP SuccessFactors, Workday, Oracle HCM, Cornerstone, ServiceNow or Ultimate Software, Raven Intel can help you better understand your partner options, streamline the Request for Proposal process, and provides you with validated peer reviews of others who have gone through the similar projects.

Choose your partner confidently knowing all of your options.

Name: Teacher Tribe
Description:

Name: jhm
Description:
Le Journal de la Haute-Marne (jhm) est un quotidien d’information lu chaque jour par 100 000 lecteurs sur tout le département.

Fondée en septembre 1944 par Gilbert Bletner, La Haute-Marne Libérée devient Le Journal de la Haute-Marne sous la houlette de son fils, Jean Bletner, qui dirige l’entreprise depuis les années 60.

A cette période, l’entreprise diversifie son activité et comprend, outre l’édition du quotidien, une imprimerie de labeur à Langres (Imprimerie de Champagne) et une imprimerie spécialisée dans l’emballage à Joinville. Le groupe ainsi constitué devient « La Haute-Marne Libérée et Imprimerie de Champagne ».

En 1968, Le journal passe un accord de collaboration avec l'Est Républicain. Les services de vente, de rédaction et de production pour la réalisation sont mis en commun. Les produits de l’exploitation commune et les charges sont portés dans un compte commun et les résultats partagés à 50/50.

Le 7 juillet 1970, une fuite de gaz engendre une explosion qui détruit totalement les locaux de la HML au centre ville de Chaumont. Il y a trois morts, un an plus tard, un incendie ravage l’unité de production de Langres. Ces deux sinistres consécutifs ont des conséquences sur les équilibres financiers de l’entreprise, jusqu’en 1975, où le journal retrouve sa rentabilité, pour toucher aujourd’hui 100 000 des 185 000 habitants de la Haute-Marne.

En 1988, les Editions Crépin Leblond, troisième client de l’Imprimerie de Champagne, intègrent le groupe.

En 1993, La SARL Le Journal de la Haute-Marne est constituée, Jean Bletner en est le Président Directeur Général et Rédacteur en Chef du quotidien. En octobre 2002, la SARL JOURNAL DE LA HAUTE-MARNE passe en SAS avec à sa présidence : Jean Bletner, la Direction Générale étant dorénavant assurée par sa fille, Marie-Jeanne Bletner.

Régulièrement modernisé, gage de son succès, le JHM compte plus de cent salariés, trente journalistes, un réseau de 350 correspondants, 285 vendeurs-colporteurs et 200 diffuseurs.

Name: LATEST THINKING (lt.org)
Description:
Who We Are – About LATEST THINKING

LATEST THINKING is an Open Access Video Journal providing summaries of current research findings covering all academic fields from astronomy to physics, from biology to philosophy. Our original videos are abstracts of peer-reviewed academic publications, brought to you by the authors themselves and embedded in a unique video player which navigates you through the scholar's flow of ideas. Themed clusters and playlists guide you to your areas of interest; reading recommendations and additional information on the scholars and their field of study round off the experience. LATEST THINKING is where scientists share their insights.

 
Why We Do it – Our Vision

We believe that as many people as possible should have access to cutting-edge research. Yet most scientific publications are written for an expert audience only and enshrined behind paywalls. This prevents the interested public from accessing seminal knowledge, let alone, benefitting from it. Thus it is our goal to increase the impact of scientific findings and promote transparency for the sake of progress and innovation in all areas of society.
 

How We Do it – Our Service

We offer a full service for scholars who want to share their findings with the public and boost the outreach of their research with an open access video publication by LATEST THINKING. Our video shootings are crafted to conveniently fit a tight work schedule and the needs of our interviewees: shootings on the spot, a technically sophisticated and fast production process, and a great outreach impact factor. The latter is guaranteed by the Creative Commons Attribution License (CC-BY) which we apply to our videos. We welcome dissemination: Feel free to pass on the knowledge!
