In an increasingly digital world, customers expect to connect with their favorite brands in a matter of clicks and through their preferred channel. Organizations that want to meet their customer where they are, need to keep their finger on the pulse of the CX tech industry.

With a mission to become the number one tech source for CX professionals, CX Scoop covers all aspects of customer experience management to keep you at the forefront of CX innovation.

CX Scoop is a part of Awards International (USA) LLC.

Name: Marvelous.works
Description:
Marvelous.works is a sales outreach and collaborative selling platform for media sales teams. 

We help our partners build trust with brand marketers by communicating relevant value at scale. 

Our team and technology are force multipliers for sales coverage, and deliver returns in the form of new pipeline and increased revenue per seller. We can help companies with complex sales cycles reach ambitious revenue milestones, and are an instant-on force multiplier for your sales team's best-researched outreach. Our media-specialist team does the heavy lifting of prospecting, copy building, target research and deployment; working in parallel with sellers to open new channels of business and achieve revenue targets.

Marvelous is designed to meet the specific challenges faced by sellers working to build consensus, and provide value in increasingly buyer-controlled transactions. 

Partners engage Marvelous because they need increased sales outreach coverage at a high level of quality control. We work best with media companies who have varied properties and offerings, by providing a go-to-market layer for content or creator opportunities, events, franchises, and major tentpoles, matching with ad buying teams across industry categories.
 
Current and past partners: 11:11 Media (Paris Hilton,) Atlas Obscura, Betches, Boston Globe, Blavity, BratTV, Bustle Digital Group, CNET, Collab, Culture Genesis, Daily Mail, Dexerto, Dictionary.com, Doing Things Media, Fatherly, Flipboard, FootballCo, Forbes, Front Office Sports, Future, Gallery Media Group (VaynerX,) Gamurs, Gamesquare, Genius, Group Nine, Gumball/Headgum, Jellysmack, Likewise, LiveOne, MobileFuse, Ogury, Pubity, Ranker, Sanctuary, Sizmek, Sofar Sounds, Spiketrap, The Newsette, The Points Guy, Publishers Clearing House, SPIN, Thought Catalog, Triller, U.S. News & World Report, and Versus.

Name: Careerography
Description:
Careerography was created to help you tap into your full potential to elevate your professional growth 

At Careerography, we're passionate about helping professionals, entrepreneurs, and businesses find work that aligns with their skills, passions, and values, and that brings them a sense of purpose and fulfillment.

We believe that true career success comes from finding work that aligns with your personal brand and values, and that too often people are told to focus on getting a high-paying job or a prestigious title without considering whether or not that job will actually make them happy.

That's why we offer personalized career coaching, top-notch resume and LinkedIn reviews, job search strategy packages, and branding services designed to help individuals and businesses find roles that align with their personal brand and bring them joy and fulfillment. We also provide resources and guidance on how to find work that aligns with your values and makes a positive impact in the world.

At Careerography, we take a unique approach to career development. We believe that it's possible to love your job and achieve success, and we're committed to helping professionals and businesses do just that. We're not just another career coaching company - we're a community of individuals who are passionate about creating a world where work is more than just a job.

Name: Sahel Tribune
Description:
Sahel Tribune est un site d’informations générales, d’analyses, d’enquêtes et de vérification des faits, crée en 2020 au Mali, sous le nom Phileingora. C’est en 2021 que ce nom bascule vers Sahel Tribune afin d’offrir un contenu plus adapté à nos lecteurs et partenaires.

En une année d’existence, Sahel Tribune a produit et publié plus de 1200 articles. Il est visité par près de 20000 utilisateurs actifs, de sa création à nos jours.

La rédaction est basée au Mali, à Baco-Djicoroni ACI. Nous avons également des correspondants à l’intérieur du Mali et dans des pays du sahel qui nous fournissent en temps réels des informations de première main.

Name: CDOTrends
Description:
CDOTrends is Asia’s only content portal dedicated to the needs of the Chief Digital Officer. It shares the latest news, highlights best practices, examines emerging trends and provides an invaluable resource for CDOs and other Business Leaders engaged with a company’s digital & data strategy.  It is also structured to evolve with CDOs, as their own job scopes and responsibilities expand in the digital era.

CDOTrends delivers insight and analysis on key topics related to an enterprise’s future by focusing on six core areas including Digital Strategy, AI & Machine Learning, Customer Experience Management, Digital Privacy, Analytics and our peer inspired leadership insights and case studies on CDOUniversity.

Name: Framtidens E-Handel
Description:
Framtidens E-Handel is the Nordic's largest podcast in retail and e-commerce where the host Björn Påhlman Spenger meets the most interesting people, entrepreneurs, and specialists in the retail and e-commerce industry. 

With the vision to inspire more people to develop successful business ideas, Björn follows the inspiring journeys of the guests, with deep insights into how to build a successful retail business in today's ever-changing business climate.

Name: k-digital
Description: k-digital ist eine Full-Service-Agentur. Wir entwickeln, betreiben und vermarkten redaktionelle Online-Medienangebote der Portale kurier.at, k.at, profil.at, futurezone.at, film.at, events.at, kurier.tv, motor.at und freizeit.at.

Name: Al Poniente
Description:
Al Poniente es un medio de comunicación independiente fundado en el 2013, que nació como un proyecto a largo plazo por un conjunto de académicos, analistas y profesionales apasionados por los distintos temas sociales que puede interesar a una sociedad. Dada su independencia, Al Poniente no está ligado a ningún partido, movimiento, asociación, organización, sindicato o cualquier otra grupo de influencia social o política.

Como un grupo de académicos, analistas y profesionales que somos; nuestro objetivo es dar tanto información sobre los temas de actualidad como generar opinión sobre los diferentes temas que acontecen en nuestra sociedad, todo con el fin de contribuir a su desarrollo.

Name: Briefing Galego
Description:
Briefing Galego nace allá por el año 2009 fruto de la pasión de un grupo de profesionales de la comunicación y la publicidad gallega. Decidimos unir esfuerzos y crear este portal para dar cuenta de las diferentes campañas que se estaban realizando en Galicia.
Somos diseñadores, creativos, periodistas, ilustradores, etc. Un equipo apasionado por nuestra profesión y con ganas de mostrar lo que se cuece en nuestra tierra.

Nuestro portal es un medio de comunicación especializado en la comunicación, la publicidad y el marketing “made in Galicia”, y también es un punto de encuentro entre creativos, anunciantes, agencias, diseñadores, etcétera.

En Briefing Galego publicamos noticias, entrevistas, ofertas de empleo y mostramos los trabajos que nos llegan de profesionales gallegos orgullosos de sus creaciones.

Si quieres contactar con nosotros puedes hacerlo a través de nuestro correo electrónico: info@briefinggalego.com o a través de nuestros perfiles en redes sociales.

Name: Vator
Description:
Vator (short for innovator) is a professional network for entrepreneurs and investors.

Founded and run by veteran and award-winning journalist Bambi Francisco, Vator consists of Vator.tv (soon to be vator.co), one of the largest business networks dedicated to entrepreneurship, VatorNews, Vator's news site focused on the business and trends of high-tech entrepreneurship and innovation. VatorNews has 500-plus contributors. Vator also has a technology platform called Vator Competitions, which is an online competition management system.

Background:

Vator has always been a catalyst for innovation. Since our launch in June 2007, we have been a professional network for ideas and businesses. People initially used Vator to pitch their ideas/businesses through video. Today, people use their company profiles to share their story to the entrepreneur community on Vator as well as the broad community across the vast Web. 

Our goal has always been to help the best entrepreneurs succeed.

Name: BIEN en Périgord
Description: BIEN en Périgord, votre magazine digital, 100% local, 100% positif, 100% gratuit, pour prendre le temps de l'information. Une approche du bien vivre en Périgord, grâce à des rubriques déclinant la production et la consommation locales, le bien-être personnel au travail, l'économie, y compris sociale et solidaire, l'environnement et les ressources naturelles, les séniors et la solidarité intergénérationnelle, l'inclusion...

Name: INFOELLES
Description:
INFOELLES est un espace virtuel de promotion des droits des femmes/filles mais aussi des actions des femmes. Nous intervenons autour de Six (6) axes stratégiques: Droits et VBG, Santé Sexuelle et Reproductive, Développement Durable, le leadership Féminin, Entreprenariat et la Masculinité Positive en utilisant les moyens de communication. 

Si les contributions des femmes sont mieux reconnues et comprises dans le monde réel, on ne peut pas en dire autant dans les médias d’information. Les médias jouent un rôle essentiel et font plus qu’informer, ils reflètent nos sociétés et leurs fonctionnements. Ils jouent un rôle sur notre manière de percevoir la société, façonnent notre vision que l’on porte sur celle-ci et permettent la formation de nos catégories de jugement.

Mais souvent les femmes ne font pas souvent l’objet de nouvelles et le peu de femmes qui occupent les sphères politiques et décisionnelles n’occupent pas assez la scène médiatique. Des pratiques qui contribuent à ancrer les images stéréotypées dans l’inconscient collectif, et à figer la place des femmes dans la société. En tant qu’instances de représentation, les médias ont un rôle à jouer pour lutter contre ce type d’inégalités.

INFOELLES veut utiliser les médias pour participer à la lutte pour la réduction des inégalités, la lutte pour les droits des femmes. Nous allons également promouvoir le leadership féminin, l’entreprenariat, les Objectifs de Développement Durable. Le média va aussi faire la promotion des actions des femmes, des filles mais aussi la masculinité positive. 

Le site web dispose d’une chaîne You Tube INFOELLES TV

Nous sommes présents sur ces réseaux sociaux:

Twitter : @infoelles

Facebook: @InfoElles

LinkedIn: infoelles.org

Instagram: Info.elles

Name: Imagine a Place
Description: Presented by OFS, Imagine a Place Productions gathers industry-leading voices that have the power to inspire the design community through storytelling and broaden our creative horizons. The goal of Imagine a Place Productions is to further elevate the belief that the places we make and the ways we design them matter in our lives.

Name: FOOD DRINK & INNOVATIONS
Description:
Food – Drink & innovations, India’s 1st monthly webzine/ e-zine on food industry. It gives valuable insights on the recent trends & innovations happening globally. It also offers an entirely new paradigm of contents and advertising options & hence revolutionizing the traditional publishing trends.

From creating quality contents which are fresh, unique & up-to-date to integrating vibrant video media, it provides a high degree of interactivity and offer value for money.

Name: Stash Media Inc.
Description:
The only streaming platform for #motiondesign, #animation, and #VFX. 
Grab a FREE trial or subscribe: http://stashmedia.tv/archive/

The Stash Permanent Collection provides an essential and constantly growing creative resource to studios, agencies, broadcasters, freelancers, brands, and schools in over 50 countries.

Name: Sam Teale Productions
Description:
Sam Teale Productions began in 2020 with one camera, a bedroom set-up and a clear purpose: to create powerful, purpose-driven films that make a real impact. What started as a one-person idea has grown into one of Yorkshire’s leading video production agencies, working with national and global brands and earning recognition for creativity and meaningful storytelling.

Our mission is simple. We tell stories that matter. Every decision reflects this, from the clients we work with to the way we develop our team. Our approach is rooted in purpose-led storytelling, sustainable growth and social responsibility.

Our team of eleven talented creatives has an average age of just 24, with many joining at the start of their careers. We give them real responsibility from day one, whether shooting for brands like Budweiser, editing NHS campaigns or pitching ideas directly to clients.

Our portfolio spans local SMEs and charities through to global brands including Greene King, Accu, Brymec, Budweiser, Coop, Maxwellia and NHS Trusts. We bring the same passion to every project because powerful storytelling can create impact at any scale.

In 2022, we produced The Go-Kart, a self-funded Christmas film that reached over 40 million people and featured across major broadcasters and national press, proving that authentic storytelling cuts through the noise.

At our core, we are a team of passionate storytellers driven by creativity, purpose and Yorkshire grit. From a bedroom start-up to a nationally recognised agency, we champion stories that connect on a deeply human level.

We make magic.

Name: Metacept | Communicating the Law
Channel Partners Online
Description:
The Channel Partners portfolio of media, events and awards offers business strategy, research, case studies and community engagement, all designed to help channel practitioners build world-class organizations ideally positioned to help their customers make the most of digital transformation.

Technology vendors look to the highly anticipated Channel Partners events to meet with partners and advance their businesses. The Channel Partners Conference & Expo is the industry’s largest independent channel event and MSP Summit helps MSPs accelerate growth and maximize business value among partners, suppliers and customers.

Name: BlockBlog
Description: BlockBlog.fr | News, Guides, Avis & Tutoriels pour s’Informer et Démarrer Facilement #Blockchain #Bitcoin #Ethereum #Monero #Altcoins #Crypto

Name: News Revenue Hub
Description:
We are a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization that works with news outlets to develop stronger business models and more loyal audiences. We help our clients become sustainable, allowing them to fight misinformation, keep the public informed, and hold elected leaders accountable.

Since our founding in 2017, we’ve helped raise $70 million for public service journalism.

Name: Tradeoffs
Description:
Tradeoffs is an award-winning nonprofit news organization on a mission to help America have smarter, more honest health policy conversations.

Tradeoffs explores into the toughest choices in health care, diving into issues like the cost of care, health equity, insurance, mental health and artificial intelligence. We connect policy to practice, uncovering the data and personal stories that help audiences understand the stakes — and the potential solutions.

Learn more at tradeoffs.org

Name: Sahara Reporters Media Group
Description:
SaharaReporters.com is a groundbreaking citizen reporters’ movement with the mission to institute transparency and accountability in Africa’s government. The forum’s goal is to empower all citizens of African nations to defend their democratic rights.  

Launched in 2006, Sahara Reporters now attracts a very loyal following.  With over 18.9MM visits and 3.3MM unique visitors in 2011, the movement continues to grow in popularity because of its uncensored accounts of corruption and key political events in Africa.

Apart from serving as an indispensable watchdog for African governments, Sahara Reporters also follows the mainstream media. In 2011, Sahara Reporters launched an online Television Station - SaharaTVOnline.com.

Name: Nivéales / Cie des Médias
Description:
Nivéales / Cie des Médias c’est :
* L'éditeur de référence pour les sports de montagne et l’outdoor.
* Le meilleur de la presse magazine "montagne et outdoor" avec 8 titres (print, digital) leaders sur les univers : Skieur, Montagnes Magazine, Grimper, Vertical, Snow Surf, Wider, Big Bike, Echappée Vélo
* Le 1er réseau digital multi-sports de la presse magazine spécialisée
* Une équipe dynamique de 20 personnes

Name: The Patient Story
Description:
It’s cancer. What’s next? The Patient Story humanizes every cancer diagnosis by helping patients, caregivers, and survivors tell their personal experience story. 
In-depth interviews, FAQs, and timelines give the first-hand account of what it’s really like after receiving a diagnosis. Visit our website to learn more or share your story.

Name: Signal Awards
Description: The Signal Awards are mission-focused on uplifting the podcast medium by recognizing the most potent, meaningful and unprecedented audio projects being made today.

Name: Bizpal s.r.l. gruppo Italiaonline
Description:
Bizpal è il contact center di Italiaonline, la più grande Internet Company Italiana proprietaria, tra gli altri, dei marchi: Pagine Gialle, Pagine Bianche, Libero, Virgilio, DiLei, Buonissimo, SiViaggia, QuiFinanza.

Come società forniamo soluzioni per le imprese in ottica B2B in ambito Customer Care, Digital Assistance e Sales & Marketing, riferendoci esclusivamente ai clienti Italiaonline.
Offriamo un portafoglio completo di servizi e soluzioni digitali che contribuiscono a rafforzare la presenza pubblicitaria delle imprese sulle varie piattaforme e supporti. Il nostro focus è orientato all’assistenza Clienti e al problem solving. L’esperienza acquisita in ambito Customer Care ci permette di offrire un valido supporto ai nostri partner nel miglioramento della customer experience. Effettuiamo ricerche, sondaggi e interviste con l’obiettivo di pianificare, creare e gestire campagne di web marketing, social Facebook e Google AdWords.
Il nostro organico è composto da più di 200 persone, un gruppo eterogeneo di colleghi accomunati da un obbiettivo comune: curare il cliente e metterlo al centro dei servizi. Una mission che parte dall’evoluzione digitale e dall’importanza della presenza delle attività sui portali online di casa madre per una maggiore connessione tra le aziende italiane e i loro clienti.

Name: Hackney Page
Description: Hackney

Name: Mumbai Uncensored
Description:
Cheers to a new beginning and supporting authentic and factual news!

Mumbai Uncensored, founded in 2014, has grown from an Instagram community supporting artists and photographers to a magnanimous Media & News Company!

This wouldn't have been possible without the support of 77,000 Family Members on Instagram, who used our Hashtag #Mumbai_Uncensored for 9,43,000 times! It's huge guys!

Name: The Folks of Delhi NCR
Description: The Folks of Delhi NCR is a team of storytellers who Focus on the journey of individuals, showing our readers that each and every person is unique, inspirational, and relatable. We believe in the power of Social Network and We are  talking about peoples.

Name: Dis-leur !
Description:
Dis-Leur ! est le site d’information sur la région #Occitanie. Dossiers et enquêtes - Entretiens exclusifs - Reportages. Décryptage. 

Du journalisme en immersion. Du journalisme de solution. Toujours positif.  C’est le magazine que nous, journalistes, aurions aimé lire. C’est celui que nous aimerions vous faire lire le plus longtemps possible. Nous voulons renouer avec le lecteur en occupant pleinement notre rôle de média, de lien avec la population.

Dis-leur ! est composé de journalistes et chroniqueurs. Ce site s’appuie par ailleurs sur un comité de lecteurs. Nous proposons régulièrement plusieurs sujets d’enquête et de reportage à nos lecteurs. Nous nous engageons d’une part à les réaliser dès que possible mais aussi à traiter ces sujets au long cours en y apportant des solutions.

Notre objectif : prendre de la distance avec l’actu chaude, la "bfmisation" des esprits qui survole 50 sujets à l’heure, en privilégiant le plaisir de lecture, la découverte d’une info bien traitée qui a une incidence sur son quotidien. C’est un journalisme de rupture. Instructif plutôt qu’exhaustif.

Olivier Schlama & Philippe Mouret, 
journalistes professionnels qui aiment et diffusent de la belle ouvrage.

Name: Earth.com Inc
Description:
As a caring citizen of our planet, you may have found yourself wishing for THE website that aggregates everything you need to know about this big blue ball. Founded in 2016, Earth.com delivers unique news and information from a top-notch team of writers and editors, with a focus on nature, science, and the environment. We are committed to providing stimulating, original content with the goal of educating the public about this amazing planet we call Earth.

Part news site, part encyclopedia, Earth.com is also home to a vast trove of information regarding life on our planet. We have cataloged every known plant and animal from the Agave to the Zebra, in order to provide a functioning reference library to satiate your curiosity or assist in research projects. Our image and video galleries include remarkable satellite imagery of the blue planet as well as scientific findings and experiments.

Another special feature of our site is an area devoted specifically to following the plight of species with Endangered status. We place great importance on providing the latest conservation news, photos, and facts.

Looking for earth-friendly products? Earth.com’s shop is a great resource for thousands of sustainable items for everyday living. From laundry detergent to lightbulbs to lawnmowers, we’re the one-stop-shop for the eco-conscious.

Say goodbye to having 20 news tabs open every morning, and say hello to Earth.com – your planet’s first home on the web.

Name: Renée Prod.
Description:
Renée Prod. est un studio de production durable.

Toutes nos créations sonores sont liées de près et de loin à l'environnement et au développement durable. Des structures publiques comme privées font appel à Renée Prod. pour des projets audiovisuels (podcast ou vidéo) grand public et/ou spécialisé. 

De l'écriture du projet à sa diffusion, en passant par l'enregistrement et le montage, Renée Prod. s'occupe de tout :)

Name: Travel2Latam
Description: Travel2Latam is an online publication founded in 2014 that includes daily updated information for professionals of the travel and tourism industry. The trilingual independent platform (English,Portuguese and Spanish) is composed of a daily update website, a weekly news bulletin, "Branded Content", e-Mail Marketing and Social Media.

Name: Schreinersicht.ch
Description: DIE Onlineplattform mit Stellenmarkt, Fachinformationen, Neuheiten, Tipps und Lieferantenverzeichnis.

Name: The Examination
Description:
The Examination is an independent donor-funded news organization founded with the understanding that information is a public health necessity, and that there is a critical deficit in information about preventable health crises responsible for more than a third of global deaths, and unimaginable human suffering.

Our team of award-winning journalists is on a mission to help bridge the knowledge gap, delivering powerful, fact-driven reporting that demands positive change. We believe our reporting can play a vital role in improving lives — and even saving them.

Each year, tens of millions of people get sick, or die, from maladies linked to toxic products, poor nutrition, pollution and other health hazards. These often-ignored health disasters are concentrated in poor and marginalized communities that can least bear the cost. 

Our reporting seeks to define, describe and even begin to close this health equity gap, through fact-driven, independent journalism that exposes those most responsible — and amplifies the voices of those most harmed. 

We cover big tobacco, big food, polluting industries and more.

Name: Capital B
Description: Capital B is a nonprofit local/national news organization for Black audiences. Cofounded by veteran news leaders Lauren Williams and Akoto Ofori-Atta, Capital B deliver quality, trustworthy, original reporting to Black people across the country.

Name: Vancouver Is Awesome
Description: Lifestyle media publication dedicated to sharing stories of the people, places and things that make Vancouver, BC, Canada an awesome place to live.

Name: TunnelContact.com
Description:
FOCUSED Networking. INFORMATIVE. Tunneling NOW, Tunnelling LIVE.

TunnelContact.com is the networking platform for tunnel and underground space  professionals. Once you join TunnelContact.com, you will find yourself in a not-so-crowded, but in a very focused community which will provide you with more resourceful networking and career improvement opportunities. 

Tunneling NOW.
Tunneling LIVE.

Our platform provides you with the dynamic side of tunneling with current international news. Whether it is over tunnel jobs, tunnel construction tenders, construction news, tunnel technology news, academic articles; you will certainly find all aspects of tunneling in a centralized place at TunnelContac.com.

For more information, please visit TunnelContact.com

Name: Zéro Virgule
Description:
Pourquoi travaillons-nous ? La justice sociale et la démocratie peuvent-elles être instaurées en entreprise ? Comment sortir de la spirale de la souffrance des employés ? Peut-on s’accomplir dans son emploi ? Comment agir, comment réagir face aux dérives managériales ?…

Autant de questions, et bien d’autres, que le podcast Zéro Virgule se propose de poser à celles et ceux qui pensent le travail.

Name: Profession Bien-Être
Description:
Profession Bien-Être est un média professionnel (numéro de commission paritaire : 0126 X 95253), qui décode l'univers de la coiffure, de l’esthétique et du bien-être avec des infos fiables, vérifiées et utiles pour vos métiers. Mais bien plus qu’un média, nous sommes aussi votre allié pour booster votre vie d’entrepreneur ! 

Chaque jour, nous vous servons un cocktail d’infos fraîches et exclusives : actus économiques (mais pas que !), analyses et conseils pratiques pour dynamiser votre marché, optimiser votre gestion, suivre l’actualité juridique et booster votre salon ou votre institut de beauté. Une offre quotidienne unique dans la presse professionnelle de nos secteurs.

Et ce n’est pas tout… Toujours à l’affût de l’innovation, nous décortiquons les dernières études scientifiques sur la peau, le cheveu et le bien-être, sans oublier les nouveautés en coiffure, barbering, esthétique, ongles, maquillage, relaxation et massages.

Et parce qu'être entrepreneur dans la beauté ou le bien-être, ce n'est pas seulement se focaliser sur la rentabilité et les chiffres, nous mettons aussi l'accent sur votre épanouissement personnel. En scrutant la presse internationale, nous vous proposons des articles, interviews et analyses inspirantes pour vous aider à mobiliser tous vos atouts et réussir sur tous les fronts.

Vivez l’info autrement et faites le plein d’expertise avec Profession Bien-Être !

Name: eMobility Türkiye
Description:
Arabalardan, otobüslere, kamyonlardan tırlara her taşıt ulaşım deneyimine dönüşecek. Gelin değişime bizimle tanık olun. Otonom sürüş, akıllı enerji yönetimi ve kullanıcı yaşam entegrasyonu ile ilgili her şey burada.

Everything from cars, buses, trucks changes into mobility experience. Come witness the change. Everything about autonomous driving, smart energy management and user life integration is here.

Name: H2H24
Description: H2H24 est un blog et une web TV avec des reportages et des interviews sur l'actualité de l'hydrogène. Chaque mois, retrouvez des émissions de 7 minutes chrono autour de la thématique H2, un des leviers pour agir pour la transition énergétique.

Name: Inilah.com
Description:
Inilah.com merupakan inovasi media pertama di Indonesia yang mengusung konsep jurnalisme solusi.

Selain menghadirkan berita dan konten terkurasi yang berfokus pada problem-solving, inilah.com juga menjadi platform yang memungkinkan penggunanya untuk mempublikasikan berita dan konten sekaligus berperan aktif untuk ikut menyelesaikan permasalahan-permasalahan yang sedang menjadi perbincangan publik.

inilah.com menghubungkan pembacanya dengan jurnalis, pembuat konten, komunitas, pemerintah, bisnis, dan akademisi untuk ikut menuntaskan berbagai permasalahan di tengah masyarakat.

Name: SolarQuotes
Description:
Helping Australians Get Quality Solar – Without the Bull

SolarQuotes was founded in 2009 to make it easier for Australians to get solar power systems they won’t regret. We’ve helped over 850,000 households get quotes from vetted installers, and we’ve published thousands of guides, reviews and articles to cut through the confusion and marketing fluff that still surrounds solar, batteries, EV chargers and more.

We don’t sell systems. We don’t take kickbacks (just charge a flat fee per lead). We connect homeowners with good people who do good work – and give them the tools to make smart decisions.

What makes us different?

We only work with installers who meet strict quality, customer service, and transparency standards.

We never auction leads to the highest bidder – it’s about quality, not quantity.

Our advice is honest, independent, and backed by data. If something’s a rip-off or a furphy, we’ll say so.

Who uses SolarQuotes?

Households who want reliable solar and battery quotes from trustworthy local installers.

Industry professionals who value long-term customers over fast churn.

Media and policymakers who need accurate, plain-English insights into clean energy trends in Australia.

Want to partner, write for us, or join the team?

We’re always keen to work with people who care about doing solar properly.

Name: IntermodalNews.eu
Description: IntermodalNews.eu is an independent online title dedicated to intermodal transport. We are focused on European issues but also cover key developments in the nearby regions.

Name: Cyprus Bar Association News & Related Updates
Description:
news, updates, circulars and anything of interest to lawyers pertaining to Cyprus.
Email : legalupdatescy@gmail.com

Name: IndigenBiz
Description:
Indigenbiz:  Stories that inspire a nation across the traditional Indigenous lands of Turtle Island and beyond.

Founder Steven McCoy offers Indigenous liaison & advisory services, workshop training and facilitation and business and economic development consulting through his business Gencity Incorporated.  Visit his personal profile, company page or website (gencity.ca) for more details or email info@gencity.ca to get in contact with his team.

"The INDIGENBIZ logo is a registered trademark owned by Steven McCoy and INDIGENBIZ is a trademark owned by Steven McCoy"

Name: Usaha Rumahan
Description:

I servizi informativi offerti da EFA News, basati sulla specificità delle tematiche trattate, portano evidenti vantaggi in termini di costi/efficacia. Ricorrere ad una qualsiasi agenzia di stampa non specializzata per ottenere le stesse informazioni significa affrontare costi estremamente più elevati, essere costretti a filtrare le notizie di interesse separandole da quelle concernenti tutti i restanti settori con evidente perdita di tempo e praticità di impiego e, inoltre, rinunciando ad una descrizione e ad un’analisi fortemente basata su criteri di competenza del settore e perciò precisa e affidabile.

Learning and Growing Successfully Together

Launched June 1, 2016, Daily Hive is the evolution of Vancity Buzz and Calgary Buzz, with newsrooms now in Vancouver, Toronto, Montreal, and Calgary.

In 2008, Vancity Buzz was created in a South Vancouver basement by two childhood friends. The concept was to provide compelling Vancouver-centric content that would result in connecting Vancouverites to their city. Growth was slow at first, but persistence was key.

Years of progress paired with dedication to social media enabled our expansion into the Calgary market in 2015. Since January 2016, our Vancouver and Calgary sites have been averaging a total of over 7.5 million page views per month. This has made us the largest digital-only publication in Western Canada.

Which brings us to now. As we expand across Canada adding newsrooms in Toronto and Montreal, we are translating our experience in Vancouver and Calgary to provide millennials in other urban centres with a hyper-local digital content experience. This is your city.

Como estruturo a minha mensagem? Que vestuário usar? Como editar os meus vídeos? De forma forma posso atrair a audiência certa? 

Olá eu sou a Mariana Figueira da Silva, Criadora do conceito: vídeo empresarial humanizado | Especialista pioneira em comunicação humanizada | Foco: O Ser além do Parecer | Posso ajudar a transformar visualizações dos teus vídeos em clientes | Academia de Treino | Workshops para equipas e Cursos online 

Vídeos humanizados impulsionam conversões!

Muitos profissionais enfrentam bloqueios ao gravar vídeos, apesar de estarem habituados a falar em grandes plateias. 

Dar a cara nos vídeos é um passo incrivelmente poderoso para criar transparência e conexões autênticas com o público. Mostrar a tua paixão, o teu rosto e a tua voz é uma forma cativante de humanizar a tua marca e construir confiança.

O meu papel é ajudar a que te libertes de forma a que consigas comunicar com eficácia. Juntos podemos desconstruir a rigidez que muitas vezes está presente no mundo empresarial e abrir portas para uma comunicação mais humana e envolvente.

Mariana Figueira da Silva
Fundadora

Les voix que vous entendez sont celles de ceux qui ont posés leurs valises à des milliers de kilomètres de leur terre natale, et certains de ces voyageurs regrettent parfois ce « sacrifice » et mais d’autres, considèrent leur « exil » comme une délivrance. Par le récit sincère de leurs parcours, ils partagent avec vous, leurs rêves, leurs idéaux et même leurs angoisses. Ils se livrent sans filtre pour que leurs témoignages les survivent et inspirent ceux qui comme vous prennent le temps de les écouter.

Con cadenza settimanale, un tema caldo del panorama energetico-ambientale viene sviluppato attraverso un’analisi principale e tre (o più) approfondimenti volti a coprirne i diversi e principali aspetti. Completano il numero settimanale un’intervista ad esponenti istituzionali o personaggi autorevoli e/o un eventuale articolo a cura di uno degli Sponsor di RiEnergia: contributi volti ad offrire al Lettore ulteriori punti di vista e interpretazioni sul tema.

Name: S.P.E.A.K
Description:
In an environment that is all about noise, what will the world be like if we were speaking powerfully to people who are listening consciously, in an environment which were actually fit for purpose. 

What will the world be like if we were creating sound consciously and consuming sound consciously and designing all our environments consciously for sound. 

That will be a world that will sound beautiful and one where understanding will be the norm. 

Now that is an idea worth spreading! 

This is the vision behind S.P.E.A.K Podcast. We're not just another podcast; we're on a mission to revolutionize the way we create, consume, and design sound. Our goal is to craft a world where every word matters, where every voice is heard, and where communication transcends noise. 

Join us on this remarkable journey where we explore the power of conscious speaking and listening. Together, we'll reshape the landscape of sound and clarity. 

If you're passionate about the art of communication, the magic of storytelling, and the beauty of understanding, then you're in the right place. S.P.E.A.K Podcast is here to inspire, empower, and transform the way we connect through sound. 

Stay tuned for thought-provoking episodes, captivating stories, and conversations that matter. Let's pioneer a world of clarity, one podcast at a time.

Name: VertMarkets, Inc.
Description:
Whether it’s through our print and online publications, an industry event, professional training course, or custom research, VertMarkets’ mission remains the same: to facilitate professional connections among our readers and partners to help achieve extraordinary business results.

VertMarkets created the Follow Your Buyer methodology to help B2B companies attract, influence, and establish loyalty among their customers throughout the entire buyer’s journey. Following Your Buyer means helping a customer accomplish an outcome, not selling a customer your product or service. 

We focus on the following markets: Bio and Clinical Research, Pharmaceutical Manufacturing, Photonic and RF Component Manufacturing, Water and Waste Water Treatment, Energy Production, Food Manufacturing, IT, Retail, and Healthcare.

Our core principles are centered around the belief that we must be the most helpful, effective, ready to lead, & professional we can be — to our customers, readers, community, & each other.

We put others’ interests before our own.
We ask “what can I do?” not “what can I get?”
We work to understand what is needed, then we actually help.
We seek to understand before seeking to be understood.
We understand that the value of our work is measured by the
Benefit to Others x Quality x Efficiency.
We embrace challenges and problems and we figure it out.
We see failure as an often inevitable and valuable step on the path to success.
We focus on desired outcomes, not tactics.
We celebrate the achievements of our team and teammates.
We innovate constantly.
We persistently seek a better solution.
We are open-minded and seek divergent thinking.
We are insatiably curious.

Name: The Tyee
Description:
The Tyee is an award-winning, independent online news magazine. We're dedicated to publishing lively, informative news and views, not dumbed down fluff. We, like the tyee salmon for which we are named, roam free and go where we wish.

At the time of our launch we said we believe many people in British Columbia are "hungry for news and comment that reflects their actual lives, their own values." And that an electronic magazine able to reach all of B.C. was needed "because 'The Big Smoke' of Vancouver/Victoria hears too little from the rest of the province and together we have plenty of challenges and solutions to talk about." We promised: "At The Tyee you'll find investigative reporting no one else is doing, and fresh viewpoints from all over B.C."

Since then, The Tyee has attracted some of the best journalists in B.C. who have broken many important stories. We've published viewpoints banished from corporate media and shined a light on corners of the province Big Media ignores. We've provided a showcase for young talent and a forum for readers who post their opinions after our stories. The Globe and Mail has said we publish "some of the best investigative reporting in the province" and when the Senate Committee on the status of Canadian news media came to Vancouver, they invited Tyee editors to share their vision of improved media democracy. Help us keep independent media alive. Visit http://thetyee.ca today.

Description:

Écoutant beaucoup de podcasts et ayant moi aussi envie d'amener ma pierre à l'édifice, il m'a semblé que ce format serait idéal pour continuer ces échanges, et pour demander à des acteurs du secteur, qu'ils soient CSMs, Managers, Sales, Insight analysts, prestataires ou clients de partager leur expérience.

Chaque semaine je vous propose donc de découvrir, sur votre plateforme de podcast préférée, une 30aine de minutes d'échange avec l'un de ces acteurs, qui viendra partager son expérience, ses bonnes pratiques et des conseils activables pour votre activité.

On parlera scale, growth, renewal, recrutement, démarrage d'une practice CS, relation avec les sales, support, valeur, satisfaction client et plein d'autres choses avec des personnes qui travaillent aussi bien dans des grandes entreprises où l'activité CS est très structurée que dans des plus petites structures qui n'ont pas les mêmes ressources.

Name: Henpicked
Description:
Henpicked is one of the UK’s largest, fastest-growing websites for women who weren’t born yesterday. We’re here to give women a place to have their say, sparking discussion, promoting healthy debate and, we hope, bringing about positive change.

Here, you’ll find inspirational life stories, tips and advice for happiness, health and wealth, plus competitions and offers and recommended products and services.

We believe that all the strong, kind, funny and wise women should be celebrated, and Henpicked is here to help us help each other… making our lives better, happier and more fulfilled.

Henpicked is the story of two dynamic communities coming together, creating a vibrant, welcoming place for women to find inspiration through their shared stories.

Totally4women was founded by the late Carolyn Lazarus in 2012 and her legacy of reaching out to all women in a kind and compassionate manner lives on through this new site.

Her vision, passion and determination helped to raise the profile of women’s issues and provided a wonderful, welcoming community for women everywhere.

Henpicked started in 2013 as a place for women to take their conversations from the coffee shop out into the wider world, sharing their wisdom and offering guidance, support and tips on a wide range of topics.

And, because we’re here to support, not to compete, we’ve joined forces. We promise you integrity, honesty and openness – we’re not here to preach, dismiss others’ opinions or tell anyone what to do. And while we’re mostly a community for women over 40, we’re very happy for younger women, or men interested in our subjects, to get involved too.

Join us to read all the latest news and views, share your stories, tell us what you think and discover the power of women supporting women.

But most of all, we hope you enjoy Henpicked!

We're here too: http://henpicked.net and https://menopauseintheworkplace.co.uk

«Money Review»: Η νέα οικονομική και επιχειρηματική ιστοσελίδα για όλους, με τη σφραγίδα της «Καθημερινής»


«Ο χρόνος είναι χρήμα. Γι’ αυτό μπες ΤΩΡΑ στο moneyreview.gr»

Το moneyreview.gr, η νέα πηγή live ενημέρωσης των «Καθημερινών Εκδόσεων», είναι online από την Τετάρτη 2 Δεκεμβρίου. Στοχεύει στην ενδελεχή, διεισδυτική ενημέρωση γύρω από τις εξελίξεις που αφορούν την επιχειρηματικότητα και τις επενδύσεις, το χρηματιστήριο και τις αγορές, τα δημόσια οικονομικά και τη φορολόγηση, την εργασία, τον τουρισμό, τις νέες τεχνολογίες και την ενέργεια. Συγχρόνως, προσεγγίζει με μια φρέσκια ματιά την πολιτική, την κοινωνία, την ποιότητα ζωής και τον ελεύθερο χρόνο. 

«Επένδυσε στην σωστή πληροφόρηση με το moneyreview.gr»
Επιστρατεύοντας μια δυναμική ομάδα καταρτισμένων δημοσιογράφων, εξειδικευμένων στους βασικούς τομείς της ελληνικής και διεθνούς οικονομίας, αποσκοπεί στην ακρίβεια και αξιοπιστία, μέσα από εκτενή ειδησεογραφία, χρηστικές πληροφορίες, πρωτογενείς αναλύσεις και ρεπορτάζ, συνεντεύξεις, newsletters, videos και podcasts. 
Το moneyreview.gr δημιουργήθηκε για να αποτελέσει ένα απολύτως πρακτικό, χρηστικό εργαλείο αναπόσπαστο από την καθημερινότητα του επενδυτή και του επιχειρηματία, του εργαζόμενου και του επαγγελματία, αλλά και του νέου που τελειώνει τις σπουδές του και ξεκινά τη σταδιοδρομία του.
«Your business is our business. Ενημερώσου τώρα στο moneyreview.gr»
 
Το εγχείρημα επιδιώκει να συντελέσει στην ανάδειξη της ιδιωτικής πρωτοβουλίας και στην ενίσχυση της υγιούς επιχειρηματικής κουλτούρας, παρακολουθώντας τις σύγχρονες τάσεις σε όλους τους τομείς που διαμορφώνουν την καθημερινότητα ανδρών και γυναικών με ενδιαφέρον για τον πυρήνα των εξελίξεων στην οικονομία.

Το moneyreview.gr είναι μια πρωτοβουλία του ομίλου της «Καθημερινής», η οποία ιδρύθηκε από τον Γεώργιο Α. Βλάχο και το πρώτο της φύλλο κυκλοφόρησε στις 15 Σεπτεμβρίου 1919.

Name: The New York Sun
Description:
The New York Sun is home to the finest traditions of American journalism.

Credited as “one of the most influential American newspapers,” The Sun was founded in 1833 and ran for over 100 years as a Pulitzer-winning independent daily until its merger with The New York World-Telegram in 1950. In 2002, The Sun was relaunched as The New York Sun under the leadership of Editor-in-Chief Seth Lipsky and competed with The New York Times for seven years as a leading daily print newspaper. 

In the coming months, we’ll be re-making the Sun’s web properties and, together with longtime proprietor and editor, Seth Lipsky, expanding its much admired coverage of politics, culture, and the arts. In its editorials, the Sun will pursue its focus on constitutionalism, equality under the law, and American values.  

We’ll also be developing the Sun’s unique community, with new opportunities to engage and participate in the conversation. 

In 188 years of history, the Sun has always resisted the herd mentality and demonstrated a willingness to stand apart. Today, amid record public distrust in news media, we’re confident that you’ll find our unique, principles-based journalism to be an indispensable addition to your day.

Name: Les Adultes de Demain
Description:
Convaincu que pour changer le monde tout commence par l’enfance, je donne la voix à des personnalités variées qui partagent leur expertise pour réinventer ensemble l’enfance et l’éducation.

Mes missions ?
 Changer le regard des adultes sur l'enfance et l'adolescence
 Soutenir les parents et les pro de l’enfance / l’éducation
 Informer pour mieux éduquer
 Remettre l’enfance et la jeunesse au cœur des priorités de notre société
 Anticiper les thèmes qui seront clés pour le monde de demain
 Lutter contre toutes formes de violence vis-à-vis des enfants

Aujourd’hui, les Adultes de demain, c’est :
 Plus de 2 millions d’écoutes
 4,9/5 sur Apple Podcast et Spotify
 1 livre "Offrir le meilleur aux enfants" publié chez Hatier
 4 podcasts produits
︎ Des dizaines de sponsors
︎ + de 200 grandes personnalités interviewées : Isabelle Filliozat, Boris Cyrulnik, André Stern, Catherine Gueguen, Héloïse Junier...

J’ai trouvé mon chemin et je suis plus convaincue que jamais :
Les enfants et les jeunes ont tant à nous enseigner.
Leur voix compte et par ce podcast, je souhaite leur donner le pouvoir qu’ils méritent dans notre société.

Mais soyons honnêtes, la société ne prend pas au sérieux nos enfants, les oublie, les discrimine.
Et seule derrière mon micro, même avec les invités les plus engagés du monde, je n’arriverai pas à changer les lignes.

Alors j’ai besoin de vous, les enfants ont besoin de nous :
 Abonnez-vous au podcast, partagez-le !
 Suivez-le sur Instagram et Linkedin :)
 Si vous travaillez dans l'éducation et l'activisme, échangeons ensemble !
 Si vous êtes un studio podcast, une marque, un média ou une asso et que vous souhaitez m'aider à faire grandir ce message, écrivez-moi à stephaniedesclaibes@gmail.com.

Faisons de notre ère celle de nos enfants.
Rétablissons les liens essentiels entre les générations.
C’est avec eux, et pas sans eux, que nous surmonterons les défis de notre siècle.
Ce combat est le mien. Vive l'enfance !

Name: AgroPortal Bulgaria
Description:
AgroPortal is a modern, reliable and comprehensive information platform for the current situation on the markets of main grain and oilseed crops in the Black Sea region, the Balkans, Bulgaria, Europe and the world. The main focus is on news, analyses and prices of milling and feed wheat, corn, sunflower, rapeseed, barley, soybeans, as well as their byproducts – meals, oils, DDGS, bran, etc. 
AgroPortal’s strive for constant improvement and expansion of services provided to make all agribusiness operators successful is clearly apparent in the trust it receives from its ever-growing client and partner base. As organizer of the annual Grain Academy international conference in Varna, Bulgaria and EuroGrain Hub Exchange&Forum in Bucharest in April 2023, that have become one of the most important events in the grain production and trade sector on the Balkans, AgroPortal has continuously demonstrated its ability to deliver world-class experiences.

The subscribers of AgroPortal use in full the platform features such as:
•	Full listing of agri commodities futures quotes on the global exchanges in Paris (MATIF) and Chicago (CME / CBOT) in real-time.

Our patented platform streams high-resolution art into playlists that mirror various themes such as seasons, moods, times of the day, and colors. This unique approach creates a dynamic and engaging atmosphere for both guests and employees. Furthermore, we offer the flexibility to customize art curation based on specific preferences, ensuring a tailored fit for your brand and space.

Beyond aesthetics, Loupe Art provides a cost-effective and sustainable solution that can significantly impact employee well-being, brand perception, and guest satisfaction.

Name: Sustainababbels
Description:
Two out of three consumers in the world prefer a sustainable product over a non-sustainable variant. And that number is most likely to grow in the years that follow. 

Sustainability is not a trend. It's a growing demand of consumers all over the world. And it's here to stay.

And it's not just the need for sustainable products and services that is growing. Consumers are also better informed, more resourceful and thus more skeptical than ever. This creates some daunting challenges for existing and new brands on the market.

With The Sustainable Marketeer, I want to support entrepreneurs and small business owners in their endeavours to incorporate sustainability in their marketing- and business model. I provide individual consultancy, as well as package-deal workshops, for entrepreneurs who want to keep matters into their own hands and just need a little "push". 

My services include: 

• Copywriting and content creation (NL/EN)
• Social media workshops and consulting 
• Company branding and communication

 Organización y cobertura de eventos

Diferentes actores del mundo de la inversión ya confían en nosotros. Diseñamos cada propuesta a medida, adaptándonos a sus objetivos y su estilo. Porque no hay dos marcas iguales, tampoco hay dos campañas iguales.

L'obiettivo è portare valore e attrattività ai territori italiani, che si tratti di aree metropolitane, rurali o remote. Name: Spicy4tuna
Description:
Spicy4tuna es un podcast refrescante y entretenido que aborda cada semana una mezcla variada de temas con un toque de picardía. En cada episodio, los anfitriones Guillermo Díaz (Willyrex), Álvaro González de Buitrago (Alvaro845), Euge Oller y Marc Urgell se sumergen en conversaciones auténticas que van desde la vida cotidiana y temas de actualidad a temáticas más profundas que nos hacen reflexionar, como la política, los negocios y la tecnología.

Lo especial de Spicy4tuna radica en su capacidad para equilibrar el humor con momentos de seriedad y su habilidad para tratar temas complejos de manera accesible, haciendo que los debates sobre economía, política y leyes fiscales sean tan entretenidos como charlar sobre la última serie de moda o el evento viral del momento.

Con un enfoque directo y sin pretensiones, este podcast es como charlar con buenos amigos sobre las novedades, curiosidades y dilemas que todos enfrentamos. Ya sea durante tu viaje al trabajo, en una tarde de ocio o mientras realizas tus tareas diarias, Spicy4tuna te acompaña, prometiendo risas, sorpresas y, quizás, algunas revelaciones. Dale play y prepárate para un contenido que desafía, entretiene y enriquece.

Name: Minenovate

En cada episodio, nos sumergimos en los avances más recientes de la industria, desde la implementación de tecnologías disruptivas hasta las estrategias innovadoras utilizadas para hacer la extracción de minerales más eficiente y sostenible. Nuestro objetivo es informar, inspirar y educar a nuestra audiencia, brindándoles una visión en profundidad de los desarrollos más emocionantes en el campo de la minería.

A través de entrevistas enriquecedoras con expertos líderes en la industria, exploramos casos prácticos, tendencias emergentes y soluciones innovadoras que están impulsando el futuro de la minería. Además, nos enfocamos en la divulgación de la carrera minera, brindando a los estudiantes y profesionales la oportunidad de ampliar sus conocimientos y descubrir nuevas oportunidades en esta emocionante área.

Description:
Portale di informazione sul Legal tech in Italia. 
Ci siamo chiesti: la tecnologia sta pervadendo ogni ambito, l’innovazione si fa sempre più spazio nella vita di tutti i giorni, in azienda e nelle professioni; come cambieranno le professioni legali e l’ecosistema nel quale tali professioni sono immerse? La risposta è stata: LegaltechItalia! Vogliamo contribuire a  cambiare il mondo legale e quello di chi ci vive dentro o ne entra in contatto, concentrandoci sul rapporto tra tecnologia, processi (legali ed aziendali) ed organizzazione.

I temi che ci stanno a cuore sono l’efficienza nella fornitura di servizi legali ed i suoi aspetti economici; la necessità di comprendere ed elaborare i dati prodotti da tutte le attività legali ed il modo in cui tale patrimonio di conoscenze, che aumenta per quantità e qualità ogni giorno  aggiunge nuovo valore per chi produce il servizio e per tutti quelli che ne fruiscono.

Per questo la tecnologia, l’automazione, l’intelligenza artificiale ed un approccio innovativo di chi le usa e le migliora sono così importanti per noi.

La Persone e la Tecnologia, insieme.

Le Persone. L’avvocato, sia che lavori da solo che in studi associati, il notaio, il compliance officer, il legal counsel aziendale, il risk manager, il DPO (GDPR), il CEO, CFO il CTO, il responsabile delle risorse umane, il responsabile sicurezza, il magistrato, le istituzioni, gli ordini professionali e molti altri ancora, sono tutti chiamati ad usufruire della tecnologia ed a farsi parte attiva del cambiamento che, possiamo dirlo con certezza, è ancora agli inizi. 

La Tecnologia. Di seguito, i nostri principali ambiti di interesse:

L’intelligenza artificiale (AI) – è un ambito molto vasto, trasversale rispetto a tutti gli altri, ed in continua crescita, che va dall’M&A all’analisi della normativa internazionale, alle applicazioni predittive nel litigation.
I sistemi esperti e chatbot (Legalbot) – che sono strumenti basati che consentono a un utente di interagire con u

Pour accéder à des conseils concrets, tirés de mon expérience pratique, et combler l’écart entre la théorie et la réalité du terrain.
Chaque post ou épisode est conçu pour t’aider à progresser et à mieux comprendre l’univers de la finance d’entreprise.

Fabio

Édité uniquement sur internet, algerie-eco.com est un journal d’information indépendant.

Il a pour vocation d’informer les décideurs économiques, les dirigeants et cadres d’entreprises sur leur environnement national et international. Son objectif : devenir leur  journal économique de référence.

Informer ses lecteurs en toute indépendance avec un grand souci de qualité et de fiabilité de l’information est l’ambition première du journal. C’est dans cette optique que la rédaction s’efforcera de mettre à la disposition de ses lecteurs un journal à la fois à la fois utile, positif et crédible.

L’équipe rédactionnelle veut apporter à ses lecteurs un autre regard sur l’actualité économique nationale et internationale en proposant des articles qui respectent la véracité des faits, le pluralisme des idées et livrent les clés nécessaires pour mieux comprendre et analyser les grands dossiers qui impactent l’économie algérienne.

Réalisé par des journalistes spécialisés, algerie-eco.com  est un journal indépendant de tous les pouvoirs et instances politiques ou patronales, comme de la publicité.

Name: Women Plot
Description:
How many volumes in our library are the work of women? Probably few, in fact already in the process of choosing the volumes to buy one immediately realizes a certain gender gap both in the catalogs and in the criticism, a gap confirmed by national data (only 38.4 per cent of authors who publish fiction for adults are women).

An analysis of the publishing sector also shows strong asymmetries both in the distribution of roles and in the awarding of awards to writers, despite the fact that women achieve better results in education and training and attend bookstores and libraries with greater assiduity than men.

Knowing all this, we can responsibly try to work toward the diminishing of the gender gap and to actively support a cultural change towards definitive gender equality.

Name: Oldyssey
Description:
Oldyssey parle des "vieilles" et des "vieux" et montre les solutions qui rapprochent les générations, partout dans le monde.
Chaque semaine, des vidéos sur www.oldyssey.org et sur les réseaux d'Oldyssey ;
Une chronique hebdomadaire tout l'été sur France Info (le dimanche à 8h24, 13h21, 16h26, et en replay : bit.ly/2Mb0wfw)
Un article mensuel dans Notre Temps

--

Pourquoi parler des vieux ?

Aujourd’hui, on a du mal à parler du vieillissement. On parle des vieux comme d'une cohorte démographique, un "poids" économique. Ou alors on n'en parle pas du tout. La difficulté même à utiliser le mot "vieux" est assez représentative du tabou qui entoure cette période de la vie. Le vieillard est, au choix,"un Sage vénérable qui domine de très haut ce monde terrestre", ou "un vieux fou qui radote et extravague” (Simone De Beauvoir, La Vieillesse, 1970).

Pourtant, c’est un sujet qui ne laisse personne indifférent. La transition démographique est un phénomène global qui touche toutes les sociétés, mais la vieillesse est aussi un sujet qui nous touche tous de manière personnelle. Encore jeunes, on est amenés, à travers le vieillissement de nos proches, à avoir un avis sur la question de l’aide à domicile, les maisons de retraite, l’isolement géographique, et notre rôle dans tout ça.

Du coup, on a voulu parler des vieux, et en parler autrement. Dans nos vidéos, ils racontent leur histoire et celle des lieux où ils ont passé la plus grande partie de leur existence, nous parlent de leur quotidien, nous donnent leurs tips pour réussir en amour, au travail, ou au contraire ce qui n’a pas marché.   

Oldyssey met aussi en avant les expérimentation qui rapprochent les générations en France et dans d'autres pays : Japon, Chine, Inde, Brésil, Colombie, États-Unis, Canada, Afrique du Sud, Sénégal, Europe... pour s'inspirer d'autres formes de solidarités.

Name: News Ireland
Description:
News Ireland is one of Ireland’s leading media groups. Publishing the award-winning titles The Sunday Times, TheSundayTimes.ie, The Irish Sun and thesun.ie, our aim is to ensure our readers stay well-informed and entertained with our unmissable journalism. Focusing on a digital first approach, we publish breaking stories across news, business, features, entertainment, lifestyle, sport and culture as well as informed opinion, global headlines and world class insights from our award-winning team of journalists. 

Quality journalism is at the heart of everything News Ireland does - telling the stories that matter in a way that resonates with our audiences. Promoting and elevating the highest standards of journalism is an integral part of News Ireland’s overall mission, and the business is continually focused on creating and distributing valuable content that educates, entertains, informs, and inspires.

News Ireland’s commercial operation connects advertising agencies and their clients with readers and users through tailored and creative campaign solutions in print, digital, social, and via events.  STUDIO is our in-house, award-winning creative team with a wealth of experience in brand strategy, advertising, and content creation. The STUDIO team develop ideas for brands looking to reach our vast audience across print, online, on-air and through social campaigns.  

News Ireland is part of the News Corp organisation in Ireland which also owns the Wireless Radio Group (Dublin’s Q102, FM104, Cork’s 96FM, C103, Live95FM, and LMFM), Storyful, and HarperCollins. Across the island of Ireland, News Corp employs over 500 employees.

- Visit thesun.ie for breaking news, sport showdowns and showbiz gossip.

Construit par et pour les personnes vivant avec des troubles psychiques,  𝑃𝑙𝑒𝑖𝑛 𝐸𝑠𝑝𝑜𝑖𝑟 nous invite avec bienveillance à (re)trouver le pouvoir d’agir sur nos vies.

 Chaque semaine : podcasts, articles et témoignages.

Oui, c’est possible de vivre pleinement avec un trouble psychique.

Et pour nous le prouver,  𝑃𝑙𝑒𝑖𝑛 𝐸𝑠𝑝𝑜𝑖𝑟 mise sur la force des témoignages et la pluralité des vécus.

De quoi inspirer les parcours de rétablissement au plus grand nombre… dans une société qui doit nous en donner les moyens !

 𝑃𝑙𝑒𝑖𝑛 𝐸𝑠𝑝𝑜𝑖𝑟, une initiative de Santé mentale France, à découvrir dès le 2 décembre.

Nel 2012, accanto alle pubblicazioni online, viene realizzata una prima pubblicazione cartacea. Da allora Bocconi Legal Papers pubblica numeri semestrali, a giugno e a dicembre, editi da Egea e fruibili in formato elettronico sulle banche dati giuridiche HeinOnline e EBSCOhost.

Name: TASTET
Description:
Tastet is simply about people who want to enjoy life at its best – we like to eat, to drink but always in good company! Each day of the week, we share together through our site and social media, the pleasures of discovering everything that’s good about food and more. We’ve chosen the motto « If we’re talking about it, then it’s good » because we believe deeply in the advancement of our society through the positive and not the negative. Constructive, not destructive criticism. We try to put forward the positive points of each business to help our followers best match their wishes to the right place, enhancing their experience.

Tastet is the go-to reference for anyone looking for restaurants, bars and cafés in Montreal. Why? Because we are valued for the authenticity of our content and opinions. No restaurant, café or bar pays or will pay to be included on our site or weblinks. The articles represent our most sincere opinions. If the business is owned by a family member or friend, this connection is always mentioned in the article and just 0.1% of all the places Tastet has visited, account for these. If any meal is offered « on the house », this invitation too, is mentioned in our article – and these represent 15% of all the places listed on our site.

Tastet is neither a blog nor a critique, it is a guide to good places and food! Our goal is to promote Montreal’s hospitality environment, help sustain its growth and contribute to its vitality. We evaluate the businesses based on criteria that allows us to present the quality of each place as objectively as possible. Tastet succeeds because it is based on mutual trust between everyone interviewed, every place visited and us, the writers – and combined with professionalism, integrity and creativity. The site is followed and read by media influencers, which adds a personal, objective touch and contributes value to our exclusive content.

We also write articles about companies we believe in.

Contact us at info@tastet.ca

Fédérant 10 millions de visiteurs uniques (Médiamétrie, internet global, novembre 2017) et générant plus de 2 millions de leads mensuels, les médias du Groupe NEWEB se positionnent comme tiers de confiance et portent un rôle de conseil et d’experts auprès de leurs lecteurs afin de les accompagner au mieux dans leur processus d’achat de produit.

Cet objectif guide non seulement notre activité mais définit également notre culture, reposant sur 4 piliers essentiels : le Contenu, la Communauté, le Conseil et la Conversion.

Derrière ces mots, près de 150 collaborateurs - partageant les mêmes valeurs d’innovation, d’intégrité, de rigueur et de bonne humeur - assurent la gestion, l’animation, la commercialisation et le développement de nos médias.

Through articles, in-depth content, periodical publications, events and online discussions, CMI explores the key dimensions of customer relationship management, connecting strategy, processes, data and technological innovation. Y conscientes del importante papel que los diversos colectivos profesionales tienen en el sector, CLIMAEFICIENCIA ha suscrito acuerdos con algunas de las principales Asociaciones que operan en el mismo como son: Atecyr, Anese, A3e, Aner, Secartys o ACI.

Igualmente, CLIMAEFICIENCIA lanza dos boletines digitales semanales, con un avance de las noticias más actuales del mercado, y promociona en su Web a empresas punteras del sector.

Name: Fairer Finance
Description:
Fairer Finance is a consumer group, research agency and consultancy founded in 2014. Our mission is to create a fairer financial services market - one that works for customers as well as the companies that serve them. 

Our customer experience ratings rank businesses based on customer polling, complaints data and our own unique transparency analysis.  

In 2017, we also launched product quality ratings, which rank financial services products based on their features. 

Our ratings are designed to help customers make better financial decisions, and also to encourage companies to compete on factors other than price.

Our consultancy business works with companies who want help improving their customer experience. We've reviewed and rewritten terms and conditions for several of Britain's largest banks and insurers, helping create documents which are clear for customers but also meet each firm's legal and regulatory requirements. We also review customer journeys - both on and offline - helping companies communicate in a consistent, clear and fair manner with all their customers.  

Some of the money we make is used to fund our policy and campaigning work, which we do on behalf of all UK consumers.

If you'd like to know more about what we do get in touch today.

Name: Platform O
Description:
Platform O is het online platform dat een brug slaat tussen de praktijk van het openbaar bestuur en de wetenschap.
Het platform dat staat voor: kennis maken, kennis delen. 

Het openbaar bestuur heeft continu reflectie, kennisdeling en debat nodig om goed te kunnen functioneren en bij de tijd te blijven. Kennis en ervaring van mensen werkzaam in het openbaar bestuur en van wetenschappers en andere experts kunnen beter en laagdrempeliger gedeeld worden dan nu het geval is. Daarom hebben VOM, VGS, VB en IKPOB de handen ineen geslagen en zijn platform O begonnen.

Platform O prikkelt bezoekers met columns en artikelen van wetenschappers, ambtenaren uit verschillende overheidslagen en professionals uit de praktijk. Opinion leaders en stakeholders worden gericht uitgenodigd om te reageren op deze artikelen. Platform O deelt niet alleen de succesverhalen, maar ook de minder geslaagde aanpakken en experimenten. Zo vindt online verdieping en discussie plaats over relevante ontwikkelingen als lokale vernieuwing, sociale en technologische innovatie. Ook gaan wij aan de slag met actuele dossiers als de hervorming van de Nationale Politie en het EU-voorzitterschap.

Platform O richt zich op iedereen die interesse heeft in de werking van het openbaar bestuur. Bezoekers kunnen reageren op gepubliceerde artikelen en columns, deelnemen aan de online discussie en hun eigen ervaringen en kennis delen. In de toekomst zal platform O ook kleinschalige bijeenkomsten organiseren om het debat rond veelbesproken thema’s voort te zetten.

Tot slot vinden we het belangrijk om te vermelden dat platform O geen enkel commercieel belang nastreeft bij het realiseren van haar doelen.

Laat platform O je inspireren en stimuleren!

Deel je inzichten en maak kennis!

Name: Opalesque
Description:
Established in 2001 by Matthias Knab, an internationally recognised expert on hedge funds and alternatives, Opalesque started in Feb. 2003 the first digital, email-/internet-based newsletter on hedge funds and alternative investments (“Alternative Market Briefing”), to provide professional news services to participants in this industry. The launch of these Briefings was a revolution in the hedge fund media space, bringing transparency where there was opacity and by reliably delivering a a daily accurate professional reporting service. 

Mr. Knab has frequently served as chairman of hedge fund conferences in New York, Greenwich, Tokyo, Shanghai, Hong Kong, Miami, Bahamas, Stockholm, and Dubai etc. In addition, he has presented or moderated hundreds of financial events in London, Geneva, Zurich, Singapore, Sydney, Cape Town, Madrid, Moscow, Sao Paolo, San Francisco, Toronto, Cayman Islands, Auckland and Bombay, and lectured at numerous universities on the subjects of hedge funds and the state of the global alternative asset management industry. 

Already in 2000 Matthias Knab started to publish a pioneering email based newsletter "Industry Report" focusing on the ascent of Electronic Trading within the online brokerage industry.

Today, Opalesque publishes over 400,000 digital copies of its 6 specialist publications to a growing professional user base.

The primary objectives of this forum include:

Policy Recommendations: We leverage our team of Subject Matter Experts and Economic Strategists and our well entrenched connect with the policy makers to develop whitepapers that highlight measures that can benefit businesses from all industry segments in a synergized manner. 

Market Intelligence: The IBC boasts of an Industry-Academia group comprising experienced researchers from some of the leading organizations and universities in the country. This group has expertise in insight-mining, data analysis, and report generation, and all its efforts are directed towards publishing sectoral as well as industry reports reflecting the status quo and actionable insights.

Industry Networking: With a host of programs aimed at professional collaborations and industry networking, IBC intends to create platforms where business representatives can come together to not only discuss opportunities for mutual growth, but also to share knowledge and experiences that can benefit all members of IBC.

Thought Leadership: Through articles, interviews, blogs/vlogs, as well as explainer content, we provide opportunity for all members to share their ideas and views with the entire industry and establish themselves as thought leaders in the market.

Industry Recognition & Awards: The IBC recognizes exemplary work done by professionals, agencies, enterprises, startups, and brands in their respective domains through Award

Name: BusinessInfo.cz
Description:
BusinessInfo.cz je oficiální státní portál pro podnikání a export. Funguje již od roku 2001. Je centrálním místem, na kterém mohou podnikatelé najít všechny důležité informace nebo informační zdroje státní správy, ale i klíčové informace od nestátních institucí, komor a svazů. 
» Video 20 let BI: https://youtu.be/CW6s8nuLqLY

Pro začínající podnikatele je na portálu BusinessInfo.cz připravena sada informací ve formě průvodců a návodů pro řešení běžných „životních situací“ podnikatele.

Pro informačně pokročilé podnikatele jsou vytvářeny kanály pro elektronickou výměnu dokumentů ve vztahu stát – podnikatel → formulář vyplníte na svém počítači a odešlete přes internet na úřad.

Pro zkušené exportéry a podniky s exportním potenciálem jsou určeny zastřešující informace o možnostech, novinkách, akcích a konkrétních obchodních příležitostech ze zahraničních trhů soustředěné z mnoha zdrojů státní i soukromé sféry. Portál integruje a zprostředkovává společnou nabídku služeb státu v zahraničí, tedy servis firmám od všech zástupců státu v oblasti exportu a investic. Rovněž pak přinášíme informace o jednotlivých zemích zpracovávané a aktualizované teritoriálními manažery.

Pro novináře přinášíme informace z trhů, zpětnou vazbu ze strany podnikatelů týkající se existujících či připravovaných směrnic v ČR i EU, či přehled o zajímavých rozhovorech a akcích.

Pro zahraniční podnikatele poskytujeme cizojazyčné informace o podmínkách podnikání, investic a příležitostech obchodu s českými podniky.

Pro širokou podnikatelskou veřejnost zpracováváme informace z veřejné správy a dalších institucí.

Our platform is ideal for marketing teams, employee training initiatives and creative video agencies. It supports seamless collaboration, secure sharing and integration with your existing tech stack, so you can move faster, measure impact and grow with confidence.

Name: Good News Magazin
Description:
Im Good News Magazin liest du Nachrichten und Geschichten, die bestärken, motivieren, inspirieren, deinen Tag erhellen – und alle positiven Adjektive vereinen, die dir sonst noch einfallen! Jeden Tag und überall finden zahlreiche positive Ereignisse statt. Das Good News Magazin ist ihre Plattform. Alles hat zwei Seiten. Wir finden, dass „Bösewichte“ und Katastrophen bereits genug Reichweite haben. Sie besetzen genug Platz auf der Welt und in den Köpfen der Menschen. Doch wir wollen dir nichts vormachen, es gibt viele Probleme und es ist nicht „alles gut“. Kritisches, konstruktives Denken ist wichtig und eine positive Berichterstattung soll das fördern. Ganz bewusst, denn positiver Journalismus heißt für uns: wir zeigen nicht mit dem Finger auf das, was fehlt, sondern wollen bestärken und fördern, was bereits da ist. Denn das, worauf wir uns konzentrieren, wird wachsen.

Wer über Probleme berichtet, schafft Probleme. Wer über Lösungen berichtet, schafft Lösungen. Deswegen wirken wir den negativ fokussierten Medien mit Good News entgegen. Unsere News reichen von Kleinprojekten bis zu riesigen Initiativen, wie The Ocean Cleanup. Damit wollen wir zeigen, dass aus jeder kleinen Idee ein positiver Impact für die Welt entstehen kann. Wir wollen keine Angst schüren, sondern Menschen zum positiven Denken und Handeln anregen. 
Wir freuen uns, wenn ihr uns auf unserem Weg begleitet!

Description:
If at all possible, we aim to provide people of the RIA business with the brainfood they need to be among the in-the-know and on-the move of the industry.

We founded RIABiz in August of 2009 and started by throwing out the thou-shalt books that tell how to run magazines, newspapers, blogs, news websites, directories and research services. We wanted the color, captions and quality of The Economist, the timeliness of Bloomberg, the personality of your favorite blog and the online destination that doesn’t look like a makeshift way of putting print content onto a website.

When we get a pile of research we want to share, we try to put it into English. We are competitive people and want to break every useful story. We are intellectually vain and want to introduce every new angle. We want to be part of the Google+ generation that puts information with faces and we use them at every opportunity.

Will we succeed in all this with our modest staff and chimp-sized brains? Not always. But hopefully the debris of our efforts will continue to give you a dynamic stopover on your daily meandering of the Internet and instill you with similarly hyper-charged idealistic business objectives that – when they fall short – still stand taller than what’s typically out there.

Name: Echte Mamas
Description:
Moin und schön, dass du uns hier gefunden hast! 

Wir sind ein junges, rasant wachsendes Unternehmen mit dem Sitz in Hamburg.  Wir lieben Social Media und Content und haben das Herz am rechten Fleck. 

Unsere Mission ist es, Mütter zusammenzubringen und mit ihnen ehrlich und offen über das Muttersein zu sprechen. 

Unsere unternehmerische Reise begann 2016 mit einer simplen Facebook-Fanpage und heute ist „Echte Mamas“ auf allen Kanälen die größte Community für Mütter im kompletten deutschsprachigen Raum.

Mit über 1.000.000 Mitgliedern und mehr als 12.000.000 monatlichen Interaktionen sind wir das erfolgreichste Netzwerk für Schwangere und Mütter für gegenseitige Akzeptanz und Unterstützung. Und darauf sind wir stolz wie Bolle!

Wir kreieren ehrlichen Content und nehmen kein Blatt vor dem Mund. Wir finden es wichtig, die Gefühle und Herausforderungen von Müttern offen zu thematisieren und sie damit zu unterstützen. 

Auf unserer Website und bei Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp, Pinterest und Tiktok finden Mütter alle Antworten auf praktischen Fragen rund ums Mamaleben. 

Wir möchten unsere Community informieren und ihnen in jeder Lebenlage helfend zur Seite stehen. 

Im Podcast geht es um Themen rund um Schwangerschaft, Babyzeit und Erziehung – immer echt, ehrlich, sensibel, offen und lustig. Die besten ExpertInnen in ihrem Bereich wissen dort, wie man Themen einfach und mit viel Liebe erklärt.

Und als Community bieten wir überall einen geschützten Raum zum Austauschen, Kennenlernen und Freundschaften knüpfen. 

Das Leben als Mutter steckt voller Herausforderungen. Gemeinsam meistern wir sie alle! 

Und wir haben noch viel vor!

Wenn du Fragen hast, sprich uns einfach an! Oder schaue dich hier noch etwas um

Name: wetter.com GmbH
Description:
Über wetter.com GmbH - ein Unternehmen der ProSiebenSat.1 Media SE 

wetter.com gehört mit bis zu 26 Millionen User:innen im Monat zu den Marktführern unter den Online-Wetterportalen in Europa. An unseren Standorten in Konstanz, München und Berlin arbeiten etwa 100 Mitarbeiter:innen mit viel Leidenschaft und Spaß an unseren Produkten. 

Erfahrene Meteorolog:innen und Redakteur:innen informieren tagtäglich über aktuelle Wetterlagen und Trendprognosen. Ein präziser Niederschlagsradar, thematische Wetterkarten, Biowetter, HD Live Webcams sowie ausführliche News- und Ratgeberartikel runden das umfassende Angebot via Webseite und App ab. Darüber hinaus präsentieren wir mit wetter.com TV den einzigen 24-Stunden-Wetterkanal im deutschen Fernsehen und produzieren die Wettershows der ProSiebenSat.1-Gruppe. Mit unserer B2B Marke METEONOMIQS nutzen wir unsere weltweite Wetterexpertise, um Unternehmen durch datengetriebenes Marketing, wetteroptimierte Umsatzplanung sowie weitere Datenlösungen voranzubringen.

Unsere Mission ist es, das beste Wetterportal auf dem Markt zu sein. Wir liefern alle wichtigen Infos rund ums Wetter und begleiten Millionen von Menschen durch ihren Alltag und sprühen nur so vor neuen Ideen, mit denen wir unsere Nutzer und Kunden immer noch ein bisschen glücklicher machen.

Mit unseren 25 Jahren im Digitalgeschäft haben wir schon eine Menge Erfahrung auf dem Buckel. Aber alt und festgefahren sind wir deshalb ganz und gar nicht. Unser unstillbarer Durst nach Fortschritt und neuen Produkten hält uns nonstop auf Trab.

Bei uns findest du vielfältige Möglichkeiten, Teil des wetter.com-Teams zu werden. Ob als Praktikant, Werkstudent oder bereits mit beruflichen Erfahrungen. Wir suchen authentische Persönlichkeiten, die Lust an der Entwicklung digitaler Produkte haben, sich in einem dynamischen Arbeitsumfeld wohlfühlen und über einen gesunden Ehrgeiz verfügen. 

Alle aktuellen Stellenanzeigen findest du unter https://karriere.wetter.com/.

Name: Salesforce facile

Description:
Consulting Buddies réinvente le fonctionnement du recrutement dans le conseil pour améliorer l'expérience candidat et faciliter le travail des recruteurs.
