De l'autre coté, les recruteurs du conseil recherchent des talents de plus en plus qualifiés, mais une grande majorité des candidatures qu'ils reçoivent ne sont pas pertinentes. 

Chez Consulting Buddies, nous offrons à des candidats intéressés par le conseil de les accompagner dans leur recherche en les instruisant sur les codes du conseil, en leur faisant découvrir des cabinets qui correspondent à leurs aspirations, et en leur donnant accès à des propositions d'entretiens de cabinets déjà intéressés par leurs profils.

Name: 70 Faces Media
Description:
70 Faces Media is the largest and most diverse Jewish media organization in North America. We publish six digital brands — including JTA, My Jewish Learning, Alma, The Nosher, Kveller, and the New York Jewish Week — and an international syndication service.

We were born through the groundbreaking merger of a storied news agency and an Internet start-up. Founded in 1917, the Jewish Telegraphic Agency (JTA) has reports on developments impacting Jews around the world. My Jewish Learning, Inc. was created in 2002 to leverage the internet and other new media to spread knowledge of Jewish religion, history, values, traditions and culture in a manner that is meaningful and accessible to all people.

Our brands collectively serve as a virtual town square, highlighting and hosting a multitude of voices and conversations as we inform people about Jewish news, history, traditions, values, entertainment and culture. We reach people wherever they are in their lives, level of Jewish knowledge and sense of Jewish identity. We connect people and communities in North America, Israel and around the globe. Through these efforts, we provide a unique platform for people to identify with the Jewish story and take part in renewing it for our time.

Name: eCommerce MasterPlan Podcast
Description:
eCommerce MasterPlan was founded by Chloë Thomas in 2012 as an exit route from the digital marketing agency she was running.

Via the agency, Chloë couldn’t help as many businesses as she wanted to navigate the journey to successful online selling.  There were so many retailers and entrepreneurs making such easily avoided mistakes, and missing out big opportunities that Chloë didn’t want to wait until she sold the agency to help them.

In 2012 Chloë created our first tool that online retailers could use to improve their businesses - the book eCommerce MasterPlan: Your 3 Steps to Successful Online Selling.

Over the years Chloë’s always done some consulting/advising for retailers, but the main focus has always been to help far more people than she has the bandwidth to help one on one. To give everyone access to the tools and knowledge and inspiration that will enable them to achieve their eCommerce goals faster, with less stress, and more fun!

The first book has been followed by another 4 (find them all here) all of which have been/currently are Amazon bestsellers.

As well as the books and a little bit of consulting Chloë’s always brought the lessons and messages of eCommerce MasterPlan to a wider audience by speaking at events around the UK and beyond. 

In recent years that’s evolved into being the host, or chairman at various panels, conferences, and webinars. Including the UK’s largest eCommerce events - Internet Retailing Expo, Internet Retailing Conference, and eCommerce Expo.
In 2015 we expanded from live events and books into the wonderful world of podcasting.

June 2015 saw the launch of the eCommerce MasterPlan Podcast over the last 5 years it’s just grown and grown, regularly named in lists of the top digital marketing and eCommerce podcasts, and ranking top 20 marketing podcast and higher all over the world.

We continue working to find ways to help you plot your route to eCommerce success.

We’ve taken the added initiative of helping to mold the technological landscape within the industry by implementing these one-of-a-kind journalistic developmental tools. 

Sports Media 101 is expanding rapidly. We are always looking forward and finding new ways to get you more information faster. We aim to make our shared obsession more convenient for you. From our live draft coverage to our micro-coverage on Twitter and Facebook to our Quick Hits on our team sections, we are always finding more ways to bring you news the instant it happens. Name: Green Business Post
Description:
Canal que colabora com a disseminação de conteúdo para os negócios sustentáveis. Seja bem vindo a colaborar também! 

Acompanhamos iniciativas e acontecimentos de todos os tipos de organizações, seja governamental, empresas com ou sem fins lucrativas, além de novidades científicas.

Respeitamos todos os conteudistas e, por isso, referenciamos nossas fontes de informação colocando seus links. Além disso, sabemos que isso facilita as pesquisas de estudantes, professores, pesquisadores, profissionais e o ecossistema se fortalece como um todo. \o/

Missão: fortalecer o ecossistema do desenvolvimento sustentável global com a divulgação de suas iniciativas.
Visão: ser um dos maiores canais de difusão de conteúdo sobre desenvolvimento sustentável.
Valores: ética, transparência, colaboração, inovação, sustentabilidade e cultura empreendedora.

O que é green business?

Green business ou sustainable business englobam os negócio sustentável.

Sabendo que os maiores impactos no planeta tem origem organizacional, é importante que eles adotem práticas sustentáveis, a fim de tornar os impactos positivos. Cada vez mais organizações vem se mobilizando e entendendo os benefícios e oportunidades do mercado sustentável.

Levando isso em consideração, organizamos as categorias do nosso canal de acordo com as áreas das organizações. As publicações podem estar relacionadas a mais de uma categoria e é possível acompanhar cada categoria através de nosso menu na página inicial.
Objetivos da ONU (ODS)

Os objetivos da ONU, conhecidos como ODS (Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável), foram criados para disseminar e mobilizar as comunidades do planeta sobre os principais problemas globais, a fim de que todos possam colaborar para solucioná-los. São no total 17 objetivos e a agenda para conseguir resultados significativos é até 2030.

Nossas tags são baseadas nesses objetivos da ONU. Dessa forma, os leitores poderão identificar conteúdos relacionados a cada ODS.

yes Satellite Services was established in 1998 and began broadcasting in July 2000.yes is the only company in Israel to provide multi-channel television broadcasts to subscribers via satellite,and was the first company to offer digital broadcasts and interactive television services.The company has over 549,000 customers,comprising more than 37% of the multichannel television market.
yes provides its subscribers multi-channel television broadcasts via satellite,including digital and interactive television services.Until yes began broadcasting in 2000,the Israeli market was limited to the cable monopoly,an outdated analog product that offered a poor variety of content.yes is determined to lead the multi-channel television by creating an entertainment and leisure experience.The company has over 549,000 customers,comprising more than 37% of the multi-channel television market. yes employs about 1,700 people and operates around 450 contractors' workers.The company's turnover in 2006 totaled NIS 1.356 billion.yes is owned by several of the leading communication companies in Israel: the Bezeq group,Eurocom (owned by Shaul Elovich), Polar Communications,Gilat Satellite Networks and Lidan 
Broadcasts
yes broadcasts more than 120 video channels, over 50 radio channels and music,as well as a wide range of interactive channels,games, information channels (including portals), and more.The video channels include 30 pay-per-view channels. 
Technological Leadership
Since its inception,the company has stood at the forefront of technology in its field.yes' technological systems are based on full digitalization.yes was the first company in Israel to market a personal video recorder,yesMax,which enables easy recording of broadcasts with options to pause the program while viewing,rewind,fast forward,and so on.The company's technological expertise has enabled it to generate a revolution in the multi-channel TV market in Israel, where a powerful monopoly had operated for many years.

Name: Audyllic
Description:
Audyllic | Let Every Word Be Heard
Audyllic is on a mission to fix a core flaw in on-demand audio: content that sounds great in the studio often falls apart in the real world.

Whether it’s a podcast in the car, an audiobook on a smart speaker, or an online course on a laptop in a noisy kitchen—real-world listening environments are a world away from the studio. What should be immersive and engaging ends up sounding muddy, too quiet, or suddenly too loud. Listeners lose focus, switch off, or tune out entirely.

We experienced this ourselves during COVID-19:

    Premium podcasts became unintelligible on the move

    E-learning was hard to follow with household noise

    Audiobooks sounded robotic and fatiguing

    Ad insertions blasted at unpredictable, jarring volumes

These issues aren’t just frustrating—they make content uncomfortable for everyone, and downright inaccessible for many, especially those with hearing conditions or audio sensitivities.

We chose a proven solution over hype. While AI audio processing is still learning, broadcast technology has already mastered the psychoacoustics of human hearing. That’s why Audyllic is powered by Optimod—the gold standard in deterministic, real-time audio enhancement.

With Audyllic, creators and advertisers can:

    Eliminate volume spikes and dips that disrupt the experience

    Ensure consistent clarity across devices and environments

    Meet loudness standards like -16 LUFS with confidence

    Process files 6x faster than real-time with zero AI inconsistencies

    Create inclusive audio that’s comfortable for all listeners

We bring broadcast-grade reliability to podcasts, audiobooks, e-learning, and dynamic ads—helping creative teams protect their work and connect with every listener.

From studio to ear, 
Audyllic ensures your audio sounds great where it actually matters—out in the world.

Let Every Word Be Heard.

Name: TOUS DANSEURS
Description:
J’aime l’idée que la danse est en chacun de nous. Que c’est un souffle. Que toutes les danses sont belles. Que tous les corps qui dansent sont beaux. Que tous les corps sont instrument. Que danser est une nécessité. Que c’est un langage que tout le monde comprend.
Que le chemin de la danse libère, rassemble et emmène à la connaissance de soi.
Qu’être en mouvement, c’est se sentir vivant.
Qu’être là, dans l’instant, c’est tout simplement être éternellement.

Tous Danseurs est un podcast. Une conversation avec un acteur de la danse d’aujourd’hui et de demain, de TOUTES les danses.
Un temps suspendu. Pour découvrir des parcours singuliers de femmes et d’hommes qui vivent passionnément danse, des artisans du mouvement. Danseurs et athlètes, costumiers, chorégraphes, musiciens, chercheurs. Des créateurs et ouvriers de la danse.
Dans l’ombre ou la lumière, ils sont tous en mouvement et tous danseurs.

Name: Truthdig
Description:
Truthdig is an award-winning news and opinion website that provides daily, in-depth coverage of current affairs and  provocative, insightful content presented from a progressive point of view. 

Truthdig seeks to challenge conventional wisdom by “drilling beneath the headlines” and to create a model for serious journalism on the Internet that helps fill the void left by the decline of traditional journalism. Truthdig's editors and writers take up this mission every day by offering a wide range of material including extensive, original “digs;” incisive columns; blog items; news briefs; videos and political cartoons by some of the most influential thinkers, writers and artists of our time.

There have always been, and will always be, people digging for the truth rather than simply accepting the conventional wisdom of the day. It is these people we hope to reach on Truthdig as we continue following stories wherever they lead us.

Our aim is to inform you about the best parts of the West — from change makers and thriving businesses to its rich culture, dynamic lifestyle and desirable communities. There’s no exact science here, we’re excited about what happens in our area, and we want you to be too.

Covering six key municipalities in the nation’s fastest-growing region — Brimbank, Hobsons Bay, Maribyrnong, Melton, Moonee Valley and Wyndham — BOB brings you meaningful, relevant, inspiring and analytical content that impacts our community.

At BOB, we evaluate, expound and showcase high-value content which is presented using innovative storytelling, slick formatting and modern design, bringing you the West like you’ve never seen it before.

We’re excited to discover and share with you the endless possibilities, great opportunities and awesomeness of Melbourne’s West.

Entrepreneur(e)s, responsables de structures associatives, élu(e)s, artistes, sportifs… Tous ont en commun une ambition qui ne fait pas débat, mais qui reste trop souvent dans l’ombre des discours dominants. AMBITION BY VOOX leur offre un micro, un espace où leur voix compte autant que celles déjà omniprésentes.

En donnant de la résonance à ces voix essentielles, le média participe à un rééquilibrage nécessaire du paysage médiatique.

Notre média est plus qu’un simple podcast : c’est une tribune pour celles et ceux qui font, qui agissent et qui changent le(ur) monde, loin des projecteurs mais avec une détermination sans faille.

 Parce que chaque voix compte.

Name: Natura Sciences
Description:
Les scientifiques sont formels : l'urgence écologique et climatique impose de réinventer notre société. Pour inscrire l'humanité dans les limites planétaires, il faudra notamment mettre fin à la surconsommation, sortir des énergies fossiles au profit de la sobriété et des énergies renouvelables, transformer notre modèle agricole et protéger la biodiversité. 

Natura Sciences, c’est la soif de connaissances. C’est un média en ligne d'information politique et générale (IPG) créé en 2009, indépendant et sans publicité, qui raconte l'actualité de l'écologie sous le prisme des sciences. Dans un monde en état d'alerte, Natura Sciences choisit de porter la voix des scientifiques pour contrer les politiques immobilistes et les marchands de doute. Nous nous adressons aux citoyens et citoyennes éclairées qui s'impliquent dans des actions individuelles et collectives, pour construire, ensemble, une société plus respectueuse des humains et du vivant.

Nos maîtres mots : alerter, comprendre, agir et s'adapter. Nos contenus vous permettent de COMPRENDRE les causes et conséquences de l’urgence écologique et climatique, d'AGIR face à un ancien monde qui peine à s’impliquer réellement dans une action écologique urgente et radicale. Nous explorons les moyens de S’ADAPTER au changement climatique et  au défi écologique. Nous analysons les actions politiques sous le prisme des sciences pour DÉCIDER une action efficace. Enfin, nous explorons les moyens d'INNOVER et interrogeons l’impact environnemental des technologies.

Ce défi ne sera atteint qu’avec l’implication des citoyens. C'est pourquoi Natura Sciences met au coeur de son projet éditorial l'exigence scientifique et le respect des vivants.

Name: Deux connards dans un bibliobus
Description: Salut ! Oui alors voilà on lance encore un nouveau podcast … et oui ça va parler de bibliothèque. Mais restez ! (Promesse déjà non tenue déso) Ensuite ce sera suffisamment outrancier pour que ce soit fun. Parce qu’effectivement ça s’appelle deux connards dans un bibliobus ! Le but c’est de vous causer de sujets de bibliothèque, avec autant de filtre qu’un bus lancé à 200 sur l’autoroute, et piloté par des belettes sous coke. On vous propose donc d’écouter nos divagations, nos vannes douteuses, mais le tout parsemé quand même de vrais références et de littérature scientifique sur le métier, parce que c’est beaucoup plus sympa de tirer à balle réelle. Je m’appelle donc Julien, Et moi Quentin, Et on est deux connards dans un Bibliobus.

Name: zenith Magazin
Description:
zenith ist das führende deutschsprachige Magazin zum Nahen Osten, Nordafrika, Zentral- und Südasien und der muslimisch geprägten Welt.

Impressum
Das Magazin zenith wird von der gemeinnützigen CANDID Foundation gGmbH herausgegeben und vom Deutschen Levante Verlag GmbH verlegt. Verantwortlicher im Sinne des Pressegesetzes ist Chefredakteur Daniel Gerlach. Geschäftsführer ist Daniel Gerlach .

Company Overview
Das Magazin zenith wird von der gemeinnützigen CANDID Foundation gGmbH herausgegeben und vom Deutschen Levante Verlag GmbH verlegt. Mit seinem großen Netzwerk an Korrespondenten und Fotografen in allen Ländern der arabischen Welt, Zentralasiens, Russlands und Afrikas veröffentlicht zenith regelmäßig exklusive Reportagen und Analysen. Für Stiftungen und Behörden produziert die Redaktion Fachbücher und Fachliteratur.

Die Lage im Nahen Osten ist unübersichtlich und aus westlicher Perspektive nur schwer zugänglich. Welche politischen Interessen verfolgen die einzelnen Länder und Protagonisten, welche Entwicklungen gibt es und wie schätzen international renommierte Experten die Sicherheitslage und die politische Zukunft der dortigen Länder ein?

zenith gibt Antworten, steht dem Leser mit seiner Fachredaktion als kompetenter Berater zur Seite und verdeutlicht die Hintergründe. Autoren und Redakteure von zenith beherrschen orientalische Landessprachen wie Arabisch, Türkisch, Persisch, Malaiisch oder Hebräisch und sind bestens vernetzt.

Warum zenith? Auch unter den außenpolitisch Interessierten nimmt die Zahl der täglichen Zeitungsleser ab. Immer mehr Menschen ziehen es vor, sich online auf dem Laufenden zu halten und nur punktuell tiefergehende Berichterstattung zu beziehen. Mit seinen ausgeruhten und sorgfältig recherchierten Inhalten und seiner hochwertigen Gestaltung erfüllt zenith als Quartalsmagazin die Ansprüche eben dieser Leserschaft.

Our goal is to provide credible, up-to-date information to people considering plastic surgery or a cosmetic procedure, as well as coverage of the latest news and hot topics from the field of plastic surgery.  

Unlike shows you might see on network or cable television, the programming on The Plastic Surgery Channel does not strive to be sensationalist, focusing solely on extreme cases, nor is it solely devoted to a documentary-style overview of various medical procedures. Rather, we strive to inform — and in some cases entertain — viewers by providing relevant, engaging content that covers all facets of cosmetic and reconstructive surgery. We rely on experienced, board certified leaders in the field as content consultants, and conduct substantive research to verify the accuracy of the articles and videos that we present.

Of course, The Plastic Surgery Channel is not meant to replace the advice of medical professionals. Viewers are reminded to always consult a medical professional before making any decisions about  plastic surgery or any other form of surgery.

For more information about our programming and our faculty, please email us at info@theplasticsurgerychannel.com

Name: Wikimedia UK
Description:
Wikimedia UK is the local Wikimedia chapter covering the United Kingdom. We support volunteer editors of, and contributors to, Wikipedia and the other Wikimedia projects such as Wikimedia Commons which are independently run by the Wikimedia Foundation.

What we do:

Wikimedia UK hosts outreach events, such as edit-a-thons and training sessions, around the country where experienced editors and newcomers can contribute to the Wikimedia projects together. We also work with institutions to improve the quality of content on Wikipedia. Learn about some of our initiatives:

*Cultural partnerships (GLAM partnerships) – We partner with cultural institutions up and down the country to help them share the information they hold on Wikipedia and its sister sites
*Expert outreach – We work with scholars and academics, involving them in contributing their knowledge to Wikimedia projects
*Education projects – We promote the use of Wikimedia sites as educational resources
*Training – We run numerous training events to help people learn how to contribute to Wikipedia and its sister sites

How you can get involved:
There are many ways to get involved in our work. You can...

*Become a member – Members play a key role in shaping the future of the Chapter. Membership is open to all and costs just £5 a year.
*Attend an event – We organise and support events all over the country, why not go to one near you?
*Apply for a grant – We offer grants to support members' editing or outreach work.
*Donate – Your donations go towards supporting our events and keeping Wikipedia free and open.

Partner with us
We are always looking for like-minded organisations who want to work with us. Get in touch with us:
*If you represent a cultural institutions, please contact us on glam@wikimedia.org.uk
*If you represent an education establishment, please contact us on education@wikimedia.org.uk
*If you don't fit into either of these, please contact us on info@wikimedia.org.uk

Abstra tworzy także treści dla partnerów zewnętrznych oraz kanały YouTube realizowane w porozumieniu z partnerami komercyjnymi. W 2019 roku realizowany przez Abstra dla marki Durex kanał „Jak TO Robić?” otrzymał 3 nagrody IAB MIXX Awards, w tym statuetkę BEST IN SHOW dla najlepszej kampanii digital marketingowej 2019 roku. Abstra została założona w 2016 roku przez Roberta Pasuta, Czarka Jóźwika i Rafała Masnego, czyli członków Abstrachuje.tv, najpopularniejszego kanału rozrywkowego na polskim YouTube (ponad 1 mld wyświetleń, 3.4 mln subskrypcji).

Name: Business Ecosystem Alliance
Description:
The founding belief of the Business Ecosystem Alliance is that ecosystems are an important and growing phenomena in the life of organizations of all types, in all locations and in all sectors of activity.

Ecosystems represent potentially the best organizational model for the future of organizations.

The Business Ecosystem Alliance aims to bring together researchers, practitioners and others who are interested in better understanding how ecosystems work and how they can have a positive impact on organizations, society and the world.

In doing so, the Business Ecosystem Alliance aims to create a mutually supporting ecosystem of knowledge, research and best practice.

Name: The Mettleset
Description: The Mettleset is a multimedia platform and online community dedicated to sharing stories of underrepresented athletes and underreported sports from the Middle East and beyond. With a mission to diversify the sporting ecosystem, it is the first and only sports platform in the Middle East to put women in sport first, while also featuring niche sporting communities such as action & endurance sports.

Name: Velis Media Group
Description:
Velis Media Group invests in talented leaders to guide the disruption in ad-tech by developing technological solutions and companies with extremely high growth potential. We have been historically finding the right balance between tech, data, and business allowing us to help improve the ecosystem and assist leading publishers and brands in connecting most effectively.
 
Our team is comprised of knowledgeable individuals who all have vast experience in ad tech and are in a position to share that knowledge and work closely with each company to enable them to achieve their full potential and accelerate growth. We can execute across multiple internet verticals with technology developed in-house by finding the right combination between business and tech.

Name: The Lunch Break
Description:
Join Lunch Break, a top-notch podcast. 
Dive into expert conversations bridging employer-graduate gaps. Get key insights into diverse job roles and corporate cultures. Elevate your career with The Lunch Break! #LunchBreakPodcast #ProfessionalDevelopment

Name: Women Talk Tech
Description:
The Women Talk Tech initiative is an important movement that provides visibility into the state of women in the technology sector.

The Women Talk Tech Podcast is not just another business podcast. Each episode is a new story of a woman who has had to overcome challenges and biases in order to be successful in a tech career. It discusses the hard topics and brings to light the current challenges women are facing today find their into a tech career.

We currently run workshops in North America for tech leadership teams that want to identify a framework for creating a more diverse workforce for their company.

Follow us on Instagram at @womentalktechpodcast and Twitter @womentalktech_

Name: ItaliAbsolutely
Description:
ItaliAbsolutely.com
ItaliAbsolutely.com is a new publishing project with a strong B2B vocation aimed primarily at international travel professionals specialized in the sale of travel packages to and in Italy. With in-depth content, news and suggestions, it is an ideal tool, facilitating access to Italy’s tourism offer. In this single web environment you can find the best ideas for your business as well as gaining access to select travel packages.  ItaliAbsolutely.com - connecting tourism supply and demand.                                                                                         

The Publisher
Travel Open Day Srl is a company specialized in publishing, events, web and tourism marketing. We edit Travel Quotidiano, for over 30 years a point of reference for Italian and international tour operators, and ItaliAbsolutely.com a new travel digital hub. We have organized over 500 travel events in Italy and abroad, promoting all aspects of travel and training for professionals: a winning format that has revolutionized B2B meetings in Italian tourism. We have also organized hundreds of online webinars, virtual events and one-to-one meetings engaging the big players of world tourism.

Our market
Italy boasts the highest concentration of tourist destinations and attractions in the world. Accessing multiple online and offline sources professionals organizing tours in Italy often find fragmented and dispersive information. What’s more, many do not all have the opportunity to visit Italy or do business at travel fairs and events.  Our MISSION is to provide a new reliable and authoritative web channel in ENGLISH that talks about Italy.  Responding to the need of intermediation, simplifying research, providing updates and in-depth analysis for the construction of appealing travel proposals, we are a one-stop solution for travel professionals.

Name: Palais F*luxx
Description:
Palais F*luxx - Online-Magazin für Rausch, Revolte, Wechseljahre. 
Gegründet im Herbst 2020. 

Es bildet die Lebenswelt dieser Zielgruppe ab und bietet an, die – auch schwierigen – Veränderungsprozesse als Chance und als Lustgewinn zu begreifen. Wir blicken mit Staunen, Neugier und Begeisterung auf diese Zeit des Wandels und befreien "Alter" aus der Spirale der Abwertung. 

Palais F*luxx bindet die Userinnen ein, beteiligt sie, indem sie Inhalte beisteuern. Wir bieten Frauen den Raum, sich mit ihren Themen, ihrer Arbeit und Expertise zu zeigen. Und regen an, diese spannenden Jahre lustvoll und angeregt zu gestalten und genießen.

Name: Culturamas
Description:
Es una revista de información cultural en Internet, independiente y de espíritu colaborativo, donde generamos nuestros propios contenidos en forma de reseñas, entrevistas, novedades, noticias, concursos, columnas de opinión, vídeos, etc. Culturamas nació en febrero de 2010 con un origen inicialmente literario, sin embargo, hemos querido ampliar nuestro alcance con la inclusión de nuevas secciones como Arte, Cómic, Cine, Fotografía, Música o Videojuegos.

Nuestra misión es ser sitio de referencia del sector cultural en la Red y según los datos que nos reporta Google Analytics (45.000 visitas mensuales y unas 150.000 en total) lo estamos consiguiendo.

Como revista cultural, las funciones de Culturamas son:
	•	informar sobre la actualidad cultural
	•	ejercer de prescriptor cualificado e independiente
	•	fomentar y difundir la Cultura
	•	generar contenidos propios y objetivos
	•	establecer redes de información culturales
	•	promocionar la lectura

Para su consecución Culturamas cuenta con un equipo de colaboradores, que aúna personalidades y autores contrastados con otros más jóvenes, cualificado y con gran conocimiento del sector.

Name: Seaze
Description:
Seaze is a podcast that celebrates the innovators and changemakers dedicated to protecting, conserving, and regenerating our oceans through impactful solutions. Hosted by Marianne Brisson and Antonia Nichols, Seaze spotlights cutting-edge blue innovation and entrepreneurship, inspiring listeners to envision a sustainable future for our seas.

From replacing plastics with seaweed-based packaging to transforming recycled oysters into fashion, we dive deep with a new wave of entrepreneurs who are redefining the relationship between business and the ocean. At Seaze, we feature those who put our planet and people above profit, proving that impactful solutions can lead the way to a thriving ocean and a better world.

Listen on Spotify & Apple Podcast.
Watch on Youtube.
(2022-2025)

Name: Le Quotidien Luxembourg
Description:
Le Quotidien est un journal francophone, fondé en 2001, appartenant au groupe Editpress.

Il est diffusé dans tout le Luxembourg et suit l’actualité du pays et de la Grande Région.

Notre but : faire vivre l’actualité avec nos reportages, faire l’actualité avec nos rencontres et interviews.

Name: Transmission
Description: Transmission, c’est des conversations entre les générations, avec les intellectuels d’hier et de demain.

Name: Argonotlar Güncel Sanat
Description:
Argonotlar güncel sanat başta olmak üzere günümüzün sanatsal tartışmalarını ele alan çevrimiçi bir platformdur. Bağımsız ve çok sesli bir güncel sanat platformu olmak için 2020 yılında yayın hayatına başlayan Argonotlar, güncel sanat tartışmalarına dair içerik üretirken okurları ile dirsek temasında olmayı ve karşılıklı görüş alışverişinde bulunmayı önemser. Sanat üretimini ve sergileri kültürel ve toplumsal bir tartışma zemini olarak gören Argonotlar aynı zamanda güncel bir kaynak olmayı hedefler. 
Platform, adını aldığı Maggie Nelson’ın anneliğin, ebeveynliğin, müşterekliğin, dilin ve aşkın dönüşümünü işaret ettiği romanı Argonotlar’da sorduğu soruları sanat için soruyor: Bir kabuğa, kimliğe ihtiyacımız var mı gerçekten? Öyle olsa bile, bir kimlikle özdeşleşmek mümkün mü?

Name: Less Invasive Podcast
Description:
A podcast about Minimally Invasive Surgery and technologies enabling these techniques, as well as other emerging assistive technologies that will spread in the radiology and operating room environments. 

Robotics, Augmented Reality, Virtual Reality, surgical navigation, procedural telemedicine, artificial intelligence, data platforms, and more.

Hosted by Lucien Blondel, Lucien is an entrepreneur with a 20+ yr experience in surgical robotics for neurosurgery, orthopedics, spine surgery, interventional radiology and interventional oncology.

Name: KOOL Mag
Description:
KOOL Mag, le média pour les papas. 
Pour les parents qui essaient d’être parfaits… mais qui recommenceront demain ! 

Premier média digital qui parle aux pères, KOOL est un guide dans un monde en constante évolution, qui les encouragent à rester impliqués de manière responsable, tout en conservant leur attitude « cool ».
KOOL met l’accent sur la paternité moderne et les défis auxquels les pères d’aujourd’hui sont confrontés, un espace unique où les papas peuvent trouver des conseils pratiques, des réflexions inspirantes et une communauté partageant les mêmes valeurs.

Un média du groupe Horyzon

Name: Robotics Today
Description:
Robotics Today is an international web portal that provides a publishing platform for anyone that is related to robotics or automation with the latest information about robots, robotics and those who make it happen. 

This includes a global robot database, an overview of all robot-related projects and developers involved and the latest news. 

Our aim is to create a clear overview of  the current status of robot development and to give a realistic view of what we might expect of the role of robots in society.

Name: Le Pouvoir au Féminin
Description:
Ca veut dire quoi, pour une femme, d’endosser un rôle de directrice ou de cheffe d’entreprise ?

C’est la question à laquelle des femmes, qui ont brisé le plafond de verre, vont tenter de répondre. Elles nous partagent leur vie "là haut", les challenges qu’elles ont relevés pour arriver là et surtout les débris de verre qui restent aujourd’hui sur leur chemin.

Vous pouvez dès à présent écouter la bande annonce sur toutes les plateformes.

Name: Oh爸媽 ohpama.com - Official
Description:
Launched in 2015 by Sing Tao News Corporation, Ohpama.com is the No.1 Digital Parenting Media in Hong Kong. Ohpama.com has built a strong reputation among readers and advertisers for its trustworthy content and interactive events on parenting and education, as well as total marketing solution from online to offline for advertisers. 

We are always seeking smart, highly motivated with positive attitude individuals to work in the top education and parenting media with fast-paced, challenging and achievement-oriented environment . You will work with a young, active and dynamic team to develop your career and find a friendly and supportive culture in Ohpama.com.

Name: Circular Now
Description:
Circular Now è un gruppo indipendente che si rivolge alle nuove generazioni e a chiunque voglia approfondire i temi che riguardano la sostenibilità e l’economia circolare, propulsori della quarta rivoluzione industriale.

I contenuti trattati sono suddivisi principalmente in quattro macroaree:

• Agrifood – Analisi della filiera agroalimentare a 360° e innovazioni di settore: case history, notizie e approfondimenti.
• Farmaceutica, Cosmetica e Nutraceutica – Valutazione e valorizzazione degli scarti organici, analizzando i possibili impieghi dei principi attivi derivanti dagli stessi a scopo salutistico e cosmeceutico.
• Scienza e Materiali – Approfondimento degli aspetti più innovativi e tecnologici legati alla sostenibilità ambientale e descrizione analitica dell’interazione di tutte le classi di materiali con l’ambiente.
• Dati e Statistiche – Promozione e diffusione di dati e statistiche, seguendo il principio dell’imparzialità e della completezza, raccolti e pubblicati da enti pubblici, istituti, associazioni ecc.

L’attività viene svolta intrecciando competenze specifiche in grado di supportare la divulgazione di informazioni, dinamiche e manovre sociali-politiche-economiche, valorizzando esperienze e decisioni innovative di tutti quegli attori coinvolti nella lotta all’inquinamento e nella riduzione di rifiuti, che quotidianamente vengono prodotti e smaltiti impropriamente sul nostro Pianeta.

Per info scriveteci a info@circularnow.it

Standardisation de l’information liée à l’installation
Accompagnement des conjoints, facteur clé de réussite des missions

Audience engagée avant et après l’installation

 Un tiers de confiance, neutre et reconnu entre :
les entreprises et leurs talents internationaux
les marques et une audience expatriée en recherche de repères

Avec :
20 ans d’expertise terrain
le Guide Just Arrived, référence n°1 de l’expatriation au Luxembourg
des dispositifs pensés pour durer, pas pour faire du bruit inutile.

Just Arrived vous aide à mieux accompagner, mieux informer et mieux communiquer auprès des talents internationaux au Luxembourg.

Os conteúdos são colaborativos, produzido por universitários das principais faculdades de São Paulo, disponibilizados em diferentes plataformas on e off-line, e consumido por jovens de todo país.

 Aqui, o universitário cria conteúdo relevante, ganha voz e audiência, além de compartilhar a sua visão de mundo. 

Conta 40 mil revistas circulando por mês dentro dos campus, além do portal com 1M de acessos/mês, mídias sociais e ativações. Sempre fomentando discussões e convidando à reflexão. 

Desta forma o aluno se aproxima do mercado de trabalho, ganha experiência profissional, monta seu portfólio e é impulsionado para sua área de atuação.

Name: This Anthro Life Podcast
Description:
Unearth the ingenious potential of humanity with This Anthro Life, an exploration of culture, design, business, and technology. Spearheaded by acclaimed Anthropologist Dr. Adam Gamwell, This Anthro Life equips leaders, individuals, and organizations to shape a more compassionate future. We aim to broaden perspectives and fortify decision-making skills by fostering a profound understanding of culture coupled with the transformative power of storytelling.

With curated conversations and thought-provoking discussions featuring humanity's top makers and minds, prepare to have your perspective transformed. This Anthro Life delves into various facets of human society—from examining the complexities of cultural identity to understanding the influence of technology on our everyday lives.

  Change Your Perspective
Explore the complexities of life in a simple and engaging way. From AI and robotics revolutionizing the nature of work to emojis changing how we communicate, we delve into the forces shaping our world. No topic is off-limits—fossil fuels and their impact on our planet, the race to find alternative energy solutions, and so much more.

 Captivating Conversations
Go beyond surface-level discussions with deep dives into fascinating topics. Dr. Adam Gamwell's interviews are thought-provoking, enlightening, and always entertaining. Carefully crafted questions ensure engaging conversations that are free from jargon, making them accessible to listeners of all backgrounds.

Beyond offering an engaging outlook on human experiences, This Anthro Life lends its anthropological expertise to businesses, organizations, and individuals. We help them navigate challenges with effective communication techniques and innovative problem-solving strategies rooted in a nuanced understanding of human behavior and social structures.

Description:
The Tylt is a digital media company that takes an audience-first approach to publishing. Using thought-provoking questions as the focal point of our story telling, we’ve built listening into our DNA. Through engaging audiences and creating social conversations, we measure and deliver culturally relative insights. The Tylt is redefining what it means to be a media company in today’s landscapes as the idea of readers and consumers as passive observers is long gone. People are hungry to be active participants in the stories that are important to them, and we help them do that.

The Tylt was originally developed by the Alpha Group, which serves as the in-house tech and media incubator for Advance Local. Advance Local is part of the Advance family of businesses. Advance’s portfolio of exceptional companies includes Condé Nast, Advance Local, Stage Entertainment, American City Business Journals, Leaders Group, Turnitin, 1010data, and POP. Advance is also among the largest shareholders in Charter Communications, Discovery and Reddit.

Name: Business at its Best
Description:
Business at its Best exists to tell inspiring stories from businesses that are making a difference to their customers, communities, their people, and the planet.

From ethically made socks for frontline workers and a start-up school for the over 50s, to a renewable energy company with ‘Double Unicorn’ status and Liverpool’s first underground vertical farm, we’re sharing stories of businesses that have collaborated, changed shape, and given back. 

Help us to celebrate more by nominating your business or one you’ve seen doing great things - click on the 'Learn More' button below and complete the simple form. 

The focus of this programme is businesses of all shapes and sizes, rather than charities. From franchises to social enterprises, sole traders to limited companies, partnerships to PLCs, we’re especially interested in sharing stories that demonstrate collaboration and innovation, and show what’s possible. 

Business at its Best has been initiated by private sector and civil society organisations - the CBI, Federated Hermes, The Inclusive Economy Partnership, PwC, ReGenerate, and The School for Social Entrepreneurs.

Good news is motivating, and we can learn from it too.

Avec leurs forces et leurs réussites, mais aussi leurs faiblesses et leurs échecs. Car chaque virage entrepris, chaque occasion manquée, chaque rencontre décisive… sont autant de pierres à l’édifice d’un parcours unique.

Parce que, face à la révolution numérique qui bouleverse les codes socio-professionnels, les compétences techniques sont aujourd’hui périssables, Quintessence s’intéresse à ce qui, demain, fera de chaque individu un professionnel reconnu : son esprit, son savoir-être, son intelligence émotionnelle. 

Rédigés par des journalistes professionnels, les portraits Quintessence supposent un entretien approfondi avec l'intéressé et le témoignage de plusieurs personnes capables d'apporter un témoignage éclairé (proche, client, partenaire, associé, collaborateur....).

automotive.

Name: Startup Editor
Description: Startup Editor is a platform that amplifies the voices of startups and shares their stories with a wider audience. Every startup has a unique story to tell, and we are dedicated to providing a space that not only highlights their achievements but also inspires the next generation of entrepreneurs.

Name: Actu Salade
Description:
Pour vous servir sur un plateau d’humeur la une de l’information, les réalités en temps et en heures sur l’économie, l’agriculture, l’éducation, la culture et l’actualité socio-politique ... la salade de l’actualité est un mélange de tout décorée à la mayonnaise des informations les plus diverses sur un ton varié à la version Togolaise. Un décryptage des informations savouré des meilleurs commentaires. Tout ce joyau pour vous avec une vivacité toujours au rendez-vous.

La salade de l’actualité se fait un canal de diffusion avec une multitude de goût varié à un appétit de quiétude paradisiaque. Avec toute la plus grande humilité possible, la salade de l’actualité vous promet grand pour chaque quotidien.

Name: BRICKLY
Description:
Brickly, c’est le média qui décrypte l’actu immobilière sans jargon et sans blabla.
 Carrousels, vidéos, formats courts… On t’explique ce qui se passe sur le marché, dans les lois, chez les pros – avec un ton clair, moderne et accessible.

Et pour aller plus loin, on a lancé Brique par Brique, le podcast où l’on construit ensemble une vision concrète de l’immobilier d’aujourd’hui.
 À chaque épisode, un invité ou un sujet clé, une brique de plus pour comprendre les enjeux de ce secteur qui nous concerne tous.

 Tu veux comprendre l’immobilier enfin simplement ?
Abonne-toi à Brickly et écoute Brique par Brique.

Name: Industry Explorers
Description:
Fellow Explorers, together we embark on a journey. An adventurous expedition along the unconventional career paths of the most interesting professional creatures.

Industry Explorers is all about discovering endless professional possibilities through the stories of our incredible guests. This podcast is for the high schooler who has no idea what to do after graduation, the undecided majors, the seasoned worker looking into a career change, the existentialist suffering an identity crisis, and everything in between.

So what are you waiting for? Explore industries and take action!

Name: Tekneco

Insieme al contributo delle Università, di giornalisti e lettori, Tekneco vuole comunicare le eccellenze e l'innovazione in ambito di bioedilizia, architettura sostenibile, tecnologia e design.

Name: Rare Disease 360
Description:
Dedicated solely to rare diseases, Rare Disease 360 is an all-encompassing resource hub that compiles the entirety of relevant information on multiple rare disease states in order to help health care professionals make the biggest impact on some of the smallest patient populations.

Through breaking news, in-depth features, conference coverage, content curation from around the globe, and more, Rare Disease 360 strives to deliver content that transcends what is traditionally covered when rare diseases are viewed as a footnote or afterthought by making it the entirety of our focus. With the most important news amassed conveniently in one location, Rare Disease 360 is a valuable resource to clinicians, patients, and caregivers navigating rare diseases.

Name: TaxSagar
Description: The Taxation system of India took a paradigm shift with the advent of Goods & Services Tax (GST). Since the inception of GST, it has not been stagnant and keeps on evolving leaps and bounds everyday. This has created a lot of ambiguity for businesses, tax professionals and public at large. We at TaxSagar aim to develop a better understanding about GST along with keeping the stakeholders updated about changes in law.

Description: Day Shift Digital is devoted to helping e-commerce brands, non-profits and small businesses grow. We build within WordPress, Shopify and Webflow. Looking to take your site to the next level? Let's chat.

Name: SME Futures
Description:
SMEs not only play a crucial role in providing large employment opportunities at comparatively lower capital cost than large industries do, they also help in industrialisation of rural areas. SMEs are complementary to large industries as ancillary units and contribute enormously to the socio-economic development of the country. India currently has over 48 million SMEs, which contribute more than 45 per cent of India’s industrial output, 40 per cent of the country’s total exports and create 1.3 million jobs every year.

Despite the sector playing such an important role in the development of India, very few people talk about its contribution. India has a deluge of media entities today across platforms, but hardly anyone talks about SMEs the way corporate titans are talked about. SME Futures is here to change this equation. It is a platform where SME leaders will find their voice and concerns amplified. Through its cutting-edge technology and content that will match the big players in the field of business journalism, SME Futures will become a fair, objective, incisive and data-driven media outlet for the sector and the general reader. Its team of young journalists will hit the road across the country, peep into the chambers of policymakers and industry bodies and speak with stakeholders from the common consumer to traders and producers in text and video formats to offer its readers a comprehensive reportage.

Its about the businesses and leaders who drive forward with the ideas and innovations that impact us all. They are an unstoppable force inspired to lead, determined to define success by their own terms, and as passionate about play as they are working—often designing them as one and the same.

Name: Le carnet de l'étudiant étranger
Description:
"Le carnet de l'étudiant étranger" est un podcast mensuel diffusé sur radiolaser.fr (95.9 FM), destiné à accompagner les étudiants internationaux dans leur vie en France. 

Chaque 1ᵉʳ lundi du mois (17h-18h), nous décryptons les sujets essentiels : études, métiers, droit des étrangers et conseils pratiques pour mieux vivre son aventure.

Name: HOKYO
Description:
Hokyo Ott is a leading Indian OTT (over-the-top) streaming platform that provides users with a wide range of movies, web series, and short films in Hindi.  Users can access the content on the platform through a subscription-based model, which offers unlimited access to a large library of content for a recurring fee. In addition, some movies or web series may be available for rent or purchase on a transactional video on demand (TVOD) basis, providing users with greater flexibility in accessing specific titles.

Hokyo Ott has gained popularity in India by providing quality original content, including Hindi web shows, that is well-received by audiences. The platform has a user-friendly interface and is available on both web and mobile devices. Its official website, www.hokyo.in, provides users with a comprehensive list of available titles, as well as the option to filter and search for specific content based on their preferences.

One of the standout features of Hokyo Ott is its diverse collection of Hindi-language movies, which includes cult classics like "Boxer" starring Mithun Chakraborty and "Hastey Hastey" starring Jimmy Shergill and Rajpal Yadav. The platform also offers a range of original Hindi web series that have become quite popular among users. Hokyo Ott's commitment to providing quality content and a seamless viewing experience has made it a preferred destination for Indian audiences seeking entertainment online.

In conclusion, Hokyo Ott is a reputable Indian OTT streaming platform that offers a wide range of Hindi movies, web series, and short films through a subscription-based model. With its diverse collection of content, user-friendly interface, and commitment to quality, Hokyo Ott has become a top choice for Indian viewers looking for a high-quality streaming experience.

Name: Makler und Vermittler Podcast
Description:
Der Makler & Vermittler Podcast ist das unabhängige Branchenformat für echten Vertrieb.

Seit 2017 ist der Makler und Vermittler Podcast eine feste Größe in der Finanz- und Versicherungsbranche.

Kein Hochglanz-Marketing. Keine Produktshows. Sondern ehrliche Gespräche über das, was den Vertrieb wirklich bewegt: Menschen!

Hier treffen sich Finanz- und Versicherungsmakler, Entscheider aus Versicherungsunternehmen, Banken sowie Dienstleister aus angrenzenden Branchen um einzuordnen, zu reflektieren und Meinungen auszutauschen.

Über Vertrieb. Über Unternehmertum. Über Marktveränderungen. Und über die Menschen dahinter.

Im Mittelpunkt stehen Persönlichkeiten aus der Branche.
Menschen mit Haltung, Erfahrung und einer klaren Meinung und einem klaren Konzept.

Im Gespräch geht es nicht um Buzzwords, sondern um echte Learnings:
Was hat funktioniert? Was nicht? Und was würde man heute anders machen?

Der Makler & Vermittler Podcast ist redaktionell unabhängig.
Jede Episode steht für sich. Inhaltlich frei, ehrlich und ohne versteckte Agenda.

Ergänzend dazu entwickeln wir ausgewählte Sonder- und Kooperationsformate mit starken Partnern.

Diese Formate sind klar gekennzeichnet, thematisch fokussiert und gedacht für Tiefe, Relevanz und echte Mehrwerte für spezielle Zielgruppen.

Wenn du Vertrieb nicht nur machen, sondern verstehen willst.

Wenn du Einordnung suchst statt Dauerbeschallung.

Und wenn du wissen willst, wie andere ihren Weg im Finanz- und Versicherungsvertrieb gehen:

Dann bist du hier richtig.

 Jetzt abonnieren.

 Oder als Partner Teil eines Formats werden, das Vertrauen vor Reichweite stellt.

Name: Asia City Media Group
Description:
The Asia City Media Group is the region’s leading media company specializing in city living and lifestyle content and marketing solutions. The group was the first to introduce city magazines to Asia, and pioneered the concept of free-distribution publications in the region.  

From these origins we have grown to provide a comprehensive range of premium media content and services throughout Asia, reaching out regularly to more than one million of Asia’s top urban professionals every month.

The Asia City Media Group employs more than 40 staff in Bangkok. The group offers clients a unique opportunity to directly reach a targeted audience of affluent, well-educated residents locally or across Asia. 

We produce bkmagazine.com, BK Magazine, and Thai-language website Soimilk.com.  Asia City Studio, our content marketing team, helps clients create and distribute a variety of exciting digital, video and print custom media products (www.asiacity.com).

Name: DIVERSIPOD
Description:
Vamos falar sobre Diversidade & Inclusão no mercado de trabalho a partir das experiências de profissionais diversos que estão realmente vivenciando os desafios de ser minoria no dia a dia dentro das empresas?

O Bruno Nogueira, pessoa com deficiência, e a Raquel Belém, mulher preta, têm um convite para você: o podcast DIVERSIPOD, com transmissão ao vivo aqui no LinkedIn. 

A cada temporada, episódios quinzenais com convidados que integram grupos sub-representados dentro das organizações. Eles vão contar suas experiências no corporativo e o que esperam encontrar de pares, liderança e cultura em uma empresa que pretende ser diversa e inclusiva.

Vem com a gente, porque aqui diversidade pode!

Name: Sciences et Cultures

L'objectif est de créer des ponts entre sciences et cultures, en mettant en avant les réflexions de spécialistes via plusieurs formats : conférences, entretiens, présentations de recherches, documentaires.

Notre mission est de trouver un juste milieu entre la précision scientifique et son accès libre et gratuit offert au plus grand nombre. Loin des raccourcis de l'actualité et des polémiques sans fond, Sciences & Cultures souhaite mettre en avant le temps de l'explication nuancée et celui du dialogue entre les disciplines. 

À très vite ! 

Sciences & Cultures

Name: celebreMagazine
Description:
From ancient classicism to the fluid frontiers of luxury, an ancient essence with modern features. This is how celebreMagazine was born.   A word pun drawn from the Latin “Celebrem” and mixes it with the English “Magazine”. At the centre is an M, the final letter of one word and the initial letter of the other, which forms the basis of the editorial project.
celebreMagazine aims to discover the excellence of luxury in any sector: from lifestyle to gourmet, from fashion to art, from motoring to hotels. A constant scouting to give voice to the best, addressing those seeking for beauty and quality, aiming with the paper edition to an elitist public selected on a worlwide scale.
With the words of the famous Oscar Wilde we can say that “There is no second chance to make a first good impression”, our mantra.

Name: Podcast MULTI
Description:
MULTI part à la découverte des multi-entrepreneurs, ces porteurs de projets qui n'ont pas une, mais plusieurs activités ! 

L'émission s’intéresse à leur parcours, leurs réussites et échecs ainsi que leurs méthodes pour fonder et gérer de multiples entreprises et projets. Des échanges, de la valeur et du partage.

Le podcast est animé par Jonathan Khalfa, expert-comptable, co-dirigeant d’un cabinet comptant aujourd’hui 120 collaborateurs. Mais également entrepreneur, investisseur (au board de plus de 20 entreprises françaises) et coach d’e-sport au PSG (oui, cela existe !). 

MULTI est sa manière de mettre en lumière des entrepreneurs exceptionnels, de partager leurs expériences, leurs réussites, mais aussi leurs moments de vulnérabilité. 

Car c'est dans ces histoires que se trouvent l'inspiration, les leçons précieuses, et la force de persévérer.

Pour nous contacter : production@podcast-multi.fr

Name: Kpopmap
Description:
Kpopmap is a content-based fan community platform that connects Korean culture with a global audience. As a platform based in South Korea, it offers unique and authentic perspective on Korean culture and entertainment by directly communicating with entertainment companies in the country. Kpopmap boasts a diverse and multicultural team from various countries around the world, adding to its global appeal, and continues to connect with millions of fans around the world every month.

At Kpopmap, our core mission is to foster a sense of community and connection among fans from all corners of the globe. We pride ourselves on the diversity and inclusivity of our content, which spans across various aspects of Korean culture, including K-Pop and K-Drama, Korean webtoons, Korean society, and beautiful places to visit in Korea. We are dedicated to constantly aligning our offerings with the ever-evolving interests of our audience by updating our services and technology accordingly. Furthermore, we offer a unique platform that allows fans to write and publish their own articles, making Kpopmap an unparalleled and inclusive fan community.

Y encabeza 7 medios especializados en rubros claves como la industria láctea, acuícola, carne y sostenibilidad.

Name: infrabuddy.net

The objective is to offer its followers an exhaustive perspective on the construction and Infrastructure industry and to provide all around latest updates, trends from the sectors.

The Portal is all what people have to say on the current scenario of the industry. The views, reviews, opinions, interviews from experts of various trades within construction industry; be it marketing communication, business development, engineering, structural methods, techniques, finance, IT and HR.

The data is gathered from a mixture of sources and analysed before it is made accessible to all our readers which give the complete venture details from origination till finishing. The system gives propelling substance to experts whatsoever levels of the construction quality chain, including up-to-the-moment news on new activities and business improvements; profiles of construction industries, builders and suppliers and standard useful blog entries made by expert construction writers.

Name: NewJerseyNewsroom.com

Name: En un battement d'aile
Description:
Le 6ème rapport du GIEC l’a rappelé : les médias ont un rôle à jouer dans la bonne compréhension des enjeux actuels.

Les conséquences du dérèglement climatique sont de plus en plus visibles, avec des records de chaleur chaque semaine et de violents incendies. Une actualité suffisamment anxiogène pour que de nombreuses personnes décident de ne plus s’informer. 

Et si nous, journalistes, nous parlions plus et mieux d’écologie et surtout des solutions qui existent ?

 Florence Gault a décidé d’apporter sa pierre à l’édifice en créant le podcast "En un battement d’aile". 

 Tous les quinze jours, elle vous emmène en reportage sur le terrain pour décrypter un enjeu écologique. Dans ce podcast, pas de catastrophisme, mais une mise en lumière de solutions inspirantes, dans une démarche de journalisme de solutions.

We strive to combine the best of the media with new technologies to provide unique added value to websites, newspaper publishers, radio/TV broadcasters, telecom companies, IPV/OTT platforms, inflight entertainment, connected cars, DOOH, video wall services and AR/VR stores. 

Our aim is to serve you and fulfill your needs. So please feel free to contact us anytime to share with your needs, critics, craziest suggestions or great ideas.

Name: inwestorzy.tv
Description:
O inwestorzy.tv

inwestorzy.tv - telewizja (dla) inwestorów

Telewizja inwestorzy.tv wystartowała w maju 2015 roku wypełniając niszę na rynku medialnym. Pierwsze tygodnie działalności potwierdziły skalę zapotrzebowania na wiedzę dotyczącą rynku kapitałowego i w konsekwencji doprowadziły do powstania ponad trzydziestu programów własnych wchodzących w skład autorskiej ramówki telewizyjnej tworzonych przez dziennikarzy inwestorzy.tv  wspólnie z analitykami, blogerami oraz praktykami rynku finansowego. W kwietniu 2018 roku spółka uruchomiła program Giełdowy ranek, czyli pierwsze pasmo na żywo, nadawane codziennie o godzinie 10:00.

Nagrania programów odbywają się w budynku Giełdy Papierów Wartościowych w Warszawie, gdzie spółka we wrześniu 2016 roku uruchomiła Centrum Inwestora oraz posiada własne studio nagrań.

Ekipa inwestorzy.tv jest obecna na wszystkich ważnych wydarzeniach branżowych w Polsce, konferencjach i kongresach ekonomicznych wielokrotnie obejmując nad nimi patronat medialny.

Spółka inwestorzy.tv SA jest również organizatorem Gali Rekiny Biznesu, Gali Nagrody Specjalne Inwestorów Filary Polskiej Gospodarki, konferencji Capital Market Forum oraz ekskluzywnego eventu Magic Luxury Night.

Name: Gamekult
Description:
Réputé pour son intransigeance et ses contenus à forte valeur ajoutée, le site est animé par une équipe de journalistes professionnels qui testent les nouveaux jeux et proposent toutes les informations du monde du jeu vidéo ainsi que l’actualité économique et business du secteur.

Lancé en décembre 2000 pour proposer une alternative au contenu jeu vidéo disponible sur le web à l’époque, Gamekult se voit rapidement récompensé par la communauté des joueurs et dépasse nettement les objectifs fixés par les fondateurs pour devenir une des références du web francophone, avec plus de 900 000 visiteurs uniques (MNR global, novembre 2016).

En 2015, Gamekult est devenu le premier site français de jeux vidéo à proposer son offre Premium, un succès qui a permis à la marque de consolider sa légitimité auprès d’un public exigeant et demandeur d’une meilleure qualité de contenu sur internet.

Racheté par le groupe américain CNET Networks (Gamespot, Metacritic, GameFAQs, CNET, ZDnet…) en 2007, Gamekult appartient depuis 2014 à NEWEB, groupe média spécialisé dans l’expertise produit et le conseil avant achat, également éditeur des sites Beauté Test, CNET France, Focus Numérique, Les Numériques et ZDNet.

Name: Brain We Are
Description:
Pomocí Brain We Are objevujeme možnosti lidského potenciálu a poznání. Čerpáme informace z vědeckých studií, podcastů a knih, na základě čehož pak optimalizujeme vlastní každodenní zkušenost a předáváme to dále ve formě podcastu, blogu, přednášek. Pole působnosti v rámci zdraví a péče o vlastní Mind-Body-Spirit skýtá nevídané možnosti práce. Rádi nacházíme nové způsoby řešení starých problémů a transformujeme je do takové podoby, aby byly lehce aplikovatelné pro každého. Máme dojem, že pole zdravotnictví a vzdělávání čekají velké změny a rádi našimi mozky spoluutváříme už tak rostoucí trend kvality bytí ve světě. 

Účel naší činnosti je inspirovat, pobavit a zlepšit zkušenost se životem třeba jen jedinému člověku na planetě.

Eu postava em minha timeline e ninguém dava ouvido então decidi criar a página Apocalipse Urgente em 2019 e aqui estamos até a volta do Senhor Jesus

Name: Welcome to the Jungle Slovensko
Description:
Pripomína vám pracovný trh džungľu?

Welcome to the Jungle je multiplatformové medium, ktorého cieľom je pomôcť každému človeku nájsť naplnenie vo svojom pracovnom živote.

Vytvárame množstvo kvalitného a rôznorodého obsahu (články, videá, podcasty, magazín a podujatia), aby sme inšpirovali mladých profesionálov a pozitívne ovplyvnili ich vzťah k práci.

Vytvorili sme tiež miesto kariérnej inšpirácie s viac ako 1500 profilmi spoločností, obsahujúcimi fotografie, videá a kľúčové údaje (ako počet zamestnancov, zastúpenie pohlaví, priemerný vek), a tak sprístupnili hodnotné informácie pre potenciálnych kandidátov. Odteraz je pre nich omnoho jednoduchšie zúžiť si výber spoločností, do ktorých skutočne zapadnú!

V snahe ponúknuť kandidátom čo najlepšiu skúsenosť, poskytujeme rekrutérom Welcome Kit, ATS system na spravovanie kandidátov, ktorý je kolaboratívny, intuitívny a efektívny. Spoločnosti vďaka nemu môžu zverejňovať neobmedzené množstvo pracovných ponúk na svojom profile a efektívne zastrešiť celý prijímací proces.

Name: Culture Plus Asia
Description:
Culture Plus 藝文拾號 is an interactive platform aimed at all cultural lovers, experts or neophytes, providing a general overview of art and cultural events and activities in Hong Kong and Shanghai.

With the aim to make art and culture accessible to all, Culture Plus helps people and families to curate their own cultural journey and to develop their personal interests and taste in art and culture.

The "Cultural Events" provide a comprehensive listing of cultural activities and happenings across all categories: architecture, heritage, crafts, design, fashion and jewellery, literature, dance, music, opera, theatre, cinema, painting, ink and drawing, photography, sculpture, street art, digital art, fairs and festivals, etc.

The "Features+" offer insightful content about the cultural scene in an accessible way: events in-depth coverage and behind-the-scenes, artists interviews and cultural figures portraits, art insights.

Culture Plus also offers other services to assist cultural institutions and affiliates: copywriting and editorial content creation, events promotion, invitations and PR.

Culture Plus was created in 2020 by Julien-Loïc Garin and Emilie El Jaouhari.

Name: Grand Slam Journey
Description:
Grand Slam Journey is the podcast where sports, business, and technology collide. Hosted by former athlete Klara Jagosova, each episode explores how the winning mindset learned through sports can drive success and innovation in every stage of life—on the field and beyond.

Join industry leaders, former athletes, and trailblazers as they share lessons on high-performance mindsets, career transitions, and achieving greatness across all pursuits. Whether you’re seeking inspiration, insights on adapting to change, or strategies to unlock your potential, Grand Slam Journey delivers actionable conversations for anyone passionate about growth.

New episodes feature:
 Stories of transition from sports to business & tech
 Insights on maximizing performance and embracing life after competition
 The mindset and habits that connect achievement in any field

Ready to redefine what’s possible? Listen, learn, and unlock your journey.

Name: The SEN Mums' Career Club
Description:
There is no shortage of content for women balancing parenting with a career. Ditto for those caring for a child with a disability. But what about the women doing both? 

The SEN Mums’ Career Club is a place for women raising children with complex and additional needs to find support and inspiration from fellow mums who are also endlessly juggling hospital appointments, DLA forms and EHCP reviews with climbing the career ladder. 

Every week, journalist and SEN mum Leisa Millar speaks to women in fascinating and diverse roles – from medicine to law, PR to business – to find out how they make work work for them in the face of seemingly insurmountable challenges.

Name: GayTravel
Description:
Your LGBT+ Travel Resource  Gay-friendly hotels, destinations, and more!

We created GayTravel to be a model for the type of community we want our world to be:  diverse, inclusive and safe. 

For over 20 years, we have traveled the globe seeking gay-friendly, welcoming and inspiring destinations, accommodations, cruises, tours, events, entertainment, attractions, clubs, restaurants, and venues to bring you meticulously curated recommendations that represent the rarified taste of our LGBTQ travelers, Editors, Experts,and GayTravel Gurus.

The U.S. Department of State has sought GayTravel’s feedback in developing safe protocols for LGBTQ travelers abroad.  GayTravel has been featured in the New York Times, The Wall Street Journal and Smart Money Magazine.

GayTravel prides itself on working with travel partners around the world who have shown themselves to be gay-friendly and welcoming to the LGBTQ community and who constantly improve their amenities and service levels for all travelers. GayTravel will decline advertising from companies and organizations that have shown discriminatory behavior toward any minority community.

It is our privilege to serve as your trusted resource for memorable, lifetime travel experiences.  We are truly fortunate to be a part of a community that understands the power of travel as a means to bring cultures together, to form friendships, and to learn from each other.  We are humbled by this and will never cease to be inspired by the special places we travel and the fascinating people we meet along the way.

Name: Køge.tv & podcast
Description:
Vi er dedikerede til at tilbyde en helt ny medieoplevelse, der skiller sig ud fra traditionelle nyhedsmedier og giver dig en unik lytte- og seeroplevelse.

Vi lever i en tid, hvor mange mennesker føler sig trætte af de konventionelle nyhedsformater og traditionelle medier, der kæmper for at følge med udviklingen og nå ud til deres målgruppe. Vores vision er at skabe et medie, der passer til den moderne tid og rammer ind i den digitale æra, hvor flere og flere danskere søger efter alternativer til de traditionelle mediekanaler.

DR Medieforsknings årlige rapport viser klart, at traditionelle medier er i tilbagegang, mens online platforme vinder mere og mere ind hos danskerne, herunder også Køgegenserne. Podcast-mediet er en af de største vindere i denne udvikling, og det er en trend, vi ønsker at udnytte fuldt ud.

Faktisk lytter hver tredje dansker til podcasts mindst en gang om ugen.

Baseret på denne indsigt ønsker vi at introducere dig til vores nye lokale medie i Køge. Vores koncept er simpelt, men effektivt: Vi producerer spændende og engagerende podcasts, der distribueres på forskellige podcast-platforme og deles som video-podcasts på populære sociale medier som Facebook og YouTube. Men det stopper ikke der! Vi går endnu videre ved også at præsentere vores podcast som en lokal tv-kanal på YouSee's kabel-tv og YouTube-LIVE, så vi virkelig når ud til så mange Køgegensere som muligt.

Se mere her: https://koege.tv/om-koegetv-podcast/

Originally for Jamie's motivational speaking, with Charlott's addition, See No Bounds expanded to assist businesses in being proactive in the disabled market. During COVID-19, it became a hub for people and businesses to pivot, reconnect, and grow.

Today, See No Bounds passionately supports entrepreneurs from startup to growth, See No Bounds is fast growing to become a leader in the networking sector. Under joint leadership, it fosters a network of collaboration, providing a platform for personal profiles, business listings, and supportive groups.

See No Bounds inspires hope, breaking barriers, and empowering the business community. Its dedication ensures every business is welcome, respected, and cultivated.

Mit dem Portal RHEINISCHE POST betreibt das Unternehmen seit 1996 eines der erfolgreichsten Nachrichtenportale in Deutschland. Das RP Digital Network bietet seinen Partnern Netzwerkeffekte auf Basis eines präzisen Verständnisses der lokalen Nutzerbedürfnisse, der Bereitstellung von technologischen Lösungen mit einer differenzierten Monetarisierung der qualitativen Inhalte und Services.

Zudem ergänzen das News-Portal TONIGHT-News, das populäre Amateurfußballportal FuPa, das Prospektportal weekli sowie RP Trauer und RP Dating das Angebot und verbinden redaktionelle Inhalte mit erfolgreicher Vermarktung. Auf rp-stellenmarkt.de können User zudem ihren neuen Traumjob finden und Unternehmen zielgerichtet ihre Stellenanzeige(n) platzieren. Das Portal rp-immobilienmarkt.de bietet zudem zahlreiche Services aus dem Immobilienmarkt der Rheinischen Post und hilft bei der Suche nach Wohn- und Gewerbeimmobilien.

Name: The Bold Italic
Description:
The Bold Italic is an online magazine in San Francisco. We celebrate the spirit of the city. 

We are a chorus of voices. The Bold Italic publishes first-person stories by locals on issues and topics that are on the brains and lips of San Franciscans. We are not a news site, we’re a hub for conversations to be heard and discussed. Some of the pieces we publish will make you laugh. Some will have you nodding your head in agreement. And others will completely piss you off. The views expressed here do not necessarily reflect the views of The Bold Italic, but they are the true opinions, experiences, and thoughts of writers from the diverse community we live amongst. Whatever feelings our stories incite, we hope our continuing conversation will get you thinking, talking, and inspire you to share your opinions with us on living in San Francisco. If you’ve got a compelling story or perspective to share, we want to hear it. Scroll to the bottom of this page to find out how to contribute your story.

We support businesses. The merchants, food carts, coffee shops, galleries, bars, and bookstores we patronize everyday are an undeniable part of how we understand and define our lives, personal spaces, and communities. It’s our mission to commemorate the greatness, beauty, innovation, and heart involved in doing business.

We inspire you to live life out in the city. There are amazing things happening around you. The content and events we offer are designed to invite you to get off the computer and take part in the experiences right outside your door.

We help localize brands. Through our storytelling and bespoke experiences, we create authentic connections that bring brands to life at a personal level.

We know design matters. We understand that beautiful design uplifts. We enhance, provide valuable context, and extend the reach of our content with original illustration, photography, and thoughtful graphic design.

Name: Big Talk
Description:
Skip the Small Talk. Make Meaningful Connections.

Big Talk is a global movement that inspires genuine human connection. Through viral videos (@makebigtalk), interactive tools, and immersive experiences, Big Talk helps people move beyond small talk to build deeper, more meaningful relationships—with loved ones, coworkers, community members, classmates, strangers, and even themselves.

What began as a government-funded Fulbright research project has grown into a global force for connection, bridging divides and combating loneliness. From Fortune 500 companies to classrooms, mental health spaces, and even prisons, Big Talk is transforming the way we communicate.

Big Talk’s Reach Includes:
The Los Angeles Lakers
Universal Music Artists
The U.S. State Department
Harvard Medical School
Northwestern Business School, USC, NYU Shanghai
Mental health professionals, military veterans, and employees at Amazon, Microsoft, Uber, Spotify, and Google
Even inspiring marriage proposals

With 500,000+ followers, 125 million views across social media, and 6.5 million views on Kalina’s TEDx Talk, Big Talk has been featured in Forbes, USA Today, NBC News, The Washington Post, People, Time, Good Morning America, and Business Insider.

Why Big Talk?
Fosters Belonging – Helping teams, communities, and individuals feel truly seen and heard.
Bridges Divides – Encouraging conversations that build empathy, curiosity, and connection across differences.
Combats Loneliness – Creating spaces for vulnerability, authenticity, and lasting relationships.
Big Talk isn’t just about talking—it’s about transforming conversations, deepening human connections, and enriching lives.

Name: OTV | Open Television
Description:
Open Television (OTV) is a non-profit streaming platform and media incubator for intersectional storytelling, with artists and their creative visions at the center. 

OTV’s mission is to transform the way film, television and entertainment industries support independent artists and communities marginalized by their race, gender, sexuality, class, disability or nationality. Through intentional artist development and holistic community development the award-winning platform provides a network of care to identify, activate and mobilize the next generation of storytellers.

Since launching in 2015 as a research project housed at Northwestern University, OTV has transformed the way the film and television industry supports independent artists and communities marginalized by their race, gender, sexuality, class, disability or nationality. Through intentional artist development and holistic community development, the award-winning organization provides a network of care to identify, activate and mobilize the next generation of storytellers. In addition to serving as a streaming home (#OTVapp) for hundreds of intersectional pilots, series, short films and video art, OTV presents an annual fellowship (#OTVFellows), hosts an educational workshop series (#OTVStudyHall), and mounts an internationally recognized film competition (#BraveFutures).  

Learn more about OTV at https://www.weareo.tv/story.

Torun is a platform for the youth. We believe in educating, entertaining, and empowering the youth of Bangladesh and above with our content & programs. With Millennials and Gen Z individuals being a huge part of our population, we work to instill values in their lives through our operations. In a world where there are so many problems which can be improved if not solved totally, through cooperation and actions by the youth audience. Thus, we want to construct ourselves as the platform where the youth can be a part of the conversation.
With youth unemployment, crime, mental health and a lot of other issues having an overall gloomy impact on the world, the youth definitely needs to collaborate to be a part of the conversation where they can solve problems. Obviously an employer would prefer hiring a young person with creative and moral values over someone who has just fancy grades. Of course, the citizens would prefer leaders who cater to fixing real problem that would invite unity. Likewise, any youth individual would prefer spending valuable time on a platform where they can be entertained, educated and empowered. Our tagline being – ‘Impact – for the youth, by the youth’, we are promising to deliver values to change the world by the youth.
A common question that arises is how we are subsisting. The attention span of youth is constantly falling, as they are having more options with new technology and advancement over time. For this, brands are not being able to communicate with the young audience, thus lacking behind in sustainable possibilities. Therefore, we are operating as the gateway for brands as we are inviting them to come to our platform to create impact for the youth and by the youth, together through our content and programs.

2) In-house library and database: ERIPL has a database of more than 20000 Indian companies. Also we have records of newspaper clippings, annual reports, major corporate announcements, etc. 

3) Backing of Adfactors group: ERIPL has the backing of Adfactors group, which is a well-known name in financial advertising and PR business. Adfactors group is around 25 years old and is the largest financial advertising company in the country today. The group has its network spread all over the country and its clientele includes Financial Institutions and companies from the financial field like RBI, IDBI, SBI, UTI, IFCI, ABN Amro Bank, Rabo Bank, Kotak Mahindra, amongst others and well-known corporates’ like Tata’s, Larsen & Toubro etc.
