Name: Euromoney Country Risk (ECR)
Description:
Euromoney Country Risk (ECR) is an online community of economic and political experts that provides real time scores in categories that relate to economic, structural and political risk. 

It was launched in 1982, being one of the longest lasting research projects at Euromoney. 

ECR’s expert contributor panel provide real-time scores in 15 categories relating to economic, political and structural risk. The consensus scores are combined with data from the IMF/World Bank on debt indicators, and survey data on sovereign access to international capital markets.
The accumulated output from these data sources creates the overall ECR score for over 174 individual countries.

Our services include:

*ECR Subscription provides access to the Global Risk Table, Weekly updates, Monthly reports and Annual Subscription Packages

*ECR Bespoke Report provides an in-depth, bespoke analytical report focused on a financial market or region of interest to the client

*ECR Historic Data provides one off, bespoke report drawing on the datasets dating back to the 1980s.

For further information regarding our services, please get into touch with:
Chen-Ta Sung (Head of Research, Euromoney Country Risk) on chenta.sung@euromoney.com 
Jeremy Weltman (Chief Editor, Euromoney Country Risk) on jeremy.weltman@euromoney.com
Dean Gounden (Commercial Director, Subscription, Euromoney & Global Capital) on dean.gounden@euromoneyplc.com

Name: Advocate Media - Dallas
Description:
The Advocate is the local news source for four Dallas, Texas, neighborhoods: Lakewood/East Dallas, Lake Highlands, Oak Cliff, and Preston Hollow. We also have a digital and print publication in Plano, Texas.

In our monthly magazines, daily websites and social media, and weekly email newsletters, we talk about neighborhood dining, schools, business, history, nonprofits, development and, most importantly, the stories of interesting people.

Learn more about The Advocate and our four neighborhood editions:
www.advocatemag.com and visit our Plano publication at planomagazine.com

The Advocate was founded more than 30 years ago by journalists Rick Wamre and Jeff Siegel and designer Tom Zielinski, longtime Dallas residents who sensed a receptiveness in the city’s neighborhoods for in-depth, quality community news. 

The Advocate began with the monthly Lakewood/East Dallas magazine in 1991, followed a year later with the Lake Highlands magazine. We added our Preston Hollow magazine in 2000, Oak Cliff in 2008 and Plano in 2020.

This expansion has created more opportunities, but also more silos and confusion. A common concern by many is a lack of communication among all of the various stakeholders as well as a lack of centralized resources and information for the community.  

Enter 2019.

LAUNCH. has evolved into a forward thinking media platform with a focus on content AND connectivity. Utilizing a unique dashboard-style platform, we hope to make it easier and faster for the community to build and grow companies, make connections, find resources, and get plugged in.

Name: Observatoire du Journalisme (OJIM)
Description:
C’est Edmond Burke qui en 1787 a créé l’expression « quatrième pouvoir », reprise ensuite par Tocqueville en 1837. Les moyens de communication (tous les moyens) servent – ou devraient servir – de contre-feux aux trois pouvoirs incarnant l’État : exécutif, législatif et judiciaire.

Mais ce quatrième pouvoir est peut-être devenu le premier. Il influence les élections, locales, nationales ou européennes ;  il commente et oriente les décisions du législatif comme de l’exécutif. Le quatrième pouvoir juge aussi les juges comme on peut le voir à travers les controverses sur les décisions judiciaires les plus sensibles. Il fait et défait les réputations, la vôtre comme celle des groupes.

Serge Halimi dans son ouvrage Les chiens de garde est plus que critique vis à vis des médias et de leurs acteurs. « Tout ce qui était directement vécu s’est éloigné dans la représentation ».  Mais qui représente la représentation ? La révérence devant le vrai pouvoir, la fausse impertinence, la prudence devant l’argent, les habitudes de vie commune ont créé un nouveau journalisme « … en se dévoyant dans une société de cour et d’argent, en se transformant en machine à propagande de la pensée de marché, le journalisme s’est enfermé dans une classe et dans une caste ». Si les journalistes doivent être protégés, le lecteur, l’auditeur, le spectateur ont aussi des droits. Le droit de savoir qui parle, qui écrit, par quel itinéraire. C’est ce droit de savoir de l’auditeur, du spectateur, du lecteur que l’Observatoire des Journalistes et de l’Information Médiatique (OJIM) veut promouvoir. Une meilleure connaissance du monde journalistique et des médias  favorise une véritable démocratie et une éthique civique. Claude Chollet préside l'OJIM depuis sa création.

Description:
TheLifeofScience.com started in 2016 as a blog, a pet project following two freelance science writers Aashima Freidog and Nandita Jayaraj as they journaled biographies of women scientists they met while hopping across laboratories and research institutions in India. The project has since gathered many more voices. The passion project, born out of the desire to see and hear femme stories from Indian science in the media, has evolved into a collective made of a fluid team and a broadening network of freelancers that includes science communicators, scientists, graduate students, journalists, artists and multimedia content creators. We see ourselves as a science media platform focused on contemporary research and stories of scientific pursuit intersecting with various societal barriers in India.
Our attempt is to answer questions like: How is Indian science progressing? What are the challenges minorities face? Who are the womxn researchers in India? What kind of work are they doing? What are their stories?

Description:
Democs is a global social media for constructive debates.
Initiate debates online on any topic that you care about and let the world participate, argue and vote.
The interactions of other users will make your debate rise in the ranking of your Public Sphere. The statistics on other users' arguments help you know more about your topic and see it from different angles. For media and politics, Democs is a boon, as it helps journalists find topics, research and representative opinions. Policymakers can use Democs to better understand social priorities as well as identify social acceptance.
Democs is an innovative social network with the aim to strengthen freedom of speech worldwide and to fight polarization and radicalization through debate culture. We are committed to a non-violent peaceful world.
Democs for more democracy, for more media literacy

Ogni giorno cerchiamo di dare visibilità alla nostra rete di eventi, storie ed iniziative che circolano nel web offrendo spunti di riflessione e spunti di discussione.

Coinvolgere i lettori negli argomenti di attualità è la nostra missione, perché in un mondo in cui le notizie escono in continuazione è nostra convinzione che debbano essere recepite considerando punti di vista molteplici. Solo cercando di leggere attraverso i fatti è possibile far si che l’informazione possa essere inserita nel quadro più grande dei fatti che avvengono ogni giorno in ogni luogo.

Name: Revista ambiental Catorce 6
Description:
Catorce6 es la principal publicación ambiental independiente de Colombia, editada por la Corporación BIOPARQUE, entidad sin ánimo de lucro. Fue creada en 2007 por la exministra de Ambiente Cecilia Rodríguez González-Rubio y el experto socioambiental Eduardo Chávez López. Su propósito fundacional es la difusión del conocimiento ambiental, noticias ambientales y sostenibilidad, con énfasis en fuentes académicas. El interés que despierta se basa en el tratamiento de los temas con veracidad y rigor periodístico a través de un lenguaje cercano, serio y respetuoso lo que nos ha significado ocho (8) premios de periodismo y la circulación trimestral impresa.

A través de este medio de comunicación, logramos llegar a ciudadanos interesados en el ambiente, líderes de opinión, gerentes y directivos de empresas públicas y privadas comprometidas con el medio ambiente, quienes tienen influencia en el destino del país. Así mismo, de la mano con comunidades científicas, profesionales, investigadores, ONGs y representantes ambientales y comunitarios, mostramos sucesos e investigaciones relacionados con contextos de sostenibilidad en todo el territorio nacional.

El portal web de Catorce6 ofrece además de noticias diariamente, la normatividad ambiental colombiana clasificada y organizada por temas y la Guía de Empresas Sostenibles. Esta es un marketplace habilitado para productores y compradores puedan vender y comprar productos y servicios con atributos ambientales. Adicionalmente cuenta con la Guía del Consumidor, la cual explica las certificaciones existentes en este ámbito, las características de las empresas y los productos que los hace sostenibles.
Location: Bogotá D. C., Bogotá D. C.

Name: WiAIR Women in AI Research
Description:
Women in AI Research (WiAIR) is a podcast dedicated to celebrating the remarkable contributions of female AI researchers from around the globe. Our mission is to challenge the prevailing perception that AI research is predominantly male-driven. 

In WiAIR, we interview successful female AI researchers coming from diverse cultural backgrounds, showcasing their inspirational cutting-edge research and insights into the future of AI. Through these conversations, we explore their personal journeys - how they overcome unique challenges, balance careers and family life, and make difficult decisions when necessary. We aim to understand how women in AI research perceive success and what it takes to achieve their goals. 

With the WiAIR podcast, our goal is to empower early career researchers, especially women, to pursue their passion for AI and make an impact in this exciting rapidly growing field. You will learn from women at different career stages, stay updated on the latest research and advancements, hear powerful stories of overcoming obstacles and breaking stereotypes, and become part of the community that values diversity and inclusion in AI.

 YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@WomeninAIResearch
 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/51RJNlZarFTJXXIlz5Qx3M
 Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/ca/podcast/women-in-ai-research-wiair/id1805993416

Name: Cyber Security America Podcast
Description: On the front lines of technology and business there’s a battle of survival. Behind the scenes, businesses are on a mission to keep a vigilant watch for threats in an ongoing Cyber War that is spilling out everywhere – no one is safe. But it’s not just about malware, ransomware, and breaches anymore. The obstacles and barriers companies face today are bigger, more technologically complex, and disruptive than ever before.  So when you need answers to win the battle, tune into Cyber Security America with your host Joshua Nicholson. You’ll learn what it’s like running cyber security operations teams inside some of the world’s largest companies. It’s a cyber backstage pass and real-world advice for cyber defenders, CISOs, and security professionals. Cyber Security America airs every Tuesday at 9 AM Pacific, 12 Noon Eastern on the VoiceAmerica Business Channel.  https://www.voiceamerica.com/show/4125

Name: ESCP Europe Around The World
Description:
Il y a deux ans un étudiant d’ESCP Europe, Loïc Giraldi, est parti seul autour du monde pour rencontrer nos Alumni. Ses 209 interviews dans 33 villes et 23 pays différents ont révélées des parcours inédits.
Aujourd’hui, ESCP Around The World ouvre un nouveau chapitre. Désormais ce n’est plus un étudiant mais une multitude qui vont à la rencontre de leurs anciens partout dans le monde. Ils pourront ainsi découvrir et faire découvrir votre histoire.
Ré-inventons ensemble le networking intergénérationnel et plaçons l'interview au coeur de la solidarité Alumni - Etudiant ESCP Europe.
Contactez-nous à l’adresse escpeuropearoundtheworld@gmail.com pour participer au projet.
------------
Two years ago Loïc Giraldi, an ESCP Europe student, travelled the world alone to meet with our Alumni. The 209 interviews he conducted in respectively 33 and 23 different cities and countries shed light on unique stories. Today, ESCP Around The World starts a new chapter. It is no longer one student alone but many who will go and meet with their Alumni around the world. This way they will discover and share with our community your story.
Let’s re-invent together intergenerational networking and put the interview at the centre of the ESCP Europe Alumni - Student solidarity. 
To join the project, contact us at the following address: escpeuropearoundtheworld@gmail.com

Name: You don't look like an Engineer
Description:
Laura Miranda and Sohan Roopra co-founded You Don’t Look Like an Engineer. A podcast aimed at challenging the stereotypes about what an engineer looks like, the show sparks meaningful conversations about inclusion, finding your passion in your career, leadership and self-improvement.
 
The corporate world is often seen as impersonal and robotic, even, but the podcast is here to show its human side—the people and their stories, and the diversity that is reshaping this profession. Through honest conversations, we explore industry issues like gender equity, cultural diversity, and leadership, offering real insights and ideas to help workplaces become places where everyone feels they can fulfill their dreams, and everyone feels like they belong.
 
With a mission to drive change through storytelling, our podcast reshapes perspectives and opens doors for a more inclusive future in engineering and beyond.

Name: True Side
Description:
Ever wondered if a WhatsApp forward is true or just fake news? Or if a tweet/ FB (Facebook) post is real? Fret no more! - We at True Side, bring the latest and trending fake news, fake posts, or fake videos circulated under different categories in one roof. 

We are set of undergraduates from IIT Madras with a mission to ‘FIght Fake News & Misinformation’. In this age of social media where there is a deluge of information, misinformation and fake news are also fed knowingly or unknowingly. With the paucity of time, one would either forward the message, picture or a video without cross checking its veracity or would not forward as getting into whether it is right or wrong was time consuming.

Features :
SEARCH - For easier access through the news contents in the app.
SHARE - Social Share feature to share the information through all major social media
FAVOURITES - Bookmark the fake news information which you feel important and read it later.

The goal is to bring attention to the credibility of fake news — thoroughly researched, fact-checked, curated, and roofed under one zone.

Luxury is about dream, but especially time, so here, we'll take it, to try to analyze it from the origins to nowadays, how it has been a factor of civilisation but also of culture.
Digital, retail, HR, law, crafts, through fashion, jewellery, hotel business, gastronomy and more ; we will speak about theses luxuries that let us say Luxury.

Name: Context.ro
Description:
Platforma CONTEXT este un start-up media independent care își propune să crească și să extindă comunitatea jurnaliștilor de investigații din România, să scoată la lumină corupția, crima organizată și fraudele de orice natură prin publicarea de investigații jurnalistice.

Obiectivul principal al CONTEXT este să îmbunătățească nivelul investigațiilor jurnalistice cu ajutorul educației, tehnologiei și prin programe de mentorat dedicate tinerilor reporteri sau celor care doresc să devină jurnaliști de investigație. 

CONTEXT este un hub pentru cooperarea între jurnaliștii de investigație din România. 

Ca parte a rețelei internaționale Organised Crime and Corruption Reporting Project,  CONTEXT promovează activ cooperarea transfrontalieră între jurnaliștii de investigație.  
/
The CONTEXT platform is an independent media start-up that aims to cultivate and expand Romania’s community of investigative journalists, with a strong focus on exposing corruption, fraud, and organized crime by publishing journalistic investigations.

Our main objective is to improve the standard of journalistic investigations through education, technology, and mentoring programs dedicated to young reporters who want to turn their hands to investigative journalism.

Ultimately, CONTEXT is a hub that supports cooperation between investigative journalists in Romania, one of Europe’s most corrupt countries. Furthermore, CONTEXT is part of the international network Organized Crime and Corruption Reporting Project and actively promotes cross-border cooperation between investigative journalists.

Is it stocks alone? What else can we expect from Dalal Times?

Dalal Times will also have a dedicated section targeted towards financially empowering Women in the country.
 
Who are the founders of Dalal Times?

Dalal Times is the brain child of Praveen Pathiyil (an entrepreneur from Kerala) who has been practicing his well acquired knowledge in the financial markets for the past 7 years. The list of all founders and top management would be shared to public once the website is launched.

When can one expect the website to be launched?

We are keen to be part of your daily routine & empower you with all the knowledge we posses. Our team has started working on the website & we expect it to be live by August – September 2014. Stay tuned for more updates.

Description: Spotlight PA is an independent, nonpartisan newsroom dedicated to high-quality investigative and public-service journalism about the Pennsylvania state government and urgent statewide issues, including elections, voting, the governor, the legislature, rural communities, criminal justice, economic development, health, human services, and more. Spotlight PA was founded to address a crisis in journalism in Pennsylvania: the ongoing and rapid decline of corporate-owned legacy news outlets, which is greatly diminishing access to trusted, contextual, and factual reporting across the state. With support from foundations, individual members, and more, Spotlight PA is uncovering stories that would otherwise go untold and cutting through partisanship and misinformation to deliver trusted, reliable journalism at no cost to all in Pennsylvania. Since its inception in 2019, Spotlight PA has become a leading national model for independent, collaborative journalism that empowers residents and gets results. Its work has won numerous state and national awards and driven meaningful change and policy reforms in the state capital and beyond.

É o órgão que tem como finalidade formular, implementar e coordenar a execução da Política Municipal do Meio Ambiente, voltada para o desenvolvimento sustentável, no âmbito do território municipal.
Vem investindo intensamente na preservação das áreas verdes da cidade. O número de parques totalmente implantados na cidade, que em janeiro de 2005 era de apenas 6, foi praticamente triplicado, saltando para 24, em março de 2010, tornando-se referência nacional em termos de preservação ambiental.

Name: iambiente
Description:
Infórmate, aprende y debate con la mejor red de profesionales del Medioambiente, la RSC, y las Smart Cities.

La plataforma iambiente.es pretende constituirse en el foro de referencia en el ámbito de la Calidad Ambiental. Para conseguirlo en su sentido más amplio esperamos contar con la colaboración de todos.

Estamos convencidos de que siendo imprescindible hacer las cosas bien, no es suficiente. Cada vez es más importante conocer y tener en cuenta las necesidades e inquietudes, tanto de los usuarios como de cada uno de los diferentes agentes sociales relacionados con el sector. Lo que hasta ahora era casi imposible de conseguir, se ha puesto al alcance de todo aquel que con ideas y entusiasmo esté dispuesto a participar.

Nuestra ilusión es mantener un foro de encuentro entre los profesionales, los usuarios, las diferentes administraciones, las universidades y la sociedad en general. El objetivo es establecer un flujo multidireccional a través del cual se compartan los conocimientos científicos, los problemas del sector productivo, las inquietudes de los ciudadanos y el marco normativo. Y, que como consecuencia de ello, todos estemos más y mejor protegidos.

A través de iambiente.es todo aquel que tenga algo que decir puede hacerlo. Así configuramos un espacio donde debatir aquellas cuestiones que nos afectan con el que contribuir a la promoción, desarrollo y mejora de nuestro sector.

Contamos ya con nuestro blog de noticias y de opinión. En las redes sociales mantenemos perfiles en Twitter, Facebook, Instagram y Linkedin. En iambiente.es centralizamos el contenido que distribuimos en estas plataformas sociales y en ellas estamos abiertos a propuestas y diálogo. Nuestra intención no es que nos sigáis, sino que nos acompañéis.

Por eso os invitamos a vencer el miedo escénico que a veces provoca escribir en público y a participar, a continuación, con los comentarios que creáis oportunos.

Name: Haematologica Journal
Description:
The Haematologica Journal was founded in January 1920 by Adolfo Ferrata and Carlo Moreschi during one of their frequent visits to the famous Gambrinus Cafè in Naples. Adolfo Ferrata, after graduating from the University of Parma, became famous by discovering the Ferrata Phenomena, and with his publications gave birth to the Italian school of Hematology. Following his graduation, Carlo Moreschi was one of the students of the Nobel Laureate Camillo Golgi, and his studies represented the basis of the theory of the Wasserman reaction for syphilis. 
The Journal, which has been edited in Pavia since 1924, has, over the years, specialized in the publication of studies of normal and pathological morphology of the blood and of the hematopoietic organs, and clinical case reports. 
After a period of progressive decline, in 1973 Edoardo Storti became President of the Italian Society of Hematology and relaunched the Journal on both the national and international scene by establishing a large network of reviewers. 
Later, in 1983, Prof. Storti set up the Fondazione Ferrata-Storti which became the new owner of the Journal.  
Hence, from an Impact Factor of 0.46 in 1978, the Journal reached 6.671 in 2015, with 14110 citations and a ranking of 4th among international hematology journals.

Name: Institute of Network Cultures
Description:
The Amsterdam-based Institute of Network Cultures was founded by Geert Lovink following his appointment as Professor within the School of Interactive Media at the Hogeschool van Amsterdam (Amsterdam University of Applied Science).

The Institute of Network Cultures analyses and shapes the terrain of network cultures from the inside. No innocent bystander, it actively contributes to the field through events, publications and online dialogue. The sphere of new media has huge potential for socio-technological change – the mission of the Institute of Network Cultures, the INC, is to explore, document and feed this potential.

Established in 2004 the INC takes as its focus the Internet and other new forms of media. The INC is a framework for the realisation of a diverse array of projects, with a strong emphasis on content. Its goal is to create an open organisational form where ideas from both individuals and organisations can be given an early institutional context.

A key INC focus is the establishment of sustainable research networks. Following from this the INC seeks to identify emerging critical topics and to then initiate and steer dialogue and exchange in order to shape the way these new forms develop. Differentiating the INC from Information Technology research is its emphasis on the interaction between aesthetics and social relations within technological environments. Attention is also paid to the intercultural aspects of the field. The INC views theoretical developments and self-reflection as vital to the creation of the rich autonomous language that this new area of knowledge deserves.

The content is both highly relatable and motivating, empowering listeners to take decisive steps as emerging business pioneers.

Con más de 2 millones de visitas al mes, se trata de forma objetiva la evolución de los servicios conocidos y se divulgan los eventos que están transformando la web. 

Los cursos online y las noticias relacionadas con Marketing en las Redes Sociales y con Tecnología tienen también un espacio importante dentro del medio, en el que ya han colaborado decenas de profesionales de diversas áreas.

Name: Social Innovations Journal
Description:
Social Innovations Journal (SIJ) is dedicated to social innovators and entrepreneurs who work at the cross section between the private sector, government, and not-for-profits and aligns them toward collective social impact goals and public policy.  SIJ chronicles social innovations and enterprises addressing the world’s most challenging issues surrounding social policy, leadership, human capital, and systems. In collaboration with government, philanthropy, not-for-profits and universities, the Journal bridges formal research and real-life experience.

Social Innovations Journal (SIJ) provides immediate open access to its content on the principle that making research freely available to the public supports a greater exchange of knowledge.

This journal is open access journal which means that all content is freely available without charge to users or / institution. Users are allowed to read, download, copy, distribute, print, search, or link to full text articles in this journal without asking prior permission from the publisher or author as long as acknowledge the original author as stated in the Creative Commons License. 

The mission of the Social Innovations Journal is to promote innovative ideas informed by data and research, incubate social innovation and thought leadership, and to spark a culture of innovation leading to improved social sector products and services, systems and policies.  SIJ is creating a new standard for social innovations and enterprise publications by including the “why” behind their innovation, their bottom line impact (social and financial), and the system and policy implications.

Boiler World Update intends to create a comprehensive platform for heat and allied industry professionals where credible and celebrated contributors from the heat industry will provide verified and validated heat-related content to create a handy, go-to platform for the benefit of heat industry professionals.

We love our rich and engaged community and our contributors, who are truly leaders in their field.

Name: LV digital
Description:
DAS SIND WIR
Wir sind Pioniere. Wir bringen den digitalen Wandel in die Landwirtschaft und helfen dabei, diesen erfolgreich zu meistern. 

DAS MACHEN WIR
Die LV digital GmbH ist der Entstehungsort für digitale Plattformen und Produkte für die Landwirtschaft. Als Tochter der Landwirtschaftsverlag GmbH fühlen wir uns dem ländlichen Raum eng verbunden. 

Unsere Digitalprodukte sind zugeschnitten auf die Bedürfnisse und Anforderungen der Menschen dort. Hier liegt unser Know-how: Ob der Handel mit Landtechnik, Reitsport und Pferdezucht, Urlaub auf dem Bauernhof oder die Digitalisierung im Büro des Landwirts. Wir sind breit aufgestellt und mit Leidenschaft, Engagement und Erfahrung dabei.

SO ARBEITEN WIR
Mit viel Herzblut und Leidenschaft arbeiten wir daran, uns und unsere Produkte stetig weiterzuentwickeln und voranzubringen. Wir lieben digitale Produkte und wir lieben die Landwirtschaft. In beidem sind wir stark. Das macht uns zu einem erfahrenen und engagierten Partner.

Als Innovationstreiber gehen wir voran. Aus Ideen entstehen Visionen, die uns begeistern und die wir gemeinsam in die Tat umsetzen. So sind unsere Plattformen traktorpool, baupool, rimondo, LandReise, Karrero und top farmplan entstanden, die seit vielen Jahren unzählige Menschen begeistern. 

UNSERE VISION
Wir arbeiten mit viel Liebe zum Detail, das große Ganze stets im Blick. Wir möchten etwas bewegen, nachhaltig verändern und jeden Tag ein kleines bisschen besser machen.

Name: Celebre Magazine World
Description:
From ancient classicism to the fluid frontiers of luxury, an ancient essence with modern features. This is how celebreMagazine was born.   A word pun drawn from the Latin “Celebrem” and mixes it with the English “Magazine”. At the centre is an M, the final letter of one word and the initial letter of the other, which forms the basis of the editorial project.
celebreMagazine aims to discover the excellence of luxury in any sector: from lifestyle to gourmet, from fashion to art, from motoring to hotels. A constant scouting to give voice to the best, addressing those seeking for beauty and quality, aiming with the paper edition to an elitist public selected on a worlwide scale.
With the words of the famous Oscar Wilde we can say that “There is no second chance to make a first good impression”, our mantra.

Name: IDL-Reporteros
Description:
Primer medio digital en Perú de periodismo de investigación sin fines de lucro, dirigido por Gustavo Gorriti. Desde su primera investigación el 14 de febrero de 2010, ha realizado cerca de 1500 publicaciones que abarcan temas como corrupción, narcotráfico, seguridad interna, crimen organizado y temas corporativos.

Premios y reconocimientos:
► Premio Pulitzer 2017 en la categoría de Reportaje Explicativo (Explanatory Reporting), por los Panama Papers. IDL-R fue parte de la investigación liderada por el Consorcio Internacional de Periodistas de Investigación (ICIJ, por sus siglas en inglés).
► Finalista Premio Gabriel García Márquez en la categoría de Cobertura que entrega la Fundación Nuevo Periodismo Iberoamericano, por el caso Lava Jato en Perú.
► Premio Salwan 2014, por "Deforestación entre palmas" y "Los Comebosques".
► Premio IRE (Investigative Reporters & Editors) 2013, por "El saqueo de los mares”, investigación periodística internacional coordinada por el Consorcio Internacional de Periodistas de Investigación – ICIJ, en alianza con CIPER Chile.
► Premio Latinoamericano de Periodismo de Investigación 2012 que entrega anualmente Instituto Prensa y Sociedad (IPYS) y Transparencia Internacional, por la serie investigativa “La pesca negra”.

Name: messweb
Description:
Ohne Sensorik und Messtechnik funktioniert in der Technikwelt nichts mehr und auch im täglichen Leben sind die künstlichen „Sinnesorgane“ nicht mehr wegzudenken. Hier setzen wir mit messweb.de an. Seit über 20 Jahren ist unsere digitale Medienmarke das Kompetenzzentrum und größte Portal, wenn es um professionelle Messtechnik, Sensorik und Automotive Testing geht. Für Konstrukteure, Entwickler, Wissenschaftler, OEMs und Endkunde sind wir der Wissens- und Informationslieferant für die tägliche Arbeit.
Umfassend, aktuell und tiefgreifend – so erreichen wir täglich mit unserer Website die wichtigsten Leser und Entscheider aus zahlreichen Branchen. Unsere 14-tägigen Messtechnik- und Sensorik-Newsletter, Themen-Newsletter und Sondernewsletter zu den wichtigsten Branchenmessen runden das Informationsangebot ab – immer zielgerichtet und auf das Wesentliche fokussiert.
Wir kennen die Technik mit der Sie sich täglich beschäftigen. Wir sind gemeinsam mit Experten im Maschinenbau, Elektrotechnik, Automatisierung, Prozessindustrie und weiteren Bereichen unterwegs und haben stets ein Ohr an Ihrer Branche. So profitieren Sie von unserer Redaktionskompetenz - mit spannenden Themen und weiterführenden Informationen. Wir sind Ihre Trend-Scouts für Innovationen aus der Sensorik und Messtechnik.

messweb.de ist eine Medienmarke der AMA Digital Networks GmbH ein Teil des AMA Verband für Sensorik und Messtechnik e.V.

Name: The Voices of War
Description:
‘The Voices Of War’ is guided by a simple vision—to scratch below the simple narratives of war.

To do this, I speak with refugees, soldiers, negotiators, academics, development workers, and anyone else whose life has been shaped by war, be they a survivor, a perpetrator, a mediator, a student, or a healer of it.

Ultimately, I want to make it lucid that neither war nor peace is a foregone conclusion. Both are a product of upstream causes that make one or the other more likely. Understanding and embracing this fact is critical when trying to find moral and ethical solutions to our many local, regional, and global challenges.

Name: Taste Radio
Description:

They hear stories from founders and pros taking products from dream to shelf with emphasis on actionable tips and inspiration stemming from success and failure. The hosts talk about everything from industry trends to the daily dilemmas of entrepreneurs though lessons learned in production, supply-chain, scale, branding, packaging, data, tech, social media, marketing, sales and beyond.

For suggestions and feedback email us at ask@tasteradio.com. To learn how to sponsor Taste Radio, visit the BevNET media kit at mediakit.bevnet.com.

SYNTH, Média critique qui clarifie les enjeux du présent technologique.

Pour vous abonner gratuitement à la newsletter  https://synthmedia.fr
Pour découvrir le podcast  https://j-d.app.link/imaginaires
---
Synth aborde l'actualité de la tech avec recul et de façon critique. 

Concentré sur l'impact de l'intelligence artificielle et des médias synthétiques dans nos vies, Synth décrypte à travers sa newsletter, les récits qui accompagnent l'essor de ces technologies. 

À travers des articles de vulgarisation, des analyses critiques, des interviews uniques, Synth souhaite aider les lecteurs à décrypter les récits qui accompagnent l’essor de l’intelligence artificielle dans la société et à mieux appréhender l’impact des technologies synthétiques sur nos vies pour fabriquer ensemble un imaginaire différent de la tech.

Synth est un média indépendant et un endroit de partage et de dialogue dédié à la pédagogie et à la découverte.

Name: The Progress Network
Description:
We live in a time marked by pessimism. Battered daily by negative headlines and facing a post-COVID world whose problems seem manifold and everlasting, it’s easy to assume we are heading for disaster. It may be that the story of chaos and collapse will prove to be true. If so, the information and analysis undergirding that view are readily available. We need little help making those arguments.

But what if it’s not true? The ideas and evidence for the opposite outcome, largely unheard, exist in equal measure. The Progress Network connects and amplifies those voices that are pointing our world in a more positive direction, providing a template for a stable and sustainable future. Our contributors come from diverse fields of business, tech, journalism, politics, and more, but are united in their conviction that humanity’s ingenuity and willingness to cooperate for the common good is ultimately more potent than forces pulling in the other direction.

Name: Business Spectator
Description:
We bring you real-time news, commentary and insights that keep you at the top of Australian business and the forces shaping our region.

Business Spectator is Australia’s number 1 digital-only premium business product. 

Founded in 2007 by Alan Kohler, Stephen Bartholomuesz and Robert Gottliebsen, it is now read by around 500,000 Australian professionals, business owners, executives and investors every month, viewing more than 2 million pages.

Business Spectator specialises in fast, straight business news as it happens and insightful opinion, commentary and analysis on the issues that matter delivered in real-time by Australia's most-trusted and respected business, economics and corporate writers.

With journalists in Melbourne, Sydney, Beijing, London and New York, we bring the world of business to you how you like it - on web, mobile, tablet and via our suite of email newsletters.

Business Spectator also brings you selected content from the world's best business sources including The Wall Street Journal, Dow Jones Newswires and more.

Our content verticals include:
China Spectator: news, insights and commentary on Australia's biggest trading partner covering business, politics, culture and more.
Climate Spectator: the latest insights and commentary on green business, clean tech, carbon markets and climate change policy.
Technology Spectator: enterprise and consumer technology, digital culture and tech industry news.
Family Business: the stories behind Australia's most-iconic family-owned businesses published as a monthly digital magazine

Name: Travel Essence Magazine

Travel Essence Magazine is a digital magazine, curated for the travel and lifestyle tastemaker of African descent. The publication targets the intelligent, spirited millennial with a passion for travel and culturally immersive experiences on the continent of Africa. 

We are content writers and storytellers, seeking to connect expat communities living and working in the UAE and wider MENA region, with the best-kept secrets in travel, hospitality, cultural experiences and wildlife encounters across Southern Africa, providing informative and visually engaging content through the eyes of travellers and tastemakers. 

Produced by Narratives PR, a Dubai-based PR and Communications Consultancy specializing in promoting African-owned ventures, Travel Essence Magazine is a consumer special interest publication, published and ready for reader downloads via a designated website

Name: Talks with T
Description:
The Talks with T Podcast was born of a desire to drive an impact with the next generation & highlight entrepreneurship as a real possibility for anybody. We cover the highs, lows and everything in between in the life of entrepreneurs in MENA.

Between 2020 and 2040, about 127 million young people will enter the labour force in MENA, potentially creating an unemployment rate of 23 per cent (amongst the highest in the world). We hope we can create the belief that anybody with the right mindset, persistence and big idea can become an entrepreneur. As a result, these entrepreneurs will create jobs and do their part at chipping away at one of highest youth unemployment rates in the world.

Fasten your seatbelts & join the ride!

Name: POUSTA
Description:
WTF is POUSTA? Partimos como un medio en 2009. Cuando la gente leía blogs y se enteraba con un poco más de calma de lo que estaba pasando en materia de arte, música, cine, moda, tendencias de diseño y todos estos temas que nos siguen inspirando. Pero hoy somos más que esa “pascualina” sobre cultura contemporánea.

Hoy POUSTA crea valor a partir de tres diferentes ámbitos. Somos una fábrica de ideas (una agencia creativa, que le dicen). Nos situamos en la óptica de las marcas para entender su visión y hacemos de sus objetivos los nuestros, para diseñar ideas que resuenen de forma genuina en audiencias jóvenes: Millennials, Gen Z y (ahora) Alpha. 

Somos también una productora. Eso que te queremos ofrecer, lo sabemos hacer y tenemos a los mejores para hacerlo realidad, así cuidamos que lo que viste en la presentación sea lo que veas en vivo. No smoke allowed. 

Y seguimos siendo una plataforma de comunicación, con cientos de miles de personas que nos miran a diario, personas que siguen alimentándose de nuestra curatoría y receptivas a que le mostremos lo que haces en nuestro idioma, con nuestro tono. Un tridente eficaz: creamos, producimos y amplificamos.
Desde 2009, creamos y amplificamos contenidos relevantes para nuevas generaciones, conectando con millones de jóvenes en Chile y habla hispana, y generando a través del entretenimiento un impacto positivo permanente en la personas.

Name: Culture of Leadership
Description:
Did you know, worldwide, only 13% of employees are engaged in their work?

This means, there are only 13% of employees who are emotionally invested and focused on creating value for their organisations every day.

I have experienced first-hand how ‘poor leadership’ negatively impacts the performance of employees and ultimately limits the growth potential and profitability of the business.

This is why I felt the need to bring this podcast to life. 

My purpose through all of my business activities is to have an impact on improving the lives of people at work.

The Culture of Things podcast will explore the strategies and experiences of business leaders, including some of my own clients, around what they are learning and doing to improve the world of work. We will also talk with everyday people who will share their own experiences, good, and bad, related to culture, leadership and teamwork.

Like most guys, I have a passion for sport - particularly football and my beloved Liverpool Football Club. Team sport can teach us so much. We will also explore the strategies and experiences of sporting leaders, around what their chosen sport has taught them about team culture, leadership and teamwork.

If you are leading a team now, or have plans to lead a team in the future, this podcast is for you. 

Remember, the single biggest competitive advantage any business has is teamwork. A dysfunctional team creates friction, causes delays, costs you time and money, and will, if left unchecked, destroy an organisation from the inside.

Every week, you will gather advice and learn from personal experiences that will help you minimise politics and confusion, increase morale and productivity, and reduce unwanted turnover and hiring costs within your organisation - whether that be a business or sporting organisation.

The Culture of Things podcast will create conversations which will help bring out the best in you as a leader, and your team.

Subscribe at www.brendanrogers.com.au/podcast

Name: Digicult
Description:
Since 2005, Digicult has being a cultural platform that examines the impact of digital technologies and sciences on the arts, design, culture and contemporary society. Marco Mancuso founded and currently directs Digicult, managing its editorial contents, communication strategies and curatorial activities, while coordinating both an editorial staff and an international Network of journalists, critics, curators, artists, theorists, and professionals.

Currently, Digicult is an online platform based on the collection and publication of news, announcements and calls for artists, researchers and professionals, book publications, presentations of artistic and research projects. In addition, it produces interviews to the protagonists of the international multimedia arts scene, reports from the most significant artistic and cultural events and critical and theoretical in-depth articles about media art and culture.
 
The Digicult Agency provides several support activities to facilitate online communication and media partnerships for partners.The Digicult Agency also develope special editorial projects, exhibitions, special events, workshops, lectures and screenings, seminars and round tables, involving also the Digicult Network members and their backgrounds, theoretical studies and professional experiences. 

Digicult is finally the publisher of the Digimag Journal, through its free publishing branch Digicult Editions (http://www.lulu.com/spotlight/digiculteditions)

Designers from all over the world reach out to share and learn from their global peers.

Notre mission est donc de les mettre en lumière grâce à nos différentes émissions, afin de promouvoir leurs activité, en leur donnant la parole !

Name: Vie de Maire
Description:
Vie de Maire, c’est le podcast qui donne la parole aux maires de toute la France, à travers des discussions profondes, intimes et transparentes. 

A chaque épisode, partez à la rencontre d'un maire, de sa commune et de ses habitants. Au micro de Clémentine et Margot, nos élus se confient sur leurs parcours, leurs fiertés, leurs doutes et leurs difficultés. Ils partagent leurs motivations à s'investir pour leur territoire, et des conseils à destination de tous ceux qui souhaitent s'engager localement. 

Maires de villages, bourgs, villes moyennes ou métropoles, ils nous dressent le portrait d'une France multiple qui, plus que jamais, a besoin de renouer le dialogue entre ses citoyens et leurs représentants. 

Qui sont nos maires ? Comment naissent les vocations et les sensibilités politiques ? Comment concilier engament public, vie privée et responsabilités professionnelles ? Quels sont les défis rencontrés par nos élus locaux aujourd'hui ? Comment œuvrer pour la transition écologique et pour la démocratie à l'échelle d'une mairie ?

Des questions passionnantes auxquelles répondent sans tabou nos élus locaux !

A écouter sur toutes les plateformes d'écoute : https://linktr.ee/viedemaire

Pour toute question ou proposition d'interview, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter par mail : viedemaire.podcast@gmail.com

For years, these stories have gone underreported, seeming to fly under the radar. Yet, 55% of America’s most valuable billion-dollar startups were launched by foreign-born entrepreneurs. Although immigrants account for less than 14% of the U.S. population, they start 24% percent of all tech companies. The Vertical covers startups and other ventures launched by foreign-born entrepreneurs. We also report on VCs, accelerators, and other building blocks of the ecosystem, supporting immigrant founders in the U.S.

Name: Les Pandas Roux
Description:
D'autres histoires sont possibles. 

Les Pandas Roux c'est un média lancé par Léa et Thibaut à l'été 2017 dont la vocation est le partage des belles idées. Ils concrétisent ainsi leur volonté de réaliser un projet en commun : mettre leurs compétences en communication au service de la valorisation d'initiatives qui leur tiennent à cœur. Ce qui n'était qu'une bulle récréative extra-professionnelle va, au fil des papiers qu'ils rédigent et des interviews qu'ils réalisent, devenir une envie de partager leurs idées pour valoriser vos projets.

Fin 2017, pour répondre à des besoins qu'ils voient émerger au détour de leurs rencontres, ils se lancent dans le conseil en communication éditoriale et la production de contenus. Forts de leurs expériences complémentaires, et pouvant mobiliser des équipes de production dédiées et sur-mesure rapidement, ils vous conseillent et vous accompagnent personnellement dans la conduite de votre projet, qu'il soit petit ou grand, stratégique ou opérationnel. 

En plus d'être réactifs, créatifs, agiles, drôles et plein de bon sens (ce qui n'est pas si banal), ils sont passionnés par le métier et croient dans les sujets qu’on leur propose de valoriser. Vous avez de la chance, ils sont moins rares que les pandas roux : citoyenneté, solidarité, culture, écologie, bien-être, gastronomie… 

Nous soutenir : https://www.lespandasroux-lr.com/je-soutiens

Name: Luật Khoa tạp chí

Luat Khoa is a non-profit magazine that is independent from governments, corporations, religious organizations, and so on. We value press freedom as a fundamental pillar of a healthy society. Although Vietnam has not yet been a democracy, we believe that an independent media that is committed to high quality journalism plays one of the central roles in securing a brighter future for our country. 

We focus on laws and politics, providing truthful information and useful knowledge for the Vietnamese audience. Self-censorship has no place in our operation despite the fact that our personnel are facing persecution in Vietnam. 

One of our co-founders and editors, Pham Doan Trang, has been awarded the Press Freedom Prize by Reporters Without Borders in September 2019.

È una piattaforma editoriale che recensisce, segnala, anticipa i saggi che più di altri offrono una lettura lucida e critica del contemporaneo.

Name: IL TUO FARMACISTA
Description:
ILTUOFARMACISTA nasce nel 2017 da un’idea di Gianluca Spanò, dottore in farmacia che sente il dovere di creare un sito web scientifico che abbia l’intento di contrastare la disinformazione scientifica che sempre più divaga nei social network.

ITF vuole divulgare consigli sui prodotti farmaceutici, dispositivi medici, integratori, news e cuorisità del mondo medico-farmaceutico a tutti coloro i quali siano interessati, a chi vuole informarsi o chi è semplicemente curioso.

Nel Gennaio del 2020 il progetto si espande dando vita a ITFcommunity, una comunità di editor che scrivono per il IL TUO FARMACISTA. Abbiamo sviluppato e migliorato il nostro sito web e creato il reparto di marketing e comunicazione.

L’obbiettivo è quello di scrivere e divulgare argomenti che affrontano diverse tematiche della medicina, del mondo farmaceutico e della ricerca clinica. ITF vuole interagire con i medici, i farmacisti, le aziende farmaceutiche, gli studenti, i pazienti e con chi ha voglia di aggiornasi quotidianamente. Infatti il nostro pubblico non ha un target preciso e le nostre capacità sono proprio quelle di saper traslare argomenti tecnici in un linguaggio comune, comprensibile a tutti, ma allo stesso tempo efficace ed autorevole. Proprio per questo ci definiamo un mondo: “Dove la scienza incontra le persone”.

First, Capitally reports on locally made clothing, jewelry, accessories, beauty and wellness brands that are either produced in the DMV or come from companies with local design headquarters. Second, the magazine reports fashion news from luxury brands, but only those with brick and mortar stores creating jobs in the District. Finally, Capitally prioritizes reporting on fashion news from conscious fashion brands including ethically produced, fair trade, vegan, and organic products from all over the world. “Be Washingtonian. Tomkins is joined in the project by former BBC News online journalist Thelma Etim, who was previously deputy editor of Air Cargo News. She is editor of the new project and brings fresh vision and a hungry attention to detail.
“We will cover all those things that other air cargo sites do not. ACE will dig into matters deeply – even if people are not used to this approach,” she says.
Between them, Tomkins and Etim have more than 35 years’ experience in the air cargo publishing business.
“Don’t bother with ACE if you’re looking for the same old PR stuff you get elsewhere,” says Tomkins.

Name: Salud Intestinal
Description:
El término “Salud Intestinal” es, sin duda uno de los conceptos más importantes en el ámbito de la nutrición y la salud animal hoy día.

De la integridad intestinal depende mayormente el sostenimiento del estado de salud general de animal y del buen desempeño productivo.

Al existir algún daño en la integridad del intestino a consecuencia de la acción de patógenos o al existir algún desequilibrio entre las múltiples funciones de este órgano, se desencadenan procesos inflamatorios y daños en las células que generan disfuncionalidad en alguno de sus elementos, con la consecuente desmejora de las condiciones de salud y rendimiento de los animales.

El sitio we Salud Intestinal tiene como objetivo proporcionarle al lector información de primera fuente proveniente de especialistas en el área de la salud intestinal y digestiva, con artículos que serán de suma utilidad para el conocimiento, diagnóstico y tratamiento de diferentes afecciones al que puede verse expuesto el sistema digestivo de los animales.

En le sitio podrá encontrar tips, estrategias y lo último en información científica, pruebas de campo e innovación inherente a este tema.

Trusted by the world's leading storytellers, including TED and the NBA, our platform is on a mission to ensure that great ideas are no longer limited by language. We're building the future of global content.

Name: Lütfiye BAYSU KESKİN
Description:
Grafik Tasarım Uzmanı olarak, yaratıcılığı estetik anlayışla birleştiriyor ve markaların kendilerini en güçlü şekilde ifade edebilmeleri için görsel çözümler üretiyorum. Renklerin, tipografinin ve görsel düzenin gücüne inanarak, her tasarımda mesajı en etkili ve anlaşılır biçimde yansıtmayı hedefliyorum.

Kariyerim boyunca; kurumsal kimlik, sosyal medya içerikleri, basılı materyaller, web arayüzleri ve reklam tasarımları gibi birçok alanda projeler gerçekleştirdim. Her işimde yalnızca göze hitap eden değil, aynı zamanda markanın kimliğini doğru yansıtan ve hedef kitleyle bağ kurabilen özgün tasarımlar üretmeye odaklanıyorum.

Benim için tasarım; sadece görsel bir unsur değil, aynı zamanda bir hikâye anlatma ve değer katma sürecidir. Bu nedenle, sürekli öğrenmeyi ve tasarım trendlerini yakından takip ederek işime entegre etmeyi önemsiyorum.

Çalışmalarımda en büyük motivasyonum; fikirleri görsele dönüştürmek ve onları insanların zihninde kalıcı bir etkiye dönüştürmektir.

Name: ACI Prensa
Description:
La Agencia Católica de Informaciones - ACI Prensa, forma parte de las agencias de noticias del Grupo ACI, uno de los más grandes generadores de contenido noticioso católico en cinco idiomas y que pertenece desde junio de 2014 a la familia de EWTN Global Catholic Network, la cadena católica televisiva más grande del mundo, fundada en 1981 por la Madre Angélica en Irondale, Alabama (Estados Unidos), y que llega a más de 85 millones de hogares en 110 países y 16 territorios.

El Grupo ACI que está integrado además por Catholic News Agency (inglés), ACI Digital (portugués), ACI Stampa (italiano), CNA Deustch (alemán), la Enciclopedia Católica y el Directorio Católico, cuenta con oficinas en Brasil, Chile, Estados Unidos, España, Italia, y Perú, además tiene corresponsales en los cinco continentes.

ACI Prensa, originalmente se fundó como la Agencia Católica de Informaciones en América Latina, cuya oficina central se encuentra en Lima, Perú, reconocida jurídicamente como una asociación educativa sin fines de lucro vinculada a la Iglesia Católica.

La fecha de fundación fue el 13 de marzo de 1980 por el misionero comboniano alemán, Adalberto María Mohn (+1987), con el fin de proporcionar un flujo constante de noticias católicas para los medios seculares y para usuarios finales en el mundo de habla hispana. Su directorio está compuesto por laicos católicos según lo estableció su fundador, nombrando como director a Alejandro Bermúdez.

Desde su fundación, ACI Prensa publicó el boletín de análisis informativo sobre temas eclesiales SELAT - Servicios Latinoamericanos. A fines de los ‘80s ACI Prensa incursionó en la producción radial y empezó a emitir programas católicos que se difundían en diversas radioemisoras de América Latina.

Con el desarrollo de Internet, se marcó un hito histórico en la historia de ACI Prensa, pues la agencia abrazó esta tecnología desde su inicios. En 1996 que se establece oficialmente como una agencia en la web.

Name: Rutas del Conflicto
Description:
Rutas del Conflicto es un medio de comunicación independiente y nativo digital que reúne información confiable sobre el conflicto armado en Colombia, por medio de la convergencia entre formatos tradicionales y digitales, incluyendo herramientas de periodismo de datos, de investigación y ciudadano. Nació con la necesidad de visibilizar historias del conflicto que no habían sido documentadas por la prensa tradicional o por el Estado en documentos oficiales.

Nuestro trabajo explora los alcances del periodismo de datos alrededor de una pregunta clave: ¿cómo hacer accesible información que permita dimensionar la magnitud del conflicto armado y ampliar su comprensión?

Desde el 2014, registramos en profundidad más de 700 masacres perpetradas en Colombia desde 1982 y hemos contado las historias de sus sobrevivientes a través de la construcción de bases de datos propias, reportajes en profundidad, productos multimedia, visualizaciones, mapas, podcasts y recorridos virtuales. Actualmente conservamos el archivo periodístico más completo e interactivo de la memoria de la guerra en Colombia.

De la mano de varios aliados y explorando estas nuevas narrativas hemos logrado liderar diferentes proyectos periodísticos. Por un lado, para hacerle seguimiento a la implementación del Acuerdo de Paz en tres asuntos centrales: la preocupante situación de amenaza y persecución contra los líderes sociales y defensores de derechos humanos en Colombia, el lento proceso de reincorporación de los excombatientes y el enredado destino de los dineros del post-conflicto. Por el otro lado, hemos logrado mapear y explicar en su complejidad la dimensión de la desaparición forzada en los ríos colombianos, la relación entre la violencia y la propiedad de las tierras que hoy miles de víctimas reclaman como despojadas y la suerte de los pueblos que después de vaciarse por la guerra han sido escenario de retorno y de reconstrucción por sus comunidades.

Name: Conexão Política
Description: Fundado em novembro de 2017, Conexão Política é um veículo de comunicação em formato digital. Todos os dias mantemos a cobertura em tempo real sobre os mais relevantes acontecimentos relacionados ao poder, em seus variados aspectos, incluindo as principais esferas da República, da iniciativa privada, da imprensa, das agremiações político-partidárias, da cultura, da economia e de todas as demais figuras que estão inseridas no debate público. Nossas plataformas (portal, aplicativo e redes sociais) garantem a transmissão de fatos e de bastidores do cotidiano por meio de textos, fotos, vídeos e newsletters. Na contracorrente de mídias convencionais, nossa atuação editorial é pautada na busca pela verdade. Defendemos, com transparência e sem hesitação, as liberdades de economia, individuais e de expressão. Senso moral, capitalismo, mérito e trabalho são pautas inegociáveis por todos que conduzem este periódico. Em suma, somos comprometidos com o resgate dos bons valores, a promoção da prosperidade e a criação de riquezas e oportunidades para todos. Não possuímos nenhum tipo de compromisso editorial ou econômico com figuras políticas ou entes ligados ao poder público, seja quem for, independentemente de hierarquia estatal ou espectro ideológico. A empresa que constitui este jornal digital é uma sociedade limitada, totalmente independente, que defende os seus próprios interesses e que jamais recebeu nem receberá recursos governamentais. Ainda que haja previsão legal para esse tipo de captação, como leis de propaganda oficial e de fomento à comunicação, nunca fará parte da nossa conduta auferir receitas provenientes do Estado. Atualmente com cerca de 2 milhões de seguidores, os conteúdos produzidos pela nossa equipe são frequentemente recomendados pela sociedade civil e por grandes personalidades nacionais e internacionais, que possuem atuação em diversos segmentos como política, mercado financeiro, jornalismo, esporte, imprensa, justiça, música e entretenimento.

Description:
Ladies Sports est un média entièrement dédié à la promotion du sport féminin et à l'amélioration de la place des femmes dans le sport et dans notre société. Fondé par Romain BEAUVAIS, journaliste sportif passionné, Ladies Sports partage des histoires inspirantes de sportives d'exception, illustrant leur parcours et leurs réussites 

 Notre mission est de servir de modèle pour les jeunes générations, leur donnant envie de faire du sport et de s'accomplir dans ce domaine. Nous souhaitons sensibiliser les femmes à la possibilité de réussir et de s'épanouir dans le sport, tout en luttant activement contre les discriminations qui persistent. À travers notre engagement, nous accompagnons les associations, clubs, ligues et fédérations dans leurs initiatives de féminisation, offrant ainsi une meilleure visibilité médiatique aux sportives pour briser les stéréotypes et tordre le cou aux idées reçues.

 Nous envisageons un monde où les politiques, les leaders du sport et Ladies Sports travaillent main dans la main pour transformer la perception de la place des femmes dans la société française. Nos valeurs de solidarité, d'inclusivité, et de bien-être sont au cœur de toutes nos actions. Nous croyons fermement que l'union et le soutien mutuel sont essentiels pour créer un environnement sportif accueillant et équitable pour toutes et tous.

 N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour discuter d'une future collaboration, couvrir un événement sportif ou développer vos plans de féminisation fédéraux. Ensemble, nous pouvons changer les mentalités et inspirer de nouvelles générations de sportives.

Description:

De huisjes, waarin de bewoners vanuit een bewuste keuze wonen, zijn klein (< 50 m2), duurzaam (vaak zoveel mogelijk zelfvoorzienend), vrijstaand en bedoeld voor permanente bewoning.  TinyFindy is een platform voor de verkoop en verhuur van Tiny Houses, grond waarop Tiny Houses kunnen staan en producten en diensten toepasbaar op Tiny Houses. De site is niet bedoeld voor (micro)-appartementen of huisjes voor tijdelijke bewoning, zoals vakantiehuisjes.


Tiny Houses are a rapidly emerging innovative housing movement in the Netherlands. The houses, in which the residents live based on a conscious choice, are small (<50 m2), sustainable (often as self-sufficient as possible), detached and intended for permanent residence. TinyFindy is a platform for the sale and rental of Tiny Houses, land on which Tiny Houses can stand and products and services applicable to Tiny Houses. The site is not intended for (micro) apartments or houses for temporary residence, such as holiday homes.

Description:
Com atuação 360º, a agência SENSU Consultoria de Comunicação nasce com a missão de produzir e difundir conteúdo qualificado sobre saúde, ciência e educação. Criada pelo jornalista e doutor em Oncologia, Moura Leite Netto, a SENSU inicia suas atividades com as conquistas das contas da Sociedade Brasileira de Patologia (SBP), entidade que representa os mais de 3 mil médicos patologistas atuantes no país e do Instituto de Urologia, Oncologia e Cirurgia Robótica (IUCR), coordenado pelo cirurgião oncológico Gustavo Guimarães, que é uma das principais referências da América Latina em uro-oncologia.  

Composta por profissionais com expertise em planejamento, coordenação e produção de conteúdo jornalístico especializado e corporativo, a SENSU oferece, dentre os principais serviços, assessoria de imprensa, comunicação dirigida, mídias sociais, comunicação interna, branded content, desenvolvimento de conteúdos e produções editoriais, media training, outbound e inbound marketing, organização de eventos e curadoria de conteúdo científico. 

A SENSU também realiza palestras e workshops , customizados de acordo com o público-alvo, com foco nas melhores práticas em jornalismo de saúde e de ciência e em divulgação científica.

À frente da SENSU também está a jornalista Danielle Lago. Com MBA pela FIA/USP em Comunicação, Mercados e TI, atuou durante 20 anos na área de Comunicação e Marketing em empresas nacionais e multinacionais. Além de Moura e Danielle, a SENSU reúne profissionais experientes em diferentes áreas como designers (mídia impressa e digital), revisores, ilustradores, fotógrafos e produtores de vídeo.

Naszą ideą jest edukacja rynku, przedstawienie innowacyjnych projektów AV, rozmów z przedstawicielami poszczególnych sektorów branżowych, pokazy ciekawych miejsc, rozwiązań, produktów.

To także przestrzeń, która ciągle się rozwija i udoskonala. Małymi krokami realizujemy nasz plan – stworzenie miejsca, gdzie znajdą się wartościowe treści związane z szeroko pojętymi rozwiązaniami Audio, Video oraz IT. 

Nie są to tematy popularne, często mocno niszowe, dlatego wsparcie, jak i sugestie dotyczące publikowanych treści będą zawsze mile widziane.

Nie ma drugiej takiej platformy w Polsce, skierowanej zarówno do ekspertów, jak i do początkujących w tej dziedzinie, która w przystępny sposób prezentuje rozwiązania AV/IT m.in. dla biur, edukacji, home office, sklepów, przemysłu czy też kin, teatrów, muzeów oraz eventów.

As a film channel without advertising or paywalls, BC1 offers a calm environment where stories can be viewed without distraction. With subtitles in multiple languages, our films reach an international audience relevant to the target groups of our clients.
BC1 is used across a wide range of situations: from complex projects and innovations to new products, methods and collaborations. Wherever words alone are not enough, film helps create clarity, understanding and direction. Do you have a project where explanation or visibility is important? Feel free to get in touch at team@bc1.nl

Thanks for listening!

Interested in being featured on our show? If you have a D2C, CPG, and or omnichannel consumer brand and are passionate about telling your story, please message me here on LinkedIn.

Name: The Stories People
Description:
Big brands spend big bucks and advertise to score in the market. Smart brands build a strong emotion around their products, and, cash on that emotion!  

If you own a strong brand that creates value in your consumers lives, come right in!

At, thestoriespeople.com, we believe that for a brand to be really successful, the consumer has to talk for you, not your advertising. 

At TSP we work with you very closely to identify, curate, and, bring to life the stories that remain under the surface for want to effort. These are the real conversations that need to be brought out and shared with the world. That is when your brand gets talked about, generates chatter and gets the credibility that no money can buy.

Once we've identified the stories, the voices, we create communities that add to your brand's success. Be it videos, blogs, magazines, newspapers, television... we work across platforms, across languages, across mediums... with one, and one view only: to get your brand to be in the centre of it all!

In a nutshell, you sell the product, we sell your story!

Name: WORKFLO AND CO
Description:
WORKFLO AND CO c’est l’histoire de deux passionnés d’image et de son. 
Lorsque WORKFLO AND CO a été créé, l’objectif était simple : rendre la communication accessible pour toutes les entreprises et créer l’impact !

Nos compétences dans le domaine de la production audiovisuelle nous permettent de proposer divers services de communication comme la production audio et vidéo, la publicité cinématographique, la stratégie et l’accompagnement à l’animation de réseaux sociaux afin de garantir votre empreinte digitale. 
Nous proposons des solutions créatives et sur mesure pour encourager les entreprises à se démarquer et à atteindre leurs objectifs de communication. Nous sommes prêts à relever les défis et vous accompagner dans la réalisation de vos projets les plus ambitieux, donner vie à vos idées et faire passer un message à votre public cible.
Grâce à nos process, notre écoute active et notre collaboration étroite avec nos clients, nous créons des solutions adaptées aux besoins de nos partenaires.

WORKFLO AND CO ne participe pas uniquement au développement de votre communication. Nous tenons également à vous garantir ce qui est l'essence même de notre projet en vous proposant avant tout des émotions à partager avec vos collaborateurs, vos partenaires et toutes les personnes qui ont toujours cru en vous et soutenu dans vos projets ainsi que vos clients actuels et surtout vos clients à venir. 
Notre équipe WORKFLO AND CO sait que l'image crée des émotions et que ces émotions sont l’atout capital pour garantir le rayonnement de votre entreprise.

Notre offre : réalisation de vidéos, podcasts, sites web vitrines, animation des réseaux sociaux, accompagnement à l'utilisation des outils numériques.

  The world class podcast “Life The Battlefield” was launched with the intention to assist those who want to change lives. Through interviews with my guests we equip you with tools and strategies to reach and exceed your full potential.

Name: C2H Connection
Description:
C2H quer dizer “Connect-to-Human”. E o “Connection” completa a frase.

Assim nasceu nosso grupo: o C2H Connection foi formado por pessoas que, em um primeiro momento, se uniram virtualmente pela tecnologia, e depois decidiram trazer suas ideias, visão de mundo, e prática, para o mundo “real”.

Somos um trio: uma terapeuta floral que tem na bagagem uma visão humana diferenciada e um olhar incomum sobre seus pacientes, um professor de língua inglesa que ensina mais do que apenas uma nova língua aos seus alunos com muita criatividade e irreverência, e um profissional da área de negócios e M&A que, mais do que números, assim como os demais membros do grupo, gosta sobretudo de gente!

Entendemos que é possível criar conexão humana em qualquer área, formando parcerias e fazendo networking real.

Fazemos isto de forma natural e com a experiência e bagagem de vários anos empreendendo. 

Buscamos trazer expertise e conexão humana, independente do ramo de atuação.

Nosso objetivo é gerar conteúdo e discussões de qualidade através do nosso canal de podcast, dos nossos posts aqui e no Instagram e também na vida real. 

Se quiser contar com a gente para ajudar sua empresa em palestras, simpósios sobre conexão humana e sobre negócios, dê um alô! Será um prazer ajudar.

Name: Xtra Magazine

Xtra Magazine is one of the world’s leading LGBTQ2S online publications. Founded in Toronto in 1984 by Pink Triangle Press, the independent, queer-run media company, Xtra is an award-winning digital magazine and community platform covering queer and trans politics, culture, sex, relationships and health. Through longform features, essays, explainers, video documentaries and podcasts—we engage and inspire our audiences to create a more just, free and inclusive world.

Xtra is the editorial core of Pink Triangle Press (PTP), Canada’s largest LGBT publisher, and a mission-driven organization. PTP has an acclaimed history of creating journalism that matters since 1971, when it quickly established its influence, and a loyal readership, in the emerging gay and lesbian communities in Canada and other English-speaking nations.

Dizi ve film izlemeyi seven, bu konular hakkında yazma tutkusu olan ve ileri düzeyde İngilizce bilen arkadaşlarımızdan oluşan ekibimiz, sektördeki en güncel haberleri ve incelemeleri sizlerle buluşturmayı görev edinmiştir.

Ekibimize katılabilir ya da sadık okuyucularımızdan biri olabilirsiniz. Her iki durumda da desteğiniz bizim için çok değerli. Yayın politikamızın temelinde samimiyet yatmakta olup, Ekranom olarak internet dünyasının en hızlı, en güvenilir ve en sevilen sitesi olma yolunda sizlerin desteğiyle ilerlemeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: Nomadic Matt
Description:
After a trip to Thailand in 2005, Matt decided to quit his job, finish his MBA, and head off into the world. His original trip was supposed to last a year. Over a decade (and nearly 100 countries) later, he is still out roaming the world. He scuba dived in Fiji, was a poker player in Amsterdam, taught English in Thailand, got lost in a jungle in Central America, and broke down in the middle of Australia's outback.

He’s the author of many books, most notably the New York Times bestseller, How to Travel the World on $50 a Day. His writings and advice have been featured in The New York Times, CNN, The Guardian UK, Lifehacker, Budget Travel, BBC, Time, Yahoo! Finance and countless other publications. He also regularly speaks at travel trade and consumer shows, led yearly group tours worldwide, and launched a non-profit called FLYTE, which sends students overseas to bring their classroom experience to life. He is also the founder of the travel media school, Superstar Blogging, and of the TravelCon travel media conference. When not traveling the world, he lives in Austin.

Join our global platform:
www.thenomadicnetwork.com

Discover travel resources, guidebooks, budget travel tips, and more:

Name: My CM Mag (Le Tonton des CM)
Description:
Bienvenue dans l’univers délirant de 𝗠𝘆 𝗖𝗠 𝗠𝗮𝗴 !

Qu’est-ce qui fait de notre blog une pépite ? Attendez, accrochez-vous bien. Ici, on ne se contente pas de partager des infos, on les transforme en aventures. On est les ninjas de la stratégie, les artistes du digital, et les détectives des tendances. Rien que ça.

Imaginez un endroit où chaque astuce vous donne un superpouvoir, chaque conseil vous fait dire "Ah, mais c’est génial !" et chaque nouveauté est une révélation. Oui, c’est aussi excitant que ça en a l’air.

Chez nous, apprendre, c’est une fête (et pas le genre où on reste dans son coin). On vous plonge au cœur des secrets du community management, on décode les mystères du marketing digital, et on vous fait explorer l’univers fascinant de l’entrepreneuriat en ligne.

Pas de jargon à rallonge ni de blabla inutile. Juste du concret, du croustillant et parfois, un petit twist d’humour parce qu’on aime ça. Et pour les curieux, on teste des outils qui changent vraiment la donne, histoire de vous éviter des heures de recherches.

Alors, prêts à embarquer pour une aventure digitale pas comme les autres ? 𝗠𝘆 𝗖𝗠 𝗠𝗮𝗴, c’est le point de départ d’un voyage où vous apprendrez, sourirez et, qui sait, peut-être changerez votre façon de voir le web. On vous attend !

Description:
We are the leading provider of information, consulting services, and events to the global fresh fruit and vegetable industry, helping it to learn, prosper and build a better future.

Get to know our different divisions:

⇨ Through our online portals PortalFruticola.com, FreshFruitportal.com and ChinaFreshPortal.com, we operate the leading news sites in the fresh fruit and vegetable industry worldwide, with an audience of more than 5.5 million readers every year. 

⇨ Vision Fruticola is the first magazine focused on the fruit export industry in Chile and Peru. Its main goal is to provide strategic analysis and information about the latest trends to executives in the fruit export market. 

⇨ Global Cherry Summit has positioned itself as the most important event for the cherry industry worldwide.  

⇨ Agricultural Water Summit, will be a meeting point not only for the agricultural industry and related entities in Chile, but also for international experts who will come together to share their experience in the use of innovative techniques and farm management styles to limit the impacts of drought on horticultural operations.

⇨ Global Grape Summit took place in the U.K. capital in 2019 brought together over 300 key industry players from six continents, demonstrating the importance of an event like this to bring decision makers together to analyze ways to boost grape consumption and move the industry forward.

⇨ Consulting & Research is specialized in analysis and research of markets at a global level. It is also dedicated to supporting and facilitating the positioning of international companies in the fresh produce industry around the world.

⇨ AgroGigante is the first online market platform for agriculture in Chile, delivering solutions to small and large producers, with competitive prices and with just a click.

Name: Curiosity Shots
Description:
News Designed To Go Beyond The Headlines.
 

Curiosity Shots is an innovative news forum designed to generate thought-provoking dialogue. Rather than being another outlet focused on ‘Breaking News,’ dramatization, and sensationalism–we intend to revitalize and reimagine relevant and overlooked topics. In exploring an extensive range of subjects from diverse global perspectives, our outlet bridges cultural divides; enabling current and critical communication.

Our writers include the likes of students, members of the working public, elite journalists, celebrities, and artists. We are fostering a community that includes people from all walks of life in order to best authenticate our stories. Until all voices are heard–not just the media, financial, and political elites–division will persist. As such, we ensure inclusivity. We involve all people, whatever their story may be, in the conversation being had here, under one roof. 


Educational Content Created To Inspire.
 

In an age defined by our ability to interact with the entire known cosmos with a mere touch of a tablet, all citizens have become perpetual students. It is for this reason that we believe the time has arrived to introduce a reinvigorated model of education. One that not only meets the demands of our time but pioneers advancements by integrating technology into the learning process.

The assembly line model of education that is adopted, to this day, was designed to produce factory workers for an export-oriented economy. This is why students are force-fed information via a ‘one-size-fits-all’ approach. There is little to no consideration for individual differences or what it means to truly, actively learn. Curiosity Shots offers an alternative with new, stimulating, video-based educational content designed to create lifelong learners.

يقدم البودكاست أنس أبو دعابس - محاضر، مستشار تسويقي لشركات تقنيات وميسّر ذو خبرة لأحداث وبرامج تقنية.

Name: Brand Zone
Description:
L’influence n’est plus un outil. C’est une culture, une économie, un langage.

Chez Brand Zone, on observe, on analyse et on raconte les stratégies qui façonnent cet écosystème, où les marques et les créateurs redéfinissent ensemble les codes de la communication.

Les créateurs ne sont plus seulement des talents. Ils sont devenus des marques, des médias et des leviers d’attention capables d’orienter les comportements.

Les marques, elles, réinventent leurs stratégies pour exister dans un univers fragmenté, où l’audience se construit désormais au croisement des plateformes, des communautés et des contenus.

Dans un monde saturé, Brand Zone apporte une lecture claire et stratégique de l’influence, en reliant les intentions des marques, la créativité des talents et les attentes des audiences.

Analyses, portraits, enquêtes, interviews. Nous révélons les mécaniques, les coulisses et les tendances qui transforment l’influence en culture.

Name: Industrial Inc.
Description:
Industrial is a digital workshop located in Ottawa, ON incorporated in 2000. We build websites and web applications, and have a strong passion for combining user-centric design with modern technology.

We have been in operation for over 20 years with a primary focus on the not-for-profit and national/provincial association sectors. Our full-time staff of project managers, UX designers, and web developers are among the best in Canada for deploying effective online solutions within these sectors.

We thrive on projects that require tight integration with external software or services. We have expert-level knowledge of API and web service frameworks, and a typical project sees us integrating with a variety of external database systems such as membership databases, or 3rd party software solutions via their API’s.

Industrial’s team are experts at membership data solutions. We are the developers of an innovative membership data platform called Wicket.io, giving us years of experience in understanding how non profit organizations store and manage their data. Additionally, we regularly consult with associations on the best data platforms for their membership data needs, including the evaluation of CRM platforms.

We have carved out unique experience in the deployment of powerful on-site search capabilities with our website projects. We focus on large, information-heavy websites. Key to findability of content for users is a robust search utility, and Industrial are experts at deploying such utilities including indexing of PDF content, search facets to quickly refine results, and intelligent search assistance and results.

At THC, we filter for quality. We unpack stories about the ever-changing digital economy. Specifically, the things that will matter in the coming years, and the things that have evolved from the past.

Description:
