Il sito nasce con l’obiettivo di sfruttare al massimo il potenziale di certificati e derivati tramite analisi e valutazioni assolutamente indipendenti, sul mercato e sui singoli prodotti, per creare trasparenza e performance per l’investitore.

Il nostro obiettivo è quello di contribuire alla crescita del mercato dei derivati in Italia attraverso lo sviluppo e alla diffusione dei nostri prodotti editoriali: la newsletter denominata Certificate Journal, il certificato del giorno e il sito web istituzionale www.certificatiederivati.it. 

Certificati e Derivati, attraverso i suoi principali mezzi di informazione contribuisce fattivamente alla crescita formativa degli investitori e fornisce agli emittenti e ai professionisti del settore (private banker, promotori finanziari e consulenti) uno strumento essenziale di lavoro day-by-day.  

La nostra newsletter, oggi in partnership con Finanza On Line, raggiunge gratuitamente ogni settimana oltre centomila iscritti. Settimanalmente il Certificate Journal viene pubblicato nella sezione di Yahoo Finance sito dal quale è possibile effettuare il download di tutti i numeri.

jewbuzz s’est imposé comme un média de référence, grâce à des formats originaux, des événements emblématiques et des produits exclusifs.

1er média de divertissement juif, jewbuzz est devenu une véritable plateforme culturelle, rassemblant aujourd’hui un public large, engagé et diversifié — bien au-delà de sa communauté d’origine.

Aujourd’hui, jewbuzz parle à tout le monde : aux jeunes comme aux familles, à ceux qui scrollent comme à ceux qui entreprennent, tous réunis par le même plaisir de rire, de découvrir et de partager.

Bien plus qu’un média, jewbuzz est devenu un lien entre les générations. À travers son humour, son ton libre et sa créativité, il raconte le monde d’aujourd’hui tout en célébrant les traditions, les histoires et les valeurs qui continuent de nous rassembler.

Description:
At Carryology, we explore better ways to carry.

We share insights, ideas and inspiration about bags, luggage, wallets and other goods that help you carry, with the hope that you can keep the things that are most precious to you close by when you go out to conquer the world.

By knowing the best ways to carry, we can roam more freely and explore more voraciously. We can have the comfort that comes from always being able to put your hand on exactly what you need at the critical moment. And we can do it all without straps cutting into us, bulk weighing us down, or weirdly placed pockets hiding our keys.

So come join the conversation, and find your best way to carry what you need to traverse the road ahead...

Name: Voices City
Description:
Voices City is a cutting-edge freelance marketplace that connects businesses and individuals with top-notch voice-over talent from around the world. Our platform provides a seamless and efficient way for clients to find and hire the perfect voice-over artist for their project, whether it's for a commercial, audiobook, explainer video, or any other type of audio content.
At Voices City, we understand that finding the right voice-over talent can be a daunting task, especially for those who are new to the industry. That's why we've made it our mission to simplify the process and make it as easy as possible for clients to connect with talented and experienced voice-over artists.
Our platform offers a wide range of features, including the ability to search and filter voice-over artists by language, accent, tone, and more. Clients can listen to samples of an artist's work, read their bios and reviews, and communicate directly with them to ensure that they're the right fit for the job.
Whether you're a small business owner looking to create a radio ad or a video producer in need of a voice-over for your latest project, Voices City is the perfect place to find the talent you need. With our simple and user-friendly platform, you can quickly and easily connect with the best voice-over artists in the business, all while enjoying the convenience of working with a freelancer on your terms.
Thank you for considering Voices City for your voice-over needs. We look forward to helping you bring your projects to life with the perfect voice-over talent.

Name: Diario El Ciudadano & la gente / elciudadanoweb
Description:
Los medios de comunicación tradicionales como la radio, prensa y televisión están sufriendo cambios muy fuertes en la denominada era de la información.
Siempre los medios masivos de comunicación juegan un papel muy importante en la opinión pública (muchas veces conocido como el cuarto poder).
Pero pleno siglo XXI el periodismo tradicional esta sufriendo cambios, que no todos los periodistas, están dispuestos a enfrentar.

El Periodismo Digital se puede relacionar en forma directa como una Comunidad virtual. A que llamamos “Comunidad virtual”. A aquella comunidad cuyos vínculos, interacciones y relaciones tienen lugar no en un espacio físico sino en un espacio virtual como Internet.

AGC Communication è in grado di fornire analisi di rischio paese, analisi dei mercati esteri, previsioni di scenari geopolitici e geoeconomici, utilizzando la metodologia OSINT, Open Source Intelligence e SOCMINT, Social Media Intelligence, con team ad hoc composti da giornalisti e analisti internazionali. Notizie on line: www.agcnews.eu

Description:

Through 𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐥, 𝐢𝐧-𝐝𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐡 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐲 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐦𝐞𝐝𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐡 𝐧𝐞𝐰𝐬, and 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫-𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐛𝐮𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬, MTI provides timely reporting and analysis on the technologies, processes, and regulations shaping the healthcare industry. Name: Women of the Middle East Podcast
Description:
The Women of The Middle East Podcast presents the multiplicity of women's voices and relates the realities of Arab women & their diverse experiences.

The podcast is available on:
Apple Podcasts | Audible | Castos | Google Podcasts | Spotify | Amazon | Youtube

About the Host: 

Dr Amal Al Malki is a Qatari scholar, educator, public speaker, social commentator and advocate of women’s rights and gender equality. Dr Amal is the Founding Dean of the College of Humanities and Social Sciences at Hamad bin Khalifa University in Qatar Foundation. Prior to that, she was the Executive Director of the Translation and Interpreting Institute, which she founded in 2011.

Dr Al Malki holds a PhD in Comparative Literature from the University of London – SOAS, where she also earned a Master’s degree in English-Arabic Applied Linguistics and Translation. In 2012, Dr Amal published her book titled Arab Women in Arab News: Old Stereotypes and New Media, which was lauded as the first comprehensive study of the topic in the world.  Dr. Al-Malki’s research interests include the negotiation of identity between East and West, media representations of Arab women and postcolonial literature. 

As Dr Al Malki’s focus is on women’s rights and Arab identity, she strives to help deepen international understanding of Qatar and its evolving place in the world. In 2020, she launched the “Women of the Middle East Podcast” to create a feminist narrative by a Qatari scholar covering women of the middle east and building new areas of knowledge and activism that will enable women to be empowered.

Name: JTA
Description:
JTA is the definitive, trusted global source of breaking news and analysis on issues of Jewish interest and concern. We are a not-for-profit organization that prides itself on producing independent and high-quality journalism. Our reporting reflects the wide spectrum of religious, political and cultural identity within the Jewish community.

We keep Jews and Jewish communities worldwide informed and connected, with correspondents in New York, Washington, Jerusalem, and dozens of other cities around the globe. Our reporting provides extensive coverage of political, economic and social developments affecting Jews in North and South America, Israel, Europe, Africa and Australia.  JTA reporting also shines a spotlight on the cultural happenings, influential thinkers and leaders, and milestone events that are defining the Jewish experience today.

In addition to our premier websites, readers can access JTA content directly through a number of products. JTA also serves as an international news, feature and photo service for more than 100 Jewish publications and websites worldwide that depend on JTA for Jewish news outside of their local community.

Since its founding in 1917, JTA has earned its reputation for journalistic integrity, outstanding reporting and insightful analysis. Over the years, the Jewish community has come to rely on JTA as the single most credible source of news and analysis available about events and issues of Jewish interest anywhere in the world.

Headquartered in New York, JTA is a not-for-profit corporation governed by an independent Board of Directors. It has no allegiance to any specific branch of Judaism or political viewpoint. We receive funding from an array of sources.

Name: Mongabay-Indonesia
Description:
Tentang
Mongabay.co.id adalah sebuah proyek dari Mongabay.com, situs web tentang ilmu lingkungan yang populer dan berita konservasi yang dimulai pada tahun 1999 oleh Rhett A. Butler.

Mongabay.co.id diluncurkan dan beroperasi sejak April 2012 untuk meningkatkan minat terhadap alam dan kesadaran masyarakat terhadap masalah lingkungan di Indonesia. Mongabay.co.id memiliki fokus khusus pada hutan, tetapi juga menyediakan berita, analisis, dan informasi lain yang berhubungan dengan lingkungan.

Misi Mongabay

Mongabay memiliki misi untuk meningkatkan pemahaman publik dunia tentang beragam kekuatan skala global yang dapat merusak sistem kesehatan ekologi Bumi. Mongabay membuat pesan sains dapat diakses oleh publik, sekaligus mengangkat pula suara masyarakat tingkat tapak yang terkena dampak langsung perubahan lingkungan.

Mongabay adalah organisasi media nirlaba independen yang memiliki misi untuk melaporkan perubahan tantangan alam dan planet melalui jejaring jurnalis lokal/global. Mongabay melayani audiens yang berbeda dengan menyediakan akses cuma-cuma ke beragam berita dan informasi dalam berbagai format dan bahasa, yang bertujuan untuk mengatasi kesenjangan pengetahuan dan meningkatkan transparansi.

Dengan mengungkap bukti perusakan ekosistem dan konsekuensinya bagi masyarakat yang terdampak di berbagai belahan dunia, Mongabay membuka  kesempatan bagi publik untuk meminta pertanggungjawaban dari para pihak yang bertanggungjawab.

Sekilas mengenai Mongabay.com

Sejak tahun 1999, Mongabay.com telah menjadi salah satu situs utama berbasis internet untuk berita, analisa dan informasi mengenai hutan tropis. Situs ini dikunjungi lebih dari dua juta pengunjung setiap bulannya, yang membuatnya menjadi salah satu tujuan situs yang “the most visited eco-focused” di internet.

Mongabay.com telah ditampilkan di San Francisco Chronicle, majalah Time, The Wall Street Journal, serta publikasi lokal, nasional, dan internasional lainnya. Mongabay.com telah diakui sebagai sumber inf

Description:

Inicialmente intitulado Mundo Asperger (em referência à Síndrome de Asperger), é um projeto idealizado pelo jornalista e escritor Victor Mendonça e pela jornalista, radialista e escritora Selma Sueli Silva, que são mãe e filho, ambos diagnosticados com Transtorno do Espectro Autista (TEA).

Lançado com o intuito de que nenhuma família se sentisse sozinha como a dupla se percebeu um dia. Hoje, o portal tem o objetivo de expandir o trabalho de levar informação e inclusão à sociedade, além da interação com seguidores em todo o Brasil. Desde  2019, o site deixou de ser um portal independente e passou a fazer parte do Portal UAI, dos Diários Associados, por meio do concurso “Você no Uai”, promovido pelo veículo.

Name: Ananke Magazine
Description:
Ananke is a new media & development platform creating inclusive conversations in the digital realm. It was launched in 2014 initially as a digital media entity documenting women's achievements, showcasing them as role models for aspiring women and girls to emulate. Ananke has evolved into a forum that aims to highlight issues across the Global South under a gender lens. 

The platform also publishes special editions on the ISSUU platform (http://issuu.com/anankemag).

Ananke’s flagship program, Empower, is a digital fellowship launched in 2016. The program has trained and mentored more than 100 girls from all over the world including Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Malawi, Cameroon, Morocco, Pakistan, India, the UAE, Bangladesh, Belarus, China, Russia, Australia, Bahamas and more. 

In 2021, Ananke organized the groundbreaking Ananke Women in Literature Festival (AnankeWLF) - a digital literary event opening dialogue focusing the literary and publishing landscapes across MENA and South Asian regions.  With eminent literary and publishing figures including Zubaan Books' Urvashi Butalia, Seagull Books' Naveen Kishore and Neem Tree Press' Archna Sharma as advisors, Ananke established the collective Ananke Women in Literature Foundation to continue the conversations, which are initiated in the festival (held successfully on a yearly basis).
All sessions organized under the AnankeWLF umbrella can be viewed on Ananke's YouTube Page: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOKaCUpgf3kaUOe5ZY6XBIw

Ananke has been nominated twice by the World Summit on Information Society Prizes (2019 & 2020) for its digitally inclusive work on gender. Ananke is a Generation Equality Commitment Maker.

Sell My Group is the UK’s number one specialist park industry portal for buying a park home, lodge or static caravan.
Specialists in our field, the Sell My Group have helped thousands of happy customers - people just like you - buy a park homes or holiday home in desirable and prime locations across the UK. From coast to country, we have got the park industry covered.
Our professional and dynamic range of services has been developed to meet each individual client’s needs. So, whether you are looking to buy a park home or a holiday home, or you are a park operator, we are here to help.

We are Recommended
The Sell My Group is recommended by some of the largest manufacturers in the industry. These manufacturers include Omar Park and Leisure Homes, Wessex Park Homes and Red Rose Park Homes. The Sell My Group has grown into the UK’S number one park industry property portal.

Discover the Sell My Group experience
At Sell My Group, we are passionate about promoting the park and holiday home style of living. And we go the extra mile to ensure our customers don’t just buy through us but enjoy the Sell My Group experience - a straightforward, hassle-free and powerful range of services, all driven by our desire to promote and support the park industry.

As industry enthusiasts, we understand when people decide to buy a home, they are usually looking forward to a relaxing retirement, a tranquil holiday retreat or a luxury, low maintenance home in a safe, secure and friendly community. We market homes to meet all these needs and many more.
Sell My Group Operates Nationwide
Wherever you are - or want to be - Sell My Group can help. We operate nationwide, from London to Looe, from Blackpool to Bournemouth and from Hastings to Harrogate. Our services have been developed to meet the needs of every type of customer involving any location. .

Name: Innovation Time
Description:
Innovation Time est une association étudiante active sur les campus universitaires du canton de Vaud. L’objectif principal de l’association est d’amener une cohésion entre le monde entrepreneurial et estudiantin.

Innovation Time souhaite être un vecteur de rapprochement entre les étudiants des différents campus. Nous voulons faciliter les échanges et la diversification des compétences et sommes persuadés que les projets innovants naissent de la rencontre de profils multiples et variés !

Les trois comités de Genève, Lausanne et Neuchâtel, formés d'étudiants passionnés par l’esprit entrepreneurial, ont pour objectif de faire partager les valeurs qui les animent, à savoir : une approche pragmatique, la créativité, la multidisciplinarité, le partage, le leadership et l’ambition ! Ces valeurs, qui encouragent l’intégration des étudiants dans le monde passionnant des startups, sont aussi de formidables moteurs dans la vie de tous les jours. Chaque membre d’Innovation Time peut apporter sa touche à l’association, et c’est là que réside notre richesse principale !

À travers ses articles, Innovation Time souhaite intéresser les étudiants de Suisse romande à l’entrepreneuriat. Nous sommes heureux de voir les projets romands prendre forme et perdurer ! Durant cette nouvelle année académique, l’association s’emploiera à développer des interviews et aftermovies sur notre site internet. Nous sommes conscients qu’un média doit avoir du contenu à la fois écrit et vidéo.

Donner la parole aux jeunes entrepreneurs afin qu’ils partagent leur vécu est notre objectif, nous désirons qu’ils partagent avec les étudiants leurs expériences et conseils ! Plus qu’un « média de masse » Innovation Time se veut être un média avec du contenu sélectionné rigoureusement par nos membres. Nous privilégions toujours une information qualitative à une information quantitative.

Feel Entrepreneurship

Description:
The core team around the brand first came together in 2018 under the Tadaima Japan banner, a travel-focused website produced by combrains, a company dedicated to the revitalization of rural Japan.

Then came the 2020 COVID-19 pandemic, which decimated Japan’s inbound travel industry. Instead of disbanding the Tadaima Japan team, combrains pressed forward with a new vision, and Kokoro Media was born. True to its namesake, this new website explored the heart of Japan through interviews, cultural essays, and language learning advice.

As post-pandemic Japan continues to evolve, so too does Kokoro Media. Now a Saga Consulting brand, we have a new vision: to create a network that shines light on talented yet under-exposed Japan-focused writers.

Name: jobblitz.de | Jobblitz GmbH
Description:
Finding jobs in online job exchanges even without studying or training - is that possible? With jobblitz.de, the job exchange for people who do it. We do not only have interesting job offers for applicants who have completed their vocational training. Everyone can find work that suits them at jobblitz.de - trained specialists as well as unskilled workers and career changers.

Jobblitz.de has a wide range of vacancies, especially in sectors where there is an acute shortage of staff. For example, anyone who works in the trade or in the technical field will find numerous jobs for car mechanics, mechatronics and service technicians on our portal. The demand for plumbers, fitters as well as production assistants and drivers is also increasing steadily.

Committed employees are also in great demand in the healthcare sector. There are job offers here for nursing assistants as well as for trained nurses and geriatric nurses.

Job advertisements on jobblitz.de save time, money and nerves: Employers benefit from our specially developed BlitzLink technology, which makes it possible to publish vacancies on our portal with just one click.

Waiting times for the job advertisement to go live are a thing of the past with jobblitz.de. Our goal: to fill vacancies with the right applicants as quickly as possible. That is why we forego unnecessary additional services and concentrate on the essential success factors to bring applicants and companies together.

Employers can find more information about placing their job advertisements at www.jobblitz.de.

We are here to open doors for artists, business, knowledge, positivity and many other things. We are heaven sent. We are here to make premium music shine. We are here to build.

We are an online station yet we want to be close that gap opened by the same community radio stations that are based in the community yet they don’t serve you. We want you feel like we are based in your community!!! We want you to think of coming to us be it you have good or bad news to share.

What do we mean when we saying we want to close the gap?

On all our social networks accounts please feel free to post if you need any form of help. Be it you want to know how you can get learner ships, you need a place to rent, you have a place to rent out, you want to compliment us or your boss, you want to share information regarding an accident that has taken place where you are at that time in point, you need advice on a legal matter or you know of a certain company that’s hiring/ looking for people to fill vacant posts please share.

Positive Minds Radio our mission is simple to give people premium radio and premium music. 
What is premium radio? One might ask? Tune in and you will hear.

What is premium music?

Premium music is the music that all these other radio station don’t not playing for you that we will play. Premium music is that music you don't just leave in the CD rack to be held by any visitor. Premium music is that music that you share with those special friends that collect music as well. Premium is that music when you hear it plays you become at piece, you become whole that void becomes filled. That is premium music.
When it comes to music here on Positive Minds Radio we will be playing only the following genres:-

*Jazz *Smooth Jazz *Neo-Soul *R&B *Soul *Pop *Afro Pop *Afro Jazz.

We are unique like that.

Name: Live From The Southside
Description:
Live from the Southside is a Southside San Antonio, Texas-based woman-owned lifestyle and travel publication and platform. We cover diverse topics, including business, events, education, wellness, and non-profit organizations.

Launched in 2020 during the Covid pandemic, initially, we began highlighting the vibrant, diverse culture and people of Southside San Antonio. With a steadily growing and influential audience, Live from the Southside attracted some of the most engaged and active individuals connecting our San Antonio community to a national audience to improve and expand community relationships.

Our readers always seek new opportunities and adventures, making our platform the perfect avenue for businesses, organizations, and individuals to connect with this motivated audience and forge lasting relationships. 85% of our readership resides in Texas, 55% are men, and 45% are women from ages 18-65 years old.

Our mission is clear: Through the power of storytelling, we bring you inspiring narratives that shine a spotlight on individuals and enterprises making a real difference in the city of San Antonio, as well as captivating tales from across Texas and the entire nation.

Stay up-to-date with the latest news and events happening on the Southside and beyond by subscribing to the digital version of Live from the Southside Magazine for free via email every month at https://bit.ly/3oHLCye. 

Find us @SouthsideSATX on Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, and Twitter for daily updates and exclusive behind-the-scenes glimpses into the incredible happenings within our community. For PR and media inquiries, please contact us at livefromthesouthside@gmail.com.

Name: Nolwenn News
Description:
𝗕𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘂𝗲 𝘀𝘂𝗿 𝗡𝗼𝗹𝘄𝗲𝗻𝗻 𝗡𝗲𝘄𝘀 !
Nous sommes LA plateforme digitale 100 % dédiée au droit de la famille.

 Créé en 2024, nous sommes un média spécialisé sur tous les thèmes touchant de près ou de loin le droit de la famille : des plus courants comme le divorce, la séparation et les questions de pension alimentaire, en passant par l’adoption, les successions et les litiges familiaux en tout genre, et bien plus encore.


 La plateforme née sous l’impulsion de l’avocate Nolwenn Leroux, 20 d’expérience en droit de la famille et du patrimoine à Paris (Cabinet Soa) et praticienne des modes amiables.

Nolwenn part du constat que les informations sur le droit de la famille disponibles sur internet sont souvent difficiles à comprendre et/ou obsolètes : 

“Je me suis demandé comment les gens pouvaient s'informer efficacement sans avoir fait 5 ans de droit.”

Nolwenn News est née de la volonté de fournir des contenus clairs, pertinents et à jour, accessibles à tous, car chacun de nous est susceptible de se poser des questions sur le droit de la famille à un moment donné.

 𝗡𝗼𝘂𝘀 𝘀𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗲𝘀 𝘀𝘂𝗿 𝘁𝗼𝘂𝘀 𝗹𝗲𝘀 𝗿é𝘀𝗲𝗮𝘂𝘅 𝘀𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗮𝘂𝘅 !  
Retrouvez des articles, les actus, des vidéos explicatives, infographies, fiches pratiques et bien d’autres formats directement depuis votre téléphone.

En Datosmacro encontrarás las series históricas de los principales datos de macroeconomía publicados en cada país. Paro (desempleo y datos trimestrales de la encuesta de población activa,EPA), PIB, IPC, SMI, tipos de interés de los bancos centrales, tipos de referencia de las hipotecas, deuda pública, déficit, prima de riesgo, divisas, materias primas, población, tasa de natalidad, mortalidad, demografía, etc,

Nuestra vocación es poder ofrecer la información macroeconómica y socio-demográfica  de forma comparable de todos los países.

Najděte svého právníka
V online databázi NAJDI PRÁVNÍKA si můžete vybrat právního experta podle svých potřeb a podle vámi zadaných kritérií. Na natočených videoprofilech uvidíte jejich projev a chování. Propojení obrazu, zvuku a užitečného obsahu je zejména v dnešní době velmi důležité, protože „kdo nemá tvář, nemá hlas”.

Využívejte moderní technologie k rozvoji svého byznysu.

Name: Sécurité Partagée
Description:
Sécurité Partagée est avant tout une chaine YouTube qui propose des vidéos autours de la prévention des risques professionnel. 
Son concept : chercher à donner du sens à la sécurité au travail.

Je m'appelle Maëlle LOPEZ et mon métier c'est la prévention des risques professionnels. A l'aide de pédagogie et de vulgarisation, mon objectif est d'illustrer de façon la plus concrète possible ce qu'est concrètement la prévention des risques professionnels. Les vidéos abordent différentes thématiques autours de la prévention, des EPI (Equipements de Protection Individuel) et une meilleure compréhension des accidents.

Je suis convaincue que c'est en expliquant de façon claire que nous pouvons, tous ensemble, nous améliorer dans la prévention des risques professionnels.
 
Et n'oublie pas : la sécurité c'est comme ces vidéos, ça fonctionne bien mieux si c'est partagé ;o)

Alors rendez-vous sur YouTube, Instragram et LinkedIn pour profiter de tout le contenu.

Name: Merchant Fraud Journal
Description:
Merchant Fraud Journal is an independent and unbiased publication dedicated to empowering online sellers to greatly reduce the impact of eCommerce fraud on their businesses. Its core mission is to break the silos surrounding merchants’ internal fraud prevention processes by bringing together industry professionals to share their knowledge with one another.

The company was co-founded by two former fraud industry professionals at the forefront of using the “deep learning” AI currently powering eCommerce fraud protection models. Years of seeing how every industry and vertical struggles with similar online fraud problems convinced them that more needed to be done to encourage merchants to crowdsource knowledge of how to fight back.

Unfortunately, the technology and business process knowledge needed for online sellers to greatly reduce the impact of eCommerce fraud is scarcely available right now. There is no single forum and resource where merchants, payment professionals, and other industry professionals could go to get educated on the myriad of challenges they face.

We seek to fill that gap by being a resource that collects insight from industry thought leaders and fraud prevention tool experts on topics such as chargebacks, false positive declines, account takeover fraud, friendly fraud, data breaches and more. Our goal is to help honest businesses quickly understand their security options and take action, so they can get back to focusing on their core business activities.

Name: Beware
Description:
Beware est Webmagazine Français croisant musique, graphisme, art, mode, design, et bien plus encore.

Le concept a vu le jour en Janvier 2009, suite à l’initiative d’une équipe de jeunes créatifs liés par la volonté de partager ce qu’ils aiment.

Quotidiennement mis à jour, Beware n’est pas destiné à une classe d’âge particulière, le souhait éditorial est de plaire aux lecteurs curieux et soucieux d’en apprendre d’avantage sur les nouvelles tendances.

Beware pose un regard décalé sur les nouvelles cultures lifestyle et transmet les coups de cœurs des différents rédacteurs, cela permet un ton libre et une expression simple et précise sur les sujets exposés.

Les influences sont diverses, elles proviennent de l’enfance des rédacteurs ayant évolués dans les années 80/90, avec la naissance de la Street Culture, l’arrivée du HIP HOP en France, l’établissement des nouveaux arts graphiques, et courants musicaux évoluant au fil des modes et nouvelles technologies…

Name: Th3rd, a Snap inc. company
Description:
At Th3rd we believe scaling 3D content creation is going to be one of the biggest hurdles the fashion market will face in taking advantage of the next wave of digitization. Through our corporate solution 3DSaaS (https://3dsaas.com/) we give fashion brands & retailers the possibility to create 3D product twins at the push of a button. By using digital product twins throughout the value chain in different applications and use cases, we help brands to adapt cost and make each step of the chain more sustainable, faster and cheaper. 

We can digitize at scale (up to 50.000 items per year per scan solution) and on a location of choice. The brand only pays a fixed price per digital twin (3D model) and can choose the format and the quality level they want as output. The high resolution digital 3D models we deliver are fit to use in (digital) marketing, VR, AR, as holograms and serve as a Master file within your asset collection to create advertisement campaigns.

More on Th3rd & 3DSaaS
Th3rd is a company that specializes in creating high-quality digital twins of people and products. We help brands like Adidas and Vans to create 3D product twins at scale & give advice on different ways of optimizing their digital content strategy. Since the beginning in 2014 we've done numerous bespoke projects of 3D scanning products for advertisement campaigns, art projects, media and television. We've also digitized celebrities, such as soccer players Messi and Mbappé, cyclist Tom Dumoulin and DJ's Armin van Buuren and Hardwell.

Check out our 3D human avatar webshop: www.humanalloy.com to get a wide collection of 3D models for architectural visualizations.

Name: Landbouweekblad
Description:
Landbouweekblad dien ons boere en die landbou in die breë nou al ’n rapsie langer as ’n eeu. Toe ons destyds in 1919 as tydskrif die lig gesien het, was dit ’n poging om Afrikaner-bestaansboere, verarm deur die verwoesting van die Anglo-Boereoorlog, te kommersialiseer. En watter sukses was dit nie! Vandag word ons boere as van die beste ter wêreld beskou. 
Oor die jare heen het die landbou baie verander. Binne ’n eeu is osse en perde vervang deur reuse-ysters met ’n magdom digitale slimsensors wat alles dophou. Hommeltuie, genomika en gevorderde klimaatbeheer is alles deesdae so deel van ’n boer se lewe soos droogtes en donderstorms. En soos die bedryf wat ons bedien oor die jare verander het, so het Landbouweekblad ook aangepas. 
Voorheen net ’n tydskrif is Landbouweekblad vandag soveel meer. Daar is TV-reekse, ’n reeks spesiale tydskrifte, wat Boerekos, Suid-Afrika se grootste kostydskrif wat verkope betref, insluit, en landbouboeke deur die land se top-veeartse en kenners soos dr. Faffa Malan, prof. Hennie Snyman, Theo Vorster en die legendariese André Lund. 
Dan is daar webinare en konferensies, wat op ’n verskeidenheid platforms uitgesaai word. Nou, vir die eerste keer, jaag ons al ons produkte vir u gerief in een kraal hier op landbou.com. 
Vir net R149 per maand, soveel as wat net die tydskrif u in ’n maand sal kos, het u nou toegang tot Landbouweekblad se magdom produkte. Gaan kyk dus gerus na ’n Landbouweekliks-episode oor een van die land se topboere, of lees een van die verskeidenheid spesiale tydskrifuitgawes soos Vee, Tegnologie, Boereplanne of Herlewingslandbou.

Welcome to Risk Is Our Business, where we explore the principles of Governance, RiskManagement, and Compliance — to reliably achieving objectives, navigating uncertainty, and act with integrity.

Here, we follow the Prime Directive of Risk Management: No decision or strategy moves forward without understanding its impact on our objectives, our resilience, and our values. Because risk isn’t the enemy—it’s the mission.
And this is where we take it seriously.

After all, risk is our business.

Join us as we go boldly into the world of GRC.

Name: Cynical Stoner Podcast
Description:
There is a certain demographic who’s voices go unheard, despite the incredible value they can bring to conversations. 

As a 17 year veteran in the cannabis industry, Kristen Yoder has always had a soft spot for cannabis employees. Having managed cannabis businesses in nearly every sector, to consulting cannabis business owners, she created the CannaBS Detector podcast in 2018 to call out the insane amount of BS business owners were up against. 4 years later, she had grown tired of playing “Cassandra” to an industry more concerned with progress than its own well being, and decided to pivot. 

The Cynical Stoner podcast is the new pivot. No longer focused on BS business owners will deal with, she has now decided to pass the metaphorical mic to the EMPLOYEES of cannabis businesses. This industry has a bad habit of chewing up and spitting out passionate people, leaving them cynical, disillusioned and broke. 

We can’t fix the morale problem in the industry until we address it. This podcast is here to give cannabis employees an anonymous platform to share their perspectives, issues, and proposed solutions!

In order to maintain anonymity of the employees, there’s a guest form to fill out, that will be read on the show. Once a month, Kristen will invite on an HR professional, labor attorney or union leader to help come up with solutions for the everyday BS occurring in cannabis companies across the country.  

Whether you work in cannabis or not, there’s a lot to learn from the unspoken people in this new industry! Stay tuned!

Name: Les Ecoenthousiastes
Description:
Les Eco-enthousiastes c'est le premier podcast qui raconte les VRAIES HISTOIRES de transition écologique.

Aujourd’hui ce sont avant tout des histoires de transition radicale ou des reconversions pro dans la transition qui sont mises en avant. 
C’est inspirant, toutefois pour la majorité des gens, il est difficile de s’identifier, le fossé est trop grand.
Dans ce podcast ce sont les transitions du quotidien qui sont partagées de manière transparente pour que les freins au changement ne soient pas tabous.

L'objectif est que ces témoignages vivants soient des ressources pour lever les obstacles et que nos auditeurs se disent “si elle ou il l’a fait alors, vraiment, je peux le faire”.

Toutes les deux semaines vous y découvrirez : 
 Des parcours de vie, des déclics, des prises de conscience
 Des petits gestes, des grands changements
 Des épreuves, des difficultés et comment elles ont été dépassées

Vous souhaitez témoigner ? Avec grand plaisir pour vous accueillir sur notre podcast, envoyez nous un mail à podcast.lesecoenthousiastes@gmail.com et parlons-en !

Name: The Money Trench - The Music Industry Podcast with Mark Sutherland
Description:
The Money Trench (TMT) is The Music Industry Podcast from Mark Sutherland, exec producer Mike Walsh, Tape Notes and supported by PPL.
 
Each Monday, Mark dissects the biggest music industry news stories of the week, in the company of one of the industry’s most influential executives. Followed by a deep dive into that exec’s career in music, including their thoughts on where we’re at and where we’re heading.
 
There is also a weekly newsletter – featuring Mark's take on that week’s hottest stories and our latest episode, plus an exclusive heads-up on what’s coming up next.

If you’re wondering where the name The Money Trench comes from, it’s a reference to the classic Hunter S Thompson misquote about the music business being “a cruel and shallow money trench, a long plastic hallway where thieves and pimps run free and good men die like dogs” – before adding: “Of course, there’s also a negative side…”

TMT is here to look at all sides of the music business and celebrate the most exciting industry on the planet. Don’t start your music week without it.

TMT is supported by PPL, who are celebrating 90 years in business this year.
 
TMT supports Earth/Percent, the music industry’s climate foundation. Co-founded by Brian Eno, Earth/Percent works with scientists, researchers, and activists, to help the music industry support the most impactful climate organisations around the world. 
 
TMT is also supported by Aimless Play and Sennheiser microphones.
 
TMT’s production partner is Tape Notes and the podcast is exec produced by Mike Walsh.
 
TMT music is provided by Tom A Smith.

TMT logo design by Junkhead Studio.
 
For media inquiries, please contact Fourth Pillar.
 
Please contact mike@themoneytrench.com for guest suggestions and further info.

Name: Lanalhue Noticias
Description:
Lanalhue Noticas, nace como un "Diario Ciudadano" en el verano del 2001, según diversas investigaciones, estudios, tesis, papers y otros escritos, somos considerado como precursores y más antiguo de Chile en el género del "Periodismo Ciudadano".

Actualmente somos un Diario Provincial con noticias orientadas y/o de interés para la Provincia de Arauco, la región del Biobío – Chile, que se publica solo en formato digital y nos regimos por la Ley de Prensa vigente en el país.
Varias son las etapas que ha cumplido LANALHUE NOTICIAS considerando su permanentes mejoras, adaptaciones o actualizaciones que han dependido de cambios tecnológicos y modernizaciones del diseño y presentación más amigable para nuestros lectores.

La primera etapa, empieza cuando nace oficialmente nuestro diario, en el verano del año 2001. La segunda, a partir de fines del 2003, cuando se incorporan herramientas que permite una plena automatización en su publicación. Una Tercera, a partir de marzo de 2007, con una modernización de su edición, que incorpora múltiples elementos orientados a la participación ciudadana que permite clasificarnos con más propiedad como un DIARIO CIUDADANO.

Podríamos considerar como la penúltima etapa de nuestro Diario, la que comenzamos el año 2014, con un reconocimiento pleno de un "Medio de Comunicación Formal", reconocido y autorizado por las autoridades pertinentes que fiscalizan y controlan el cumplimiento de la Ley de Prensa, así pues, cada nota que publicamos debemos registrarlos en la Biblioteca Nacional (DIBAN). La última etapa, pudiendo haber otras en el futuro, es la que iniciamos al cumplir los 20 AÑOS, en el verano del año 2021, la que con un nuevo Diseño Gráfico, para mejor presentación en las diversas plataformas, creemos que es nuestra consolidación final.

Name: Le fil d'Agathe
Description:
Le Fil d’Agathe est le podcast qui tisse des liens autour de la pédagogie.
Chaque épisode explore les pratiques, les ressources et les inspirations qui nourrissent le travail des formateurs, enseignants et éducateurs.
Notre ambition :
-Valoriser l’expertise et la créativité des pédagogues.
-Mutualiser les savoirs et les outils.
-Donner des idées concrètes pour innover dans l’apprentissage.

Que vous soyez enseignant, formateur, éducateur, animateur ou simplement curieux du monde de la formation et de l’éducation, Le Fil d’Agathe vous accompagne avec des réflexions, des témoignages et des ressources pour faire évoluer vos pratiques.

Name: JornalismoPortoNet (JPN)
Description: O JPN-JornalismoPortoNet é um jornal multimédia de informação geral e atualização permanente, acompanhando a evolução das novas tecnologias de comunicação e pondo em prática as mais modernas técnicas de expressão jornalística na Internet. É um projeto da Licenciatura em Ciências da Comunicação da Universidade do Porto.

Name: Woof Studios
Description:
At Woof Studios, we are dedicated to fueling the growth of Africa’s vibrant creative economy. We specialize in partnering with creators across the continent, offering the tools, strategies, and connections needed to thrive on the global stage. From digital strategy and brand partnerships to content optimization and monetization, we provide tailored services that transform passion into sustainable success.

Our mission is to amplify African voices, showcasing the rich diversity, talent, and stories that Africa has to offer. By bridging the gap between local creativity and international markets, we empower creators to expand their reach, connect with global audiences, and unlock new revenue streams. Whether you’re an emerging talent or an established brand, we believe in the potential of every story and work tirelessly to bring those stories to the world.

Join us in shaping the future of the African creative industry—one story, one collaboration, and one opportunity at a time.

Name: El-Shai
Description:

Just like our name; We will be bringing you the “tea” like it is. Unfiltered and honest.

Name: Boğaziçi University Social Media Lab
Description: Boğaziçi University Social Media Lab, 2018 yılında Prof. Dr. V. Aslıhan Nasır ve Prof. Dr. Hande B. Türker tarafından kurulmuştur. SML'nin misyonu, sosyal medya dünyası ve sosyal ağlar ile ilgili çok çeşitli konularda araştırma yapmak ve bilgi birikimini geliştirmektir. Vizyonumuz, sosyal medyanın çeşitli davranışsal, psikolojik, sosyal ve işle ilgili yönlerini iş dünyası ve halkla birlikte araştıran, her detayı kucaklayan etkili bir akademik köprü olmaktır.

Name: Tomorrow's Bites
Description:
Food is a problem and this podcast is full of the people turning it into a solution.

Hosted by Andrés and Sjacco, Tomorrow’s Bites dives into the minds of the  farmers, founders, investors, chefs, and others rewriting how food is grown, made, financed, and shared.

Each episode opens their playbook, from farmers building resilient, regenerative food systems to founders creating sustainable, healthy food products, and from impact investing to scaling agrifood companies.

We uncover what actually works to farm resilient, nourish people, rebuild supply chains, and grow agrifood companies that last.

If you're building something in agifood, or want to understand those who are, this is your place.

Name: rabble.ca
Description:
rabble is an award-wininng innovator in media: non profit, paywall-free, reader-supported. rabble.ca was built on the efforts of journalists, progressive researchers and activists, artists and technology innovators across Canada and has a unique role of reporting on stories from civil society while providing a counterbalance to corporate-owned media. 

rabble.ca features some of the best new and emerging progressive voices in Canada. Keep up with the latest news in federal politics, labour news and social movement actions with rabble.
